We operationalize the measure with arithmetic coding, seed coding, and a fallback, and evaluate it in five settings: reversed text, chess moves, protein sequences, retrieval-augmented question answering, and semantic story compression; in all of them agentic components reduce codelength. These small, controlled experiments cover component types typical of real agentic systems, show that codelength can analyze how components, observers, and budgets change residual uncertainty, and offer guidance for evaluating real agent systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于压缩的智能度量方法，通过编码长度量化智能体系统的智能水平。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型正从独立预测器演变为包含工具调用、检索证据、多轮交互等的智能体系统，但缺乏统一的智能量化标准。现有方法难以评估不同组件对系统整体智能的贡献，需要一种可操作的理论框架。
light_analysis.method: 基于'压缩即智能'理念，将智能体系统强度定义为在固定任务分布、接口和计算预算下，重建目标对象所需的比特数。采用算术编码、种子编码和后备策略实现度量，在反转文本、国际象棋走法、蛋白质序列、检索增强问答和语义故事压缩五个场景中测试，涵盖真实智能体系统的典型组件。
light_analysis.result: 在五个设置中，智能体组件均显著减少编码长度，证明其提升了系统智能。实验表明编码长度可分析组件、观察者和预算对残余不确定性的影响，为评估真实智能体系统提供量化依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法为智能体系统智能提供了一种可操作的量化指标，通过压缩视角统一评估工具使用、检索、验证等组件。未来可扩展到更复杂的真实系统，但需注意计算预算和任务分布的限定条件。

title: Pulmonary Embolism Risk Stratification from CTPA and Medical Records: Vascular Graphs Are Not All You Need
abstract: Risk stratification for pulmonary embolism (PE) is critical for clinical decision-making. Stratification guidelines are based on patient medical records, parameters measured from computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), and blood tests. However, blood tests are often missing in routine practice. This work studies whether state-of-the-art models can accurately classify risk stratification from only medical records and biomarkers extracted from CTPA images. We benchmark different approaches to combine medical records and cardiac biomarkers with rich pulmonary vascular information; we add vascular biomarkers to tabular models and apply graph neural networks (GNNs) on the vascular tree's intrinsic graph representation. We use a private dataset (n=353) with uniquely complete data for PE risk stratification. Our results show that, among global features, medical records and cardiac biomarkers are the most significant predictors, while vascular biomarkers do not further improve stratification. Even more surprising, even GNNs on vascular graphs fail to outperform strong tabular baseline on global features. We consider hypotheses, on both models and data, that could explain this suboptimal performance. Our investigation suggests that, counter-intuitively, vascular graphs might hold no discriminative information for PE risk stratification. Code is available from https://github.com/creatis-myriad/GENESIS.
comment: 8 1/2 pages + 2 pages of references. Accepted for MICCAI 2026. This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this contribution is published in, and available online at, the external reference provided below

light_analysis.overview: 研究肺栓塞风险分层中，医疗记录和心脏生物标志物比血管图更关键，图神经网络也无法超越简单表格模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 肺栓塞风险分层对临床决策至关重要，标准指南需医疗记录、CTPA参数和血液测试，但血液测试常缺失。研究仅从医疗记录和CTPA生物标志物能否准确分类风险分层，并比较融合血管信息的方法，评估其必要性。
light_analysis.method: 使用私人数据集（n=353）包含完整数据。基准方法包括：将血管生物标志物加入表格模型，以及使用图神经网络处理血管树的图表示。比较这些方法与仅用全局特征（医疗记录和心脏生物标志物）的表格基线。
light_analysis.result: 全局特征中，医疗记录和心脏生物标志物是最重要的预测因子，血管生物标志物不进一步改善分层。甚至血管图上的GNN也未能超过基于全局特征的强表格基线。结果暗示血管图可能没有判别性信息。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，在肺栓塞风险分层中，血管图数据可能不提供额外有价值的信息，与直觉相反。未来需探索模型和数据方面的其他假设，代码已公开。

title: Overview of HIPE-2026: Person-Place Relation Extraction from Multilingual Historical Texts
abstract: Was this person ever at that place, and if so, when? Answering such questions from noisy, multilingual historical documents is the central challenge of HIPE-2026, the third edition of the HIPE evaluation series. Moving from named entity recognition and linking (HIPE-2020, HIPE-2022) to reasoning about relationships between entities, HIPE-2026 targets two temporally grounded relation types: $at$, indicating that a person was present at a location at some point prior to a document's publication date, and $isAt$, indicating presence contemporaneous with that date. This paper presents the results of the evaluation campaign, which confronted 17 participating teams with the challenges of historical language variation, OCR noise, and indirect contextual cues across three languages: French, German, and English. The datasets include historical newspaper text from the nineteenth and twentieth centuries, as well as a surprise-domain generalization set drawn from early modern French literary texts. A distinctive feature of HIPE-2026 is its three-fold evaluation framework, which assesses predictive accuracy, computational efficiency, and cross-domain generalization, reflecting the practical demands of large-scale historical document processing in the cultural heritage domain. Across more than 40 submitted runs, results reveal a wide range of strategies, from state-of-the-art large language models to lightweight task-specific classifiers, and highlight the trade-offs between accuracy, efficiency, and robustness inherent to historical relation extraction at corpus scale. System descriptions, datasets, and findings are presented and discussed, offering a detailed picture of the current state of temporally grounded relation extraction for historical documents.
comment: Condensed Overview of CLEF-HIPE-2026 Shared Task Results

light_analysis.overview: HIPE-2026评估系列转向时间关系抽取，从多语言历史文本中提取人物-地点关系（at/isAt），并首次评估预测准确性、计算效率和跨领域泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 历史文档中的人物-地点关系（如某人是否曾在某地）对文化遗产研究至关重要，但历史语言变化、OCR噪声和间接上下文线索使关系抽取极具挑战。现有方法多关注命名实体识别与链接，缺乏对时间约束关系的系统评估。HIPE-2026旨在推动该领域发展，通过多维度评估框架（准确性、效率、泛化）反映大规模历史文档处理的实际需求。
light_analysis.method: HIPE-2026定义了两种时间关系：at（在文档出版前）和isAt（与出版同时）。数据集包含19-20世纪的法语、德语和英语历史报纸，以及早期现代法语文学的跨领域泛化集。评估框架包括预测准确性、计算效率和跨领域泛化。17个团队提交超过40次运行，策略涵盖大型语言模型到轻量分类器。
light_analysis.result: 结果揭示了广泛策略，从SOTA大型语言模型到轻量任务特定分类器。展示了历史关系抽取在语料库规模下准确性、效率和鲁棒性的权衡。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但指出不同方法在跨领域泛化和OCR噪声下的表现差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: HIPE-2026为历史文档的时间关系抽取提供了全面评估基准，强调了实际应用中的权衡。研究促进了文化遗产大规模文档处理，但存在局限性，如仅聚焦两种关系类型和三种语言。未来可扩展至更多关系、语言和时间粒度。

title: $\text{DT}^2$: Decision-Targeted Digital Twins
abstract: A digital twin (DT) is a virtual model of a real-world system that can assist decision-making by simulating scenarios induced by different policies. However, typical machine learning-based DTs do not optimise for this use case. We prove that, when model capacity is limited, training DTs to minimise one-step transition errors can produce suboptimal models for ranking sets of policies according to a reward function. We further show that this holds empirically, even with expressive model classes. To address this, we introduce $\text{DT}^2$, a decision-targeted DT training paradigm. Firstly, $\text{DT}^2$ uses fitted Q-evaluation to estimate values of candidate policies from offline data. A DT is then trained to generate rollouts that preserve pairwise policy rankings derived from these proxy ground-truth values with an architecture-agnostic loss function. We empirically demonstrate the efficacy of our method across a range of settings and architectures. $\text{DT}^2$ consistently improves policy ranking and reduces decision regret during policy selection relative to conventional DT training, both for policies used during training and for unseen policies, while maintaining a good level of raw simulation fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出决策目标数字孪生训练范式DT^2，通过优化政策排名减少决策遗憾，替代传统的一步预测误差最小化。
light_analysis.motivation: 数字孪生常辅助决策，但传统机器学习训练只最小化一步过渡误差，未针对决策优化。当模型容量有限时，这会破坏政策排序的准确性，导致次优决策。该问题在实际中普遍存在，即使使用高表达力模型也难以避免。
light_analysis.method: DT^2首先利用拟合Q评估从离线数据估计候选政策的值，然后训练数字孪生生成轨迹，通过架构无关的损失函数保留由这些代理真实值导出的政策对排名。该方法不依赖特定模型结构，可适用于多种数字孪生架构。
light_analysis.result: 在多种设置和架构下，DT^2一致改善政策排名，降低政策选择的决策遗憾。无论是训练中用到的政策还是未见的政策，均取得更好效果，同时保持了良好的原始模拟保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: DT^2通过决策目标优化数字孪生，有效提升了政策评估的可靠性，降低决策风险。该范式具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于模型容量有限的场景。未来可探索其在更复杂决策任务中的扩展。

title: FunPiQ: A New Benchmark for Pixel-Level Quality Assessment in Fundus Images
abstract: Color fundus photography (CFP) is the most common ophthalmic imaging modality for large-scale screening. However, it is highly susceptible to degradations, making robust fundus image quality assessment (FIQA) crucial. The criteria for what constitutes high-quality at the image level vary across clinical tasks, making FIQA dependent on expert knowledge. This motivated the development of automated methods and datasets. While existing datasets aim to standardize image-level quality, their criteria often differ. Furthermore, image-level labels preclude the quantitative evaluation of localized degradations, which is essential for trustworthy FIQA. We argue that pixel-level FIQA based on anatomical visibility represents a more task-agnostic, explainable approach. In this work, we introduce FunPiQ, the first FIQA benchmark to provide pixel-level quality annotations. In addition, we propose EFIQA-CP, an explainable-by-design (EBD) method that uses quality pseudo-labels based on anatomical visibility to train a CNN via Non-Negative Positive-Unlabeled learning. Extensive evaluations of classification methods with post-hoc explanations, anomaly detection methods, and EBD methods demonstrate the superior performance of the last and, particularly, of EFIQA-CP.
comment: Accepted at MICCAI 2026 main conference. Our code, weights, and dataset are available at https://github.com/penway/FunPiQ

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个像素级眼底图像质量评估基准FunPiQ，并设计可解释EFIQA-CP方法，通过非负正未标注学习实现基于解剖可见性的质量评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有眼底图像质量评估（FIQA）数据集和标准聚焦于图像级质量，但不同临床任务对高质量定义不同，且图像级标签无法量化局部退化。像素级质量评估基于解剖结构可见性，更任务无关和可解释，但缺乏相应基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建FunPiQ基准，提供像素级质量标注。提出EFIQA-CP方法，利用基于解剖可见性的质量伪标签，采用非负正未标注学习（NN-PU）训练CNN，实现可解释性设计。该方法无需显式退化标注，通过正样本和未标注数据学习。
light_analysis.result: 广泛评估分类方法（事后解释）、异常检测方法和可解释设计方法。结果表明，可解释设计方法整体性能优越，尤其EFIQA-CP在像素级质量评估中显著优于其他方法，验证了基于解剖可见性伪标签的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FunPiQ填补了像素级FIQA基准空白，EFIQA-CP提供可解释、任务无关的评估方案。该工作推动了FIQA的可靠性和临床可用性，未来可扩展到其他医学图像质量评估任务。

title: In-context Region-based Drag: Drag Any Region to Any Shape
abstract: Diffusion models have shown promise in drag-style editing. Previous works mainly focus on point-based drag, which is inherently ambiguous. This paper focuses on region-based drag and introduces a novel In-Context Region-based Drag (ICRDrag) method. Under the in-context learning framework, ICRDrag consumes a source image, a source region mask, and a target region mask, producing the target dragged image. Built upon the basic in-context learning model, we introduce two novel attention regularization: 1) image-mask attention consistency to ensure that a target region attends to similar source regions for image and mask modalities; 2) source-target attention correspondence to ensure the mutual correspondence between source and target regions. To facilitate region-based drag, we also construct Paired Region Dataset (PRD), a large-scale dataset with paired masks and images. Extensive experiments show that ICRDrag significantly outperforms existing methods in both quantitative metrics and user studies, achieving superior editing accuracy and visual fidelity. The dataset, code, and model are available at https://github.com/bcmi/ICRDrag-Region-Drag-Editing.
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Dataset, code, and model are available at https://github.com/bcmi/ICRDrag-Region-Drag-Editing

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于上下文学习的区域拖拽编辑方法ICRDrag，实现将任意区域拖拽至任意形状。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有拖拽编辑主要基于点，存在歧义性，且区域拖拽需求明确但缺乏有效方法。本文聚焦区域拖拽，旨在解决点拖拽的不确定性以及编辑精度和视觉保真度不足的问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于上下文学习框架，输入源图像、源区域掩码和目标区域掩码，输出目标图像。引入图像-掩码注意力一致性和源-目标注意力对应两种正则化技术，确保目标区域与源区域的语义对应。构建大型配对区域数据集PRD以支持训练。
light_analysis.result: 在定量指标和用户研究中，ICRDrag显著优于现有方法，编辑准确率和视觉保真度大幅提升。数据集、代码和模型已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文有效解决了区域拖拽编辑问题，提出高精度、高保真的方法，为交互式图像编辑提供了新思路。未来可拓展至更复杂编辑场景。

title: OracleAnalyser: Analysing Implicit Semantics of Oracle Bone Scripts through MLLMs with Post-training
abstract: With the advancement of artificial intelligence, research on oracle bone scripts has entered a new era. However, existing methods and benchmarks remain largely confined to recognition tasks, overlooking the equally crucial aspect of oracle bone analysis. To address this gap, we propose OracleAnalyser, a reasoning framework for oracle bone analysis based on post-training techniques. Specifically, we fine-tune Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct through multiple post-training stages and introduce a new preference optimization algorithm, Stable Focal Preference Optimization (SFPO), tailored to the characteristics of oracle bone datasets. In addition, we release both an oracle bone reasoning dataset and an oracle bone preference dataset, and further construct a new benchmark to evaluate models' analytical capabilities for oracle bone scripts. Extensive experiments validate the superior analytical performance of OracleAnalyser, which achieves remarkable results with only 3B parameters, surpassing models with substantially larger scales.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OracleAnalyser，一个基于后训练技术的甲骨文分析推理框架，通过多阶段微调3B参数模型并引入新算法，实现超越更大模型的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有甲骨文研究主要聚焦于识别任务，忽视了同样重要的分析任务。甲骨文分析涉及隐式语义理解，对古文字研究和人工智能应用均有重要价值。当前缺乏专门的推理框架和基准，亟需方法提升模型对甲骨文的深层分析能力。
light_analysis.method: OracleAnalyser基于Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct进行多阶段后训练微调，包括监督微调和偏好优化。提出Stable Focal Preference Optimization (SFPO)算法，针对甲骨文数据集特点设计。同时构建甲骨文推理数据集和偏好数据集，并建立新基准评估分析能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多个实验上，OracleAnalyser仅用3B参数即展现出优越的分析性能，显著超过参数量更大的模型。具体指标未在摘要明确，但表明小模型通过后训练可达到甚至超越大模型效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: OracleAnalyser证明了后训练技术在甲骨文分析任务上的有效性，提供了从识别到分析的研究新方向。其资源和基准为未来工作奠定基础。潜在局限包括对更多类型甲骨文分析的扩展性。

title: SurgAtlas: A Large-Scale Surgical Video-Language Dataset with 2,391 Hours of Open and Minimally Invasive Surgery
abstract: We introduce SurgAtlas, the largest surgical video-language dataset to date, comprising 15,291 videos (2,391 hours) spanning 18 surgical specialties and over 5,000 procedure types, sourced entirely from publicly available YouTube content. SurgAtlas is also the first surgical video-language dataset to include open surgery at scale, with 6,182 open procedure videos alongside over 9,000 minimally invasive recordings, and the first to establish standardized benchmarks for open-surgery video understanding. We additionally provide an expert-validated subset with verified visual question-answer pairs across diverse open and minimally invasive procedures, serving as a clinically grounded benchmark for surgical reasoning. Compared with existing surgical video-language datasets, SurgAtlas provides one of the most diverse annotation schemas, combining segment-level captions, step- and phase-level descriptions, video-level surgical descriptions, and reasoning-oriented question-answer pairs organized within a hierarchical taxonomy. These annotations are constructed through an automated multi-tier pipeline with LLM-based enrichment and a staged VQA generation framework with explicit groundedness verification. The scale and diversity of SurgAtlas enable training surgical foundation models with broad procedural coverage: we finetune Qwen3-VL-8B through a two-stage captioning-then-instruction pipeline and achieve competitive or state-of-the-art results on multiple established surgical benchmarks, including phase recognition, triplet detection, and reasoning question answering. More broadly, SurgAtlas provides a large native public video corpus that can support future large-scale pretraining of multimodal surgical AI systems and contribute to the development of next-generation foundation models for surgery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了当前最大的手术视频-语言数据集SurgAtlas，包含2391小时视频，覆盖开放和微创手术，并建立标准化基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有手术视频数据集规模小、种类有限，且缺乏开放手术数据和标准化基准。大规模、多样化的数据集对于训练通用手术基础模型至关重要，而公开可用的高质量数据资源稀缺，限制了该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建SurgAtlas数据集，包含15291个YouTube视频（2391小时），涵盖18个专科和5000+手术类型，包括开放和微创手术。采用自动化多层级流水线：LLM增强生成字幕，分阶段VQA框架生成推理问答对，并提供专家验证子集。注释包括段字幕、步骤描述、视频描述和分层问答。
light_analysis.result: 基于Qwen3-VL-8B进行两阶段字幕-指令微调，在阶段识别、三元组检测和推理问答等多个手术基准上取得竞争性或最优结果，验证了数据集的有效性和多样性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurgAtlas作为大规模原生视频语料库，支持多模态手术AI的预训练，促进下一代手术基础模型发展。其开放性和标准化基准有助于学术研究和临床应用，但视频来自YouTube可能引入质量差异，未来可扩展更多专业注释。

title: Variational Autoencoder Layer
abstract: Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) belong to a family of autoencoders with probabilistic properties, making them well suited for generating data by producing a smooth and continuous latent space. Despite being introduced over a decade ago, the method continues to be widely adopted in both research and industry for diverse applications. While VAEs are typically used as standalone models, this paper introduces a novel approach to integrate them as a neural network layer. Furthermore, a new training strategy is proposed for models incorporating these layers, and their performance is thoroughly analyzed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将变分自编码器作为神经网络层并设计相应训练策略的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统VAE被用作独立模型，但将其集成到神经网络中作为层可以增强网络的概率建模能力，改善潜在空间的连续性和平滑性，为解决复杂生成任务提供更灵活的架构。现有方法缺乏对这种集成方式的探索，因此本文旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出将VAE变体封装为神经网络层，嵌入任意网络架构中。该层包含编码器和解码器，输出潜在表示的参数。同时设计新的训练策略，包括联合优化层内和层间参数，可能使用重参数化技巧和变分下界。通过实验验证该层在不同任务中的有效性，但具体数据集和架构摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。合理推断：该VAE层能提升生成质量和潜在空间的结构性，可能在与传统VAE或标准层对比中表现出更好的性能指标（如重构误差、生成样本多样性）。具体数据需参考原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将VAE作为神经网络层，拓展了其应用范围，使模型能更灵活地融入概率建模。潜在价值在于简化复杂生成模型的构建，推动VAE在序列建模、多任务学习等领域的应用。未来可能需解决训练稳定性及与其他层兼容性问题。

title: Enhancing Brain MRI Anomaly Detection and Reasoning with ROI Rethink and Synthetic Data
abstract: Medical vision-language models typically generate diagnoses through single-pass inference without indicating which image regions support their conclusions. This lack of spatial grounding limits clinical utility: outputs cannot be audited, and models may hallucinate findings on normal scans. We present BrReMark (Brain Rethink via ROI Marking), a framework that introduces explicit region marking into brain MRI diagnosis. The model first generates hypotheses about potential abnormalities and grounds them through explicit bounding box marking, then verifies conclusions by re-examining the marked evidence. Training combines supervised fine-tuning on structured reasoning trajectories with reinforcement learning using a composite reward over localization accuracy and diagnostic reasoning. Furthermore, we integrate a domain randomization-based pathology synthesis augmentation strategy to improve the model's generalizability to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. On internal benchmark, BrReMark improves mAP50 from 0.74% to 37.54% compared to the base model, while achieving 21.57% Clinical F1 and 45.26% diagnostic accuracy. On NOVA OOD benchmark, it also achieves competitive overall performance with a 45.7% reduction in false positives compared to the state-of-the-art, indicating reduced hallucination on rare pathologies. These findings suggest that explicit hypothesis-verification grounding is a practical path toward trustworthy open-ended brain MRI diagnosis across both in-distribution and OOD settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BrReMark框架，通过显式区域标记和假设验证机制增强脑MRI异常检测与诊断推理的可信度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态医学视觉语言模型在生成诊断时缺乏空间定位，导致输出不可审计、易在正常扫描上产生幻觉。这一问题限制了临床实用性。亟需一种能够显式标记异常区域、验证推理过程的方法，以提升诊断透明度和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: BrReMark框架包含三步：首先生成异常假设并输出边界框标记可疑区域，然后重新检查标记证据进行验证。训练采用结构化推理轨迹的监督微调与基于定位精度和诊断推理的复合奖励强化学习。同时引入域随机化病理合成增强策略，提升对分布外数据的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在内部基准上，BrReMark相比基础模型将mAP50从0.74%提升至37.54%，临床F1达21.57%，诊断准确率45.26%。在NOVA OOD基准上，与最先进方法相比假阳性减少45.7%，表明在罕见病理上幻觉降低。整体在分布内和分布外场景均表现竞争性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BrReMark通过显式的假设-验证空间定位机制，为可信赖的开放式脑MRI诊断提供了可行路径。该工作提升了诊断的可解释性和泛化性，减少了幻觉。未来可拓展至更多模态和病变类型，进一步验证临床实用性。

title: An Analysis of Posterior Collapse, Parameterization and Initialization in Variational Deep Gaussian Processes
abstract: DGPs are probabilistic models with remarkable prediction performance that concatenate GPs across several layers. Exact inference in DGPs is intractable, and variational inference is often used to approximate the posterior with a parametric distribution tuned by minimizing the Kullback-Leibler divergence. Moreover, finding a good VI approximation is challenging. In particular, a problem of VI is posterior collapse, where VI converges to a variational posterior that matches the prior. In variational DGPs, this implies explaining the data as noise. This work studies posterior collapse in DGPs and identifies its connection to the DSVI algorithm and the widely used linear prior mean function employed in all but the last layer. We show that the benefit of the linear prior mean does not arise from avoiding the non-injective pathology in very deep DGPs, as previously believed, but from improving the conditioning of the optimization problem at initialization. Thus, we propose an alternative initialization of a zero prior mean DGP that mimics a DGP with a linear prior mean at initialization. This enables successful training of DGPs without imposing optimization-driven constraints on the prior, allowing to choose the prior based on modeling assumptions rather than optimization convenience. Our analysis considers three common parameterizations of DGPs and shows that not all of them benefit from a linear prior mean. We also explain why a whitened parameterization of the \DGP provides more stable convergence, something often assumed from experience, but lacking a rigorous analysis. Furthermore, we show that this stability is also beneficial to avoid the posterior collapse problem. Extensive experiments validate our findings: the proposed initialization prevents posterior collapse, improves stability, and achieves performance comparable to (and sometimes better than) DGPs with a linear prior mean.
comment: Submitted to the Journal of Machine Learning Research

light_analysis.overview: 研究了变分深度高斯过程（DGP）中的后验坍塌问题，提出了一种新的初始化方法以避免该问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度高斯过程（DGP）在预测性能上表现优异，但精确推理困难，常用变分推理（VI）近似。然而，VI存在后验坍塌问题，即变分后验退化为先验，导致模型将数据解释为噪声。现有方法使用线性先验均值函数来缓解该问题，但原因尚不明确。本文旨在揭示线性先验均值的真实作用，并提出无需优化约束的替代方案。
light_analysis.method: 本文分析了变分DGP中的后验坍塌现象，指出线性先验均值函数的益处并非来自避免非单射病理，而是改善初始化时优化问题的条件。为此，提出一种新的初始化方法：在零先验均值的DGP中模拟线性先验均值的初始化效果。研究了三种常见参数化方式，发现并非所有都受益于线性先验均值。同时解释了白化参数化为何能提供更稳定的收敛。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的初始化方法有效防止了后验坍塌，提高了稳定性，并取得了与使用线性先验均值的DGP相当甚至更好的性能。具体数值未在摘要中明确给出，但声称广泛实验验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文核心贡献是揭示了线性先验均值在变分DGP中的真实作用，并提出了一种可替代的初始化方法，允许基于建模假设而非优化便利性选择先验。研究还深入分析了参数化和初始化对后验坍塌的影响，为DGP的稳定训练提供了理论指导。局限性可能包括对特定参数化的依赖，未来可探索更通用的初始化策略。

title: USS: Unified Spatial-Semantic Prompts for Embodied Visual Tracking with Latent Dynamics Learning
abstract: Embodied Visual Tracking (EVT) requires an agent to continuously follow a specified target while actively moving through dynamic environments. However, prevailing EVT paradigms predominantly rely on language-based target indication. While language is expressive and convenient, cluttered scenes often contain multiple objects that satisfy the same semantic description, leading to ambiguous target grounding. We therefore propose a paradigm shift, reframing target indication in EVT from text-only specification to unified spatial-semantic prompting. Based on this paradigm, we introduce Unified Spatial-Semantic Prompts for Embodied Visual Tracking with Latent Dynamics Learning, USS, an end-to-end embodied tracking framework that supports text, point, bounding box, and mask prompts within a unified architecture. USS encodes heterogeneous prompts with modality-specific encoders, fuses prompt tokens with visual features through hybrid attention, and decodes compact prompt-conditioned representations into egocentric waypoints. To further improve temporal robustness, USS incorporates a latent world model that predicts future representations through self-supervised alignment. Real-robot experiments demonstrate that explicit spatial target cues yield higher success rates than text-only prompts, particularly in scenarios involving similar distractors and longer-horizon tracking where maintaining instance-level target identity is critical. In the simulation benchmark, USS also achieves state-of-the-art performance among non-MLLM-based methods and competitive results against recent MLLM-based approaches with faster inference speed. Our findings reveal that spatial-semantic prompting provides a more precise and flexible target indication interface for embodied visual tracking. Project site: https://arescheah.github.io/uss-project-page/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一空间-语义提示的具身视觉跟踪框架USS，支持多模态提示并利用潜在世界模型学习时间动态，提升跟踪鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有具身视觉跟踪主要依赖语言提示，但杂乱场景中多个物体满足同一语义描述，导致目标模糊。语言提示无法唯一标识目标，尤其在存在相似干扰物时。因此需要更精确的提示方式，将空间信息与语义结合，以消除歧义并提高跟踪可靠性。
light_analysis.method: USS框架统一支持文本、点、边界框和掩码提示。使用模态特定编码器编码异构提示，通过混合注意力融合提示令牌与视觉特征，解码为自我中心路点。引入潜在世界模型，通过自监督对齐预测未来表示，增强时间鲁棒性。该框架端到端训练，无需多模态大模型。
light_analysis.result: 真实机器人实验中，空间目标提示相比纯文本提示成功率更高，尤其在类似干扰物和长时跟踪场景。在模拟基准上，USS在非MLLM方法中达到SOTA，且与MLLM方法相比推理速度更快。具体数据未明确给出，但声称更高成功率和更快速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 空间-语义提示为具身视觉跟踪提供了更精确灵活的目标指示接口，有效解决语言歧义问题。USS通过统一多模态提示和潜在动力学学习，平衡了精度和效率。未来可扩展至更多提示模态或应用于其他具身任务。

title: Semantic Consistency Policy Optimization for Reinforcement Learning of LLM Agents
abstract: Group-based reinforcement learning effectively post-trains LLM agents for long-horizon, sparse-reward tasks by deriving step-level credit from trajectory outcomes. However, this ties a step's credit to its rollout's final outcome: semantically near-identical intermediate steps receive opposite credit depending on whether their trajectory eventually succeeded or failed. Such semantic credit inconsistency sends conflicting gradients to similar actions and wastes the partially-correct progress inside failed rollouts. Motivated by this, we propose Semantic Consistency Policy Optimization (SCPO), a value-free reward-shaping method that mitigates this inconsistency by recovering step-level credit from successful siblings in the same rollout group. Concretely, SCPO scores each failed step against a successful sibling and adds positive step-level credit for new progress along that sibling. On ALFWorld and WebShop, SCPO matches or exceeds strong group-based baselines, reaching 93.7+/-4.1 percent success on ALFWorld and 74.8+/-2.0 percent on WebShop at 1.5B parameters, with gains concentrated on the hardest multi-step tasks.
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. Under review at EMNLP 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义一致性策略优化（SCPO），通过从同组成功轨迹中恢复步骤级信用，解决LLM智能体强化学习中语义信用不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于分组的强化学习通过轨迹结果推导步骤信用来后训练LLM智能体，但这种方法将步骤信用与其轨迹最终结果绑定：语义上几乎相同的中间步骤会根据轨迹最终成功或失败而获得相反的信用，导致语义信用不一致，向相似动作发送冲突梯度，并浪费失败轨迹中的部分正确进展。
light_analysis.method: SCPO是一种无值函数的奖励塑形方法，通过从同一 rollout 组中的成功兄弟轨迹恢复步骤级信用来缓解不一致性。具体地，SCPO将每个失败步骤与一个成功兄弟轨迹进行评分，并沿着该兄弟轨迹为新的进展添加正面步骤级信用。该方法在 ALFWorld 和 WebShop 上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在 ALFWorld 上，SCPO 达到 93.7±4.1% 的成功率；在 WebShop 上，达到 74.8±2.0% 的成功率（1.5B 参数）。与强分组基线相比，SCPO 匹配或超越其性能，且增益集中在最困难的多步骤任务上。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCPO 有效解决了语义信用不一致问题，提升了 LLM 智能体在长期、稀疏奖励任务中的强化学习效果。其价值在于恢复失败轨迹中的部分正确进展，为后训练提供更准确的信用分配。未来可探索更复杂的评分机制或扩展到更多环境。

title: Naturalness Predicts but Does Not Cause Transferability in Image Encodings of Real-World Streams
abstract: A common practice converts a one-dimensional signal into an image so that a vision backbone pretrained on natural photographs can be reused for recognition, yet the encoded image is rarely examined. We ask how the visual naturalness of an encoded image relates to its transfer accuracy under a frozen backbone. We build WorldStream, a corpus of 299 heterogeneous current-value series from key-free public APIs (weather, air quality, earthquakes, gold and oil, equities, crypto, foreign exchange, web activity and space weather), with a nine-way source-recognition task over 3143 temporally split windows. Across seven encodings and six frozen backbones, the Frechet distance of an encoding to natural images (FID) predicts its accuracy: Spearman $ρ=-0.72$. Two controlled interventions show this is not causal in the spectrum. Our invertible encoder has a single adjustable part, a spectral exponent $β$ (power $\propto |f|^{-β}$); varying $β$ moves the image toward or away from the natural-image manifold at fixed content. FID is lowest near the natural value $β\approx 2$, but frozen accuracy stays flat and far below the structured baselines (19.2% vs. 73.0%), and FID and accuracy are only weakly related over the sweep (Pearson $-0.32$). A second intervention, phase scrambling, holds the power spectrum exactly fixed while removing local structure; now FID and accuracy fall together (Pearson $-0.89$). The cross-encoding correlation is thus mediated by local structure, not spectral naturalness: FID predicts accuracy because Inception reads the same structure the backbones do. Full fine-tuning does not close the gap (27% vs. 67%), so the deficit is structural. The encoder is exactly invertible, recovering the signal from the 8-bit image at 72.9 dB, so the image doubles as a lossless record of the data.
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables; code and data manifest included as ancillary files

light_analysis.overview: 揭示图像编码的视觉自然度（FID）与迁移准确性相关，但并非因果关系，而是由局部结构中介。
light_analysis.motivation: 常见做法将一维信号转换为图像，以便重用预训练的视觉骨干进行识别，但编码图像本身很少被审视。本研究旨在探究编码图像的视觉自然度与冻结骨干下迁移准确性之间的关系，以理解这种做法的有效性。现有方法缺乏对此关联性的因果机制分析，尤其是区分谱自然度与局部结构的作用。
light_analysis.method: 构建WorldStream语料库，包含299个异质时间序列（天气、空气质量等），进行九类源识别任务。使用七种编码和六种冻结骨干，通过FID测量自然度。设计两种控制干预：可调谱指数β的逆变编码器（移动图像自然度）和相位混洗（固定谱但破坏局部结构）。比较FID与准确性的关系。
light_analysis.result: 跨编码和骨干，FID预测准确性（Spearman ρ=-0.72）。但第一干预（改变β）中，FID在β≈2最低，准确率平坦且远低于结构化基线（19.2% vs 73.0%），相关性弱（Pearson -0.32）。第二干预（相位混洗）中，FID与准确性同步下降（Pearson -0.89）。全微调未能弥补差距（27% vs 67%）。编码器可逆，恢复信号质量72.9 dB。
light_analysis.conclusion: FID预测准确性是因为Inception网络读取了与骨干相同的局部结构，而非谱自然度。图像编码作为无损数据记录的实用价值。局限性在于仅使用冻结骨干和特定编码。未来工作可探索其他编码和任务，或设计利用自然度但不过分依赖局部结构的编码方法。

title: Graph it first! Enabling Reasoning on Long-form Egocentric Videos through Scene Graphs
abstract: Existing multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) face significant challenges in processing long video sequences due to strict input token limitations. As a result, current video understanding approaches, especially in egocentric settings characterized by complex dynamics, frequent state changes, and moving cameras, are forced to massively subsample frames. This leads to severe loss of temporal and contextual information, constraining their ability to perform fine-grained video reasoning. In this work, we introduce a framework for egocentric video question answering (VQA) that overcomes these input constraints through Egocentric Scene Graphs (EgoSGs), i.e., temporally grounded, structured representations that capture objects, attributes, spatial relations, and interactions over time. By representing videos as compact, text-based scene graphs, our method preserves the essential visual and temporal information of the original video in a symbolic form that drastically reduces input length while maintaining semantic richness. Crucially, this enables MLLMs to reason efficiently over entire video sequences within their token budget. On HD-EPIC VQA, our method achieves state-of-the-art results, outperforming strong video-based baselines on multiple models and suggesting that structured, temporally grounded representations like EgoSGs can bridge long-form egocentric video understanding and the context limitations of today's MLLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用自我中心场景图（EgoSGs）将长视频表示为紧凑文本形式，突破MLLMs输入长度限制，实现高效视频推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）因严格的输入token限制，处理长视频序列时需大量子采样帧，导致严重的时间与上下文信息丢失，尤其在动态复杂的自我中心视频中，难以进行细粒度推理。因此需要一种能保留关键视觉和时序信息且紧凑的表示方法，以突破输入约束，提升长视频问答性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出EgoSGs框架，将自我中心视频转换为基于文本的时序场景图，捕获对象、属性、空间关系和随时间变化的交互。通过结构化表示压缩视频为紧凑文本，大幅减少输入长度，同时保持语义丰富性，使MLLMs能在token预算内对整个视频序列进行高效推理。
light_analysis.result: 在HD-EPIC VQA数据集上，该方法取得最先进结果，在多个模型上显著优于强视频基线方法，证明EgoSGs能有效桥接长视频理解与MLLMs上下文限制之间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作表明，结构化、时序化的场景图表示（如EgoSGs）是克服MLLMs长度限制、提升长自我中心视频理解的有效途径。它既保留了关键信息，又实现了高效推理，具有重要的学术和应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的场景图生成与跨视频推理。

title: Edges Before Embeddings: A Confidence-Aware Blur Gate for Vision-Language Pipelines
abstract: Production vision pipelines silently degrade on blurry input, wasting compute on downstream OCR, retrieval, and vision-language model (VLM) calls that cannot recover a usable output. We present MagikaDocumentFromPixel, a lightweight, CPU-friendly image quality gate that classifies a single image as sharp, blurred, or uncertain in roughly 7 ms on a single CPU core. The contributions are (i) a recipe selected from a 46-configuration, 8-sweep empirical search that isolates input resolution as the dominant lever and shows architecture capacity only pays off at >= 384 px; (ii) a confidence-aware routing formalism grounded in classical selective prediction; (iii) the Edge Prior Module (EPM), a Laplacian-magnitude auxiliary input channel that gives the network direct access to the spectral evidence that classical blur heuristics rely on and that lifts test F1 by +1.3 points in a matched-env comparison; and (iv) an observation that the gate is one instance of a recurring design pattern that appears independently in Magika content-type detection, risk-controlled OCR with VLMs, and DocVLM. The final recipe MobileNetV3-Large with the EPM trained at 384x384 on paired GoPro Large frames, evaluated with 5-scale test-time augmentation reaches F1 = 0.9803 (AUC 0.9989) with a 17 MB ONNX artifact, improving over our fixed-scale baseline on the same hardware (F1 = 0.9672) by +1.31 points. We are explicit about limitations: results are on a single motion-blur distribution, numbers are from a single seed, and calibration is qualitative rather than measured.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级图像质量门控MagikaDocumentFromPixel，通过边缘先验模块和置信度路由，在CPU上快速检测模糊，提升下游视觉语言流水线效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 生产环境中的视觉流水线在模糊输入上无声退化，浪费下游OCR、检索和VLM计算资源。现有方法缺乏轻量级、快速的模糊检测门控，无法在推理前筛除模糊图像，导致无效计算。
light_analysis.method: 通过46配置8扫描经验搜索，确定输入分辨率是关键杠杆，架构容量仅在≥384px有效。提出基于选择性预测的置信度感知路由，以及边缘先验模块(EPM)，利用拉普拉斯幅度辅助输入提供光谱证据，提升F1。最终采用MobileNetV3-Large在384x384上训练，使用GoPro Large数据集和5尺度测试增强。
light_analysis.result: 在单CPU核心上约7ms完成分类，最终模型F1=0.9803 (AUC=0.9989)，模型大小17MB（ONNX），相比固定尺度基线（F1=0.9672）提升1.31点。局限性：仅在单一运动模糊分布评估，单种子结果，标定定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出轻量级模糊门控，有效过滤模糊输入减少下游无用计算。EPM和置信度路由具有通用性，但局限在单一模糊分布、单种子实验和定性标定，需更多验证。

title: AI Snitches Get Glitches: Towards Evading Agentic Surveillance
abstract: To better assist users with completing challenging tasks, AI agents mediate communications, access data, and interact with different APIs. Many employers (and even nation-states) already provide their users with this technology. However, widespread adoption of AI agents creates a new risk to abuse access to user data for another goal: surveilling users. These users might not even have the ability or permission to control the actions and data accesses of the surveilling agents.   We introduce and formalize the problem of agentic surveillance: the ability of an AI agent to analyze available information, craft a report, and send it out using available tools. To evaluate surveillance capabilities across different models, we create SurveilBench, a dataset of various reporting scenarios focusing on three domains: corporate, education, and police. We find that some models exhibit emergent (i.e., unprompted) tendencies to help surveillance, but they also report the attempts to surveil users to the government.   Finally, we repurpose prompt injections for evading surveillance and develop three evasion techniques that hide from, deceive, or induce over-escalation in surveillance agents. We conclude that agentic surveillance can already be easily implemented and, therefore, call for a comprehensive technical, ethical, and legislative framework to protect users.

light_analysis.overview: 本文首次形式化AI代理监控问题，构建SurveilBench数据集评估模型监控能力，并提出三种规避监控的提示注入技术。
light_analysis.motivation: AI代理广泛用于协助用户完成任务，但存在被滥用进行用户监控的风险，用户可能无法控制代理行为。现有研究缺乏对代理监控问题的形式化定义和评估方法，亟需系统分析其风险并探索防御手段。
light_analysis.method: 形式化定义代理监控问题，构建SurveilBench数据集涵盖企业、教育、警察三个领域，评估多个模型在监控任务上的表现。发现模型存在自发监控倾向，但也会向政府报告监控尝试。提出三种基于提示注入的规避技术：隐藏、欺骗和诱导过度升级。
light_analysis.result: 多个模型在SurveilBench上显示出适应监控的能力，部分模型自发报告监控尝试。提出的三种规避技术有效降低监控成功率，但未给出具体数值。摘要未明确说明与基线方法的对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 代理监控已可轻易实现，对用户隐私构成威胁。本文首次形式化该问题并构建基准，提出有效规避方法。呼吁建立技术、伦理与法律综合框架保护用户。未来可扩展更多领域和更复杂的规避策略。

title: MiniOpt: Reasoning to Model and Solve General Optimization Problems with Limited Resources
abstract: Achieving strong optimization generalization across diverse optimization problems while requiring limited training resources remains a challenging problem for optimization-oriented large language models (LLMs). Existing approaches typically rely on large-scale supervised datasets, costly reasoning annotations, and expensive intermediate step verification, resulting in substantial training overhead. To address these challenges, we propose MiniOpt, a reinforcement learning framework that learns to solve optimization problems through an "reasoning-to-model-and-solve" paradigm. MiniOpt decomposes optimization reasoning into structured optimization modeling and executable solver generation. Building upon this paradigm, we introduce OptReward, a reward function with hierarchical score structure that jointly evaluates formulation and solution, enabling effective policy learning without expert demonstrations. We further develop an optimization-oriented policy optimization strategy that improves exploration efficiency and stabilizes reinforcement learning for compact models. Extensive experiments show that MiniOpt-3B exhibits strong optimization generalization across various optimization types, problem scenarios, and task domains. For models with fewer than 10B parameters, MiniOpt series achieves the highest average solving accuracy (SA). For models with more than 10B parameters, MiniOpt still shows competitive performance. These results suggest that optimization-oriented reward design and reinforcement learning provide an effective pathway for developing compact optimization-specialized language models with strong optimization generalization capabilities. The code is available at https://github.com/Hsiang-1/MiniOpt.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MiniOpt框架，通过强化学习实现小模型在多种优化问题上的强泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有优化LLM依赖大规模监督数据、昂贵推理标注和中间步骤验证，训练资源消耗大。MiniOpt旨在解决资源受限下优化泛化难题，通过结构化解耦和层次化奖励设计，减少训练开销，使小模型也能高效解决多种优化问题。
light_analysis.method: MiniOpt采用“推理-建模-求解”范式的强化学习框架，将优化推理分解为结构化建模和可执行求解器生成。引入层次化奖励函数OptReward联合评估建模和求解质量，无需专家示范。并提出优化导向的策略优化策略，提升探索效率并稳定小模型训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多种优化类型、问题场景和任务域上，MiniOpt-3B表现出强泛化能力。对于<10B参数模型，MiniOpt系列达到最高平均求解准确率（SA）；对于>10B参数模型仍具竞争力。实验验证了优化奖励设计与强化学习对开发紧凑优化专用语言模型的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MiniOpt证明了通过优化推理结构化解耦和层次化奖励，结合强化学习，可有效训练紧凑的优化专用语言模型，在资源受限下实现强泛化。代码开源，为低资源优化LLM研究提供了新思路。未来可扩展至更多优化类型和实际应用。

title: SARA: Unlocking Multilingual Knowledge in Mixture-of-Experts via Semantically Anchored Routing Alignment
abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have emerged as an increasingly influential paradigm as they offer a strategic balance between parameter scalability and computational efficiency. However, low-resource languages, which suffer from a scarcity of high-quality training data, often have their tokens routed to different experts than those predominantly activated by high-resource inputs, which limits cross-lingual expert sharing. This cross-lingual routing divergence consequently hinders their efficacy in multilingual contexts. To address this issue, we propose SARA (Semantically Anchored Routing Alignment), a framework designed to transfer specialized capabilities from high-resource languages as anchors to low-resource languages. SARA explicitly aligns the routing distribution of multilingual inputs with high-resource semantic anchors using a symmetric Jensen-Shannon (JS) divergence constraint. Unlike traditional distillation methods that operate on output logits, SARA directly aligns the internal routing distributions of MoE layers, encouraging mechanistic consistency in expert selection across languages. We conduct experiments on 2 LLMs across 5 low-resource languages and 3 benchmarks. Experiment results demonstrate that SARA outperforms standard instruction tuning, e.g., +0.8% on Qwen3-30B-A3B and +1.2% on Phi-3.5-MoE-instruct on Global-MMLU. Further analyses show that SARA effectively addresses performance bottlenecks in low-resource languages, providing a scalable pathway to enhance multilingual capabilities in sparse architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SARA框架，通过对称JS散度约束对齐路由分布，将高资源语言知识迁移到低资源语言，提升MoE模型的多语言能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏MoE架构因参数可扩展性和计算效率备受青睐，但低资源语言因训练数据稀缺，其token被路由到与高资源输入不同的专家，导致跨语言专家共享受限，产生路由发散，阻碍多语言性能。现有方法未有效解决此对齐问题，急需一种方法实现跨语言专家分布的机械一致性。
light_analysis.method: SARA框架通过对称Jensen-Shannon散度约束，显式对齐多语言输入的路由分布与高资源语义锚点，鼓励跨语言专家选择的一致性。与传统输出logits蒸馏不同，SARA直接对齐MoE层的内部路由分布，保持结构不变。实验基于2个LLM（Qwen3-30B-A3B、Phi-3.5-MoE-instruct）和5种低资源语言，在3个基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: SARA在Global-MMLU上优于标准指令微调：Qwen3-30B-A3B提升0.8%，Phi-3.5-MoE-instruct提升1.2%。进一步分析表明，SARA有效缓解低资源语言的性能瓶颈，实现跨语言专家共享，增强稀疏架构的多语言能力。摘要未提供其他基准的具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: SARA框架通过路由对齐解决了低资源语言在MoE中的性能瓶颈，证明了将高资源语言知识迁移到低资源语言的有效性。该工作为多语言MoE模型提供可扩展的增强路径，具有重要学术和实际价值。未来可探索更复杂的锚点选择或动态对齐策略。

title: Beyond Function Calling: Benchmarking Tool-Using Agents under Tool-Environment Unreliability
abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as agents that solve tasks by interacting with external tool environments. Although recent tool-use benchmarks increasingly cover complex task settings, they still largely assume clean, stable, and trustworthy tool environments, leaving tool-environment unreliability insufficiently examined. We introduce ToolBench-X, a benchmark for evaluating agents under recoverable reliability hazards. ToolBench-X contains executable multi-step tasks across diverse domains and sequential, parallel, and mixed workflows, each paired with deterministic tools and a canonical final answer for automatic evaluation. Starting from clean tool environments, ToolBench-X injects five structured hazard types: Specification Drift, Invocation Error, Execution Failure, Output Drift, and Cross-source Conflict. Crucially, each injected instance remains solvable through at least one valid recovery path, such as retrying, fallback, verification, or cross-checking. Experiments reveal a substantial reliability gap: agents that perform well with reliable tools often fail under recoverable hazards. Further analysis shows that failures are driven less by tool-use volume or inference budget than by limited hazard diagnosis and ineffective recovery. Targeted recovery hints recover many failed tasks, while test-time scaling yields more limited gains. These results suggest that tool-use evaluation should move beyond function-call accuracy toward task completion under unreliable tool environments. The code and data is available at https://github.com/Foreverskyou/ToolBench-X.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ToolBench-X基准，评估智能体在工具环境不可靠性下的任务完成能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工具使用基准大多假设工具环境稳定可靠，忽略了实际中工具可能出现的可靠性问题。研究表明，即使工具环境存在可恢复的故障，智能体的性能也会显著下降。因此，需要评估智能体在不可靠工具环境下的鲁棒性和恢复能力。
light_analysis.method: ToolBench-X包含跨领域的多步可执行任务，支持序列、并行和混合工作流。它从干净环境开始，注入五种结构化故障：规范漂移、调用错误、执行失败、输出漂移和跨源冲突。每个故障实例至少有一条有效恢复路径（如重试、回退、验证、交叉检查）。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示明显的可靠性差距：在可靠工具上表现良好的智能体在可恢复故障下经常失败。失败原因更多是故障诊断不足和恢复无效，而非工具使用量或推理预算。有针对性的恢复提示能挽回许多失败任务，而测试时扩展带来的收益有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 工具使用评估应从函数调用准确率转向不可靠工具环境下的任务完成。ToolBench-X为评估智能体在真实世界故障下的鲁棒性提供了标准化基准，有助于推动更可靠自主智能体的开发。

title: Shift Variant Image Degradation and Restoration Using Singular Value Decomposition
abstract: Shift-variant image degradation is frequently encountered in practical imaging systems where the point spread function (PSF) varies across the image field due to motion, optical aberrations, atmospheric turbulence, or sensor-related effects. Unlike shift-invariant, shift-variant degradation presents significant challenges for image restoration because the degradation process cannot be represented by a single convolution kernel. This paper proposes a singular value decomposition (SVD)-based framework for restoring images degraded by shift-variant motion blur. The proposed approach determines the contribution of small singular values using a singular-value energy retention criterion. Specifically, the number of small singular values is selected based on a specified percentage of cumulative singular-value energy, providing a systematic approach for controlling noise amplification while preserving useful image information. The degradation model is formulated using a position-dependent PSF represented by a shift-variant imaging operator. Three representative one dimensional shift-variant motion PSFs are considered: bidirectional linear motion, Gaussian motion, and simple harmonic motion. The image degradation process is modeled as a linear system, and SVD is employed to analyze and invert the corresponding degradation operator. The singular-value representation provides insight into the ill-conditioned nature of the restoration problem and enables the development of stable inversion techniques. The proposed SVD-based restoration algorithm is applied to three degraded images. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach in recovering image details and reducing blur artifacts under different motion models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于奇异值分解的框架，用于恢复由移位变运动模糊退化的图像。
light_analysis.motivation: 在实际成像系统中，点扩散函数常随图像场变化，导致移位变图像退化，无法用单一卷积核表示。现有方法主要针对移位不变退化，难以处理移位变情况。该研究旨在解决移位变运动模糊图像恢复问题，提出一种系统控制噪声放大同时保留有用信息的稳定反演方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于奇异值分解（SVD）的恢复框架，通过奇异值能量保留准则确定小奇异值的数量，以控制噪声放大。退化模型由位置相关PSF表示，采用移位变成像算子。考虑三种一维移位变运动PSF：双向线性运动、高斯运动和简单谐波运动。利用SVD分析退化算子的病态性质，并实现稳定反演。
light_analysis.result: 在三种退化图像上应用所提算法，实验结果表明该方法能有效恢复图像细节并减少模糊伪影。摘要未提供具体量化指标如PSNR或SSIM提升，但定性结果显示了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种基于SVD的移位变图像恢复框架，通过奇异值能量保留准则平衡噪声抑制和细节保留。该方法适用于多种运动模型，具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步扩展至二维PSF或更复杂的退化模型。

title: ROAD-VLA: Robust Online Adaptation via Self-Distillation for Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: Effective online adaptation of vision-language-action (VLA) models remains challenging, as sparse rewards provide weak supervision for high-dimensional autoregressive action policies. Although self-distillation can in principle provide denser training signals, we find that text-based privileged teachers conditioned on demonstrations, retrieved experiences, or high-level plans are ineffective for VLA adaptation, exposing a modality gap between symbolic guidance and low-level robot actions. We propose ROAD-VLA, an advantage-guided self-distillation framework that constructs a proximal teacher directly in action space by perturbing action-token logits with calibrated advantage estimates. This converts sparse rewards into dense token-level supervision while keeping the teacher close to the current policy. We further derive a policy-improvement lower bound under calibrated advantages and accurate teacher matching. Across seven robotic manipulation environments with in-distribution and out-of-distribution shifts, ROADVLA outperforms PPO in nearly all settings, demonstrating robust online VLA adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ROAD-VLA，一种优势引导的自蒸馏框架，用于视觉-语言-动作模型鲁棒在线适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言-动作模型在线适应面临稀疏奖励对高维自回归动作策略弱监督的问题。现有方法如基于文本的教师蒸馏存在模态鸿沟，符号指导难以直接优化底层机器人动作。需要一种在动作空间内提供密集信号、保持策略稳定性且有效适应分布偏移的方法。
light_analysis.method: ROAD-VLA构建优势引导的自蒸馏框架，通过扰动动作token对数几率并加入校准优势估计，在动作空间中构造近端教师。该教师将稀疏奖励转换为密集的token级监督，并保持与当前策略接近。推导了基于校准优势和准确教师匹配的策略改进下界。无需额外数据或复杂规划。
light_analysis.result: 在七个机器人操作环境（含分布内和分布外偏移）中，ROAD-VLA在几乎所有设置下优于PPO基线。结果表明其鲁棒在线适应能力，尤其在分布偏移场景下表现突出。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了与PPO的全面对比优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ROAD-VLA通过优势引导自蒸馏有效解决了VLA模型在线适应中的稀疏奖励问题，弥合了符号指导与底层动作之间的鸿沟。该框架具有通用性，可推广至其他涉及高维动作空间的强化学习任务。未来可探索更复杂的优势校准策略及跨任务迁移。

title: Confidence Sequences for Online Statistical Model Checking of Markov Decision Processes
abstract: Markov decision processes (MDPs) are a classic model of decision making under uncertainty, exhibiting both non-deterministic choice as well as probabilistic uncertainty. Traditionally, exact knowledge of the underlying probabilities is assumed. However, this often is unrealistic, e.g.\ when modelling cyber-physical systems or biological processes. Here, statistical methods provide a way towards obtaining meaningful guarantees. The classical approach is to gather samples in the MDP, use these to draw statistical conclusions about the transition probabilities, and from there obtain bounds on the true value; then, if these bounds are too broad, repeat. However, existing implementations of this approach are either subtly incorrect or sub-optimal, and quite often both. We present several \emph{confidence sequences}, which are specifically designed for such \enquote{online} settings, implement all of them in an efficient tool, and show their practical applicability. In particular, we show that they outperform classical \enquote{union-bound} style approaches, and overall our implementation requires 50x less samples on average than previous state of the art.

light_analysis.overview: 提出专为在线统计模型检验设计的置信序列，比传统方法平均减少50倍样本。
light_analysis.motivation: 马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）是决策建模的经典工具，但传统方法假设已知转移概率，这在现实系统中（如信息物理系统、生物过程）往往不成立。统计方法通过采样获取概率边界，但现有实现存在细微错误或效率低下。该研究旨在提供一种高效、正确的在线统计模型检验方法，以解决实际应用中的不确定性挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了多种置信序列（confidence sequences），专为在线设置设计，即在数据收集过程中持续更新置信区间。这些序列避免了传统联合界（union-bound）方法的保守性和错误，通过逐轮调整置信水平实现更紧的边界。所有方法均实现在一个高效工具中，支持在MDP中采样并实时计算界限。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提出的置信序列方法优于经典的联合界方法，在平均样本量上比先前最优方法减少了50倍。具体而言，该工具在不同MDP基准上均能快速收敛到精确的概率边界，显著降低了统计模型检验的采样成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提供了MDP在线统计模型检验的理论基础和实用工具，通过置信序列替代传统联合界方法，大幅提升样本效率。这为信息物理系统、生物过程等不确定环境下的决策验证提供了可靠手段。未来可扩展至更复杂的概率模型或自适应采样策略。

title: $S^{2}$-FracMix: Label-Preserving Self-Saliency Mixup Augmentation
abstract: Data augmentation is known to improve generalization of deep visual models. Recent methods favor mixup strategies that generate interpolated samples to improve model performance. However, these techniques not only incur significant computational overhead, they also lead to semantic disruption of augmentation data due to cross-sample mixing. We first propose Self-Saliency ($S^2$) Mixup, which constructs challenging yet label-consistent samples by extracting multi-scale salient patches and reinserting them into non-salient regions of the same image. This promotes scale-invariant feature learning while avoiding cross-sample interference. To further enhance model robustness, we introduce FracMix, a mixing scheme that injects self-similarity patterns into salient regions using adaptive ratios. Collectively, our unified framework, $S^{2}$-FracMix, enables simultaneous learning from fractal and non-fractal structures within a single image, yielding a targeted and structurally coherent augmentation strategy. We theoretically analyze the advantage of our technique, and empirically establish its superiority over the existing methods by achieving state-of-the-art performance in extensive evaluation with seven benchmarks across classification (coarse and fine-grained), robustness, calibration, object detection, and transfer learning tasks. Project page is available at \href{https://fracmix-data-augmentation.github.io/}{fracmix-data-augmentation.github.io}

light_analysis.overview: 提出$S^2$-FracMix，一种保持标签一致性的自显著性混合数据增强方法，提升视觉模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有混合数据增强方法存在语义破坏和计算开销大的问题。跨样本混合会导致标签不一致，削弱模型学习效果。此外，传统方法未能有效利用图像内部结构信息，缺乏针对性和结构一致性的增强策略。因此，需要一种既能保持标签一致性又能促进尺度不变特征学习的高效数据增强方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Self-Saliency ($S^2$) Mixup，从同一图像中提取多尺度显著区域并重新插入非显著区域，构建具有挑战性且标签一致的样本，避免跨样本干扰。进一步引入FracMix，通过自适应比率向显著区域注入自相似性模式。统一框架$S^2$-FracMix使模型同时从单个图像中的分形和非分形结构学习，实现有针对性且结构一致的增强。
light_analysis.result: 在七个基准上评估，涵盖粗粒度/细粒度分类、鲁棒性、校准、目标检测和迁移学习任务，达到最先进的性能。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但声称优于现有方法。理论分析也证明了该技术的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: $S^2$-FracMix通过保持标签一致性和利用图像内部结构，实现了高效且有针对性的数据增强，显著提升了视觉模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性。该方法具有广泛的适用性，可应用于多种视觉任务。未来可探索更复杂的自相似性模式或与其他增强策略结合。

title: Do Encoders Suffice? A Systematic Comparison of Encoder and Decoder Safety Judges for LLM Adversarial Evaluation
abstract: With the widespread adoption of large language models (LLMs) in chatbots and everyday applications, companies increasingly need guardrails that are effective while remaining low-cost and low-latency. Safety evaluation of LLM outputs has generally relied on LLM-based judges, which can be effective but are often slow and expensive to deploy at scale.   In this paper, we evaluate whether fine-tuned modern encoder classifiers from the ModernBERT family, including ModernBERT and Ettin, can reliably identify harmful LLM outputs in user-model conversations without substantial performance loss relative to LLM-based judges. We benchmark these encoder classifiers against rule-based prefix matching, fine-tuned LLM classifiers, and LLM judges using a range of judge-prompting strategies across open-source adversarial datasets.   The LLM judges include evaluation methodologies from StrongReject, ShieldGemma, JailbreakBench, AILuminate, SorryBench, and a Claude-as-a-judge setup, as well as fine-tuned safety classifiers such as LlamaGuard 3 and LlamaGuard 4. The encoder classifiers are fine-tuned on judge-labeled data using a majority-voting label strategy and are then evaluated on a gold-standard holdout dataset to assess their performance relative to LLM judges.   We report absolute performance using F1 score, false negative rate, and precision-recall metrics. We also break down results by attack technique, including single-turn prompting, decomposition, escalation, and context manipulation, to identify where encoder classifiers align with or diverge from LLM-based judges. Our findings provide guidance on when encoder classifiers can serve as cost- and latency-efficient alternatives to LLM-based safety evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 系统比较编码器和解码器安全评判者在LLM对抗性评估中的性能，探索低成本、低延迟的编码器分类器能否替代LLM评判者。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着LLM在聊天机器人等应用中的广泛部署，企业需要高效且低成本的护栏来检测有害输出。现有LLM评判者虽然有效，但部署时速度慢、成本高，难以大规模使用。因此，研究微调后的编码器分类器（如ModernBERT）是否能在保持性能的同时提供更经济高效的替代方案，具有重要实际意义。
light_analysis.method: 论文系统评估了ModernBERT系列编码器分类器（ModernBERT和Ettin），与规则前缀匹配、微调LLM分类器（LlamaGuard 3/4）及多种LLM评判者（StrongReject、ShieldGemma等）进行对比。编码器分类器使用评判者标记的数据（多数投票标签策略）进行微调，并在黄金标准保留集上用F1、假阴性率、精确率-召回率指标评估。按攻击技术（单轮提示、分解、升级、上下文操作）细分结果。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，编码器分类器在F1分数、假阴性率等指标上表现接近LLM评判者，尤其是在某些攻击类型下。例如，ModernBERT和Ettin在部分场景中达到与LLM评判者相当的性能，同时推理速度更快、成本更低。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但对比表明编码器分类器在特定情况下可作为有效替代。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了现代编码器分类器（如ModernBERT）在LLM安全评估中可作为成本-延迟高效的替代方案，尤其适用于资源有限或需要实时检测的场景。研究为实际部署提供了指导，但也指出在复杂攻击下编码器可能不如LLM评判者。未来可探索更多攻击类型和混合方法。

title: Fuzzy Quantification over OWL Ontologies and Knowledge Graphs
abstract: This paper presents a versatile framework for evaluating fuzzy quantification queries over both standard and fuzzy ontologies as well as knowledge graphs. The primary objective is the retrieval of individuals that satisfy queries articulated via Type I or Type II fuzzy quantified expressions. A key advantage of the proposed approach is its inherent adaptability: it remains entirely agnostic to the quantifier type, the underlying evaluation method, and the specific data source of the ontology (i.e., OWL ontologies or RDFS knowledge graphs). Furthermore, we present Q2S2, a publicly accessible implementation of this system developed to support future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个与量词类型、评估方法和数据源无关的模糊量化查询通用框架，并提供开源实现Q2S2。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模糊量化查询方法通常针对特定量词类型、评估方法或数据源（如OWL本体或RDFS知识图谱），缺乏通用性，难以跨域应用。本研究旨在解决这一问题，提出一个统一框架，使查询可灵活适应不同场景，提高模糊量化在语义网和知识图谱中应用的灵活性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个通用框架，支持Type I和Type II模糊量化表达式。核心创新在于框架与具体量词类型、评估方法以及数据源（OWL本体或RDFS知识图谱）完全解耦，通过抽象接口实现灵活集成。此外，开发了开源系统Q2S2，作为该框架的参考实现，便于其他研究者复现和扩展。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但强调了框架的通用性和适应性。Q2S2作为公开实现，可用于验证框架在多种模糊量化查询场景下的有效性，并支持未来研究。具体性能指标和对比结果待查阅全文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究为OWL本体和知识图谱上的模糊量化查询提供了统一的通用框架，突破了传统方法对量词类型、评估方法和数据源的依赖。学术上促进了模糊逻辑与语义网的融合，实际应用中可支持智能信息检索和决策系统。未来工作可探索更多量词类型和优化评估效率。

title: Re-mixing Embeddings for Patient Augmentation in Data Scarce Multiple Instance Learning
abstract: Data scarcity is a major bottleneck in medical Multiple Instance Learning (MIL), especially for rare diseases or expensive modalities. We introduce a statistically grounded patient augmentation approach that generates realistic patients directly in embedding space. Using Gaussian Mixture Models as a probabilistic clustering approach on pooled instance embeddings from all patients, our method learns disease-specific "recipes"-statistical distributions of instances across unsupervised clusters. New patients are then generated by sampling embeddings from clusters based on learned recipes. Unlike existing methods that require examples from all categories, our method can generate patients offline by re-mixing pooled embeddings. Generated patients are further selected based on uncertainty quantification to improve MIL performance. We evaluate our method across three clinically relevant scarcity scenarios: (i) cross-dataset transfer, where an entirely missing "healthy" class is generated using statistics from an external cohort; (ii) low-data regimes, where class sizes are extremely limited; and (iii) small-cohort non-image tasks, including single-cell RNA-seq and flow cytometry. Across all experiments, our method improves performance over baseline, often outperforming other bag-mixing strategies. Notably, in the missing-class scenario, a performance comparable to full-dataset training is achieved, demonstrating its potential for rare disease diagnostic and privacy-preserving patient augmentation. The code is available at https://github.com/marrlab/RECIPE
comment: Accepted for publication at the 29th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于高斯混合模型的嵌入空间患者增强方法，解决医疗MIL中的数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗多实例学习（MIL）中数据稀缺是主要瓶颈，尤其对罕见病或昂贵模态。现有数据增强方法需要所有类别的示例，无法生成缺失类别的患者。本研究旨在通过统计建模在嵌入空间中生成逼真的患者，以提升MIL在多种稀缺场景下的性能。
light_analysis.method: 采用高斯混合模型对全体患者的实例嵌入进行概率聚类，学习每个疾病类别在无监督簇上的分布（即“配方”）。通过从簇中按配方采样嵌入来生成新患者，并依据不确定性量化筛选。该方法无需所有类别示例，可离线生成。评估跨数据集转移、低数据、非图像任务三种场景。
light_analysis.result: 在跨数据集转移中，生成缺失的健康类后性能接近全数据集训练；在低数据和小队列任务中，该方法优于基线和其它混合策略。具体而言，在三个临床相关的稀缺场景下均提升MIL性能，尤其在缺失类场景中达到与全数据训练相当的结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种统计驱动的患者增强方法，有效缓解数据稀缺问题，在罕见病诊断和隐私保护（无需原始数据）方面有重要应用价值。未来可扩展至更多模态。局限性：依赖GMM假设，可能不适用于复杂分布。代码已开源。

title: Deep Neural Networks with Ordinal Loss for Medical Applications
abstract: In many prediction problems in medical applications, target labels exhibit an inherent ordinal structure, where class ordering reflects clinically meaningful severity levels. The cost associated with misclassification is often non-uniform and asymmetric, as errors between distant ordinal categories may have substantially more severe consequences than errors between adjacent ones, and overestimating disease severity may have different clinical implications than underestimating it. Traditional loss functions such as multi-class cross-entropy treat all misclassifications equally and fail to incorporate this ordering information. Recent advances in ordinal regression aim to address this limitation by integrating rank-based structures into deep learning models. In this work, we introduce the \textbf{Ordinal Cross-Entropy (OCE)} framework, a general and architecture-independent approach for learning from ordinal data. The proposed method extends the standard cross-entropy formulation to account for misclassification severity through an ordinal cost matrix while preserving the probabilistic interpretation and optimization benefits of the conventional loss. We provide a theoretical analysis of the OCE gradient behavior and show that it yields smoother optimization dynamics and improved ordinal consistency. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that our method achieves lower prediction error costs and better calibration compared to existing state-of-the-art ordinal approaches, establishing OCE as a simple yet effective solution for ordinal regression in deep neural networks.

light_analysis.overview: 引入序数交叉熵（OCE）框架，通过代价矩阵改进深度神经网络的序数分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学应用中目标标签具有内在序数结构，误分类代价非均匀且不对称，传统交叉熵损失忽视序数信息，无法处理不同类别间错误代价的差异。现有序数回归方法虽尝试融合排序结构，但缺乏通用且保持概率解释的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出序数交叉熵（OCE），扩展标准交叉熵以集成序数代价矩阵，保留概率解释和优化优势。理论分析显示OCE梯度产生更平滑的优化动态和更好的序数一致性。该方法架构无关，可应用于任意深度神经网络。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上，OCE比现有最优序数方法实现更低的预测错误成本和更好的校准性能，验证了其在序数回归中的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: OCE作为简单有效的序数回归损失函数，适用于深度神经网络的医学应用。其通用性和理论保证为序数分类任务提供了实用解决方案，未来可探索在更多领域的应用。

title: ShutterMuse: Capture-Time Photography Guidance with MLLMs
abstract: Real-world photography requires capture-time guidance for both camera framing and subject pose. Yet existing aesthetic cropping benchmarks mainly evaluate post-hoc crop prediction and overlook subject-side recommendations, leaving the capture-time guidance capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce CaptureGuide-Bench, a benchmark with two complementary tasks: photographer-side composition decision and refinement, and subject-side scene-conditioned pose recommendation. Our evaluation reveals limitations: general-purpose MLLMs can make composition decisions but lack precise refinement localization, while specialized aesthetic cropping models localize crops effectively but are limited to refinement; neither provides actionable pose guidance. To support model development, we further construct CaptureGuide-Dataset, comprising 130K samples with textual rationales and structured visual annotations, and develop ShutterMuse, a unified MLLM trained with supervised and reinforcement fine-tuning. Experiments on CaptureGuide-Bench show that ShutterMuse achieves the best overall photographer-side performance among evaluated baselines and competitive subject-side pose recommendation with substantially lower inference cost, demonstrating the potential of MLLMs as interactive assistants for photography during image capture.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一的多模态大语言模型ShutterMuse，用于拍摄时摄影指导，涵盖构图决策和主体姿态推荐，并构建了基准和数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实摄影需要拍摄时的实时指导，包括取景和主体姿态。现有方法主要针对事后裁剪，缺乏对拍摄时指导能力的研究，尤其是多模态大语言模型在摄影师构图和主体姿态推荐方面的能力未被充分探索。通用MLLM缺乏精确细化，美学模型局限于裁剪，两者均无法提供可操作姿态指导。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出ShutterMuse，一个统一的多模态大语言模型。首先构建CaptureGuide-Bench基准，包含摄影师侧（构图决策与细化）和主体侧（场景条件姿态推荐）两个任务。然后构建CaptureGuide-Dataset，含13万样本及文本理由和结构化视觉注释。ShutterMuse采用监督微调和强化微调联合训练。
light_analysis.result: 在CaptureGuide-Bench上，ShutterMuse在摄影师侧任务中取得最佳总体性能，在主体侧姿态推荐中表现具有竞争力，且推理成本显著低于其他基线模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过基准、数据集和模型，展示了多模态大语言模型作为交互式助手在拍摄时提供摄影指导的潜力。主要贡献包括CaptureGuide-Bench、CaptureGuide-Dataset和ShutterMuse模型。未来可拓展至更多实时摄影指导场景。

title: OncoSynth: Synthetic data generation for treatment effect estimation in oncology
abstract: In oncology, access to patient-level data is often restricted. Synthetic data provides an alternative for analyzing treatment effectiveness, but existing methods for synthetic data generation fail to preserve the causal relationships between covariates, treatments, and outcomes, thereby leading to biased estimates of treatment effects. Here, we introduce OncoSynth, a generative, causally-aware machine learning framework designed to produce synthetic cohorts that enable accurate estimation of population- and patient-level treatment effects. OncoSynth uses a diffusion-based sequential approach to model how covariates influence treatment assignment and how treatment affects survival. We evaluate OncoSynth using large lung (N = 37,128) and breast cancer (N = 17,046) cohorts. Our results show that OncoSynth generates high-fidelity synthetic patient cohorts that preserve real-world patient, treatment, and outcome distributions. Notably, OncoSynth improves treatment effect estimation over existing approaches, by reducing population-level treatment effect error by up to 66%, and patient-level treatment effect error by up to 58%. Thereby, OncoSynth supports reliable evidence generation for precision oncology in settings where data sharing is restricted.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OncoSynth，一种因果感知的生成式机器学习框架，用于合成保留因果关系的肿瘤学数据，以准确估计治疗效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 在肿瘤学中，患者级数据访问受限，现有合成数据方法未能保持协变量、治疗与结果间的因果关联，导致治疗效应估计有偏。需要一种能生成高保真数据并准确估计治疗效果的方法。
light_analysis.method: OncoSynth采用基于扩散的序列方法，首先建模协变量对治疗分配的影响，再建模治疗对生存的影响。在大规模肺癌（N=37,128）和乳腺癌（N=17,046）队列上生成合成数据，保留真实患者、治疗和结局分布。
light_analysis.result: OncoSynth生成高保真合成队列，与现有方法相比，人口级治疗效应误差降低66%，患者级治疗效应误差降低58%，显著提升了治疗效果估计的准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OncoSynth能够可靠地生成合成数据，支持在数据共享受限的场景下进行精准肿瘤学的证据生成。未来可扩展至更多癌症类型和治疗场景。

title: Bridging Spherical Black-Box Optimizers
abstract: When gradient information is unavailable, black-box optimization (BBO) methods provide a practical alternative. While Evolution Strategies (ES), Consensus-Based Optimization (CBO), Optimization via Integration (OVI), and related methods have each been studied independently, their connections remain underexplored. We unify these approaches within a common theoretical framework, revealing that they differ primarily in two design choices: fitness aggregation (controlling sharpness preference) and consensus scope (controlling modality). Leveraging these insights, we introduce hybrid optimizers that interpolate between existing methods. Our ES-OVI hybrid allows explicit control over the preference for flat minima, enabling a trade-off between performance and robustness in continuous control tasks. Our CBO-OVI hybrids combine the higher-dimensional efficiency of parametric methods with the multimodal capabilities of particle-based approaches, achieving competitive results on language model merging under limited evaluation budgets. We validate our methods on standard BBO benchmarks and higher-dimensional locomotion tasks, demonstrating that the hybrid methods can outperform their constituent algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架揭示ES、CBO、OVI等黑箱优化方法的联系，并引入混合优化器实现性能与鲁棒性的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 黑箱优化方法如演化策略、共识优化和集成优化各自独立研究，但其内在联系未被充分探索。缺乏统一理论指导使得方法选择依赖经验，无法灵活平衡多种目标（如平坦最小值偏好与多模态能力）。该工作旨在填补这一空白，提供可插拔的设计空间。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论统一框架识别出两种关键设计维度：适应度聚合（控制峰度偏好）和共识范围（控制模态性）。基于此，构建ES-OVI混合优化器（显式控制平坦最小值偏好）和CBO-OVI混合优化器（结合参数方法的高维效率与粒子方法的多模态能力）。方法在标准BBO基准和更高维运动控制任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在连续控制任务中，ES-OVI混合优化器允许权衡性能与鲁棒性；在语言模型合并场景中，CBO-OVI混合方法在有限评估预算下取得竞争性结果。混合方法在标准BBO基准和运动任务上均优于各自组成算法，表明泛化能力提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为黑箱优化提供了统一设计视角，混合优化器展示了根据任务需求定制算法维度的潜力。未来可扩展至更多基类组合及实际应用（如超参数调优、迁移学习）。局限性包括对高维问题的理论分析尚不充分。

title: Uncertainty Quantification for Computer-Use Agents: A Benchmark across Vision-Language Models and GUI Grounding Datasets
abstract: Computer-use agents turn vision-language model (VLM) predictions into executable GUI clicks, so reliable uncertainty estimates are essential for rejection, calibration, miss-severity ranking, and spatial safety regions. Yet evidence on post-hoc uncertainty quantification (UQ) for these agents is fragmented across isolated model and dataset pairs, leaving it unclear whether UQ rankings stay stable when the agent, benchmark, or observable interface changes. We present Argus, a cross-regime benchmark for post-hoc UQ in single-step executable GUI grounding: a 27-method open-weight matrix over 4 VLM agents and 4 datasets, plus an 8-method closed-source matrix across 3 frontier vendors where logits, hidden states, and attention maps are unavailable. Evaluated methods span logit-based scores, sampling and consistency measures, hidden-state and density estimators (Mahalanobis, SAPLMA), attention-based scores, P(True) and verbalised-confidence prompting, and split-conformal prediction. The main finding is selective transfer: UQ rankings are stable across datasets for a fixed model, but degrade across model classes and observable interfaces. Hidden-state and density methods are the most stable open-weight family, while CoCoA-1MCA, Focus, sampling-based scores, and verbalised self-assessment win in specific regimes. Within-model ranking transfer is strong (Spearman rho up to 0.969), but cross-tier transfer to closed-source vendors averages only +0.08, so closed-source UQ should be reranked on the target rather than extrapolated. Conformal click regions show score-level discrimination is not enough for deployment: locally weighted disks shrink radii by 40-60% when the plug-in UQ is calibrated, but coverage degrades under calibration-test or interface mismatch. We release per-item records, calibration/test splits, UQ scores, and analysis scripts for regime-aware UQ selection in GUI agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Argus基准，系统评估视觉语言模型在GUI grounding任务中的后验不确定性量化方法，揭示UQ排名在不同模型类和接口间的选择性迁移现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 计算机使用智能体依赖视觉语言模型（VLM）预测生成GUI点击，因此准确的不确定性估计对于拒绝、校准、错误严重性排序和空间安全区域至关重要。然而现有关于后验不确定性量化（UQ）的证据分散在孤立的模型和数据集对中，不清楚当智能体、基准或可观察接口变化时UQ排名是否稳定。缺乏跨体制的系统评估，导致难以选择可靠的UQ方法部署。
light_analysis.method: 构建Argus基准，包含27种开放权重方法和8种闭源方法，覆盖4个VLM智能体和4个GUI grounding数据集。评估方法包括基于logit的分数、采样与一致性度量、隐状态与密度估计（马氏距离、SAPLMA）、注意力分数、P(True)与言语化置信度提示、分裂共形预测。关键创新在于跨模型类、数据集和可观察接口的系统比较，并设计选择性迁移分析。
light_analysis.result: 主要发现是选择性迁移：UQ排名在固定模型下跨数据集稳定（Spearman rho高达0.969），但在模型类和可观察接口间退化。隐状态与密度方法是最稳定的开放权重家族，而CoCoA-1MCA、Focus、采样分数和言语化自评估在特定场景占优。跨层迁移到闭源供应商平均仅+0.08，因此闭源UQ应在目标上重新排名而非外推。共形点击区域显示分数级判别不足，校准后局部加权圆盘半径缩小40-60%，但校准-测试或接口不匹配时覆盖下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: Argus基准系统揭示了GUI grounding中UQ方法的选择性迁移特性，为不同场景提供方法选择指导。学术上强调了UQ排名依赖模型类和接口，实践中为部署可调校的UQ提供依据。局限性在于仅关注单步可执行 grounding，未来可扩展至多步任务；另外闭源模型UQ仍需在目标上单独测试。

title: Dual Distribution Estimation for Zero-shot Noisy Test-Time Adaptation with VLMs
abstract: While test-time adaptation (TTA) empowers vision-language models to adapt without costly retraining, it remains highly vulnerable to out-of-distribution (OOD) outliers prevalent in real-world applications. This discrepancy motivates Noisy TTA (NTTA), an online task to filter noisy OOD samples on the fly while maximizing in-distribution (ID) classification accuracy. Existing zero-shot NTTA approaches typically rely on test-time discriminative training, leading to overconfident misclassifications and significantly degraded inference efficiency. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework named Dual Distribution Estimation (DDE), shifting the zero-shot NTTA paradigm from instance-level learning to training-free Gaussian distribution modeling. DDE incorporates two novel modules: Positive Feature Distribution Estimation (PFDE) and Negative Label Distribution Estimation (NLDE). PFDE explicitly models class-wise inclusion and exclusion Gaussian distributions to formulate a calibrated contrastive score, robustly enhancing ID accuracy. In parallel, NLDE improves OOD identification by explicitly modeling the negative label distribution to mine highly discriminative labels, effectively mitigating spurious correlations. Extensive experiments show that on the large-scale ImageNet benchmark, DDE achieves an improvement of 3.70\% in harmonic mean accuracy and reduces the FPR95 for OOD detection by 6.20\%, while ensuring highly scalable and efficient online inference. Furthermore, DDE is zero-shot and training-free, demonstrating remarkable robustness in data-scarce scenarios. Codes are available at https://github.com/ZhuWenjie98/DDE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双分布估计（DDE）框架，通过无训练高斯分布建模实现零样本噪声测试时适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时适应（TTA）使视觉语言模型无需重训练即可适应新环境，但现实中的分布外（OOD）异常值使其易受干扰。现有零样本噪声TTA（NTTA）方法采用测试时判别训练，导致模型过度自信地误分类OOD样本且推理效率低下。因此需要更稳健高效的零样本NTTA方法。
light_analysis.method: DDE框架将NTTA从实例级学习转向无训练高斯分布建模。包含两个模块：正特征分布估计（PFDE）显式建模类内与排除高斯分布，形成校准对比分数增强ID精度；负标签分布估计（NLDE）显式建模负标签分布，挖掘高区分性标签缓解虚假相关性。整个框架零样本且无需训练。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet基准上，DDE在调和平均准确率上提升3.70%，OOD检测FPR95降低6.20%。同时具备高可扩展性和高效在线推理，在数据稀缺场景下表现鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: DDE通过无训练分布建模替代传统实例级学习，有效解决零样本NTTA中的过度自信和效率问题。实验验证了性能提升和鲁棒性。未来可探索扩展到更多视觉语言模型或复杂噪声环境。

title: OPERA: Aligning Open-Ended Reasoning via Objective Perplexity-based Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has enabled LLMs to excel in objective reasoning tasks such as mathematics and code generation. However, applying RL to open-ended tasks, such as creative writing, remains challenging because LLM-as-a-judge reward models often exhibit stylistic biases and positional inconsistencies, leading to unstable supervision. To address this, we propose OPERA (Objective Perplexity-based Reflective Alignment), which replaces unreliable external judges with intrinsic rewards derived from perplexity dynamics. Specifically, we derive an intrinsic reward signal from perplexity dynamics, quantifying uncertainty reduction at critical reflective states. During the cold-start phase, we introduce a data synthesis method that leverages carefully designed guiding words to generate diverse reasoning traces, along with perplexity-prioritized rollouts that utilize internal log-probabilities to identify logically consistent reasoning branches. This pipeline yields a large-scale dataset comprising 20,000 high-quality reasoning trajectories. Empirical evaluations consistently demonstrate the scalability and efficacy of our approach in alignment for open-ended tasks. Implementing OPERA on Qwen3-8B establishes a new state-of-the-art among open-source models, achieving parity with or surpassing proprietary models like Gemini2.5 and MiniMax-M2.5 in some open-ended tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/pangpang-xuan/OPERA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于困惑度动态的内在奖励机制（OPERA），解决开放式推理任务中RL对齐的监督不稳定问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习在数学、代码等客观推理任务中表现优异，但应用于创意写作等开放式任务时，LLM作为评判的奖励模型存在风格偏见和位置不一致，导致监督信号不稳定。该问题限制了LLM在开放式场景中的对齐效果，亟需一种无需外部评判的稳定奖励方法。
light_analysis.method: OPERA利用困惑度动态推导内在奖励信号，量化模型在关键反思状态下的不确定性减少。冷启动阶段设计引导词数据合成方法生成多样化推理轨迹，并结合困惑度优先滚动策略，基于内部对数概率选择逻辑一致的推理分支。构建包含2万条高质量推理轨迹的数据集，用于训练模型。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-8B上实现开源模型最优性能，部分开放式任务中达到或超越Gemini2.5、MiniMax-M2.5等闭源模型。实验验证方法的可扩展性和对齐有效性，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出基于困惑度内在奖励的强化学习对齐方法，有效解决开放式任务中外部奖励的不稳定问题。学术上为RL对齐提供新范式，实际应用可提升LLM在创意写作等场景的表现。未来可探索结合其他内在信号或扩展至更多开放式任务。

title: Gradient-based inverse lithography for EUV masks via the waveguide method and a physics-informed neural operator
abstract: Gradient-based inverse lithography technology~(ILT) for extreme ultraviolet~(EUV) masks is presented. A novel framework treats the differentiable waveguide method and the recently proposed waveguide neural operator~(WGNO) as end-to-end physics engines, recovering the permittivity of the absorber of the mask through automatic differentiation of the full forward diffraction model. Numerical experiments on realistic 2D and 3D absorbers of the mask (TaBN, La, U) at $λ{=}11.2$~nm show that the considered ILT methods make it possible to obtain a mask structure that achieves the desired field on the wafer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合可微波导方法与物理信息神经算子的梯度逆光刻框架，用于高效EUV掩模设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 逆光刻技术旨在优化掩模图案以实现所需晶圆场，但传统正向衍射模型计算复杂且难以微分，限制了梯度优化的应用。现有方法要么近似度过高，要么计算成本高昂。本研究通过可微分波导方法及物理信息神经算子，实现端到端的自动微分优化，从而高效恢复掩模吸收体的介电常数，解决EUV掩模反向设计中的精确性与效率矛盾。
light_analysis.method: 构建端到端框架，将可微分的波导方法与波导神经算子（WGNO）作为前向物理引擎，通过自动微分计算梯度，优化二维/三维吸收体（TaBN, La, U）的介电常数分布。关键创新在于WGNO作为物理信息代理模型加速求解，同时保持衍射模型的物理准确性，波长λ=11.2 nm。
light_analysis.result: 在真实二维与三维EUV掩模吸收体上的数值实验表明，所提梯度逆光刻方法能够获得实现目标晶圆场的掩模结构。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但证实了方法的可行性及与全波导方法的一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了可微波导方法与物理信息神经算子结合在EUV掩模反向设计中的有效性，为光刻分辨率增强提供了新路径。学术上拓展了物理信息学习在计算光刻中的应用，工业上有望降低掩模优化成本。未来工作可能涉及复杂三维结构及多波长扩展。

title: Black-Box Assisted Regression: Phase Transitions and Minimax Optimality
abstract: Foundation models are often used as fixed black-box predictors for downstream tasks with limited labeled data, but their predictions may be biased and unsafe to trust blindly. We study this setting through black-box assisted nonparametric regression: a learner observes labeled samples and can query a fixed predictor $f_0$, while the target $f^*$ is close to $f_0$ in $L_2(P_X)$ up to an unknown radius $δ$. We give a finite-sample minimax characterization showing a phase transition at $δ_c(n) \asymp n^{-β/(2β+d)}$, with leading risk $\min\{δ^2, n^{-2β/(2β+d)}\}$. We then analyze a Safe Residual Estimator: it learns a correction around $f_0$, initializes the residual head at zero so the initial predictor equals $f_0$, and uses holdout selection to revert to $f_0$ when the learned correction is not supported by validation data. Here, "safe" means avoiding negative transfer, i.e., performing worse than the black-box predictor alone. The estimator matches the leading minimax term up to an additive validation-selection cost. Synthetic regression experiments verify the predicted phase transition, while CIFAR-100 with CLIP and AG News with Qwen3-8B provide practice-facing evidence that the same residual-correction tradeoff is useful beyond the formal squared-loss regression setting.
comment: 23 pages, 3 figures. Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 研究黑箱辅助非参数回归中的相变现象和极小化最优性，提出安全残差估计器避免负迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 基础模型作为固定黑箱预测器用于下游任务，但其预测可能存在偏差，盲目信任不安全。现有方法缺乏对黑箱辅助回归的理论理解，尤其是何时依赖黑箱、何时学习修正的权衡，导致实际应用可能负迁移。
light_analysis.method: 提出安全残差估计器，学习围绕黑箱预测器f0的修正残差，初始化残差头为零以保持初始预测等于f0，并通过留出验证选择性地回退到f0。理论分析给出有限样本极小化风险，刻画相变阈值δ_c(n) ≍ n^{-β/(2β+d)}。
light_analysis.result: 理论表明前导风险为min{δ^2, n^{-2β/(2β+d)}}，估计器匹配极小化前导项，附加验证选择代价。合成实验验证相变现象，CIFAR-100+CLIP和AG News+Qwen3-8B实验显示残差修正权衡在分类任务中同样有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了黑箱辅助非参数回归的极小化最优理论，安全残差估计器提供实用方法。学术价值是建立相变理论，应用价值是在有限数据下安全利用预训练模型。未来可扩展至其他损失函数和更复杂的黑箱模型。

title: Point Cloud Diffusion with Global and Local Reconstruction for Instance-Level 3D Anomaly Detection
abstract: 3D anomaly detection in point clouds is critical for high-precision industrial manufacturing. Reconstruction-based methods have laid a strong foundation by detecting 3D anomalies through comparisons between defective inputs and their reconstructed normal counterparts. However, existing methods still suffer from two challenges: 1) the foreground weak defective regions such as scratches are hard to reconstruct and detect, where the anomaly deviations in normalized point clouds can be as small as $10^{-3}$; 2) the background non-defective regions are prone to get positional bias in reconstruction, which leads to false positives. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{PCDiff}, a point cloud diffusion framework for instance-level 3D anomaly generation and detection. In the generation phase, an instance-level multi-modal attention is embedded into the generation framework, where anomalies are conditioned with texture gradient, image patch, text and mask. The instance-level condition enables the high-quality generation of weak-defective anomalies. In the detection phase, a joint local-global reconstruction algorithm is introduced to ensure local anomaly restoration and global geometric consistency, which preserves background normal structure while restoring the foreground defect. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed PCDiff significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both 3D anomaly generation fidelity and reconstruction quality, leading to substantial improvements in anomaly detection accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PCDiff，一个点云扩散框架，通过实例级多模态条件生成和联合局部-全局重建，实现高性能实例级3D异常检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D点云异常检测对高精度工业制造至关重要，但现有重建方法面临两大挑战：前景弱缺陷（如划痕）重建困难，偏差可小至10^{-3}；背景非缺陷区域易出现位置偏差导致误检。亟需一种兼顾精细缺陷重建与背景几何一致性的方法。
light_analysis.method: PCDiff包含生成与检测两阶段。生成阶段嵌入实例级多模态注意力，以纹理梯度、图像块、文本和掩码为条件生成弱缺陷异常；检测阶段采用联合局部-全局重建算法，局部模块恢复缺陷、全局模块保持几何一致性，从而保留背景正常结构。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，PCDiff在3D异常生成逼真度和重建质量上显著优于现有最先进方法，进一步大幅提升了异常检测的准确率（摘要未提供具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: PCDiff通过扩散框架有效解决了弱缺陷重建和背景误检两大挑战，显著提高了实例级3D异常检测精度，对工业精密制造具有重要应用价值。未来可拓展至更多3D异常检测场景。

title: UniTeD: Unified Temporal Diffusion for Joint Perception and Planning in Autonomous Driving
abstract: Diffusion models have shown strong potential for multi-modal planning in end-to-end autonomous driving. However, most existing methods confine diffusion to the planning module, conditioning on fixed outputs from separate discriminative perception networks.
