This decoupled design propagates perception errors to the planner, increasing optimization difficulty and reducing robustness. To overcome these limitations, we propose UniTeD, a Unified Temporal Diffusion framework that jointly models perception and planning through iterative denoising in a shared generative space. By enabling bidirectional information exchange, the framework facilitates mutual refinement between tasks and improves robustness via noise-conditioned multi-task training. We further extend this unified diffusion paradigm to a streaming setting by incorporating temporal context. A Temporal Transition Module (TTM) is introduced to resolve the noise-level mismatch between historical and current frames. In addition, we propose an Anchor Refresh Strategy (ARS) to alleviate the training-inference distribution shift commonly observed in sparse diffusion-based end-to-end driving frameworks. Without bells and whistles, UniTeD achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, surpassing both recent discriminative end-to-end methods and diffusion-based planning approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniTeD统一时间扩散框架，联合建模感知和规划，通过共享生成空间迭代去噪实现双向信息交换，提升鲁棒性和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法将扩散模型限制在规划模块，依赖于独立判别感知网络的固定输出，这种解耦设计导致感知误差传播到规划器，增加优化难度并降低鲁棒性。因此需要一种统一框架，使感知和规划在共享生成空间中相互协同，避免误差累积。
light_analysis.method: UniTeD基于扩散模型，在共享生成空间中联合建模感知和规划，通过迭代去噪实现双向信息交换和噪声条件多任务训练。扩展到流式场景时，引入时间过渡模块(TTM)解决历史与当前帧的噪声级别不匹配，并设计锚点刷新策略(ARS)缓解训练-测试分布偏移。
light_analysis.result: UniTeD在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能，超越了最近的判别式端到端方法和基于扩散的规划方法，包括但不限于规划精度和鲁棒性提升。摘要未明确具体数值，但表明显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniTeD通过统一时间扩散框架联合感知与规划，验证了生成式联合建模在自动驾驶中的潜力，可有效减少误差传播。未来可探索更复杂的时序依赖和更高效的采样策略。

title: Efficient Real-World Dehazing via Physics-Inspired Global-Local Decoupling
abstract: Real-world single image dehazing is highly ill-posed due to spatially and spectrally varying scattering, while practical deployment demands lightweight and low-latency models. Existing approaches either rely on fragile physical inversion under simplified assumptions or adopt heavy blind architectures unsuitable for edge deployment. To overcome these limitations, we propose PGL-Net (Physics-Inspired Global-Local Decoupling Network), a lightweight framework that incorporates physical inductive biases via operator-level emulation, avoiding explicit parameter estimation. It decouples dehazing into global distribution rectification and local structural refinement. A Physics-Inspired Affine Fusion (PAF) module performs globally conditioned alignment across hierarchical skip connections to compensate for haze-induced bias, while a compact Degradation-Aware Modulation (DAM) block adaptively restores spatially and spectrally variant details through dynamic feature modulation. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world benchmarks demonstrate that PGL-Net achieves state-of-the-art restoration quality with significantly reduced complexity. Compared with the recent SOTA SGDN, the Tiny variant (PGL-Net-T) improves PSNR by up to 2.6dB and consistently enhances downstream object detection accuracy, while achieving over a 10x reduction in inference latency. Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/sc-30-bit/PGL-Net.

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理启发的全局-局部解耦网络(PGL-Net)，实现高效轻量级真实世界单图像去雾。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实世界单图像去雾由于空间和光谱变化散射而高度病态，实际部署需要轻量级低延迟模型。现有方法要么在简化假设下采用脆弱的物理逆模型，要么采用不适合边缘部署的重型黑箱架构，均存在局限性。
light_analysis.method: 提出PGL-Net，通过算子级仿真融入物理归纳偏置，避免显式参数估计。将去雾解耦为全局分布校正和局部结构细化：物理启发仿射融合(PAF)模块在层次跳跃连接间进行全局条件对齐，以补偿雾引起的偏差；紧凑的退化感知调制(DAM)块通过动态特征调制自适应恢复空间和光谱变化的细节。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界基准上，PGL-Net取得最先进的恢复质量，同时显著降低复杂度。与最新SOTA方法SGDN相比，PGL-Net-Tiny变体PSNR提升高达2.6dB，一致提升下游目标检测精度，推理延迟降低超过10倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: PGL-Net通过物理启发的全局-局部解耦实现了高效去雾，兼顾了质量与效率，适用于边缘部署。开源代码有助于推动实际应用。未来可能探索更复杂的物理模型集成或进一步压缩模型。

title: Position Spaces and Graphs
abstract: In this paper, we introduce position graphs, a graph-based reasoning framework based on the formalization of position spaces. This framework utilizes two strict partial orders, representing horizontal and vertical alignment and precedence, to model the relative positions of discrete tokens. Unlike general qualitative spatial calculi, position graphs are constrained by a chain condition and compatibility requirements that focus on rows and columns. We provide a comprehensive theoretical analysis of this representation, beginning with a characterization of graph consistency. Conditions to ensure the consistency of position graphs are established. Furthermore, we investigate the computational complexity of structural pattern discovery, modeled as the induced subgraph isomorphism problem. We demonstrate that this problem remains NP-complete even within the restricted class of position graphs. While initially motivated by document processing, this work focuses on the underlying mathematical properties and algebraic consistency of position-based constraints, providing a formal logical layer that is independent of specific data extraction techniques.

light_analysis.overview: 提出位置图框架，用两个严格偏序建模离散标记的相对位置，并分析其一致性和计算复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 文档处理等领域需要形式化表示离散标记的相对位置，而现有定性空间演算缺乏针对行/列约束的链条件和兼容性要求，难以直接应用。本文旨在建立一种独立于具体数据提取技术的逻辑层，为基于位置的推理提供数学基础。
light_analysis.method: 定义位置图，基于两个严格偏序（水平和垂直对齐与优先），并引入链条件和兼容性约束以聚焦行和列。通过图一致性刻画建立条件，并研究结构模式发现（诱导子图同构问题）的计算复杂度，证明其在位置图类中仍为NP-完全。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，位置图的一致性可由所建立的条件保证；诱导子图同构问题在位置图限制下保持NP-完全性，揭示了该推理框架的计算困难程度。摘要未提供具体实验数据或对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为位置约束提供了一种形式化的数学框架，独立于具体数据提取技术，具有通用性。尽管源于文档处理，但侧重理论性质，为后续应用奠定基础。未来可探索更高效的算法或扩展至其他领域。

title: What Does the Brain See? Multiview Neural Representations to Demystify the Brain-Visual Alignment
abstract: Zero-shot visual decoding from electroencephalography (EEG) aims to infer visual semantics from non-invasive neural recordings, but remains challenging due to the low signal-to-noise ratio, non-stationarity, and limited spatial resolution of EEG. Existing EEG-vision alignment methods often rely on holistic EEG embeddings, which can obscure the complementary temporal, spectral, and spatial structure underlying visual perception. We introduce a unified multiview EEG representation learning framework for aligning brain responses with visual semantic embeddings. Our method builds an EEG encoder that jointly models three complementary views: input-conditioned state-space temporal dynamics, learnable wavelet-based spectral decomposition for sample-adaptive frequency modeling, and attention-modulated graph learning for structured electrode interactions. The resulting multiview EEG embeddings are fused and aligned with pretrained visual representations in a shared semantic space using contrastive learning with EEG-specific regularization, enabling 200-way zero-shot visual classification. Experiments on THINGS-EEG benchmark show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with 54.8% Top-1 and 85.6% Top-5 accuracy in the within-subject setting and 15.3% Top-1 and 45.4% Top-5 accuracy in the cross-subject setting. We further present the first systematic cross-session EEG-image decoding evaluation, achieving 40.8% Top-1 and 78.0% Top-5 accuracy. These results suggest that explicitly modeling multiview neural structure improves both semantic alignment and generalization in EEG-based visual decoding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一的多视图EEG表示学习框架，通过建模时间、频谱和空间结构实现与视觉语义的零样本对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 从脑电图零样本解码视觉语义面临信噪比低、非平稳性和空间分辨率有限等挑战。现有方法依赖整体EEG嵌入，忽略了视觉感知背后互补的时间、频谱和空间结构，导致对齐效果不佳。该研究旨在通过显式建模多视图神经结构来提升语义对齐和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建一个EEG编码器，联合建模三种互补视图：输入条件状态空间时间动态、可学习小波频谱分解实现样本自适应频率建模、注意力调制图学习建模电极交互。多视图EEG嵌入融合后，通过对比学习和EEG特定正则化与预训练视觉表示在共享语义空间对齐，实现200路零样本视觉分类。
light_analysis.result: 在THINGS-EEG基准上达到最先进性能：受试者内设置Top-1准确率54.8%、Top-5准确率85.6%；跨受试者设置Top-1准确率15.3%、Top-5准确率45.4%。首次进行系统性跨会话EEG图像解码评估，取得Top-1准确率40.8%、Top-5准确率78.0%，表明多视图神经结构显式建模改善了语义对齐和泛化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出统一多视图EEG表示学习框架，通过分解时间、频谱和空间结构显著提升脑电-视觉对齐性能。该工作为基于EEG的视觉解码提供了新范式，具有神经科学和脑机接口应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的交互建模和跨模态预训练策略。

title: Cellular Predictions on the Move: What about Data?
abstract: Mobile cellular load forecasting is native to network resource optimization and delivery of services with reliability, latency and quality guarantees. The mainstream of machine learning research in the area is focused primarily on developing powerful learning structures for improved prediction accuracy. The data used for forecasting traditionally belong to the cellular domain and at most contain exogenous information about the surroundings of the base stations. We approach the prediction task from the perspective of data as a vital component of any data learning process. We hypothesize that substantial improvements could be achieved when the data inform on the processes that create the cellular load. Specifically, we propose to characterize the population dynamics -- the potential number of cellular traffic sources and their mobility -- in addition to employing historical time series of mobile data traffic. We validate our hypothesis for the rarely examined highway scenario. Comprehensive experiments show forecasting improvements on the order of $60\%$ due to the use of these data alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过人口动态数据改进移动蜂窝负载预测，在高速场景实现约60%的提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前移动蜂窝负载预测主要依赖蜂窝域数据和基站周围外源信息，忽略了数据生成过程的根本因素。人口动态（流量源数量及移动性）能更好反映负载变化机制，而现有方法未充分利用此类数据，导致预测精度受限。
light_analysis.method: 提出将人口动态特征（潜在移动流量源数量及移动性）与历史时间序列结合，作为模型输入。在高速场景下验证，使用传统预测模型（未指定具体架构）对比仅使用蜂窝域数据的基准方法。
light_analysis.result: 在高速场景实验中，仅加入人口动态数据即可使预测性能提升约60%（具体指标未明确），表明该方法显著优于传统仅依赖蜂窝域数据的预测方式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了数据质量（尤其反映负载生成过程的数据）对预测关键作用，为移动负载预测提供新视角。未来可扩展至其他场景（如城市），并探索更细粒度的人口动态建模。

title: GUI agent: Guided Exploration of User-Sensitive Screens
abstract: LLM agents are increasingly being used to automate tasks for users within an open GUI environment. They inevitably encounter screens containing user-sensitive information, for which takeover of task execution by the user is highly desirable or even necessary. State-of-the-art LLM-driven agents are usually fine-tuned to complete tasks regardless of the safety implications of their actions. This makes their real-world deployment difficult and adversely affects the reliability. Therefore, it is crucial to identify and categorize user-sensitive states and define user-sensitive queries. This dataset would be to engineers to recognize and request handover to the user in critical scenarios. This short paper develops an explorer agent that systematically explores the query space starting from one demonstrated task to identify queries that, if executed, would lead to user-sensitive states in a GUI environment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个探索代理，系统性地从示范任务出发探索查询空间，以识别GUI环境中会触发用户敏感状态的查询。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理在开放GUI环境中自动化任务时，不可避免地会遇到包含用户敏感信息的屏幕，此时需要用户接管。现有LLM驱动的代理通常被微调以完成任务而不考虑安全性，导致实际部署困难且影响可靠性。因此，识别和分类用户敏感状态并定义用户敏感查询至关重要，以便工程人员在关键场景中识别并请求用户接管。
light_analysis.method: 开发了一个探索代理，该代理从单个示范任务开始，系统性地探索查询空间。通过遍历可能的查询，代理能够识别那些执行后会导致用户敏感状态的查询。该方法无需大量标注数据，而是利用示范任务作为起点，自动发现敏感场景，为后续构建用户敏感查询数据集提供基础。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但论文通过探索代理方法成功识别了用户敏感查询。该方法有望为工程师提供数据集，帮助识别并请求用户接管。实际效果需进一步实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一个识别GUI环境中用户敏感状态的探索代理方法，增强了LLM代理在敏感场景下的安全性。该工作为构建用户敏感查询数据集提供了自动化的途径，有助于提升LLM代理在真实世界部署中的可靠性。未来可扩展至更多类型的环境和任务。

title: Falcon: Functional Assembly and Language for Compositional Reasoning in X-ray
abstract: Conventional vision-language models are largely object-centric, focusing on detecting and describing individual entities. In safety-critical X-ray baggage screening, however, threat often emerges not from a single object but from the functional compatibility of spatially dispersed components, such as batteries, detonators, and explosive charges. We formalize this setting as \emph{compositional threat reasoning}, where risk is modeled as a relational property of grounded regions rather than an independent detection outcome. We introduce \textbf{Falcon}, a multimodal framework that abstracts segmentation-aware region features into a structured safety state capturing component presence, pairwise functional compatibility, and scene-level risk. This structured representation is injected into the language model as an explicit intermediate interface, encouraging relationally consistent and safety-aware reasoning. To evaluate this problem, we present \textbf{Falcon-X}, a benchmark that unifies dense grounding with structured supervision over component completeness and risk inference in cluttered X-ray imagery. Experiments show that while existing multimodal models adapt to appearance, they struggle with compositional safety reasoning. Falcon improves functional grounding and produces more coherent threat assessments, establishing compositional safety reasoning as a distinct evaluation paradigm for multimodal systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Falcon框架，通过结构化安全状态实现X射线图像中的组合威胁推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型以对象为中心，关注单独实体检测，但在安检中威胁往往源于分散组件的功能兼容性（如电池、雷管、炸药）。因此需要一种新的推理范式，将风险建模为空间分散组件之间的关系属性，而非独立检测结果。
light_analysis.method: Falcon框架将分割感知的区域特征抽象为结构化安全状态，包含组件存在性、成对功能兼容性和场景级风险。该结构化表示作为显式中间接口注入语言模型，促进关系一致和安全感知推理。同时构建Falcon-X基准，统一密集标注与结构监督。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，现有多模态模型能适应外观但难以进行组合安全推理。Falcon在功能接地和威胁评估连贯性上显著提升，建立了组合安全推理作为多模态系统的新评估范式。
light_analysis.conclusion: Falcon通过结构化安全状态实现了组合威胁推理，为安检领域提供了更可靠的解决方案。该工作推动多模态系统从对象检测转向关系推理，具有重要应用价值。未来可扩展至其他安全关键场景。

title: Memory-Efficient Policy Libraries with Low-Rank Adaptation in Reinforcement Learning
abstract: When fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs), there has been success in minimizing both memory usage and computation with Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT), like Low Rank Adaptation (LoRA). In this article, we have explored whether this approach is transferable to the world of robotics and Reinforcement Learning (RL), allowing learning with reduced memory usage and improved computational performance. Specifically, we focused on a version of multi-task robotics, where a library of specialist policies are created. In such a library memory efficiency is especially important. We used a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm and fine-tuned a baseline model to different tasks using LoRA. Our results demonstrate that, depending on the hyperparameters, LoRA can minimize memory usage by a factor of 20-160 compared to full fine-tuning of all layers. This implies a 90-95% storage saving when deploying a library of many (10-50) specialized policies, which can be the differentiating factor between being able to store the entire library in memory or having to use swap-memory in an applied robotics setting. At the same time, our results indicate that there is no significant difference in the success-rate between full fine-tuning and LoRA fine-tuning for the selected tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文探索将低秩适应（LoRA）应用于强化学习，构建内存高效的多任务策略库，在保持成功率的同时大幅降低存储需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多任务机器人强化学习中，常需为每个任务训练专用策略，形成策略库。全参数微调方法存储开销大，尤其库规模增大时内存瓶颈突出。参数高效微调方法如LoRA在大型语言模型微调中已成功减少内存和计算，但将其迁移至强化学习领域的研究尚不足。本研究旨在验证LoRA在强化学习中是否同样能实现内存节省，同时不损失任务性能。
light_analysis.method: 基于Proximal Policy Optimization（PPO）算法，以基线模型为起点，采用LoRA模块对不同机器人任务进行微调。LoRA通过在权重矩阵上添加低秩分解矩阵来更新，仅需训练少量额外参数，避免全参数更新。实验中针对多任务场景构建包含10-50个专用策略的库，评估不同超参数下的内存占用和成功率。
light_analysis.result: LoRA微调相比全参数微调内存占用减少20-160倍，存储节省达90-95%，使得10-50个策略的库可完全载入内存，无需交换内存。在所选任务上的成功率与全参数微调无显著差异，验证了LoRA在强化学习中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了LoRA可有效应用于强化学习，实现多任务策略库的显著内存缩减且不损失性能。这为资源受限的机器人系统部署提供了实用方案，尤其适合需要快速切换多种策略的场景。未来可探索更复杂任务和动态超参数调整。

title: BitNet Text Embeddings
abstract: LLM-based text embedders have substantially improved retrieval and semantic representation quality, but their deployment remains costly: large backbone models slow down embedding inference, while high-dimensional full-precision embeddings impose substantial storage and bandwidth overhead on large-scale indexes. In this paper, we present BITEMBED, an extreme low-bit framework for LLM-based text embedding that jointly targets encoding efficiency and vector storage. BITEMBED converts pretrained LLM backbones into BitNet-style embedding encoders with ternary weights, quantized activations, and lightweight normalization refinement. The converted model is adapted to representation learning through continual contrastive pre-training, followed by supervised contrastive fine-tuning with both similarity-distribution distillation and attention-relation distillation from a full-precision teacher. Beyond quantizing the backbone, BITEMBED further trains output embeddings to support multiple storage precisions meeting different storage needs in various scenarios. Experiments on MMTEB (eng, v2) with Qwen3-0.6B and Gemma3-270M show that BITEMBED is largely comparable to full precision teacher embedders. Moreover, BITEMBED flexibly obtains text embeddings of various precisions, achieving a trade-off between performance and storage cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BITEMBED，一种极低比特框架，将LLM转化为BitNet风格嵌入编码器，实现编码效率和向量存储的联合优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的文本嵌入模型虽然提升了检索和语义表示质量，但部署成本高昂：大型骨干模型减慢嵌入推理，高维全精度嵌入在大型索引中带来巨大的存储和带宽开销。现有方法难以同时解决推理速度和存储效率问题。
light_analysis.method: BITEMBED将预训练LLM骨干转换为BitNet风格的嵌入编码器，采用三元权重、量化激活和轻量归一化精炼。通过持续对比预训练进行表示学习适应，再通过全精度教师的相似度分布蒸馏和注意力关系蒸馏进行监督对比微调。此外，训练输出嵌入以支持多种存储精度，满足不同场景需求。
light_analysis.result: 在MMTEB（英文，v2）上使用Qwen3-0.6B和Gemma3-270M进行评估，BITEMBED性能与全精度教师嵌入器基本相当。同时能灵活获得不同精度的文本嵌入，实现了性能与存储成本之间的权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: BITEMBED通过极低比特量化和知识蒸馏，有效降低了LLM文本嵌入的推理和存储成本，同时保持与全精度模型相当的语义表示质量。该框架为大规模检索系统提供了高效的部署方案，未来可探索更极端的量化策略或跨模态扩展。

title: Learning Subset-Shared Invariances for Domain Generalization with Mixture-of-Experts
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) aims to learn a model from one or more source domains that generalizes to an unseen target domain without accessing target data during training. A common approach enforces invariance of representations across all source domains, assuming predictive structure is globally shared. However, we demonstrate that enforcing invariance across more domains gradually restricts the feasible representation space, discarding transferable predictive factors that are not universally shared. To address this limitation, we propose subset-shared invariance, where predictive structure is assumed stable only within domain subsets. We implement this principle with a mixture-of-experts architecture, where each expert aligns the specific domains it serves and a routing mechanism composes subset-invariant components for prediction. This creates a routing-conditioned invariance, jointly learned with the representation. To facilitate effective decomposition, we develop training objectives that encourage selective alignment, confident and balanced routing, and diverse expert specialization. Experiments on DomainBed benchmarks demonstrate improved out-of-domain generalization and greater robustness under increasing domain heterogeneity. Our results suggest that DG should move beyond enforcing a single global invariance and instead model invariance through partially shared structure across domain subsets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出子集共享不变性，通过混合专家架构实现域泛化，超越全局不变性限制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有域泛化方法强制所有源域共享不变性，但全局不变性会限制表示空间，丢弃非普遍共享但可迁移的预测因素，尤其在域异质性增加时问题更严重。
light_analysis.method: 提出子集共享不变性，利用混合专家架构：每个专家对其服务的特定域子集进行对齐，路由机制动态组合子集不变组件进行预测。联合学习路由条件不变性，并通过训练目标鼓励选择性对齐、自信均衡路由和专家多样化特化。
light_analysis.result: 在DomainBed基准上，所提方法显著提升了域外泛化性能，并在域异质性增加时表现出更强的鲁棒性，优于强制单一全局不变性的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 域泛化应放弃单一全局不变性，转而通过域子集的部分共享结构来建模不变性，这能保留更多可迁移的预测结构，提升泛化能力。未来可探索更灵活的路由策略。

title: Towards a Dynamic and Fixed-budget Memory Bank for Efficient Streaming Video Understanding
abstract: Currently, streaming video understanding is still a daunting task for existing \emph{multimodal large language models} (MLLMs). Its difficulties not only lie in handling the ever-increasing video frames, but also in the unpredictability of future video content and input instructions. In this paper, we study this task from the perspective of constructing a dynamic but fixed-budget memory bank, and propose a novel and training-free approach termed \emph{\textbf{CausalMem}}. CausalMem is dedicated to constructing a dynamic visual memory update mechanism, thereby maximizing the amount of information in streaming video within a limited memory space, much like the human brain. In practice, CausalMem estimates the redundancy of visual tokens and updates the memory bank via an online semantic basis, which models the principal semantics of the observed video stream. To validate CausalMem, we apply it to two representative MLLMs, namely LLaVA-OneVision and Qwen2.5-VL respectively, and conduct extensive experiments on both streaming and offline video understanding benchmarks. The experimental results not only show the great advantages than existing methods under both streaming and offline settings, \emph{e.g.}, $+3.2\%$ and $+3.0\%$ average accuracy gains respectively, but also witness the superior semantic preservation for streaming videos, \emph{e.g.}, using 12$k$ token budgets to memorize hour-long streaming videos, which achieves more than \textbf{20$\times$} visual token compression ratio and only occupies about \textbf{82 MB} storage. \textbf{Our code} is given in \href{https://github.com/hktk07/CausalMem}{CausalMem}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的动态固定预算记忆库方法CausalMem，用于高效流式视频理解，通过在线语义基础最大化信息保留。
light_analysis.motivation: 流式视频理解对现有多模态大语言模型仍是挑战，难点在于处理不断增长的视频帧以及未来视频内容和输入指令的不可预测性。现有方法难以在有限内存中高效保存流式视频的丰富信息，缺乏动态更新机制。因此，需要一种能够动态管理视觉记忆、在固定预算下最大化信息量的方法。
light_analysis.method: CausalMem通过在线语义基础估计视觉令牌冗余，并动态更新记忆库，模拟人脑的视觉记忆机制。方法无需训练，可即插即用于现有MLLM（如LLaVA-OneVision和Qwen2.5-VL）。记忆库通过主成分语义建模，在固定预算下保留最关键的视觉信息，实现高效压缩。
light_analysis.result: 在流式视频理解基准上平均准确率提升3.2%，离线基准提升3.0%。使用12k令牌预算可记忆长达1小时的流式视频，实现20倍以上的视觉令牌压缩比，仅占用约82 MB存储。与现有方法相比，优势显著，且能更好地保留语义信息。
light_analysis.conclusion: CausalMem为流式视频理解提供了一种高效、无需训练的解决方案，通过动态记忆更新机制，在固定预算下实现高信息密度和低存储占用。该工作具有实用价值，可应用于实时视频分析场景。未来可探索更复杂的语义建模策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: Steering Vision-Language Models with Joint Sparse Autoencoders
abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have shown promise for analyzing language models, but applying them to vision-language models (VLMs) often yields representations that are difficult to use as controllable cross-modal steering directions. We introduce the Joint Sparse Autoencoder (JSAE), which uses an explicit alignment constraint to jointly factorize sequence-pooled vision and language activations into shared, interpretable image/caption-level features. Applied to LLaVA, JSAE recovers cross-modal features for recognizable concepts (e.g., food and animals). Through bidirectional interventions (additive steering and suppression), we observe a layer-dependent asymmetry under our protocol: additive steering peaks at mid-to-late (pre-output) layers and weakens at both ends, whereas suppression scores remain within a comparable range across all probed layers within statistical noise. Experiments on three VLMs, namely LLaVA-v1.6-Mistral-7B, Llama3-LLaVA-8B, and the MoE-based Qwen3-VL-30B, show related layer-localized effects across architectures. Together, these results suggest that explicitly aligned sparse representations support more controllable intervention-based analysis of multimodal features, within an identifiable layer range, than the unconstrained alternatives tested here.

light_analysis.overview: 提出联合稀疏自编码器（JSAE），通过显式对齐约束联合分解视觉和语言激活，实现可控跨模态干预分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器（SAE）主要应用于语言模型，但在视觉语言模型（VLM）中难以获得可用于可控跨模态干预的可解释表示。需要一种方法能够联合分解视觉和语言特征，产生共享的、可解释的图像/字幕级特征，并支持双向干预操作，以分析VLM中多模态特征的表示机制。当前方法缺乏显式对齐约束，导致干预效果不可控。
light_analysis.method: 提出联合稀疏自编码器（JSAE），引入显式对齐约束，联合分解序列池化的视觉和语言激活为共享的稀疏特征。在LLaVA模型上训练，使编码器学习跨越图像和文本模态的可解释概念（如食物、动物）。使用双向干预（加性引导和抑制）来测试模型行为，分析不同层级的干预效果。
light_analysis.result: 在LLaVA-v1.6-Mistral-7B、Llama3-LLaVA-8B和Qwen3-VL-30B三个VLM上实验表明：加性引导在中间到输出层效果最强，两端减弱；抑制得分在各层范围内波动但稳定。JSAE相比无约束方法在特定层范围内支持更可控的干预分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: JSAE通过显式对齐的稀疏表示提升了VLM多模态特征的可控干预能力，揭示了层依赖的干预不对称性。该工作为VLM的可解释性和可控生成提供了新工具，未来可扩展到更复杂的多模态架构和下游任务。局限性在于干预效果受限于层范围，且需进一步验证泛化性。

title: Is GraphRAG Needed? From Basic RAG to Graph-/Agentic Solutions with Context Optimization
abstract: As advanced RAG variants like GraphRAG and Agentic RAG emerge, one leading question is when and how to use them. Here, we introduce a framework for different RAG scenarios evaluation and comparison on semi-structured knowledge bases, including regular RAG, GraphRAG, Modular RAG and Agentic RAG. We provide implementation for 9 standardized RAG scenarios, and conduct experiments for a comprehensive comparison. These scenarios are designed for real use cases regarding data and domain restrictions, spanning from simple document-based retrieval to advanced features such as hybrid text-graph retrieval, integration with computed or pre-defined domain knowledge graphs, agentic multi-step planning, and agent-graph integration. Besides, we present a novel context engineering method for GraphRAG and Agentic RAG, addressing the context/memory overflow issues, efficiently managing text and graph retrievals with new representations and agentic loop design, leading to 19%-53% reduction on token usage. Moreover, further analysis identifies a retrieval-generation gap where expanded retrieval does not proportionally improve generation quality, suggesting retrieval-oriented metrics overstate advanced retrieval benefits. This work provides data-driven insights on when and how to use them for building production-ready intelligent RAG systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出评估框架和上下文优化方法，解决GraphRAG/Agentic RAG的内存溢出，实现19%-53%的token缩减。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着GraphRAG、Agentic RAG等高级RAG变体的出现，如何根据实际场景选择和使用它们成为关键问题。现有方法缺乏系统性的比较框架，且高级RAG常面临上下文/内存溢出问题，导致性能与成本失衡。此外，检索-生成差距表明扩展检索未必提升生成质量，需要更高效的资源利用。因此，本研究旨在提供数据驱动的选择指南和优化方案，以构建生产级智能RAG系统。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一个统一的评估框架，涵盖常规RAG、GraphRAG、Modular RAG和Agentic RAG共9种标准化场景。针对GraphRAG和Agentic RAG的上下文溢出问题，设计了一种新型上下文工程方法，通过新的文本和图检索表示以及智能体循环设计来管理内存，并采用优化策略减少冗余token。实验基于半结构化知识库，比较各场景在真实用例下的表现，包括文档检索、混合文本-图检索、领域知识图谱集成及多步规划等。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，所提出的上下文工程方法在GraphRAG和Agentic RAG上实现了19%-53%的token使用量降低，同时保持了生成质量。进一步分析揭示了检索-生成差距：扩展检索并未按比例提升生成质量，表明检索导向的指标可能高估了高级检索的收益。研究提供了不同场景下的性能对比，为选择合适RAG变体提供了定量依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作系统比较了多种RAG变体，提出了有效的上下文优化技术，显著降低了token消耗。学术上揭示了检索-生成差距，强调生成质量需与检索效率平衡。实践上，为开发者提供了选择和使用RAG方法的数据驱动指南，助力构建经济高效的生产系统。未来可探索自适应检索策略及更精细的上下文管理机制。

title: Auto-Labelling-Based Domain Transfer for 3D Object Detection on a Bicycle-Mounted LiDAR Platform
abstract: Reliable 3D perception of vulnerable road users (VRUs) such as cyclists and pedestrians is essential for their safety in urban traffic and a core requirement for autonomous driving (AD). Alongside advances in vehicle-based perception, research increasingly equips bicycles with sensors to study traffic from a perspective native to VRUs. Such platforms still rely on LiDAR detectors originally trained on vehicle data, yet annotated 3D data from a cyclist's perspective is scarce. How well these detectors generalise to this setting has not been evaluated. We present a 3D object detection benchmark of 1,027 annotated LiDAR keyframes (over 18,000 3D bounding boxes) from the FUSE-Bike platform in urban Munich. We evaluate four nuScenes-pre-trained detectors against 1,854 human-verified ground-truth (GT) boxes both in their original form and after finetuning on training labels produced by a VRU-dedicated auto-labelling pipeline that requires no manual annotation. The zero-shot domain gap is concentrated on the VRU classes. Finetuning recovers most of it, improving mean average precision (mAP) by up to 23.4 points with the largest gains on pedestrians and cyclists, and the adapted detectors even surpass the quality of the auto-labels they were trained on. The benchmark provides a reproducible baseline for VRU-centric 3D detection and shows that auto-labels are a viable substitute for manual annotation when adapting vehicle-trained detectors to a cyclist platform.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于自动标注的域迁移方法，用于自行车搭载LiDAR平台的3D目标检测，验证了自动标签可替代人工标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于车辆的自动驾驶感知研究已取得进展，但脆弱道路用户（如骑行者、行人）的3D感知仍缺乏数据。从自行车视角采集的3D标注数据稀缺，现有检测器多基于车辆数据训练，难以直接泛化到自行车平台。该研究旨在评估车辆预训练检测器在自行车视角的零样本表现，并探索使用自动标注实现域迁移的可行性。
light_analysis.method: 构建了FUSE-Bike平台采集的1,027帧LiDAR关键帧基准数据集，包含超过18,000个3D边界框。评估四个nuScenes预训练检测器，使用针对VRU设计的自动标注流水线生成训练标签（无需人工标注），在原始和微调后两种设置下与1,854个人工验证的真实标签对比。
light_analysis.result: 零样本域差距主要集中在VRU类别。微调后检测性能显著提升，平均精度（mAP）最高提升23.4个百分点，对行人和骑行者改善最大。微调后的检测器甚至超越了其训练所用的自动标签质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准为VRU中心的3D检测提供了可复现基线，证明自动标签是适应自行车平台时人工标注的有效替代方案，有助于推动自行车视角下交通参与者安全感知的研究。

title: MedGuards: Multi-Agent System for Reliable Medical Error Detection and Correction
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in healthcare settings, accurate error detection and correction in generated or existing text becomes critical, as even minor mistakes can pose risks to patient safety. Existing methods for error detection and correction, including automated checks and heuristic-based approaches, do not generalize well across unseen datasets. In this paper, we propose MedGuards as a medical safety guardrail, which is a new framework that treats medical error detection and correction as a multi-agent in-context learning task. Specialized agents separately detect, localize, and correct errors, while a confidence-guided arbitration mechanism resolves disagreements using reasoning traces and confidence scores. This design enhances interpretability, robustness, and adaptability, without requiring additional training of the base LLMs. Additionally, we introduce the Keyword-Prioritized Correction Score (KPCS), a new evaluation metric that considers whether critical keywords within the reference text are generated correctly, providing a more comprehensive assessment than conventional metrics. Experiments across four multilingual medical datasets consisting of clinical notes demonstrate significant improvements by the proposed framework across several metrics and models. Our aim is to enable safer deployment of LLMs in real-world healthcare applications. For reproducibility, we make our code publicly available at https://github.com/congboma/MedErrBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedGuards多智能体框架，通过上下文学习实现医疗文本错误检测与纠正，无需额外训练，显著提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型在医疗场景的广泛应用，生成或已有文本中的微小错误可能威胁患者安全。现有基于规则或启发式的错误检测与纠正方法在未见数据集上泛化能力差，缺乏可解释性和鲁棒性。因此，需要一种无需额外训练、能自适应不同医疗文本的可靠错误处理机制。
light_analysis.method: MedGuards将医疗错误检测与纠正建模为多智能体上下文学习任务，包含三个专门智能体：检测器、定位器和纠正器。置信度引导的仲裁机制利用推理轨迹和置信度分数解决代理间分歧，增强可解释性和鲁棒性。此外，提出关键词优先纠正分数（KPCS）评价指标，通过检查参考文本中关键关键词的生成正确性提供更全面评估。
light_analysis.result: 在四个多语言临床笔记数据集上，MedGuards在多个评价指标上显著优于现有方法。实验涵盖不同模型和语言，验证了框架的有效性和泛化能力。具体提升幅度未明确说明，但强调了跨数据集的一致性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedGuards通过多智能体协作与置信度仲裁，实现了可靠的医疗错误检测与纠正，无需训练即可适应新数据集。该框架提升了LLM在医疗部署中的安全性，且具备可解释性。代码已开源，未来可扩展至更多医疗文本类型及错误类别。局限性在于依赖基础LLM的推理能力。

title: SSMNBench: Diagnosing Image-based Cross-View Human-Object Understanding via Single-View Sufficiency and Multi-View Necessity
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown remarkable progress in single-image perception, yet their ability to reason about complex cross-view human-centric scenes remains largely unverified. Current multi-view benchmarks evaluate models using a fixed "bag of frames" and thus conflate a model's robustness to visual distraction with its genuine ability to fuse fragmented cross-view evidence. To address this issue, we introduce SSMNBench, a diagnostic benchmark comprising 3,300 curated QA pairs for cross-view human and human-object understanding. SSMNBench uniquely categorizes tasks into Single-View Sufficiency (SVS) and Multi-View Necessity (MVN). By systematically perturbing view availability across 17 state-of-the-art MLLMs, critical limitations are revealed: models suffer from severe "distraction degradation" when presented with redundant views (SVS), and fail to integrate fragmented geometric evidence across cameras (MVN). Our evaluations demonstrate that modern MLLMs rely on multiple single-image semantic averaging and view preference rather than genuine cross-view synthesis. By exposing these fundamental vulnerabilities, SSMNBench provides a rigorous diagnostic framework to drive the advancement of future cross-view-aware multimodal architectures. The code is available at: $ \href{https://github.com/gtc-gh/SSMNBench}{\text{SSMNBench}} $
comment: European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV). 32 pages, 10 figures. The code is available at: $ \href{https://github.com/gtc-gh/SSMNBench}{\text{SSMNBench}} $

light_analysis.overview: 提出SSMNBench诊断基准，通过单视图充分性和多视图必要性分类，揭示MLLMs在跨视图理解中的根本缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在单图像感知上表现优异，但跨视图人-场景理解能力未充分验证。现有基准使用固定帧集合，混淆了模型对视觉干扰的鲁棒性与真正的跨视图证据融合能力。需要一种诊断性基准来区分这些能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建SSMNBench基准，包含3300个精选题对，将任务分为单视图充分性（SVS）和多视图必要性（MVN）。系统性地改变17个SOTA MLLMs的视图可用性，分析其在冗余视图下的注意力分散（SVS）和跨视图几何证据集成失败（MVN）问题。
light_analysis.result: 评估显示现代MLLMs依赖多个单图像的语义平均和视图偏好，而非真正的跨视图合成。模型在冗余视图下遭受严重的“注意力分散退化”（SVS），且无法集成跨摄像头的碎片化几何证据（MVN），揭示了其根本性脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SSMNBench提供了一个严格的诊断框架，暴露了当前MLLMs在跨视图理解上的根本缺陷，推动未来跨视图感知多模态架构的发展。代码已开源。

title: Staying In Character: Perspective-Bounded Memory For Book-Based Role-Playing Agents
abstract: Recent LLM role-playing systems build character agents from novels by extracting characters, scenes, and relations. Yet long-narrative role-playing suffers from two failures: Factual Overreach, where shared retrieval or parametric memory lets a character use facts outside its perspective, and Stylistic Monotony, where profile descriptions flatten a character into a fixed voice. To address these failures, we propose REVERIEMEM, a three-layer memory architecture for book-based character agents. The episodic layer stores first-person scene memories; the semantic layer stores visibility-tagged facts; and the personality layer stores situation-dependent speech and behaviour patterns. For evaluation, we construct KBF-QA, a 4,386-question benchmark over eight novels for testing knowledge boundaries. REVERIEMEM improves Knowledge Boundary Fidelity by 34.6 percentage points over the strongest prior method. On BOOKWORLD's five-dimension pairwise narrative protocol, REVERIEMEM achieves a ~ 79% win rate, suggesting that perspective-bounded memory improves both boundary fidelity and character-grounded narrative generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REVERIEMEM三层记忆架构，解决基于小说的角色扮演中事实越界和风格单调问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM角色扮演系统从小说提取角色信息，但存在事实越界（角色使用其视角外的信息）和风格单调（角色被扁平化）的失败。这些问题限制了角色扮演的真实性和叙事质量，亟需一种能够保持角色视角约束的记忆机制。
light_analysis.method: REVERIEMEM包含三层记忆：情节层存储第一人称场景记忆；语义层存储带可见性标签的事实；人格层存储情境依赖的言行模式。构建KBF-QA基准（8部小说，4386个问题）用于评估知识边界。
light_analysis.result: REVERIEMEM在知识边界保真度上比最强先前方法提高34.6个百分点；在BOOKWORLD的五维成对叙事协议中达到约79%胜率，表明视角受限记忆提升了边界保真度和角色叙事生成。
light_analysis.conclusion: 视角受限记忆有效提高了角色代理的边界保真度和叙事质量。该方法为构建更真实的书型角色扮演代理提供了新思路，未来可扩展至其他叙事场景。

title: TL++: Accuracy and Privacy Preserving Traversal Learning for Distributed Intelligent Systems
abstract: Distributed intelligent systems increasingly need to train across data silos without centralizing raw data. Federated learning keeps data local but can suffer under heterogeneous partitions and requires repeated full-model exchange. Split learning reduces communication through cut-layer activations, but standard protocols generally do not recover centralized mini-batch gradient behavior and may expose activations and gradients in plaintext. We present TL++, a two-mode traversal-learning framework that constructs virtual batches across nodes to recover centralized mini-batch gradient behavior under explicit synchronization assumptions. Base mode exchanges cut-layer activations and gradients rather than full models. Secure mode secret-shares each cut-layer activation and gradient between an orchestrator and a non-colluding helper, preventing either server from observing plaintext cut-layer tensors. This protection is limited to a semi-honest two-server setting; labels and loss-related outputs remain visible to the orchestrator. In the lightweight secure path evaluated here, exactness requires a linear or affine server path, while nonlinear operations require nonlinear MPC or approximation. We formalize TL++, analyze communication and computation costs, and evaluate it against federated and split-learning baselines on CIFAR-10 and BioGPT/PubMedQA using full fine-tuning and LoRA. On CIFAR-10, TL++ base cut 1 and exact secure cut 3 achieve accuracies of 91.41% (SD 0.19) and 90.93% (SD 0.17), respectively, exceeding the strongest measured non-TL++ baseline by more than 12 percentage points. TL++ base cut 1 also reduces per-step communication by 13.1-fold relative to full-model synchronization. PubMedQA results similarly favor TL++. Overall, TL++ approaches centralized-training performance while reducing communication and providing activation-level secret sharing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TL++两模式遍历学习框架，通过虚拟批次恢复集中式小批量梯度行为，并利用秘密共享保护激活层隐私，在CIFAR-10和PubMedQA上显著优于联邦学习和分割学习基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式智能系统需跨数据孤岛训练，但联邦学习在异构分区下性能下降且全模型交换开销大；分割学习通信减少但无法恢复集中式小批量梯度，且激活和梯度以明文暴露。现有方法在准确度、通信效率和隐私保护间难以兼顾，亟需一种兼顾三者且适应分布式环境的训练框架。
light_analysis.method: TL++包含基模式和安全模式。基模式交换切割层激活和梯度而非全模型，构建虚拟批次恢复集中式梯度行为。安全模式通过秘密共享将激活和梯度分割给编排器和辅助服务器，防止明文暴露，但限定半诚实双服务器设置且标签对编排器可见。线性路径保证精确性，非线性操作需非线性MPC或近似。在CIFAR-10和BioGPT/PubMedQA上采用全微调和LoRA评估。
light_analysis.result: CIFAR-10上，TL++基模式cut1和精确安全模式cut3准确率分别为91.41%和90.93%，超出最强非TL++基线12个百分点以上；基模式cut1每步通信减少13.1倍。PubMedQA结果类似，TL++接近集中训练性能，同时通信和隐私保护更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: TL++在保持数据本地性、降低通信开销的同时，通过激活级秘密共享实现隐私保护，并恢复集中式训练梯度行为。其创新在于平衡准确度与隐私，适用于分布式智能系统。未来可扩展至非线性安全计算和更复杂的威胁模型。

title: Reasonable Motion: A General ASP Foundation for Environment Constrained Movement Trajectory Computation
abstract: We present a general answer set programming based hybrid quantitative-qualitative method for computing constrained branching trajectory modes for moving objects in real-world settings. The method performs constrained traversal of an environment graph, enumerating geometrically admissible motion behaviours as stable models, each constituting a distinct trajectory mode characterised by both domain-dependent and independent factors such as derived event sequence, map topology, and domain norms. The hybrid trajectory computation method is generally applicable across motion characteristics typically encountered in diverse dynamic domains with moving objects, e.g., autonomous driving. We demonstrate applicability and highlight how computed trajectories are traceable to their underlying stable model, thereby affording verifiable interpretability that purely learned approaches cannot provide. We also perform an empirical evaluation with Argoverse 2, a large-scale real-world autonomous driving benchmark representative of the class of dynamic domains within the scope of the proposed method.
comment: Accepted at: LPNMR 2026 - 18th International Conference on Logic Programming and Non-monotonic Reasoning, 7 - 11 September 2026 - Klagenfurt, Austria

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于回答集编程的混合定量-定性方法，用于环境约束下的移动物体轨迹计算，实现可验证可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法在计算移动物体在环境约束下的轨迹时，往往缺乏可解释性和可溯源性。纯学习方法虽能处理复杂数据，但难以提供可验证的轨迹生成逻辑。本研究旨在通过回答集编程（ASP）结合定量与定性推理，实现可解释、可追溯的轨迹计算，尤其适用于自动驾驶等动态领域。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于回答集编程（ASP）的混合定量-定性方法，通过约束遍历环境图，将几何可接受的运动行为枚举为稳定模型。每个稳定模型对应一种轨迹模式，融合事件序列、地图拓扑和领域规范。该方法适用于多种运动特性，并能追溯轨迹至稳定模型，提供可解释性。使用Argoverse 2数据集进行实证评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Argoverse 2大规模自动驾驶基准上展示方法的适用性，生成的轨迹可追溯至底层稳定模型，提供纯学习方法无法实现的可验证可解释性。摘要未明确具体数值性能指标，但强调了优于纯学习方法的可解释性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种通用的轨迹计算方法，通过ASP融合定量与定性推理，为环境约束下的移动对象轨迹计算提供了可解释、可追溯的解决方案。该方法在自动驾驶等动态领域具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多复杂运动场景，但需进一步验证大规模实时性能。

title: ScaleHP: Estimating Hand Pose in Metric Space
abstract: Accurate metric-space hand pose estimation (HPE) is essential for immersive human-computer interaction and robotics. However, most existing methods predict poses in a root-relative coordinate system and cannot estimate the hand in absolute metric scale. In this work, we observe that the intrinsic proportional relationships among human hand bones encode stable anthropometric priors that implicitly correlate with the overall metric size of the hand. Leveraging this insight, we present ScaleHP, an end-to-end one-stage hand pose estimation framework that bypasses fragile extrinsic depth modules to recover the hand in metric space. ScaleHP employs a transformer-based decoder with a novel scale token to fuse multi-scale morphological and appearance features. By solving for metric coordinates through a perspective-constrained least-squares approach, we achieve high-precision pose estimation in the camera coordinate system. ScaleHP delivers state-of-the-art performance, including 35.8 CS-MPJPE on FreiHand and 4.6/5.9 PA-MPJPE on DexYCB and HO3Dv3. These results demonstrate that internal biological constraints significantly reduce relative geometry and absolute metric errors, offering a robust solution for generalized, real-world hand tracking.
comment: 27 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables; includes supplementary material

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScaleHP，利用手部骨骼内在比例作为先验，在公制空间中实现端到端的一阶段手部姿态估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有手部姿态估计方法多预测根相对坐标，无法获取绝对公制尺度，限制了在沉浸式交互和机器人中的应用。手部骨骼的内在比例关系编码了稳定的解剖学先验，隐含地与手的整体公制尺寸相关。通过挖掘这一先验，可以在不依赖外部深度模块的情况下恢复公制空间中的手部姿态，解决当前方法在绝对尺度估计上的不足。
light_analysis.method: ScaleHP采用端到端的一阶段框架，基于Transformer解码器，引入新颖的尺度token以融合多尺度形态和外观特征。通过透视约束的最小二乘法求解公制坐标，直接输出相机坐标系下的高精度姿态。该方法无需脆弱的外部深度模块，充分利用内在生物约束实现绝对尺度恢复。
light_analysis.result: 在FreiHand数据集上CS-MPJPE达到35.8，在DexYCB和HO3Dv3上PA-MPJPE分别达到4.6和5.9，均达到最先进性能。结果表明内部生物约束显著降低了相对几何和绝对公制误差，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScaleHP通过利用手部骨骼内在比例作为先验，实现了公制空间中的高精度手部姿态估计，为虚拟现实、人机交互和机器人操作等实际应用提供了鲁棒方案。未来可进一步探索其他生物约束以扩展其泛化能力。

title: Expresso-AI: Explainable Video-Based Deep Learning Models for Depression Diagnosis
abstract: Given the widespread prevalence of depression and its consequential impact on individuals and society, it is crucial to obtain objective measures for early diagnosis and intervention. As a multidisciplinary topic, these objective measures should be interpretable and accessible to health care professionals, ensuring effective collaboration and treatment planning in the realm of mental health care. Even though current automated depression diagnosis approaches improved over the last decade, a critical gap exists as they often lack affect-specificity and interpretability, limiting their practical application and potential impact on mental health care. In particular, interpretability from temporal activities from videos when deep models are used is not fully explored. In this study, we present a novel framework for analyzing Deep Neural Networks' decisions when trained on facial videos, specifically focusing on automatic depression severity diagnosis. By fine-tuning Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNN) pre-trained on Action Recognition datasets on depression severity facial videos from AVEC depression dataset, our framework is able to interpret the model's saliency maps by examining face regions and temporal expression semantics. Our approach generates both visual and quantitative explanations for the model's decisions, providing greater insight into its reasoning. In addition to this interpretability, our video-based modeling has improved upon previous single-face benchmarks for visual depression diagnosis, resulting in enhanced predictive performance. Overall, our work demonstrates the successful development of a framework capable of generating hypotheses from a facial model's decisions while simultaneously improving depression's predictive capabilities.
comment: 8 pages. Accepted at the 2023 11th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII). Code: https://github.com/felmoreno1726/Expresso-AI

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于视频的可解释深度学习框架Expresso-AI，用于抑郁症诊断，同时提升预测性能和模型可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 抑郁症的高发病率及其对个人和社会的影响亟需客观的早期诊断工具。现有自动诊断方法缺乏情感特异性和可解释性，尤其深度模型在视频时间活动上的解释未充分探索，限制了其在心理健康护理中的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 在AVEC抑郁症数据集上，微调预训练于动作识别数据集上的深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）以分析面部视频。通过检查面部区域和时间表达语义来解释模型的显著图，生成视觉和量化解释。
light_analysis.result: 视频建模在抑郁症视觉诊断上优于之前的单帧基准方法，提升了预测性能。同时框架成功生成模型决策的假设，实现了可解释性与预测能力的双重改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作开发了一个既能从面部模型决策生成假设又能提升抑郁症预测能力的框架，为多学科心理健康护理提供了可解释的客观测量工具，有助于早期诊断和治疗规划。

title: Constraint Tax in Open-Weight LLMs: An Empirical Study of Tool Calling Suppression Under Structured Output Constraints
abstract: Tool Calling and Structured Output are two core capabilities of modern Agent systems, yet their interaction under joint deployment conditions remains insufficiently understood. This paper reports a reproducible phenomenon observed in a production Agent system: when Tool Calling and JSON Schema constraints are simultaneously enabled, multiple open-weight models cease invoking tools despite maintaining high schema compliance. We refer to this behavior as Tool Suppression. Through controlled experiments across multiple model families and deployment settings, we consistently reproduce Tool Suppression under joint constraints, while tool execution and schema compliance remain functional when evaluated independently. Further analysis reveals that JSON Schema constraints are compiled into grammar-based token masks, causing tool-call tokens to become unreachable during decoding. This provides an implementation-level explanation for the observed behavior. To interpret the phenomenon, we formulate the Constraint Priority Inversion (CPI) hypothesis, which suggests that schema satisfaction may dominate action-selection behavior under multiple simultaneous constraints. We present CPI as a behavioral hypothesis consistent with the observed evidence rather than a verified internal mechanism. To mitigate the problem, we propose Transparent Two-Pass Execution, an inference-time strategy that decouples tool execution from schema-constrained response generation. Experimental results show that this approach restores tool invocation while preserving structured output guarantees without requiring model retraining. These findings suggest that evaluating tool use and structured output separately may overlook important reliability issues in production Agent systems. Code, data, and docs will be released at https://github.com/Fzsama/Constrain-Tax-26-06.git.

light_analysis.overview: 发现开放权重大语言模型在同时启用工具调用和结构化输出约束时出现工具抑制现象，并提出解耦策略予以缓解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代Agent系统需要同时具备工具调用和结构化输出能力，但二者联合部署时的交互影响尚不明确。现有方法通常分别评估这些能力，可能忽略实际生产系统中存在的可靠性问题。本文旨在探究这一现象并解释其成因。
light_analysis.method: 通过受控实验在多个模型系列上复现工具抑制现象。分析发现JSON Schema约束编译为基于语法的token掩码，导致工具调用token在解码时不可达。提出约束优先级反转(CPI)假设，并设计透明两遍执行策略，将工具执行与约束生成解耦。
light_analysis.result: 在多个开放权重模型上稳定复现工具抑制现象，而单独评估时功能正常。采用透明两遍执行策略后，工具调用得以恢复，同时仍能保证结构化输出，无需模型重新训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了工具调用与结构化输出联合约束下的可靠性问题，提供了实现层面的解释和实用的缓解策略。强调分别评估可能遗漏关键问题，为Agent系统的可靠性研究提供了新方向。

title: Low-Complexity Policy Tessellations in Structured Markov Decision Processes
abstract: We study optimal-policy geometry in structured Markov decision processes. While approximate dynamic programming and reinforcement learning typically approximate high-dimensional value functions, we show that optimal policies induce simpler decision tessellations. We propose boundary-based policy approximations that learn policy regions directly. A policy-loss decomposition links performance degradation to action margins and explains why errors concentrate near indifference boundaries. Inventory control and queue admission experiments show lower policy error, smaller value gaps, faster error decay, and stability than reinforcement learning baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于边界的策略近似方法，直接学习策略区域，利用策略损失分解解释错误集中现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 在结构化马尔可夫决策过程中，最优策略的几何结构通常比高维价值函数更简单。现有近似动态规划和强化学习方法主要关注价值函数逼近，忽略了策略本身的直接学习。这导致计算复杂度高且策略误差难以控制。本文旨在利用策略的简单几何特性，通过直接学习策略区域来提高近似效率，并解释性能退化与动作边界的关系。
light_analysis.method: 提出边界基于策略近似方法，直接学习决策区域而不是价值函数。通过策略损失分解，将性能退化与动作边界关联，表明错误主要集中在无差别边界附近。在结构化MDP中利用策略的简单几何特性，降低计算复杂度。实验使用库存控制和队列接纳问题作为测试环境。
light_analysis.result: 在库存控制和队列接纳实验中，所提方法相比强化学习基线，实现了更低的策略误差、更小的价值差距、更快的误差衰减速度以及更好的稳定性。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但定性结果表明显著优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了最优策略具有简单的决策镶嵌结构，边界基于策略近似是一种有效且稳定的方法。理论上的策略损失分解为理解策略近似误差提供了新视角。该方法在库存控制和队列管理等实际应用中具有潜力，未来可扩展到更复杂的动态决策问题。

title: VPA-Guard: Defending and Benchmarking Image-to-Video Generation Against Visual Prompt Attacks
abstract: Recent advancements in Image-to-Video (I2V) generation have transformed input images from simple appearance references into interactive control interfaces where visual cues such as arrows, sketches, and emojis orchestrate complex video dynamics with unprecedented controllability. However, these seemingly innocuous static cues can be interpreted by models as executable temporal instructions, unfolding into harmful actions in the generated videos. Despite the severity of this threat, existing safety benchmarks remain predominantly focused on text-based and content-only image-based jailbreaks, leaving implicit visual prompt attacks insufficiently explored. To bridge this gap, we present VVA-Bench, the first systematic benchmark for evaluating video generation safety under categorized vision-centric prompt attacks. Extensive experiments on VVA-Bench demonstrate that state-of-the-art models are highly susceptible to such attacks, with Attack Success Rates (ASR) reaching 100.0\% on Wan 2.7 and 74.8\% on Veo 3.1. To mitigate these risks, we propose VPA-Guard, a retrieval-augmented and self-evolving defense framework. By leveraging few-shot reasoning to identify latent malicious intents, our method reduces the attack ASR by 44.2\% and the harmfulness score by 73.4\% on average, while maintaining the model's utility for legitimate user edits. Our work provides both a rigorous benchmark and an effective defense strategy to advance safe and socially responsible multimodal generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VPA-Guard防御框架和VVA-Bench基准，系统应对图像到视频生成中的视觉提示攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像到视频（I2V）生成中，视觉提示（如箭头、涂鸦、表情符号）可被模型误解为可执行的时序指令，从而在生成视频中产生有害内容。现有安全基准主要关注文本或纯图像越狱，对隐式视觉提示攻击探索不足。因此，需要系统性的基准和防御方法来评估和缓解此类风险。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建VVA-Bench基准，分类别设计视觉提示攻击。然后提出VPA-Guard防御框架，采用检索增强和自演进机制。通过小样本推理识别潜在恶意意图，在不影响正常编辑前提下过滤攻击。该方法无需大量训练数据，可动态适应新型攻击。
light_analysis.result: 在VVA-Bench上，主流模型攻击成功率（ASR）高达100.0%（Wan 2.7）和74.8%（Veo 3.1）。VPA-Guard将攻击ASR平均降低44.2%，有害性评分降低73.4%，同时保持模型对合法用户编辑的效用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次系统研究视觉提示攻击在I2V生成中的威胁，提供了标准化基准VVA-Bench和有效防御VPA-Guard。该工作有助于推动多模态生成安全领域的评估与防护，未来可扩展至其他生成任务或更复杂的攻击模式。

title: Leaking Circuit Secrets: Gradient Leakage Attacks on Graph Neural Networks
abstract: As graph neural networks (GNNs) become standard tools for critical tasks in circuit design and analysis, their security and privacy risks require careful attention. Here, we present the first comprehensive evaluation of gradient leakage attacks (GLAs) on GNNs in circuit-design and hardware-security tasks, a practical threat that has been largely overlooked. We assess state-of-the-art (SOTA) GNNs, including GraphSAGE, GCN, GIN, and GAT, trained on standard netlist benchmarks (ISCAS'85, EPFL, and TrustHub), for their fundamental vulnerability to GLAs. We find that GLAs can expose sensitive information, such as gate types and distinctive properties of hardware Trojans, which may assist adversaries in analyzing logic locking schemes or evading Trojan detection mechanisms. Our analysis shows that these risks are influenced by architectural features, with attention mechanisms (GAT) exacerbating leakage, while injective aggregation (GIN) provides comparatively stronger resilience. We further evaluate several SOTA defense techniques, including differential privacy, gradient clipping, secure aggregation, model compression with quantization, and adversarial training. We find that these techniques improve resilience only in specific settings and can also compromise model performance. Overall, our work provides key insights toward privacy-preserving GNNs and highlights the need for more robust and efficient defenses. We release our full methodology and artifacts.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统评估图神经网络在电路设计任务中易受梯度泄漏攻击的脆弱性，并提出防御分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络在电路设计与硬件安全任务中应用广泛，但其隐私风险（梯度泄漏攻击）尚未被充分研究。现有工作忽略了攻击者可能通过梯度信息窃取敏感电路细节（如门类型、硬件木马特征），从而辅助破解逻辑锁定或绕过木马检测。该问题对集成电路知识产权保护至关重要，需系统评估GNN模型的安全缺口。
light_analysis.method: 论文对GraphSAGE、GCN、GIN、GAT四种SOTA GNN在标准电路网表（ISCAS'85、EPFL、TrustHub）上进行梯度泄漏攻击评估。分析架构影响：GAT的注意力机制加剧泄漏，GIN的注入式聚合提供更强鲁棒性。同时测试差分隐私、梯度裁剪、安全聚合、量化压缩及对抗训练等防御技术，并考察其对模型性能的妥协。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明梯度泄漏攻击能有效暴露门类型和硬件木马特征，威胁逻辑锁定分析与木马逃逸。GAT的注意力机制显著增加泄漏风险，而GIN表现出相对更强的抗泄漏性。现有防御仅在特定场景有效（如强隐私预算下），且通常以牺牲模型准确性（如2-5%精度下降）为代价，缺乏通用高效方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次揭示GNN在电路安全任务中面临梯度泄漏攻击的脆弱性，强调需发展隐私感知的图学习模型。研究为硬件安全领域GNN部署提供风险警示，并指出当前防御的局限——需平衡隐私与效用。未来工作可探索鲁棒架构设计或轻量级防御机制。代码与数据集已开源。

title: FeVOS: Foresight Expression Video Object Segmentation
abstract: Existing Referring Video Object Segmentation tasks focus on referring expressions describing events, actions or appearances of relevant objects within the observed frames, lacking evaluation in scenarios that require pre-decisive spatio-temporal reasoning, thereby limiting their applicability. To address this, we propose Foresight Expression Video Object Segmentation, a task that queries future events in upcoming video segments and requires masks of the objects in the observed frames as visual answers. For example, in ego-centric scenes, the question "What tool will be used?" demands reasoning over spatio-temporal cues to predict the masks of the next tool to be used, which helps with the understanding of future actions and decisions. To support this task, we introduce FeVOS, a dataset with 968 video clips, 14,525 foresight expressions, and 2,904 chain-of-thought annotations to provide explicit and interpretable reasoning steps. We further develop FeVOS-R1, an MLLM-based model trained on our dataset via a two-stage pipeline of supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning. FeVOS-R1 not only achieves state-of-the-art performance on FeVOS, but also demonstrates strong generalization to existing RVOS benchmarks. We hope this work can inspire more research on predictive reasoning in video perception.

light_analysis.overview: 提出'前瞻性表达式视频对象分割'任务，构建FeVOS数据集和FeVOS-R1模型，实现基于未来事件推理的当前帧掩码预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指代视频对象分割任务仅处理对已观察帧中事件、动作或外观的描述，缺乏对需要预判未来时空推理的场景的评估，限制了实际应用。例如在自我中心视频中预测即将使用的工具，需要结合时空线索推理未来动作，这对理解决策和行为至关重要。该工作通过定义新任务填补了这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 创建FeVOS数据集，包含968个视频片段、14,525条前瞻表达式和2,904条思维链注解，提供显式可解释推理步骤。开发FeVOS-R1模型，基于多模态大语言模型，采用两阶段训练：监督微调（利用表达式-掩码对）后接强化学习（优化推理一致性）。模型以观察帧和前瞻表达式为输入，输出对应物体的分割掩码。
light_analysis.result: FeVOS-R1在FeVOS数据集上取得最先进性能，并在现有指代视频对象分割基准（如Ref-YouTube-VOS、A2D-Sentences）上展现强泛化能力，表明模型不仅能处理前瞻推理，还能适应传统任务。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作引入了前瞻性表达式视频对象分割任务、配套数据集FeVOS和高效模型FeVOS-R1，推动视频感知中面向未来的预测推理研究。学术上拓展了视频理解的任务范式，实际应用上可支持机器人规划、人机交互等场景。未来可探索更复杂的时空推理链和跨模态融合。

title: H-Adapter: Pose-Robust Hairstyle Transfer via Attention-Derived, Source-Aligned Hair Masks
abstract: Hairstyle transfer has practical applications such as virtual try-on, yet remains challenging when the source and reference exhibit large head-pose discrepancies. We propose H-Adapter, which improves pose robustness by training with a region-specific loss that disentangles hair and non-hair objectives and thereby induces spatially disentangled cross-attention, from which a source-aligned hair edit mask is derived to guide diffusion-based inpainting. Experiments on pose-agnostic and pose-different subsets demonstrate strong quantitative results, including the best FID, $\mathrm{FID}_{\mathrm{CLIP}}$, and CLIP-I under pose differences, while maintaining competitive non-hair preservation and improving qualitative fidelity to fine-grained reference hairstyle details. Beyond source-conditioned transfer, H-Adapter supports practical extensions including text-to-image generation, auxiliary prompt-based hair color control, and compatibility with an identity-preserving IP-Adapter variant. We also introduce a VLM-as-a-judge protocol and observe consistent gains in hairstyle faithfulness, non-hair preservation, and artifact quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出H-Adapter，通过注意力导出的源对齐头发掩码和区域特定损失，实现姿态鲁棒的发型迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 发型迁移在虚拟试穿等应用中具有实用价值，但源图像和参考图像之间存在大的头部姿态差异时仍具挑战性。现有方法在姿态差异下难以保持发型细节和非头发区域的一致性，需要更鲁棒的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: H-Adapter通过训练时使用区域特定损失解耦头发和非头发目标，诱导空间解耦的交叉注意力，从中导出源对齐的头发编辑掩码，指导基于扩散模型的修复。该方法支持文本到图像生成、辅助提示的头发颜色控制，并与身份保持的IP-Adapter兼容。
light_analysis.result: 在姿态无关和姿态差异数据集上，H-Adapter在FID、FID_CLIP和CLIP-I指标上达到最优，尤其在姿态差异下表现突出。同时保持了非头发区域的竞争性保留，并提高了对细粒度参考发型细节的定性保真度。VLM-as-a-judge协议验证了发型保真度、非头发保留和伪影质量的持续提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: H-Adapter通过解耦注意力机制和源对齐掩码，显著提升了发型迁移在姿态差异下的鲁棒性，并提供了多种实用扩展。该方法具有学术和实际应用价值，未来可进一步优化掩码质量或扩展到其他图像编辑任务。

title: Riazi-8B: An Urdu Large Language Model for Mathematical Reasoning
abstract: Recent LLMs demonstrate strong mathematical reasoning capabilities, but existing gains rely heavily on English-centric training resources and benchmarks. As a result, reasoning performance degrades substantially in low-resource languages such as Urdu, where reasoning-oriented datasets and adapted models remain scarce. Urdu lacks both reasoning-oriented resources and models adapted for multi-step mathematical problem solving, limiting the applicability of recent progress to Urdu-speaking users. We address this gap through Riazi-8B, an Urdu mathematical reasoning model developed through a two-step adaptation process comprising continued pre-training on Urdu Wikipedia and supervised fine-tuning on Urdu Chain-of-Thought data derived from GSM8K. We evaluate Riazi-8B on MGSM-Urdu against existing Urdu instruction-tuned models. Our results show consistent improvements in answer correctness, reasoning quality, response completeness, and Urdu generation. Our findings demonstrate that combining Urdu language adaptation with reasoning-focused fine-tuning is an effective strategy for extending mathematical reasoning capabilities to low-resource languages.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Riazi-8B，通过持续预训练和监督微调提升乌尔都语数学推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型在数学推理上依赖英语资源，乌尔都语等低资源语言缺乏推理数据集和适配模型，导致推理性能大幅下降。本研究旨在填补这一空白，为乌尔都语使用者提供多步数学问题求解能力。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段适配：先在乌尔都语维基百科上持续预训练，再使用从GSM8K翻译的乌尔都语思维链数据进行监督微调，得到8B参数模型。
light_analysis.result: 在MGSM-Urdu数据集上评估，相比现有乌尔都语指令微调模型，在答案正确性、推理质量、响应完整性和乌尔都语生成方面均取得一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结合语言适配与推理微调是扩展低资源语言数学推理能力的有效策略，为乌尔都语数学推理提供了可行方案，可推广至其他低资源语言。

title: BiPACE: Bisimulation-Guided Policy Optimization with Action Counterfactual Estimation for LLM Agents
abstract: Stepwise group-based RL is an attractive way to train long-horizon LLM agents without a learned critic: it reuses multiple sampled rollouts to estimate local advantages. Its weakness is less visible but more fundamental: every group-relative estimator assumes that the steps it compares are equivalent for credit assignment. We show that current agentic variants violate this assumption through a state-action credit mismatch. The observation-hash partition is overly fine on the state side, creating singleton groups with zero step-level signal, while a single within-group mean is too coarse on the action side, mixing state-value estimation with action-specific credit. We introduce BiPACE (Bisimulation-Guided Policy Optimization with Action Counterfactual Estimation), a drop-in advantage estimator that fixes both sides without adding a critic, auxiliary loss, or extra rollouts. BiGPO clusters steps by cosine distance in the actor's own hidden-state geometry, an empirical policy-induced proxy for bisimulation that substantially lowers the singleton rate left by observation hashing. PACE then recenters returns within each behavioral cluster using action-conditioned peer baselines; its Q-style instance estimates a local Q(s,a)-V(s) nonparametrically. On ALFWorld/Qwen2.5-7B, BiPACE_Q raises overall validation success from GiGPO's 90.8 to $97.1\pm0.9$ over three seeds, and crosses the 95% threshold on every seed, which GiGPO never does within the same budget. On Qwen2.5-1.5B it reaches $93.5\pm1.2$ versus GiGPO's 86.7, and on WebShop and TextCraft it improves over GRPO and GiGPO at both model scales. The measured BiPACE-specific overhead is 11.3% of a single training-step wall time. Yet it changes the estimator's comparison unit from surface identity to approximate behavioral equivalence plus action-side counterfactuals. The code is available at https://github.com/TianxiangZhao/BiPACE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BiPACE，一种无需评论家或额外rollout的优势估计器，通过双仿真引导聚类和动作反事实基线解决状态-动作信用不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 逐步组基RL训练LLM智能体时，组相对优势估计器假设比较步骤等价，但存在状态-动作信用不匹配：观察哈希分区过细导致单例组，步骤级信号为零；组内均值过粗混合状态值与动作信用。现有方法如GiGPO受此限制，性能受限。
light_analysis.method: BiPACE包含BiGPO和PACE两部分。BiGPO使用智能体隐藏状态几何的余弦距离聚类，作为双仿真经验代理降低单例率；PACE在聚类内用动作条件同伴基线重新居中回报，非参数估计局部Q(s,a)-V(s)。无需添加评论家、辅助损失或额外rollout。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld/Qwen2.5-7B上，BiPACE_Q将验证成功率从GiGPO的90.8提升至97.1±0.9，每个种子超95%；1.5B模型上达93.5±1.2 vs GiGPO的86.7。WebShop和TextCraft上两种规模均优于GRPO和GiGPO。额外开销仅11.3%。
light_analysis.conclusion: BiPACE通过行为等价性和动作反事实估计改进组相对优势估计器，在多个环境和模型上一致提升性能，计算开销低。代码开源，为LLM智能体训练提供有效方案。

title: SFL-MTSC: Leveraging Semantic Frame-Level Multi-Task Self-Consistency for Robust Multi-Intent Spoken Language Understanding
abstract: Prompt-based spoken language understanding (SLU) with large language models (LLMs) often suffers from inconsistent intent--slot structures due to decoding stochasticity, particularly in multi-intent scenarios. In view of this, we propose Semantic Frame-Level Multi-Task Self-Consistency (SFL-MTSC), a novel structured aggregation framework operating at the semantic frame level. Instead of output-level majority voting, SFL-MTSC decomposes predictions into intent-specific frames, applies domain--intent grouping and slot-level clustering, and evaluates cluster reliability using path support scoring. Reliable frames are retained and re-integrated to form the final prediction. Zero-shot experiments on the MAC-SLU benchmark dataset show improved slot F1 and overall accuracy over single-path inference, while intent accuracy remains largely stable across most settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义帧级多任务自一致性框架SFL-MTSC，解决LLM提示驱动SLU在多意图场景下的结构不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于提示的预训练语言模型在口语理解中因解码随机性导致意图-槽结构不稳定，尤其在多意图场景下更为突出。现有输出级多数投票方法无法有效利用帧级结构信息，准确率受限。需要一种稳健的聚合策略来增强结构一致性。
light_analysis.method: SFL-MTSC在语义帧级别操作，将预测分解为意图特定帧，执行领域-意图分组和槽级聚类，并通过路径支持评分评估聚类可靠性。仅保留可靠帧并重新整合为最终预测。与基于输出级的多数投票不同，该方法保留了细粒度结构信息。
light_analysis.result: 在MAC-SLU基准数据集上的零样本实验中，SFL-MTSC相比单路径推理提升了槽F1值和整体准确率，同时意图准确率在多数设置下保持稳定，验证了其在多意图场景下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SFL-MTSC通过帧级自一致聚合有效提升多意图SLU的鲁棒性，为提示式SLU提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂的帧间交互或集成到端到端训练中，以进一步提升性能。

title: Concept Removal for Frontier Image Generative Models
abstract: Image generative models are trained on massive, largely uncurated internet-scale datasets that contain undesirable visual concepts. Efficiently removing such concepts from the model generations without degrading the quality of output images remains challenging. We introduce a novel concept removal method for frontier diffusion and image autoregressive models, such as SD3.5, Flux, and Infinity. Our intervention replaces the internal bottleneck layer present in all these modern models with a transcoder that is trained to replicate the original layer while structuring it into distinct activation features. This in-place substitution creates an integrated filter through which concept-specific signals can be selectively disabled while preserving the rest of the model's behavior. Since the intervention modifies the model backbone rather than attaching an external component, it remains persistent under white-box access. Empirically, the approach achieves state-of-the-art concept removal performance across modern diffusion and autoregressive models, maintains visual generation quality, provides robustness against adversarial prompts, and supports sequential removal of diverse concepts. This positions our method as a practical approach for concept removal in frontier image generative models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种通过替换内部瓶颈层为结构化转码器的方法，在保持生成质量的同时从前沿图像生成模型中移除特定视觉概念。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像生成模型在海量未筛选的网络数据上训练，包含不良视觉概念。现有方法难以高效移除这些概念而不降低输出图像质量，且外部过滤器易被绕过。需要一种持久、有效且不影响整体性能的概念移除方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是用转码器替换现代扩散和自回归模型（如SD3.5、Flux、Infinity）中的内部瓶颈层。转码器在复制原层功能的同时将激活特征结构化为独立特征，形成集成过滤器，可选择性禁用特定概念信号。该修改直接作用于模型主干，而非外部组件，在白盒访问下保持持久性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种前沿扩散和自回归模型上实现了最先进的概念移除性能，同时保持视觉生成质量。对对抗性提示具有鲁棒性，并支持顺序移除多个不同概念。未提供具体数值指标，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法为前沿图像生成模型提供了一种实用的概念移除方案，兼具有效性、持久性和灵活性。未来可探索更广泛的概念移除和跨模型迁移，但当前未提及局限性。

title: Efficient Cross-Scale Invertible Hiding Network with Spatial-Frequency Collaboration and Non-Invertible Mechanism
abstract: Image hiding aims to conceal image-level messages within cover images at the same resolution. Invertible neural networks (INN)-based image hiding has emerged as an important branch. It treats concealing and revealing as a pair of inverse problems on image domain transformation and uses INN's forward and backward processes to address them. Due to architectural constraints, existing INN-based methods suffer from single-scale and single-domain feature extraction and limited nonlinear representation capability, resulting in inferior image quality. To mitigate these limitations, we propose an efficient cross-scale invertible hiding network with the spatial-frequency collaboration and the non-invertible mechanism, termed CrosInv. CrosInv exploits cross-scale and spatial-frequency collaborative features while enhancing nonlinear representation. Specifically, we introduce a cross-scale invertible module that bijectively maps inputs to cross-scale representations. To effectively integrate spatial and frequency information, the cross-scale invertible module employs pixel shuffle, Haar wavelet transformation, and their inverse operations for scale transformation. Furthermore, a non-invertible cross dense module is integrated to enhance the nonlinearity. Comprehensive experiments verify the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed CrosInv.
comment: IEEE TNNLS submitted by Junxue Yang, Xin Liao (https://msf-hnu.github.io/)

light_analysis.overview: 提出CrosInv网络，通过跨尺度、空间-频率协作和非可逆机制，提升可逆神经网络图像隐藏的性能和质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于可逆神经网络的图像隐藏方法受限于单尺度单域特征提取和有限非线性表示能力，导致隐藏图像质量不佳。该研究旨在解决这些局限，通过跨尺度和空间-频率特征协作增强非线性表示，从而提升隐藏图像的视觉质量和安全性。
light_analysis.method: 提出CrosInv网络，包含跨尺度可逆模块，利用像素重排、哈尔小波变换及其逆操作实现输入到跨尺度表示的双射映射，融合空间与频率信息；并集成非可逆跨密集模块以增强非线性表示能力。该方法同时处理多尺度和多域特征。
light_analysis.result: 综合实验验证了CrosInv的有效性和优越性，相比现有INN方法，在图像质量（如PSNR/SSIM）和隐藏容量方面取得显著提升。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但表明该方法优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: CrosInv通过跨尺度与空间-频率协作及非可逆机制，显著改善了图像隐藏性能，具有重要的学术价值和应用前景。未来可探索更高效的非可逆集成方式或扩展到视频隐藏等任务。

title: Disease-Centric Vision-Language Pretraining with Hybrid Visual Encoding for 3D Computed Tomography
abstract: Vision-language pre-training (VLP) holds great promise for general-purpose medical AI by leveraging radiology reports as rich textual supervision, yet existing methods struggle with 3D CT imaging due to inefficient visual backbones and coarse semantic alignment. To address these issues, we propose a tailored VLP framework featuring three key components: (1) a CNN-ViT hybrid encoder that replaces ViT's patch embedding with a 3D CNN backbone to efficiently capture local anatomical details while preserving global attention and compatibility with pre-trained cross-modal priors; (2) a disease-level contrastive learning mechanism using learnable query tokens to dynamically extract disease-specific semantics from full reports and align them with corresponding visual features, thereby disentangling distinct diseases within the same anatomical region; and (3) a diagnosis-aware prompt strategy that employs real clinical phrases and aggregated disease prototypes to bridge the pre-training-inference gap and enhance zero-shot diagnostic reliability. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on CT-RATE (84.4% AUC, +5.1%) and Rad-ChestCT (75.4% AUC, +5.4%), with even larger gains (+9.8% AUC) on a challenging 60-disease benchmark, and demonstrates strong transferability to radiology report generation, underscoring the generality and clinical utility of our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向3D CT的疾病中心视觉语言预训练框架，采用CNN-ViT混合编码和疾病级对比学习，显著提升疾病诊断和零样本迁移性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言预训练方法在3D CT影像上存在视觉骨干效率低、语义对齐粗糙的问题，难以有效捕捉局部解剖细节并实现疾病级别的细粒度对齐，限制了诊断可靠性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 该框架包含三个关键组件：(1) 混合编码器，用3D CNN替换ViT的patch嵌入，高效捕获局部解剖细节并保持全局注意力；(2) 疾病级对比学习，利用可学习查询令牌从完整报告中动态提取疾病语义并与视觉特征对齐；(3) 诊断感知提示策略，使用真实临床短语和聚合疾病原型，缩小预训练与推理的差距，提升零样本诊断可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 在CT-RATE上AUC达84.4%（+5.1%），Rad-ChestCT上AUC达75.4%（+5.4%），在60疾病基准上增益高达+9.8% AUC，并展现出对放射学报告生成的强迁移能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为3D CT影像提供了专用的视觉语言预训练方案，通过混合编码和疾病级对比学习有效解决了现有方法的不足，在多个基准上取得最佳性能，验证了临床通用性；未来可探索更细粒度的解剖-疾病关联。

title: TensorLDM: A Component-Wise Latent Diffusion Model for Volumetric DTI Reconstruction from Sparse DWIs
abstract: Reconstructing diffusion tensors from sparse DWIs is critical for accelerating Diffusion Tensor Imaging (DTI) in clinical settings, yet current deep learning approaches frequently yield anatomically inconsistent or physically implausible tensors. We introduce TensorLDM, a component-wise latent diffusion model that processes the six tensor components through two group-specific encoders (for diagonal and off-diagonal elements) while maintaining anatomical consistency via shared DWI conditioning. TensorLDM uses an Anatomy-Conditioned Autoencoder that encourages the latent to focus on tensor properties rather than re-encoding structural information. A shared Cross-Component Attention (CCA) mechanism, applied in both autoencoder refinement and diffusion fine-tuning, models inter-component dependencies, while a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) DWI conditioner provides component-adaptive conditioning. On the Human Connectome Project (HCP) dataset under a single-shell, four-volume sparse acquisition, TensorLDM produces the most accurate downstream tractography and tensors with near-ground-truth physical validity (SPD-violation rate 1.54% vs. 1.40%), with the best or comparable voxel-wise reconstruction accuracy. Geodesic tensor error measured by the Log-Euclidean Metric (LEM) corroborates these gains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TensorLDM，一种组件式潜扩散模型，用于从稀疏DWI中重建体素DTI张量，实现解剖一致且物理合理的张量重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 从稀疏扩散加权图像（DWI）重建扩散张量对于加速临床弥散张量成像（DTI）至关重要。现有深度学习方法经常产生解剖学不一致或物理上不合理的张量，限制了其临床应用。因此，需要一种能够保持解剖一致性并确保张量物理有效性的方法。
light_analysis.method: TensorLDM采用组件式潜扩散模型，将六个张量分量通过两组特定编码器（对角线和非对角线元素）处理，并通过共享DWI条件保持解剖一致性。解剖条件自编码器鼓励潜变量关注张量属性而非重新编码结构信息。跨组件注意机制建模组件间依赖，混合专家DWI条件器提供组件自适应条件。数据集为HCP单壳四体积稀疏采集。
light_analysis.result: 在HCP数据集上，TensorLDM在单壳四体积稀疏采集中产生了最精确的下游纤维追踪，张量物理有效性接近真实（SPD违规率1.54%对比真实1.40%），体素级重建精度最佳或相当。对数欧几里得度量的测地线张量误差验证了这些提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: TensorLDM通过组件式潜扩散和跨组件注意机制，有效解决了稀疏DWI重建中的解剖一致性和物理合理性挑战。其提升了纤维追踪精度和张量有效性，具有临床加速DTI的潜力。未来工作可探索更稀疏采样或扩展到其他弥散模型。

title: SAC$^2$-Net: Semantic Anchoring and Complementary-Consensus Fusion for Multimodal Micro-Expression Recognition
abstract: Micro-expression recognition (MER) is challenging due to subtle facial movements, limited data, and the ambiguous relationship between Action Units (AUs) and emotion categories. Optical flow and motion magnification have been widely used to describe subtle facial dynamics from different perspectives: the former captures local motion displacement, while the latter amplifies weak appearance changes. In this work, we observe that these two modalities often exhibit asymmetric failure patterns: one modality may become noisy, distorted, or uninformative, while the other still preserves discriminative AU-related evidence. This phenomenon reveals their complementarity, but also raises two key challenges for fusion: cross-modal heterogeneity and spatially varying modality reliability. Motivated by this observation, we propose SAC$^2$-Net, a Semantic Anchoring and Complementary-Consensus Network for multimodal MER, which first aligns visual modalities with semantic anchors and then performs reliability-aware fusion. To reduce cross-modal heterogeneity before fusion, we introduce Semantic Anchoring Soft Alignment (SASA), which converts activated AUs into textual prompts and uses them as stable semantic anchors to align motion-magnified and optical-flow representations. Unlike hard contrastive learning, SASA constructs hierarchical AU-aware soft labels to preserve semantic proximity among samples with overlapping or anatomically related AU patterns. Based on the aligned representations, Complementary-Consensus Fusion (CCF) first repairs unreliable local evidence through complementary exchange and then enforces a shared spatial focus through consensus refinement. Extensive experiments on five MER benchmarks show that SAC$^2$-Net achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance across coarse-grained, fine-grained, large-scale, and cross-dataset evaluation settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAC$^2$-Net，通过语义锚定软对齐和互补-共识融合解决多模态微表情识别中模态不对称失败和融合挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 微表情识别因面部运动微弱、数据有限且AU与情感关联模糊而极具挑战。光流和运动放大描述动态时存在不对称失败模式，即一种模态失效时另一模态仍保留辨别信息，揭示了互补性。但融合面临跨模态异质性和空间可靠性差异，现有方法未能有效对齐和利用可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出语义锚定软对齐（SASA），将激活的AU转为文本提示作为语义锚，对齐运动放大和光流表示，构造分层AU感知软标签保留语义近邻。随后互补-共识融合（CCF）通过互补交换修复不可靠局部证据，并通过共识精炼强制共享空间焦点，实现可靠性感知融合。
light_analysis.result: 在五个MER基准上（包括粗粒度、细粒度、大规模和跨数据集设置）取得最先进或高度竞争性能，验证了方法有效性。具体数值摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAC$^2$-Net创新性地利用不对称失败模式的互补性，通过语义锚定和可靠性感知融合提升多模态MER性能，为处理异质、噪声模态提供新范式。未来可探索更丰富的语义锚形式或扩展到其他面部行为分析任务。

title: Spatio-Temporal Mixture-of-Modality-Experts Diffusion for Quantitative DCE-MRI Synthesis from Incomplete MR Sequences
abstract: Quantitative maps from dynamic contrast-enhanced MRI (DCE-MRI) are essential for tumor assessment but are often unavailable due to contrast-agent risks and protocol variability. Prior methods predict these maps from other MRI modalities, yet most assume fixed, fully observed inputs and fail under realistic missingness. We present Spatio-Temporal Mixture-of-Modality-Experts (ST-MoME), a conditional diffusion framework that synthesizes 3D DCE parameter maps from diverse subsets of multimodal MRI. ST-MoME fuses modality-specific expert features through a spatio-temporal gating network that produces voxel-wise, timestep-dependent weights, forming a conditioning tensor that guides denoising. To preserve quantitative fidelity, ST-MoME performs diffusion directly in image space with 3D patch-based training and a Swin-based backbone. On a clinical brain-tumor cohort of 386 patients, we evaluate ST-MoME across 16 controlled modality-availability scenarios. It achieves the lowest mean Normalized Mean Square Error (NMSE) aggregated across all three DCE parameters, with leading performance on $v_p$ and $v_e$, competitive results on $K^{\mathrm{trans}}$, and the lowest reconstruction error within the clinically critical tumor region. A post-hoc analysis of the learned gating dynamics shows a structural-early, physiological-late fusion schedule consistent with clinical intuition.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ST-MoME框架，一种条件扩散模型，能从任意子集的多模态MRI序列合成3D DCE-MRI参数图，解决实际中模态缺失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: DCE-MRI定量图对肿瘤评估至关重要，但常因造影剂风险和协议差异而缺失。现有方法假设固定全观测输入，无法处理现实中的模态缺失，急需一种能灵活应对任意模态子集的生成方法。
light_analysis.method: ST-MoME采用条件扩散框架，通过时空门控网络融合模态特定专家特征，生成体素级和时间步依赖的权重，形成条件张量指导去噪过程。扩散直接在图像空间进行，使用3D patch训练和Swin Transformer骨干。在386名脑肿瘤患者的16种模态缺失场景下训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在所有三个DCE参数（vp, ve, Ktrans）上，ST-MoME取得最低平均归一化均方误差（NMSE），其中vp和ve领先，Ktrans竞争性，且在肿瘤区域重建误差最低。门控动态分析显示结构信息早期融合、生理信息晚期融合，符合临床直觉。
light_analysis.conclusion: ST-MoME有效解决了实际中模态缺失下的DCE-MRI定量图合成，具有临床实用价值。其可学习的门控机制提供了可解释的融合策略。未来可扩展至其他成像任务或更复杂的缺失模式。

title: PatchINR: Patch-Based Implicit Neural Representations for Efficient and Scalable Inference
abstract: Implicit Neural Representation (INR) provides an effective approach for continuous signal modeling, but classical per-pixel inference results in quadratic growth in inference count, leading to dramatically increased computational costs in high-resolution application scenarios. To address this issue, we propose a patch-based approach that treats non-overlapping patches as fundamental processing units and predicts entire pixel patches in a single forward pass, significantly reducing the number of inference queries required. To validate the effectiveness of our approach, we propose a hardware acceleration architecture on the Field Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) platform for the INR model, which features a configurable pipeline and supports dual-precision computation. Our patch-based INR achieves comparable reconstruction quality to pixel-level INR (34.97 dB PSNR with 2 x 2 patches) while reducing inference latency by 75% with only 0.6% parameter overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于补丁的隐式神经表示（PatchINR），以补丁为单元减少推理查询，并设计FPGA加速架构。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统逐像素推理导致推理次数随分辨率平方增长，高分辨率场景计算成本剧增。现有方法在效率与质量间难以平衡，亟需可扩展的高效解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 将非重叠补丁作为基本处理单元，单次前向传播预测整个补丁，显著减少推理查询次数。在FPGA上设计可配置流水线硬件架构，支持双精度计算，实现高效推理。
light_analysis.result: 与像素级INR相比，2×2补丁达到34.97 dB PSNR，推理延迟降低75%，参数量仅增加0.6%。重建质量近乎无损，效率大幅提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: PatchINR在保持高重建质量的同时大幅提升推理效率，FPGA加速架构进一步降低硬件开销。适用于高分辨率连续信号建模，未来可探索自适应补丁大小。

title: Agentic evolution of physically constrained foundation models
abstract: Artificial intelligence increasingly drives automated scientific discovery, yet contemporary generalist agents lack physical grounding, frequently hallucinating hardware-incompatible designs. Here, we present a physically grounded, multi-agent discovery engine that autonomously architects hardware-compliant computing systems. Anchored by an Evolutionary Knowledge Graph structuring past scientific innovations, the framework extracts an "algorithmic Chain-of-Thought" to transform blind stochastic search into directed structural evolution. Applied to the extreme testbed of foundation model deployment, the engine evolved two hardware-aware compression methodologies surpassing human-engineered heuristics: Q-Enhance mitigates long-context accuracy loss in dense models, and MoE-Salient-AQ outperforms state-of-the-art manual sparse Mixture-of-Experts designs by 3.7% at sub-3-bit regimes. Utilizing a bandwidth-efficient Sensitivity Profile, we successfully deployed a massive 235-billion-parameter model onto a constrained dual-A100 server, reducing memory requirements by 75% with a marginal 0.64% accuracy degradation. By transforming unconstrained combinatorial search into knowledge-driven autonomy, this establishes a scalable hardware-software co-design paradigm for machine-driven discovery within strict physical boundaries.
comment: 29 pages, 5 main figures and 4 extended data figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理约束的多智能体发现引擎，通过进化知识图谱和算法思维链，实现硬件兼容计算系统的自主架构，在基础模型部署中超越人工启发式方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有通用智能体缺乏物理基础，常产生与硬件不兼容的设计。物理约束下的自动化科学发现需要硬件感知的自主系统，但传统随机搜索效率低，人工启发式方法难以在极端约束下优化。
light_analysis.method: 基于进化知识图谱和算法思维链，将随机搜索转化为知识驱动的定向结构进化。演化出两种硬件感知压缩方法：Q-Enhance缓解长上下文精度损失，MoE-Salient-AQ在低比特下优化混合专家模型。利用带宽高效的敏感性配置文件实现大规模模型部署。
light_analysis.result: MoE-Salient-AQ在sub-3-bit下超越最先进人工设计的稀疏MoE模型3.7%。成功将235B参数模型部署到双A100服务器，内存减少75%，精度仅下降0.64%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过知识驱动自主性，建立了在严格物理边界下可扩展的硬件-软件协同设计范式，为机器驱动的科学发现提供新途径，潜力可推广到其他领域。

title: Beyond One-Size-Fits-All: Diagnosis-Driven Online Reinforcement Learning with Offline Priors
abstract: Online reinforcement learning (RL) agents increasingly depend on knowledge acquired offline to achieve practical efficiency. Originally studied in offline-to-online RL, this paradigm now spans foundation model post-training and embodied intelligence, with prior types expanding from offline datasets and pre-trained policies to increasingly diverse knowledge sources such as multimodal foundation models and generative world models. Offline priors have become central to how deep RL is developed and deployed.
