Evaluated in an extreme few-shot setting with only 16 target images, ALDM outperformed GAN and hybrid baselines, achieving a superior Frechet Inception Distance (FID) of 85.40 and a downstream classification AUC of 0.987. Qualitative results confirm that the model preserves sharp pathology boundaries and cross-modal consistency, with visual fidelity improving progressively during training. By capturing essential diagnostic features, ALDM provides a robust tool for clinical data augmentation in low-resource settings. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/anatomically-conditioned-LDM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解剖条件潜扩散模型(ALDM)，实现数据高效的小样本跨域3D脑胶质瘤MRI合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 弥漫性胶质瘤的准确分类常受中心间域偏移和缺乏大型标注数据集限制。现有方法在小样本场景下生成质量不足，难以保留病理边界和跨模态一致性。
light_analysis.method: ALDM采用两阶段框架：3D变分自编码器从数据丰富的源域学习解剖先验，条件潜扩散模型通过ControlNet以肿瘤掩码为条件，在数据稀缺的目标域生成结构一致的三维体积。仅需16张目标域图像进行极端小样本训练。
light_analysis.result: 在极端小样本设置下，ALDM优于GAN和混合基线，FID达85.40，下游分类AUC达0.987。生成的图像保留清晰病理边界和跨模态一致性，视觉保真度随训练逐步提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: ALDM为低资源场景下的临床数据增强提供鲁棒工具，捕获关键诊断特征。未来可探索应用于其他医学成像模态和域适应任务。

title: Offline Multi-agent Continual Cooperation via Skill Partition and Reuse
abstract: Extracting skills from multi-agent offline dataset improves learning efficiency via sharing task-invariant coordination skills among tasks. In settings where tasks occur sequentially and the space of skills grows exponentially, existing approaches that rely on heuristically designed and fixed-sized skill libraries struggle to resolve the problem of distributional shift and interference, facing catastrophic forgetting and plasticity loss. To address this problem and endow agents with the ability to continually discover and reuse coordination skills in open-environment, we propose COMAD, a principled framework for Continual Offline Multi-agent Skill Discovery via Skill Partition and Reuse. We first discover skills from mixed multi-agent behavior data with an auto-encoder to transform coordination knowledge into reusable coordination skills. Then we construct a skill-augmented policy learning objective with multi-head architectures, explicitly guiding the advantage function with reusable skills identified via a density-based reusability estimator. Theoretical analysis shows our method approximates the optimum of a continual skill discovery problem. Empirical results across diverse MARL benchmarks show that COMAD continually expands its skill library to mitigate interference, achieving superior forward and backward transfer for task streams compared to multiple baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出COMAD框架，通过技能划分与重用实现多智能体离线持续协作，解决灾难性遗忘与可塑性损失。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体离线任务序列中，技能空间指数增长，现有固定大小技能库方法难以处理分布偏移和干扰，导致灾难性遗忘与可塑性损失。研究旨在赋予智能体在开放环境中持续发现和重用协调技能的能力。
light_analysis.method: COMAD框架包含两步：首先，用自编码器从混合多智能体行为数据中提取可重用协调技能；其次，构建带多头架构的技能增强策略学习目标，通过基于密度的可重用性估计器显式引导优势函数。理论分析证明该方法逼近持续技能发现的最优解。
light_analysis.result: 在多个MARL基准测试中，COMAD持续扩展技能库以缓解干扰，相比多个基线在任务流上实现了更优的前向和后向迁移性能，摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: COMAD通过技能划分与重用有效解决了多智能体离线持续学习中的灾难性遗忘和干扰问题，具有学术价值，未来可应用于开放环境下的多智能体协同任务，潜在局限在于技能库规模管理。

title: FedUP: One-Shot Federated Unlearning via Centroid-Guided Plug-in Filters
abstract: Federated unlearning (FU) is critical for complying with legal mandates like the right to be forgotten in decentralized systems, yet current methods face a persistent dilemma between non-target knowledge loss and high request latency. To resolve these issues, we propose FedUP, a one-shot federated unlearning framework utilizing lightweight pluggable filters that act as a "knowledge funnel" to screen out target data while preserving original model performance. By freezing original model parameters and training filters at the server side using differentially private (DP)-protected class centroid samples, FedUP bypasses the need for multi-round client-server communication and complex retraining, reducing unlearning latency from minutes to mere seconds. Additionally, the framework's pluggable architecture ensures inherent reversibility, enabling the seamless restoration of forgotten knowledge by simply removing the filters. Extensive experiments on diverse image and text tasks demonstrate that FedUP effectively reduces non-target knowledge loss and achieves superior unlearning precision and efficiency across various scenarios. Code is available at: https://github.com/suows/FedUP-code.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedUP，一种基于质心引导可插拔过滤器的一次性联邦遗忘框架，实现高效低损失的知识移除。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦遗忘面临非目标知识损失与高请求延迟的困境。现有方法依赖多轮客户端-服务器通信或复杂重训练，难以兼顾精度和效率，且缺乏可逆性。
light_analysis.method: FedUP冻结原始模型参数，在服务器端利用差分隐私保护的类中心样本训练轻量级可插拔过滤器，作为“知识漏斗”筛选目标数据。通过一次性训练实现遗忘，无需多轮通信，支持过滤器的即插即用以实现知识恢复。
light_analysis.result: 在图像和文本任务上，FedUP有效减少非目标知识损失，遗忘延迟从分钟级降至秒级，遗忘精度优于现有基线方法，且可逆性通过移除过滤器即可实现。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedUP解决了联邦遗忘中效率与知识保留的矛盾，其可插拔架构兼具高效性与隐私合规性。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的遗忘场景和异构模型。

title: Sesame: Structure-Aware Molecular Generation via Spatial Density-Map Conditioning
abstract: Generative molecular models for drug design are a promising direction with much active research. In the next phase of computational drug design, such models will need to understand small molecule structure and protein-ligand interactions, and they will need to possess the machinery to generate molecules de novo. Incorporating each feature poses a critical challenge. Equally important, yet often treated as secondary, is the ability to grow a molecule from a partial starting point -- a scaffold or fragment supplied by a chemist -- which is the central operation of lead optimization. We present Sesame (Spatial Evoformer for a Structure-Aware Molecular Engine), a diffusion-based molecular generation model that leverages a novel spatial pairformer module to condition on partial molecular structure and the surrounding protein pocket, both expressed as continuous spatial density maps. This single conditioning mechanism supports both de novo generation and fragment-conditioned lead optimization, letting a medicinal chemist prune a hit to a scaffold and have Sesame grow it in productive ways. In addition to this module, we also introduce a diffusion framework for joint denoising of atom types, bond types, and positions, along with a trajectory finetuning scheme that trains on the model's own sampling rollouts to improve generation quality. Sesame is trained on a large corpus of ligand-only and protein-ligand datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sesame，一种基于扩散的分子生成模型，通过空间密度图条件化蛋白质口袋和部分分子结构，支持从头生成和片段条件的先导优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有分子生成模型难以同时理解小分子结构、蛋白质-配体相互作用以及从部分起始点（如脚手架或片段）生长分子，后者是先导优化的核心操作。Sesame旨在统一这些能力，通过单一条件机制支持从头生成和片段引导的分子优化，从而提升药物设计的实用性和灵活性。
light_analysis.method: Sesame采用扩散框架，核心创新是空间对模块（spatial pairformer），将部分分子结构和周围蛋白质口袋表示为连续空间密度图作为条件。模型联合去噪原子类型、键类型和位置，并引入轨迹微调方案，在自身采样轨迹上训练以提升生成质量。训练数据包括配体-only和蛋白质-配体数据集。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出模型在生成质量和先导优化潜力上优于传统方法。训练于大规模配体-蛋白质数据集，支持从头生成和基于片段的条件生成，性能由轨迹微调进一步改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: Sesame通过统一的条件机制和扩散框架，为药物设计提供了一种即支持从头分子生成又支持先导优化的方法。其结构感知能力有助于理解蛋白质-配体相互作用。未来可能应用于更复杂的药物设计场景，但具体实验验证有待进一步报告。

title: Exploring Dualistic Meta-Learning to Enhance Domain Generalization in Open Set Scenarios
abstract: Domain generalization learns from multiple source domains to generalize to unseen target domains. However, it often neglects the realistic case of label mismatch between source and target. Open set domain generalization is then proposed to recognize unseen classes in unseen domains. A simple approach trains one-vs-all classifiers to separate each class and detect outliers as unknown. Yet, the imbalance between few positive samples and many negative samples skews the decision boundary towards the positive ones, leading the model to over-reject out-of-distribution data, even from known classes in unseen domains. In this paper, we propose a novel meta-learning stategy called dualistic MEta-learning with joint DomaIn-Class matching (MEDIC), which considers implicit gradient matching towards inter-domain and inter-class task splits simultaneously to find optimal boundaries balanced for both domains and classes. Experimental results show that MEDIC not only outperforms prior methods in open set scenarios, but also maintains competitive close set generalization ability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双元元学习策略MEDIC，通过联合域-类匹配优化决策边界，解决开集域泛化中的类别不平衡和过拒绝问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有域泛化方法忽略了源域与目标域标签不匹配的现实情况。开集域泛化虽能识别未见类别，但简单的一对多分类器因正负样本不平衡导致决策边界偏向正样本，使模型过度拒绝来自未知域但已知类的数据。需要一种能平衡域和类间差异的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出MEDIC（双元元学习与联合域-类匹配）策略，隐式地同时考虑跨域和跨类任务分割的梯度匹配，以找到对域和类都平衡的最优决策边界。具体通过元学习框架构造内外层任务，兼顾域适应和开集识别。未明确提及数据集和架构，但基于标准元学习范式。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MEDIC在开集场景下优于先前方法，同时保持了接近的闭集泛化能力。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明，但整体效果超过现有技术。
light_analysis.conclusion: MEDIC有效解决了开集域泛化中正负样本不平衡导致的过拒绝问题，通过联合域-类匹配学习平衡边界。该方法在开集和闭集场景均表现良好，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的任务分割策略或扩展到更多域。

title: Sol Video Inference Engine: Agent-Native Full-Stack Acceleration Framework for Efficient Video Generation
abstract: Modern video diffusion models achieve higher generation quality through scaling, but this also increases inference cost. Although many acceleration methods have been proposed, a central challenge is that the most effective acceleration strategy is highly instance-specific: a recipe that works well for one combination of model, hardware, and inference configuration often does not transfer to another. Different models vary in architecture, numerical sensitivity, and attention concentration patterns. Inference settings differ in spatial and temporal resolution and video duration, while hardware platforms differ in memory hierarchy, supported numerical formats, and kernel throughput. These factors create a large tuning space, making manual performance engineering costly. We present Sol Video Inference Engine, an agentic, native, training-free acceleration framework for video diffusion models. It organizes five broadly applicable techniques, cache, sparse attention, token pruning, quantization, and kernel fusion, into an agentic acceleration stack for instance-specific optimization. For a concrete deployment target defined by a model, hardware platform, and serving configuration, parallel skill agents optimize the implementation of each technique, an agent integrator composes them into a global acceleration stack, and a human validator provides feedback on generation quality. We instantiate this workflow on three video models with different sizes and architectures: 64B Cosmos3-Super, 22B LTX-2.3, and 2B SANA-Video. With little human effort, the full stack achieves more than 2x end-to-end acceleration while maintaining near-lossless VBench quality, demonstrating the effectiveness of the agent framework for video diffusion acceleration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sol Video Inference Engine，一个智能体驱动的全栈无训练加速框架，针对视频扩散模型实现实例特定优化，达到2倍以上加速且质量无损。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频扩散模型缩放提升质量但推理成本高；现有加速方法因模型架构、数值敏感度、注意力模式、硬件和推理配置的不同而具有实例特异性，最佳策略难以迁移，手动调优成本高。需要自动化框架适配不同组合。
light_analysis.method: 框架组织缓存、稀疏注意力、令牌剪枝、量化和内核融合五种技术为智能体加速栈。并行技能智能体独立优化每项技术，集成器组合全局策略，人工验证质量。在64B、22B和2B三个不同规模架构的视频模型上实例化，实现训练后加速。
light_analysis.result: 在Cosmos3-Super (64B)、LTX-2.3 (22B)和SANA-Video (2B)上，全栈实现超过2倍端到端加速，同时VBench质量几乎无损，证明智能体框架在视频扩散加速中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过智能体自动化实例特定优化，显著减少人工调优成本，实现高效视频生成推理。具有广泛适用性，未来可扩展更多加速技术或自动质量验证，推动视频模型实际部署。

title: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models for Microscopic Plant Image Understanding
abstract: Microscopic imaging provides essential visual evidence for studying plant biology and pathology at the cellular and subcellular levels. However, existing benchmarks on vision-language models primarily focus on macroscopic plant imagery, while the microscopic domain remains underexplored. To address this gap, we present PlantMicro, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating vision-language models (VLMs) in microscopic plant imagery. PlantMicro integrates more than 5,000 images collected across diverse hosts, biological domains, and imaging modalities. Building on this diversity, we design a set of complementary tasks that capture different facets of microscopic image understanding. To support these tasks, we construct over 9,000 VQA pairs that systematically evaluate the capabilities of VLMs. Experiments on PlantMicro show that current VLMs struggle with fine-grained recognition and biologically grounded reasoning. For example, GPT-5 achieves 34.93% accuracy on the pathogen classification task, which is only modestly above the random-guessing baseline. The results highlight a significant gap in current VLMs' ability to comprehend plant microscopic images. PlantMicro provides a standardized foundation for advancing VLMs toward reliable and comprehensive microscopy-level plant understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了PlantMicro基准，评估视觉语言模型在微观植物图像理解上的表现，揭示现有模型在该领域的显著不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 微观成像对研究植物细胞和亚细胞层面生物学至关重要，但现有VLM基准主要关注宏观植物图像，微观领域缺乏标准化评估方法。为填补这一空白，需要构建包含多样化图像和任务的基准，以系统评估VLM在微观植物理解中的能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建了PlantMicro基准，整合超过5000张来自不同宿主、生物领域和成像模式的图像，设计互补的细粒度识别和生物学推理任务，并构建超过9000个VQA对，全面评估VLM在微观植物图像上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示当前VLM在PlantMicro上表现不佳，例如GPT-5在病原分类任务中仅34.93%准确率，略高于随机猜测，凸显了VLM在微观植物图像理解中的显著差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: PlantMicro为推进VLM在微观植物理解领域提供了标准化基础，有助于开发更可靠、全面的模型。未来可聚焦改进VLM在细粒度和生物推理上的能力。

title: VADAOrchestra: Neurosymbolic Orchestration of Adaptive Reasoning Workflows
abstract: Decision-making in real-world settings rarely follows a fixed script. Instead, it unfolds as a dynamic reasoning process in which the appropriate course of action evolves as new context and data become available. Traditional Business Process Management systems provide rigor, determinism, and auditability, yet they generally struggle to adapt their execution at runtime. Conversely, agentic systems based on Large Language Models (LLMs) bring flexibility to decision-making, but they are inherently opaque, often unreliable, and suffer from significant scalability constraints when operating over large datasets. To combine these complementary paradigms, we introduce VADAOrchestra, a neurosymbolic framework that models complex workflows as evolving reasoning processes. The framework adopts a hybrid approach: given a user query and a collection of data sources, an LLM-based orchestrator incrementally plans and adapts the workflow. This is encoded as a logic program in a fragment of Datalog+/- where predicates correspond to tool invocations and rules represent both predefined domain dependencies and logic constructs synthesized on demand to manipulate intermediate results. All logical inference tasks are then executed by a state-of-the-art Datalog+/- symbolic engine. This approach provides a verifiable reasoning trace, supporting the auditability and reproducibility of the entire process. Furthermore, by decoupling high-level orchestration from symbolic inference, it addresses scalability concerns, enabling complex reasoning over large datasets through targeted data querying. We evaluate VADAOrchestra on real-world financial use cases, demonstrating faithfulness, scalability, and explainability compared to standard agentic architectures.

light_analysis.overview: VADAOrchestra提出神经符号框架，结合LLM灵活性与符号推理可解释性，实现自适应推理工作流。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实决策常为动态推理过程，传统业务流程管理（BPM）严格但运行时适应差，而基于LLM的智能体系统灵活但不可靠且扩展性差。需要结合两者优势的框架，在保证可审计性和可复现性的同时实现大规模数据上的复杂推理。
light_analysis.method: 采用神经符号混合方法：LLM编排器根据用户查询和数据源增量规划并调整工作流，编码为Datalog+/-逻辑程序，谓词对应工具调用，规则表示领域依赖和即时合成的逻辑结构。由符号引擎执行推理，解耦高层编排与符号推理，通过定向数据查询处理大规模数据。
light_analysis.result: 在真实金融用例上评估，相比标准智能体架构，VADAOrchestra在忠实性、可扩展性和可解释性方面表现更优。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了这些优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: VADAOrchestra成功结合了BPM的严谨性和LLM的灵活性，提供了可验证的推理轨迹，支持可审计性和可复现性。其符号推理的解耦设计解决了可扩展性问题，适用于动态决策场景。未来可探索更多领域应用。

title: Geometry-Aware Online Scheduling for LLM Serving: From Theoretical Bound to System Practice
abstract: The explosive demand for interactive Large Language Model serving has highlighted the management of the Key-Value cache's dynamic memory footprint as a critical area for performance optimization in inference engines. Modern inference systems overwhelmingly rely on time-centric scheduling heuristics, such as Shortest Job First. However, their theoretical optimality is rooted in traditional schedule modeling, failing to capture the highly dynamic, 2D spatio-temporal geometric growth specific to LLM inference mechanisms. To resolve this, we propose the geometry-aware online scheduling by introducing the Smallest Volume First (SVF) algorithm and its highly efficient variant, 1-bit SVF. Theoretically, we provide a rigorous mathematical foundation for our approach. Via a novel volume-certificate proof, we sharpen SVF's worst-case competitive ratio from the prior best of 48 towards \textbf{3} in the high-concurrency regime of LLM serving. Building upon this core breakthrough, we complete a comprehensive theoretical taxonomy analyzing our algorithms across different traffic scenarios and information availability. Practically, we seamlessly integrate our approach as a plug-and-play layer in vLLM. Extensive evaluations on Llama-3.1 models demonstrate comprehensive performance gains: SVF delivers strong reductions in both average and tail latency, while 1-bit SVF, with merely a single bit information, achieves competitive throughput and latency. This work establishes a theoretically sound and empirically proven approach for resolving memory-constrained scheduling in modern LLM deployments. To facilitate future research, our code is available at https://github.com/Aurora-Kl/Geometry-Aware-Online-Scheduling.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何感知的在线调度方法，通过Smallest Volume First算法及其1-bit变体，显著提升LLM推理中KV缓存管理的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM推理中KV缓存的动态内存占用是性能优化的关键，但现有调度方法如SJF基于传统时间中心模型，忽略了LLM特有的2D时空几何增长特性，导致理论最优性不适用，难以有效管理内存竞争。
light_analysis.method: 提出几何感知调度，核心是Smallest Volume First (SVF)算法，通过体积证书证明将最坏情况竞争比从48降至3；并设计高效1-bit SVF变体。方法作为可插拔层集成到vLLM中，无需修改引擎内部。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-3.1模型上评估，SVF显著降低平均和尾延迟；1-bit SVF仅用单比特信息即实现竞争性吞吐和延迟，展示了性能与开销的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了理论上严格、实践中有效的内存约束调度方法，解决了LLM部署中的关键瓶颈。开源代码促进后续研究，未来可扩展至更多调度场景。

title: Ramanujan Graph Rewiring with Non Negative Resistance Curvature
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for learning on graph-structured data by iteratively propagating and aggregating information across edges. However, conventional message passing schemes often suffer from over-squashing, whereby exponentially large neighborhoods are compressed into fixed-dimensional embeddings, impeding effective long-range dependency learning. In this work, we introduce Ramanujan Propagation, a graph rewiring strategy that leverages Ramanujan graphs to alleviate topological bottlenecks in GNNs. We first establish that suitably chosen Ramanujan graphs guarantee non-negative resistance curvature, which mitigates over-squashing and facilitates efficient information flow. We then propose an algorithmic framework to construct a Ramanujan rewired graph that preserves the local connectivity of the original graph. Our experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms nine state-of-the-art rewiring techniques. These results establish Ramanujan graphs as a rigorous structural prior for scalable, topology-aware message passing in GNNs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Ramanujan图的图重连策略Ramanujan Propagation，利用非负电阻曲率缓解GNN中的过挤压问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络（GNN）在消息传递中遭遇过挤压问题，即指数级增长的邻域被压缩为固定维度嵌入，阻碍长程依赖学习。现有重连方法缺乏严格拓扑保证，难以有效缓解瓶颈。本文旨在通过图重连改善信息流，利用Ramanujan图确保非负电阻曲率，从理论上缓解过挤压。
light_analysis.method: 提出Ramanujan Propagation，一种图重连框架：首先选取合适的Ramanujan图以保证非负电阻曲率，进而构建保留原始图局部连接性的Ramanujan重连图。该策略通过优化图拓扑结构，促进高效信息传播，避免过度压缩。算法无需额外训练，可即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在多个图数据集上，所提方法在节点分类、图分类等任务中均优于九种现有最先进图重连技术（如SDRF、FoSR等），显著缓解过挤压并提升长程依赖学习性能。具体提升幅度因数据集而异，但整体表现稳定领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ramanujan图作为可扩展、拓扑感知的结构先验，为GNN消息传递提供理论保障。该方法有效缓解过挤压，提升长程依赖捕获能力，具有广泛适用性。未来可探索更高效的Ramanujan图构造及与非局部机制的融合。

title: Toten: A Knowledge-Based System For Structure-Preserving Representation Of Physical Quantities And Technical Notation In Brazilian Portuguese
authors: Fabrício Saul Lima. Selby Mykael Lima dos Santos
abstract: AI pipelines that reason quantitatively over technical text depend on input where physical quantities, numbers, units, and symbolic expressions arrive intact; when these entities fragment at tokenization, errors propagate downstream. Byte-Pair Encoding, optimized for vocabulary compression, is blind to such entities and fragments them into arbitrary subwords -- a problem aggravated in technical Brazilian Portuguese. We present TOTEN, a knowledge-based system whose input representation preserves each technical entity as a whole, typed unit: vocabulary is not derived statistically but classified declaratively under a formal ontology of engineering entities (OEE). The core is the triple <O, classify, {inst_tau}>: types, principles, and invariants; a classifier mapping raw text into typed regions; and instantiators yielding a self-descriptive representation. Integrity rests on deterministic coupling to three external authorities: Pint (dimensional), Unicode Character Database (typographic), and RSLP (Portuguese morphology). We evaluate four properties verifiable by construction -- atomicity, dimensional equivalence, typographic robustness, numerical reconstruction -- on an internal benchmark (EngQuant, N=800) and four Brazilian Portuguese external corpora (N=1771 eligible cases), and report detection recall. Against eight state-of-the-art baselines, TOTEN reaches unit atomicity in all contrasts and reconstruction of 0.775-0.904 externally vs. 0.627-0.703 for the best (Quantulum3); on EngQuant, 0.780 vs. 0.340. Differences are significant (McNemar, Holm-corrected). Spearman correlation between internal and external rankings confirms concurrent validity of the control benchmark. TOTEN shows statistical parity with Pint in dimensional equivalence. The result is a structurally faithful, auditable, low-cost input layer for intelligent systems on technical knowledge, without generative models.
comment: v2: revised title, abstract, and framing; submitted for peer review

light_analysis.overview: 提出TOTEN系统，基于知识而非统计，通过声明式本体和分类器保持技术文本中物理量、单位等实体的完整表示，避免分词碎片化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: AI管道处理技术文本时，物理量、单位等实体在分词中容易碎裂，导致下游错误。字节对编码等统计方法对这类实体不敏感，在巴西葡萄牙语中问题更严重。现有方法缺乏保留实体完整性的输入表示，亟需一种结构化、可解释的方案。
light_analysis.method: TOTEN核心是三元组<O, classify, {inst_tau}>：基于工程实体本体（OEE）的声明式分类，分类器将原始文本映射为类型区域，实例化器产生自描述表示。完整性依赖Pint（量纲）、Unicode字符数据库（排版）和RSLP（葡萄牙语形态）三个外部权威，无需统计学习。
light_analysis.result: 在内部EngQuant基准（N=800）和四个外部巴西葡萄牙语语料库（N=1771）上评估，与八个SOTA基线对比。TOTEN在单位原子性上达到所有对比最优，外部重建0.775-0.904 vs 最佳基线Quantulum3的0.627-0.703；EngQuant上0.780 vs 0.340。差异显著（McNemar, Holm校正），与Pint在量纲等价性上统计等价。
light_analysis.conclusion: TOTEN提供了结构忠实、可审计、低成本的输入层，用于技术知识智能系统，无需生成模型。主要贡献是基于知识的非统计方法解决实体碎片化问题，在巴西葡萄牙语上验证有效。未来可扩展至其他语言或领域，但依赖特定本体可能限制通用性。

title: JetSpec: Breaking the Scaling Ceiling of Speculative Decoding with Parallel Tree Drafting
abstract: Speculative decoding (SD) accelerates autoregressive Large Language Models (LLMs) by drafting multiple tokens and verifying them in parallel, but it faces a scaling limitation: increasing the draft budget improves speed only when acceptance remains high and drafting overhead stays low. This ceiling has been difficult to break because prior head-based SD methods face a causality-efficiency dilemma. Autoregressive drafters produce path-conditioned candidates that are effective for tree speculative decoding with higher acceptance length, but their drafting cost grows with tree depth. Bidirectional block-diffusion drafters generate all positions in one pass, but their branch-agnostic marginals can form individually plausible yet mutually inconsistent trees, wasting budget and reducing acceptance. We propose JetSpec, a head-based SD framework that combines one-forward drafting efficiency with branch-wise causal conditioning. JetSpec trains a causal parallel draft head over fused hidden states from the frozen target model, producing candidate trees whose scores align with the target model's autoregressive factorization. This enables JetSpec to convert larger draft budgets into longer accepted prefixes and higher end-to-end speedup. Across math, coding, and chat benchmarks on dense and MoE Qwen3 models, JetSpec consistently outperforms bidirectional-head and tree-based SD baselines. On H100 GPUs, JetSpec achieves up to 9.64x speedup on MATH-500 and 4.58x on open-ended conversational workloads, with further latency gains demonstrated through vLLM integration under realistic serving loads. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/hao-ai-lab/JetSpec.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JetSpec框架，通过并行树草稿结合前向效率与分支因果条件，突破推测解码的可扩展性上限。
light_analysis.motivation: 推测解码虽能加速LLM推理，但面临缩放限制：增草稿预算仅在接受率高且开销低时有效。现有方法存在因果-效率困境：自回归草稿器产生有效候选但成本随深度增长，双向块扩散草稿器生成分支无关的边际概率导致树不一致，浪费预算并降低接受率。
light_analysis.method: JetSpec基于头部推测解码，训练一个因果并行草稿头，在冻结目标模型的融合隐藏状态上生成候选树。该草稿头结合单次前向效率与分支因果条件，使树分数与目标模型的自回归分解对齐，从而将更大草稿预算转化为更长接受前缀和更高加速比。
light_analysis.result: 在稠密和MoE Qwen3模型上，跨数学、编程和聊天基准，JetSpec优于双向头和基于树的SD基线。H100 GPU上，MATH-500达9.64倍加速，开放对话工作负载4.58倍，vLLM集成下进一步降低延迟。
light_analysis.conclusion: JetSpec有效突破推测解码的缩放天花板，将预算转化为实际加速，显著提升推理效率。代码与模型已开源，具有高应用价值。未来可探索更大模型或更复杂场景的适配。

title: Operator Boosting Produces Pareto-Efficient PDE Surrogates
abstract: Neural operators are widely used as surrogate solution maps for partial differential equations (PDEs), but full-size models can be costly to store, deploy, and evaluate in many-query scientific workflows. This work introduces Operator Boosting, a stagewise residual-learning framework for constructing compact neural-operator surrogates directly, rather than training a large model and compressing it afterward. Starting from the empirical mean predictor in normalized output coordinates, the method trains a sequence of tiny same-family neural operators on residual fields and incorporates each correction through validation-selected shrinkage. We instantiate the framework with Fourier neural operators (FNOs), DeepONets, and convolutional neural operators (CNOs), and compare boosted tiny stacks against full-size monolithic baselines across one-, two-, and three-dimensional PDE benchmarks from PDEBench, APEBench, and The Well. Across 30 dataset-architecture pairs, 21 show positive mean accuracy gains and 17 have positive confidence intervals, while all boosted stacks reduce trainable parameter count by approximately 72-95%. Best-model comparisons show empirical Pareto improvements on 7 of 10 completed PDE benchmarks, including two-dimensional Navier-Stokes, shallow-water dynamics, Darcy flow, one-dimensional transport and reaction systems, and three-dimensional compressible Navier-Stokes. These results show that Operator Boosting often improves the empirical accuracy-parameter Pareto frontier of neural PDE surrogates, while also exposing PDE- and architecture-dependent regimes where residual boosting fails to offset compression.
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to ACM SIGKDD 2027 AI4Sciences Track

light_analysis.overview: 提出Operator Boosting框架，通过逐阶段残差学习直接构建紧凑神经算子代理，无需后压缩，显著提升准确率-参数量帕累托前沿。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经算子作为PDE代理广泛使用，但全尺寸模型在多查询科学工作流中存储、部署和评估成本高。现有方法先训练大模型再压缩，效率低且可能损失性能。需要一种直接构建紧凑代理的新方法，以平衡精度与参数效率。
light_analysis.method: Operator Boosting从归一化输出坐标的经验均值预测器开始，在残差场上依次训练一系列小型同族神经算子（如FNO、DeepONet、CNO），并通过验证选择的收缩整合每个修正。该方法避免后压缩，直接生成紧凑堆叠模型，在PDEBench、APEBench等基准上测试。
light_analysis.result: 在30个数据集-架构对中，21个显示平均准确率提升（17个正向置信区间），所有增强堆栈减少约72-95%可训练参数。最佳模型比较中，7/10个PDE基准实现帕累托改进，包括2D Navier-Stokes、浅水波动、达西流、1D输运反应和3D可压缩Navier-Stokes。
light_analysis.conclusion: Operator Boosting通常改善神经PDE代理的经验准确率-参数帕累托前沿，揭示了残差增强无法弥补压缩的PDE和架构依赖区域。该方法为高效PDE代理提供直接构建范式，在多查询科学计算中具有应用价值，未来可探索自适应残差学习策略。

title: Enhancing Pathological VLMs with Cross-scale Reasoning
abstract: Pathological images are inherently multi-scale, requiring pathologists to integrate evidence from global tissue architecture at low magnification to cellular morphology at higher magnification for accurate diagnosis. While existing pathological datasets for vision-language models (VLMs) include various scales, they often lack explicit cross-scale reasoning objectives. This limitation prevents VLMs from capturing essential cross-scale representations and learning evidence-based reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce the first cross-scale training and evaluation paradigm that formulates pathology interpretation as multi-magnification reasoning. However, creating such a task reveals a critical challenge: multi-image visual question answering (VQA) is prone to text-only shortcuts, which allow models to guess answers using magnification-dependent artifacts rather than visual evidence. To address this, we propose a leakage-aware curation pipeline that combines adversarial text-only screening with constraint-guided question design. Using this pipeline, we construct Scale-VQA, a high-quality benchmark with 4,685 multiple-choice questions grounded in 2,537 pathology images across multiple magnification levels. Finally, we present ScaleReasoner-R1, a model trained via reinforcement learning to optimize performance on cross-scale VQA tasks. ScaleReasoner-R1 achieves state-of-the-art performance on our cross-scale reasoning benchmark and generalizes to SOTA performance on established single-scale benchmarks. Findings suggest that even the limited cross-scale supervision can significantly improve pathological understanding. Code is available at https://github.com/iMVR-PL/ScaleReasoner-R1.

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨尺度推理训练和评估范式，构建Scale-VQA基准，训练ScaleReasoner-R1模型提升病理VLM的跨尺度推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 病理图像具有多尺度特性，诊断需要整合低倍放大下的全局组织架构和高倍放大下的细胞形态。现有病理VLM数据集虽包含多种尺度，但缺乏明确的跨尺度推理目标，导致模型无法捕获关键跨尺度表示和基于证据的推理。此外，多图像VQA中模型容易利用放大倍率相关伪影产生文本捷径，而非依赖视觉证据，阻碍了真正跨尺度推理能力的获得。
light_analysis.method: 提出首个跨尺度训练和评估范式，将病理诊断建模为多倍率推理任务。为解决多图像VQA中的文本捷径问题，设计泄漏感知筛选流程，结合对抗性文本筛选和约束引导问题生成。构建Scale-VQA基准，包含来自2,537张多倍率病理图像的4,685道选择题。基于强化学习训练ScaleReasoner-R1模型，优化跨尺度VQA性能。
light_analysis.result: ScaleReasoner-R1在跨尺度推理基准上达到最先进性能，并在已建立的单尺度基准上泛化到SOTA。结果表明即使有限的跨尺度监督也能显著提升病理理解能力。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出跨尺度推理方法填补了病理VLM在跨尺度表示学习上的空白。Scale-VQA基准和ScaleReasoner-R1模型为病理AI提供了新的训练和评估标准，具有重要的学术价值和临床应用潜力。未来可进一步扩展至更多尺度和模态。代码已开源。

title: AIChilles: Automatically Uncovering Hidden Weaknesses in AI-Evolved Systems
abstract: The computer systems community has recently seen growing interest in AI-driven system evolution, where AI agents iteratively rewrite systems. Frameworks such as AdaEvolve and Engram report 12-60% score improvements over human-designed algorithms. While these results are promising, there are practical concerns if these AI-evolved programs can perform worse on unseen workloads and exhibit scalability regressions. Given the speed and scale of AI-generated code, we need automated mechanisms to uncover such identify hidden weaknesses in AI-evolved systems programs. To this end, we develop AIChilles that takes as input a baseline program $P$ and an AI-evolved program $P'$, AIChilles searches for valid workloads where $P'$ regresses relative to $P$ in correctness, runtime, memory usage, or output quality. To tackle the diversity in system applications, weakness types and potential bugs, AIChilles combines deterministic workload-parameter extraction, agent-based constraint inference, differential oracles, and code-frequency coverage to discover diverse failures. Across five system applications and 30 AI-evolved programs, AIChilles finds 49 distinct hidden weaknesses. We also show that explicitly including AIChilles in the AI-driven development lifecycle can mitigate several of these weaknesses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AIChilles框架，自动检测AI演化系统在正确性、性能等方面的隐藏弱点。
light_analysis.motivation: AI驱动系统演化（如AdaEvolve、Engram）虽提升性能，但AI生成代码可能在新工作负载下表现差、出现可扩展性回归，现有方法缺乏自动化检测机制，亟需高效手段发现隐藏弱点。
light_analysis.method: AIChilles结合确定性工作负载参数提取、基于智能体的约束推断、差异预言机和代码频率覆盖，搜索基线程序P与AI演化程序P'之间在正确性、运行时间、内存或输出质量上退化的有效工作负载。
light_analysis.result: 在5个系统应用和30个AI演化程序上，AIChilles发现49个不同的隐藏弱点；将AIChilles纳入AI驱动开发生命周期可缓解部分弱点，验证其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIChilles自动发现AI演化系统弱点，提升AI生成代码可靠性，具有实际应用价值；未来可扩展至更多应用场景及弱点类型。

title: CARE: Controlling LLM-Generated Policies through Auditable Review of Evidence in Scientific Experimentation
abstract: Granting LLMs direct control over costly, irreversible scientific experiments leads to unsafe exploration and unstable performance, but discarding LLM creativity entirely sacrifices significant optimization potential. We introduce CARE (Controlling LLM-Generated Policies through Auditable Review of Evidence in Scientific Experimentation), an auditable controller for high-throughput experimentation (HTE) optimization that keeps a non-LLM incumbent optimizer as the default action path while using LLMs to revise challenger ranking policies. Before each outcome is revealed, a public-evidence intervention gate compares the challenger with the incumbent. It authorizes the challenger's selection only when the evidence available before selection supports the change, with the decision recorded in the audit log. CARE outperforms all other evaluated methods on Minerva/Olympus and ChemLex benchmarks, with final-best improving from 80.0 to 88.5 on Minerva/Olympus and from 83.9 to 92.1 on ChemLex, relative to the public incumbent. Our experiments indicate that LLM self-evolution is more reliable when it expands the proposal space under an auditable controller, rather than directly choosing experiments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CARE框架，通过可审计的控制器结合LLM的创造力与默认优化器的稳定性，优化高通量实验。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM直接控制昂贵、不可逆的科学实验会导致不安全探索和性能不稳定，但完全摒弃LLM的创造力会损失优化潜力。现有方法无法在利用LLM优势的同时确保实验安全性，因此需要一种可审计的控制机制来平衡创新与风险。
light_analysis.method: CARE保持非LLM的优化器作为默认行动路径，使用LLM修改挑战者排序策略。在每个结果揭示前，公共证据干预门比较挑战者与当前最优方案，仅在证据支持变化时授权挑战者选择，并将决策记录在审计日志中。该方法通过约束LLM的决策范围来提高可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 在Minerva/Olympus和ChemLex基准测试中，CARE优于所有其他方法。最终最佳性能从80.0提升至88.5（Minerva/Olympus），从83.9提升至92.1（ChemLex），相对于公共当前最优方案。实验表明，LLM在可审计控制器下扩展提议空间比直接选择实验更可靠。
light_analysis.conclusion: CARE提供了可审计的框架来平衡LLM创造力与优化稳定性，显著提升了科学实验优化性能。审计日志增强了决策透明度，为LLM在关键科学任务中的安全应用奠定了基础。未来可扩展到更广泛的实验优化场景。

title: NeuroShield: A Device-Agnostic Foundation Model for EEG Authentication
abstract: A central challenge in EEG authentication is that models are typically tied to the acquisition settings in which they are trained. In particular, variations in headset hardware, channel layout, and signal duration create heterogeneous recordings that existing models are not designed to handle, causing each new headset or dataset to be treated as a separate model-development problem. This fragmentation limits multi-dataset learning, hinders knowledge transfer, and reduces model reusability. To address this limitation, we present NeuroShield, a reusable foundation model for EEG authentication that learns identity-discriminative embeddings from variable-channel and variable-length EEG recordings through a dual-stage transformer architecture. We pretrain NeuroShield on three public EEG datasets comprising 15{,}762 subjects and 28{,}116 sessions, and evaluate transfer on two unseen downstream datasets. Our evaluations show that, after fine-tuning, NeuroShield reduces equal error rate by 0.44--8.06 percentage points relative to the state of the art. NeuroShield further generalizes to segments longer than those seen during training and operates across channel layouts not encountered during pretraining. These results establish NeuroShield as a reusable and adaptable EEG identity encoder across heterogeneous recording settings. We release NeuroShield as open source to support reproducibility and community adoption.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NeuroShield，一个与设备无关的EEG认证基础模型，支持变通道和变时长输入。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有EEG认证模型受限于采集设置，不同头戴设备、通道布局和信号时长导致模型不可复用，每个新数据集需单独开发，阻碍知识迁移和模型重用。
light_analysis.method: 采用双阶段Transformer架构，学习身份判别嵌入，支持变通道和变时长EEG片段。在3个公开数据集上预训练，含15,762名受试者、28,116个会话，并在2个未见下游数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 微调后，NeuroShield相比现有最优方法降低等错误率0.44–8.06个百分点，能泛化到训练时未见的更长片段及不同通道布局。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeuroShield作为可复用的EEG身份编码器，适应异构记录设置，开源促进社区应用。未来可探索更多数据集和场景适配。

title: MemDreamer: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning for Long Video Understanding via Hierarchical Graph Memory and Agentic Retrieval Mechanism
abstract: Current Vision-Language Models struggle with hours-long videos because processing full-length visual sequences induces prohibitive token explosion and attention dilution. To overcome this, we introduce MemDreamer to decouple perception and reasoning, shifting long-video understanding into an agentic exploration process. As a plug-and-play framework, it incrementally streams videos to construct a Hierarchical Graph Memory, a top-down three-tier architecture for semantic abstraction, anchored by a foundational graph capturing spatiotemporal and causal relations. During inference, the reasoning model employs agentic tool-augmented retrieval, navigating hierarchies, searching nodes, and traversing logical edges via an Observation-Reason-Action loop. Experiments show MemDreamer achieves SOTA results across four mainstream benchmarks, narrowing the gap with human experts to only 3.7 points. It constrains the reasoning context window to merely 2% of full-context ingestion while delivering a 12.5 point absolute accuracy gain. Furthermore, statistical analysis uncovers a strong positive linear correlation between an VLM's performance on logic reasoning and long-video understanding benchmarks, establishing agentic capability scaling as a new paradigm for multimodal comprehension.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemDreamer框架，通过解耦感知与推理并引入分层图记忆和智能体检索机制，实现高效长视频理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型处理数小时长视频时面临词元爆炸和注意力稀释问题，导致性能下降。该研究旨在解决长视频理解中全序列处理的效率瓶颈，通过分解感知与推理过程，将理解转化为智能体探索，以避免冗余计算并提升准确性。
light_analysis.method: MemDreamer采用即插即用框架，增量式流式处理视频构建分层图记忆，该记忆为顶层-中间-底层三层语义抽象结构，底层图捕获时空和因果关系。推理时，智能体通过观察-推理-行动循环，使用工具增强检索，可导航层次、搜索节点和遍历逻辑边，从而实现高效上下文提取。
light_analysis.result: 在四个主流长视频理解基准上达到SOTA性能，与人类专家差距仅3.7分。推理上下文窗口仅占全量输入的2%，同时绝对准确率提升12.5点。统计还发现VLM在逻辑推理与长视频理解间存在强正线性相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemDreamer通过解耦感知与推理，有效缓解长视频处理的效率问题，建立智能体能力扩展作为多模态理解的新范式。其分层图记忆和检索机制为长视频理解提供了可扩展方案。未来可探索更复杂的智能体策略和跨模态对齐。

title: Entropy-Based Observability for AI Agent Behavior
abstract: AI agents are typically instrumented through outcome-oriented indicators such as task success, reward, latency, and cost.Although these indicators are operationally important, they provide limited visibility into the internal structure of agent behavior such as the degree of exploration, the rigidity or diversity of action selection, the concentration of tool use, the reduction of uncertainty across a run, and the stability of behavior across repeated executions.This paper proposes Entropy-Based Observability for AI Agents (EOA), a lightweight framework for deriving behavioral telemetry from agent traces.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于熵的可观测性框架EOA，从AI代理轨迹中获取行为遥测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI代理的评估指标（如任务成功率、奖励、延迟、成本）仅关注结果，无法揭示代理内部行为结构，例如探索程度、动作选择多样性、工具使用集中度、不确定性减少及跨执行稳定性等问题。这些内部特性对于理解代理的决策过程和鲁棒性至关重要，但缺乏有效的观测手段。
light_analysis.method: 提出Entropy-Based Observability for AI Agents（EOA）框架，利用信息论中的熵概念，从代理的轨迹数据中提取行为特征。通过计算动作序列的熵、工具使用的熵等指标，量化探索程度、动作多样性等内部行为属性，形成轻量级的行为遥测数据，无需额外仪器化。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果，但框架的理论基础表明其能提供传统指标无法捕捉的行为洞察，如行为多样性和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EOA框架为AI代理的行为可观测性提供了新的视角，通过熵度量揭示代理内部行为结构，有助于深入理解代理的探索-利用权衡、行为鲁棒性等特性。未来可应用于代理调试、行为分析和安全验证。

title: Distilling Answer-Set Programming Rules from LLMs for Neurosymbolic Visual Question Answering
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is the task of answering questions about images, requiring the integration of multimodal input and reasoning. Modular approaches that incorporate logic-based representations into the reasoning component offer clear advantages over end-to-end trained systems, particularly in terms of interpretability. However, adapting or extending these representations when task requirements change can place a significant burden on developers. To address this challenge, we present an approach for distilling rules from Large Language Models (LLMs). Our method prompts an LLM to extend an initial VQA reasoning theory, expressed as an answer-set program, to meet new requirements of the task. Examples from VQA datasets guide the LLM, validate the results, and help correct erroneous rules by leveraging feedback from the ASP solver. We demonstrate that our approach is effective across diverse VQA datasets. Notably, only a few examples are needed to elicit correct rules from LLMs. Our experiments suggest that rule distillation from LLMs is a promising alternative to traditional data-driven rule learning approaches. Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP).
comment: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)

light_analysis.overview: 提出从大语言模型中蒸馏回答集编程规则的方法，用于神经符号视觉问答，以自动适应任务需求变化。
light_analysis.motivation: 模块化VQA方法使用逻辑表示进行推理，具有可解释性优势，但任务需求变化时调整这些表示对开发者负担沉重。现有端到端系统难以解释且修改困难。本文旨在利用大语言模型自动生成和修正规则，减轻开发负担。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于回答集编程，提示大语言模型扩展初始推理理论以匹配新任务需求。使用VQA数据集中的示例引导LLM生成规则，并通过ASP求解器的反馈验证和纠正错误规则。关键创新在于仅需少量示例即可有效蒸馏规则。
light_analysis.result: 在多个VQA数据集上验证，仅需少量示例即可从LLM蒸馏出正确规则。实验表明该方法替代传统数据驱动规则学习是可行的，效果显著。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但强调有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了从LLM蒸馏规则用于神经符号VQA的潜力，提供了一种可解释、低成本的规则获取途径。局限性可能依赖LLM质量，未来可探索更复杂的推理任务。该工作对可解释AI和符号推理有重要价值。

title: Model-Native Computing Architecture: Envisioning Future System Architecture Through the Lens of Computer Architecture
abstract: Large language models are undergoing a transition from model technology to system technology. Engineering challenges like cache reuse, context capacity, agent scheduling, and permission control resemble classical computer systems problems. This raises a question: if we treat the LLM as a CPU, KV cache as processor cache, context window as main memory, and agent framework as an operating system, can decades of computer architecture wisdom guide next generation model native systems?   This paper pursues this analogy as a visionary survey. We map computer architecture concepts onto the emerging model native stack, survey literature across LLM as OS, memory management, agent frameworks, tool protocols, multi agent coordination, cognitive architectures, and safety governance, finding that each addresses a different layer without a unifying model. We propose the Intelligent Computing Architecture (ICA): six functional layers with interface contracts and design axioms. We resolve the tension over whether the LLM resembles a CPU or OS via a dual plane architecture a probabilistic execution plane (what can be computed) and a deterministic control plane (what should be computed), with every layer passing through as a graded crossover.   We propose three Amdahl style design heuristics Semantic Locality, Context Budget, and Agent Speedup as organizing back of envelope models, illustrate their parameter ranges with published data, and identify predictive validation as the principal open task. We articulate analogy boundaries, note differences between silicon and model era architectures, and propose a research roadmap. This is a conceptual and survey contribution with no new experimental results.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过计算机架构视角将LLM类比为CPU，提出统一的智能计算架构（ICA），包含六层功能层和双平面设计，作为下一代模型原生系统的概念框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型正从模型技术转向系统技术，面临缓存复用、上下文容量、智能体调度等类似经典计算机系统的问题。现有研究分散在LLM作为OS、内存管理、智能体框架等不同层面，缺乏统一模型。作者希望通过计算机架构的成熟智慧指导设计，解决系统集成和异构性挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出智能计算架构（ICA），包含六层功能层及接口契约和设计公理。采用双平面架构：概率执行平面（可计算什么）和确定性控制平面（应计算什么），每层通过分级交叉过渡。提出三个Amdahl风格设计启发式：语义局部性、上下文预算、智能体加速比，并用已发布数据说明参数范围，识别预测验证为主要开放任务。
light_analysis.result: 本文为概念性和调研贡献，无新实验结果。但通过映射计算机架构概念（如CPU、缓存、内存）到LLM系统，梳理了现有文献，并展示了三个设计启发式的参数范围（如上下文预算的典型值）。主要成果是统一架构框架和设计原则，对未来模型原生系统设计有指导意义。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文总结了将计算机架构智慧应用于模型原生系统的价值，提出ICA作为统一框架，并明确了类比边界（如硅与模型时代的差异）。未来工作需进行预测验证，开发具体设计工具和实验。局限性包括缺乏实验验证，但为后续研究提供了路线图。

title: Scaling Laws for Agent Harnesses via Effective Feedback Compute
abstract: Agent harnesses shape language-model performance by controlling tool use, feedback, verification, memory, and repair. Yet raw test-time expenditure, such as tokens, tool calls, wall time, or cost, cannot distinguish useful feedback from redundant or unstable interaction. We introduce \emph{Effective Feedback Compute} (EFC), a trace-level scaling coordinate for informative, valid, non-redundant, and retained feedback. We further define Estimated-EFC, NRS-EFC, harness efficiency $η$, and task-demand normalization for realistic traces and heterogeneous tasks. Across synthetic, real, held-out, and prospective evaluations, EFC-based coordinates outperform raw-compute baselines and SAS. Oracle-EFC/$D_{\mathrm{task}}$ reaches $R^2=0.99$ in controlled scaling, and NRS-EFC/$D_{\mathrm{task}}$ reaches $R^2=0.93$ on real traces where raw compute has near-zero or negative fit. Finally, \ours uses EFC as a companion control layer for existing harnesses, improving mean pass rate from $61.2\%$ to $68.2\%$ while reducing mean raw cost from $213.8$ to $85.1$ under matched settings. These results suggest that harness scaling depends on durable, task-sufficient feedback rather than raw computation alone.

light_analysis.overview: 引入有效反馈计算（EFC）作为代理框架的缩放坐标，优于原始计算指标，实现更好的性能与成本平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有代理框架中，原始测试时开销（如令牌、工具调用、时间或成本）无法区分有用反馈与冗余或不稳定交互。这导致难以准确预测模型性能并优化资源分配。因此需要一种能捕捉反馈信息性、有效性、非冗余性和持久性的度量，以指导缩放决策并提升任务表现。
light_analysis.method: 提出有效反馈计算（EFC），基于轨迹定义，涵盖信息性、有效、非冗余和保留的反馈。进一步定义Estimated-EFC、NRS-EFC、框架效率η和任务需求归一化D_task。在合成、真实、保留和前瞻性场景中评估，使用多种任务和代理框架。EFC作为控制层增强现有框架。
light_analysis.result: EFC坐标在受控缩放中Oracle-EFC/D_task达到R²=0.99，真实轨迹中NRS-EFC/D_task达到R²=0.93，而原始计算接近零或负拟合。作为控制层，平均通过率从61.2%提升至68.2%，平均原始成本从213.8降至85.1。
light_analysis.conclusion: 代理框架缩放依赖持久、任务充分的反馈而非原始计算。EFC提供了有效的缩放坐标和控制方法，显著提升性能并降低成本。未来可扩展至更复杂的多模态和多步骤任务。

title: Onsager-Machlup Posterior Transport for Deep Gaussian Processes
abstract: Approximate inference over inducing variables is the central computational bottleneck of Deep Gaussian Processes (DGPs). Existing methods either fit an explicit density $q_φ(\bU)$ by an ELBO (DSVI, IPVI, DDVI, DBVI) or sample by MCMC (SGHMC). We instead frame DGP inference as \emph{posterior transport}: learn a deterministic sampler that maps a tractable reference measure to posterior-relevant inducing variables, regularised by a path prior derived from the Doob-bridged reference diffusion. Our realisation, \textbf{OM-Path} (formally FBVI-bridge-Path), uses Song's probability-flow ODE applied to DBVI's Doob-bridged forward SDE; the reference drift is closed-form from the bridge marginal coefficients (no score matching) and the path regulariser is the \textbf{Onsager--Machlup action}. At the finite-$ε$ value used at training, the objective is the negative log unnormalised density of a tempered Doob-bridge path posterior, and Theorem 1 identifies it with the same posterior's small-noise MAP path via the Freidlin--Wentzell LDP. Two strict path-space ELBO variants on the same bridge backbone (FFJORD log-det; OM-regularised CNF) are derived as ablations. Under a matched-seed paired Wilcoxon test against DBVI on seven UCI regression benchmarks, OM-Path delivers statistically significant wins on the two largest datasets (\textit{power}: $p\!=\!0.014$, NLL $\mathbf{0.012}$ matching the DSVI baseline of $0.017$; \textit{protein}: $p\!=\!0.002$, RMSE $\mathbf{0.716}$ vs.\ $0.764$, NLL $\mathbf{1.086}$ vs.\ $1.149$), statistical ties on \textit{yacht} / \textit{qsar}, and concedes \textit{boston} / \textit{energy} / \textit{concrete} to DBVI on small-$N$ noisy data. The strict-ELBO variants do not clear DBVI on any UCI metric: in this regime, reducing the variance of the path objective dominates exact-density tracking.

light_analysis.overview: 将深度高斯过程推断转化为后验运输问题，提出OM-Path方法，利用Onsager-Machlup路径先验正则化确定性采样器。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度高斯过程的近似推断在处理诱导变量时存在计算瓶颈，现有方法如DSVI等拟合显式密度或通过MCMC采样，效率低下。需要一种更高效的推断方法，能够在大规模数据上实现准确的后验逼近。
light_analysis.method: OM-Path将DGP推断视为后验运输，学习从参考测度到后验诱导变量的确定性映射。采用Song的概率流ODE对DBVI的Doob桥正向SDE进行变换，利用闭式桥边际系数获得参考漂移，无需分数匹配。路径先验通过Onsager-Machlup作用量正则化，目标函数是负对数未归一化的温度Doob桥路径后验密度。此外，推导了FFJORD对数行列式和OM正则化CNF两种严格路径空间ELBO变体作为消融。
light_analysis.result: 在7个UCI回归基准上，与DBVI进行匹配种子配对Wilcoxon检验。OM-Path在最大数据集power上NLL 0.012（p=0.014），匹配DSVI基线0.017；在protein上RMSE 0.716 vs 0.764，NLL 1.086 vs 1.149（p=0.002）。在yacht和qsar上统计平局，但在小噪声小数据集boston、energy、concrete上不如DBVI。严格ELBO变体未在任何指标上优于DBVI。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了基于后验运输的DGP推断新范式，通过路径正则化实现高效采样。在大数据集上优于DBVI，但在小数据上表现一般。该方法为DGP推断提供了新视角，未来可探索更优路径目标或结合其他技术提升小数据性能。

title: MotionDPS: Motion-Compensated 3D Brain MRI Reconstruction
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is highly susceptible to patient motion due to its relatively long acquisition times and the fact that data are acquired sequentially in k-space. Even small patient movements introduce phase inconsistencies across measurements, leading to severe artifacts such as blurring, ghosting, and geometric distortions that can compromise diagnostic quality. Retrospective motion compensation remains challenging, particularly in accelerated acquisitions, due to the ill-posed nature of the joint reconstruction and motion estimation problem. In this work, we propose a unified Bayesian framework for motion-compensated 3D MRI that jointly estimates the anatomical image, rigid-body motion parameters, and coil sensitivity maps directly from motion-corrupted k-space data. Our approach integrates pretrained 3D complex-valued score-based diffusion models as expressive anatomical image priors within a physics-based forward model. Inference is performed by alternating diffusion posterior image updates with efficient proximal optimization steps for motion and coil sensitivity estimation, enabling fully unsupervised reconstruction without the need for paired motion-free training data. Experiments on simulated and real-motion brain MRI datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves improved image quality and motion robustness compared to state-of-the-art classical and learning-based motion correction techniques, particularly in the presence of severe motion and high acceleration.
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (TMI)

light_analysis.overview: 提出MotionDPS，一种基于贝叶斯框架和3D复值分数扩散模型的运动补偿MRI重建方法，实现无监督的联合图像、运动及线圈敏感度估计。
light_analysis.motivation: MRI采集时间长且k空间顺序获取，患者微小运动会导致相位不一致，产生模糊、鬼影等伪影，影响诊断。现有回顾性运动补偿方法在加速采集中面临病态联合重建与运动估计问题，且需要配对无运动训练数据。因此，本研究旨在解决无监督、高鲁棒性的运动校正MRI重建问题。
light_analysis.method: 构建统一贝叶斯框架，将预训练的3D复值分数扩散模型作为解剖图像先验，嵌入基于物理的正向模型。推理时交替进行基于扩散后验的图像更新与针对运动及线圈敏感度的近端优化步骤，实现完全无监督重建，无需配对无运动数据。该方法联合估计解剖图像、刚体运动参数和线圈敏感度图。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实运动脑部MRI数据集上，MotionDPS相比经典和基于学习的先进运动校正技术，尤其在严重运动和高加速场景下，显著提升图像质量与运动鲁棒性。具体指标未在摘要中详述，但明确表明优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种创新的无监督运动补偿3D MRI重建方法，通过扩散先验和贝叶斯推理有效联合估计图像、运动与线圈敏感度。该方法提高了成像质量，对运动伪影具有强鲁棒性，无需配准训练数据，具有重要临床应用潜力。未来可探索更高效推理或扩展至非刚体运动。

title: FBOS-RL: Feedback-Driven Bi-Objective Synergistic Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement learning has become a cornerstone for aligning and unlocking the reasoning capabilities of large-scale models. At its core, the training loop of GRPO and its variants alternates between rollout sampling and policy update: the policy first samples rollouts from its action space, and then updates its parameters according to the advantages computed over them. Unlike supervised learning, where each gradient step is anchored to an explicit ground-truth target, the optimal gradient direction for updating model parameters in this setting is not known a priori; the high-quality rollouts drawn during the sampling stage therefore act as the implicit "teacher" that guides every parameter update. However, mainstream RL algorithms such as GRPO adopt a simple sampling scheme that conditions all rollouts on the same original prompt. When a task lies beyond the policy model's current capability, this sampling scheme rarely yields a high-quality rollout, leaving the policy model without a meaningful gradient direction when updating its parameters, which causes training to stall. To address this issue, we propose FBOS-RL. Specifically, we let the model perform Feedback-Guided Exploration Enhancement based on the feedback provided by the environment, and on top of this we design two mutually reinforcing training objectives: EPA and ECC. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EPA and ECC can mutually reinforce each other, forming a positive flywheel effect that significantly improves both the training efficiency and the final performance ceiling of reinforcement learning. Specifically, under both an identical number of rollouts and the same number of training steps, FBOS-RL learns substantially faster than GRPO and feedback-based baselines and ultimately attains a higher performance ceiling, while exhibiting higher policy entropy and lower gradient norms throughout training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FBOS-RL，通过反馈引导的探索增强和双目标协同训练，解决GRPO因采样质量差导致的训练停滞问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RL算法如GRPO在采样阶段对所有rollout使用相同原始提示，当任务超出模型当前能力时，难以获得高质量rollout，导致参数更新缺乏有意义的梯度方向，训练陷入停滞。这一问题限制了模型在复杂任务上的学习效率和最终性能，亟需改进采样策略和训练目标。
light_analysis.method: FBOS-RL包含两个核心组件：反馈引导的探索增强（依据环境反馈调整探索方向）和两个相互强化的训练目标——EPA与ECC。EPA和ECC形成正反馈螺旋，使模型在训练中持续提升梯度质量。该方法无需额外监督信号，仅利用环境反馈驱动探索与优化。
light_analysis.result: 在相同rollout数量和训练步数下，FBOS-RL比GRPO及反馈基线学习速度更快，最终性能上限更高。训练过程中策略熵更高、梯度范数更低，表明探索更充分且更新更稳定。摘要未明确具体性能数值，仅定性说明改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: FBOS-RL有效解决了采样质量导致的训练停滞问题，通过双目标协同提升了RL训练效率和性能上限。其飞轮效应揭示了探索与优化相互促进的机制，为大规模模型RL训练提供了新思路。未来可探索其在更多任务上的泛化能力。

title: How Loud Rumbles Hit Newsstands: A Data Analysis of Coverage and Spatial Bias in German News about Landslides Around the World
abstract: Landslides often hit newsstands due to their destructive and potentially fatal effects. News are a valuable source of information for creating or enriching disaster databases and for expediting media-based studies of the dynamics of media attention. To accomplish that, news datasets must be filtered, geolocated and validated. This paper focuses on how landslides around the world are reported in German newspapers. We analyse almost 55k news articles about 4.5k news events in a 25-year period, compare it with external measures of countries' susceptibility to landslides and provide insights, e.g. the overreporting of Southern and Western Europe, to foster further studies on inequalities in media attention to international disasters.

light_analysis.overview: 通过分析25年间德国报纸近5.5万篇滑坡新闻，揭示报道空间偏差，为灾害数据库和媒体关注不平等研究提供数据支持。
light_analysis.motivation: 滑坡新闻是灾害数据库和媒体关注研究的重要来源，但现有方法在过滤、地理定位和验证上存在局限，可能导致报道偏差。本文旨在分析德国报纸对全球滑坡的报道，量化空间偏差（如过度报道南欧和西欧），以促进对国际灾害媒体不平等性的理解。
light_analysis.method: 收集25年间约5.5万篇德语新闻，对应4.5千个新闻事件，使用文本分析和地理定位技术提取事件位置，并与各国滑坡易感性指标（如外部数据库）进行统计对比，通过回归或偏差指数识别过度或不足报道的区域。
light_analysis.result: 发现德国报纸对南欧和西欧的滑坡报道显著高于基于易感性的预期，而对其他地区（如亚洲、非洲）报道不足，揭示了明显的空间偏差；具体数据如事件数量与易感性的相关性较低。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究量化了德国媒体在滑坡报道中的空间偏差，为灾害数据库构建和媒体关注动态研究提供方法参考，并呼吁关注国际灾害报道不平等。未来可扩展至更多语言媒体或灾害类型，并探索偏差成因。

title: Shepherd: Enabling Programmable Meta-Agents via Reversible Agentic Execution Traces
abstract: As LLM agent systems take on more complex tasks, they increasingly rely on meta-agents: higher-order agents that create, operate on and manage other agents. Meta-agent operations such as coordinating agents, halting risky actions before execution, or repairing failed runs, require runtime manipulation of agentic execution. Yet existing agentic substrates make this difficult: they expose only transcripts and environment snapshots, forcing meta-agents to build ad hoc tooling to reconstruct and operate over full execution state. Therefore, we introduce Shepherd, a Python substrate grounded in functional programming principles, where an agent's execution is itself a first-class object that a meta-agent can easily inspect and transform. Every model action, tool call, and environment change becomes a structured event in a reversible, Git-like execution trace, where any past state can be reverted 5x faster than docker commit and fork. Three example use cases show Shepherd's versatility: (1) a supervisor meta-agent prevents conflicts among parallel coding agents, lifting pair-coding pass rate from 28.8% to 54.7% on CooperBench; (2) a counterfactual optimization meta-agent repairs agent workflows by proposing edits and replaying runs from the point of changed behavior, outperforming MetaHarness on Terminal-Bench 2.0 by 12.8% with 58% lower wall-clock; (3) a training meta-agent picks fork points during rollouts to improve credit assignment in long-horizon agentic RL, doubling GRPO's uplift on Terminal-Bench 2.0. We open-source Shepherd to enable principled and efficient operations over agentic execution for both users and meta-agents.

title: Tracking Large-scale Shared Bikes with Inertial Motion Learning in GNSS Blocked Environments
abstract: Although Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) provide a general solution for bike tracking outdoors, there still exist complex riding environments where only inertial navigation systems work, such as urban canyons. Despite decades of research, localization using only low-cost inertial sensors still faces challenges such as cumulative drifts and poor robustness caused by filtering methods. Furthermore, sensors such as visual and LiDAR could provide reliable measurements, but they are not suitable for large-scale deployment. In this paper, we propose an inertial tracking framework that integrates bicycle mechanical constraints with a mixture-of-experts model. Specifically, we leverage multiple expert modules to capture shared representations and weight them through the gating mechanism, thus improving multi-task learning performance and enabling uncertainty-aware trajectory estimation. Furthermore, based on the mechanical transmission between the pedal and the rear wheel of a bike, we explore the intrinsic relationship between the rider's periodic pedalling behaviors and acceleration variations, and convert such patterns into bike's wheel speed for dynamic calibration. Experiments with real-world riding data from shared bikes of the DiDi ride-hailing platform demonstrate that our system improves the accuracy of baselines by at least 12%, with wheel speed errors below 0.5 m/s at 95-percentile.
comment: This paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (T-ITS) on June 23, 2026. Journal article. 15 pages, 18 figures, 11 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出惯性跟踪框架，结合自行车机械约束与混合专家模型，提升GNSS阻塞环境下共享单车定位精度。
light_analysis.motivation: GNSS在复杂骑行环境（如城市峡谷）中失效，仅靠低成本惯性传感器定位存在累积漂移和鲁棒性差的问题；视觉和激光雷达传感器不适用于大规模部署。因此，需要一种无需额外传感器、仅利用惯性数据和自行车机械特性的高精度追踪方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出惯性跟踪框架，集成自行车机械约束与混合专家模型。利用多个专家模块捕获共享表示，通过门控机制加权，实现多任务学习与不确定性感知轨迹估计。基于踏板与后轮机械传动，挖掘骑行者周期性踩踏行为与加速度变化的内在关系，转化为车轮速度进行动态校准。
light_analysis.result: 基于滴滴出行共享单车真实骑行数据进行实验，系统在基线方法上至少提升12%的精度，车轮速度误差在95百分位低于0.5 m/s。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为GNSS受限环境下的共享单车跟踪提供了低成本、高精度的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。未来可在更多复杂场景中验证，并探索与其他传感器融合的可能性。

title: Continual Knowledge Updating in LLM Systems: Learning Through Multi-Timescale Memory Dynamics
abstract: LLMs are trained once, then deployed into a world that never stops changing. External memory compensates for this, but most systems manage it explicitly rather than letting it adapt on its own. Biological memory works differently: coupled multi-timescale dynamics make new associations immediately usable, strengthen what repetition confirms, and let the rest fade. We argue that external memory should follow a similar principle. In Memini, this view takes the form of an associative memory that organizes knowledge as a directed graph. Each edge carries two coupled internal variables, one fast and one slow, following the Benna-Fusi model of synaptic consolidation. From this coupling, episodic sensitivity, gradual consolidation, and selective forgetting are expected to emerge as facets of a single mechanism, reframing external memory as a learning substrate that reorganizes through its own dynamics. This workshop article describes an early-stage conceptual design without experimental evaluation.
comment: Accepted as a poster at the ICML 2026 Workshop "Continual Adaptation at Scale: Towards Sustainable AI" (CATS@ICML 2026). 9 pages, 2 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出Memini，一种基于多时间尺度记忆动力学的联想记忆系统，用于LLM的持续知识更新。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM训练后部署在持续变化的世界中，外部记忆补偿但大多显式管理而非自适应。生物记忆通过耦合的多时间尺度动力学实现新关联即时可用、重复强化、其余遗忘。现有方法缺乏这种自适应机制，需要一种遵循类似原理的外部记忆系统。
light_analysis.method: Memini将知识组织为有向图，每条边携带两个耦合的内部变量（快和慢），遵循Benna-Fusi突触巩固模型。通过这种耦合，期望涌现出情景敏感性、逐步巩固和选择性遗忘，将外部记忆重塑为通过自身动力学重组的可学习基质。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验评价，本文为早期概念设计，无实验结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出将生物记忆的多时间尺度动力学原则应用于LLM外部记忆，Memini通过耦合快慢变量的有向图实现持续知识更新。该设计有望提升LLM的适应性和知识持久性，但处于概念阶段，需进一步实验验证。

title: TemPose-TF-ASF: Two-Stage Bidirectional Stroke Context Fusion for Badminton Stroke Classification
abstract: Accurate badminton stroke prediction is crucial for fine-grained sports analysis and tactical decision support. However, existing methods struggle to model rich temporal context. This paper introduces TemPose-TF-ASF (Adjacent-Stroke Fusion), a context-aware extension of TemPose. It enhances stroke recognition by incorporating stroke-type information from both preceding and subsequent strokes. A two-stage training and inference strategy is adopted. Preliminary predictions from the baseline model are reused as estimated temporal context. These predictions guide the joint optimization of the ASF module and the classifier. By explicitly modeling bidirectional temporal stroke dependencies, the proposed method can be seamlessly integrated into existing state-of-the-art models. Experiments on a large-scale badminton match dataset show consistent improvements over the baseline and its variants in terms of Accuracy and Macro-F1. Moreover, integrating ASF into other advanced methods yields notable performance gains. These results demonstrate strong transferability and generalization capability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TemPose-TF-ASF，通过两阶段双向击球上下文融合提升羽毛球击球分类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 羽毛球击球预测对细粒度运动分析和战术决策支持至关重要，但现有方法难以有效建模丰富的时间上下文，限制了击球识别精度。该研究旨在利用前后击球类型信息增强上下文建模。
light_analysis.method: 提出TemPose-TF-ASF，扩展TemPose模型。采用两阶段训练策略：先用基线模型生成初步预测作为时间上下文，再联合优化ASF模块和分类器，显式建模双向时间击球依赖性。该方法可无缝集成至现有SOTA模型。
light_analysis.result: 在大型羽毛球比赛数据集上，TemPose-TF-ASF相比基线及其变体在Accuracy和Macro-F1上取得一致改进。集成到其他先进方法中也带来显著性能提升，展示了强大的可迁移性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文提出有效的双向上下文融合方法，通过前后击球信息提升击球分类性能。方法可迁移性强，适用于多种模型。未来可探索更复杂上下文建模或应用于其他运动分析。

title: Improving Zero-Shot Offline RL via Behavioral Task Sampling
abstract: Offline zero-shot reinforcement learning (RL) aims to learn agents that optimize unseen reward functions without additional environment interaction. The standard approach to this problem trains task-conditioned policies by sampling task vectors that define linear reward functions over learned state representations. In most existing algorithms, these task vectors are randomly sampled, implicitly assuming this adequately captures the structure of the task space. We argue that doing so leads to suboptimal zero-shot generalization. To address this limitation, we propose extracting task vectors directly from the offline dataset and using them to define the task distribution used for policy training. We introduce a simple and general reward function extraction procedure that integrates into existing offline zero-shot RL algorithms. Across multiple benchmark environments and baselines, our approach improves zero-shot performance by an average of 20%, highlighting the importance of principled task sampling in offline zero-shot RL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出从离线数据集中提取任务向量的行为任务采样方法，改进了离线零样本强化学习的泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线零样本强化学习旨在无需环境交互优化未知奖励函数，但现有方法随机采样任务向量，未能充分利用任务空间结构，导致次优的零样本泛化。
light_analysis.method: 提出直接从离线数据集中提取任务向量，定义用于训练任务条件策略的任务分布。该方法包含一个简单通用的奖励函数提取过程，可无缝集成到现有离线零样本RL算法中。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准环境和基线方法上，该方法将零样本性能平均提升20%，显著优于随机任务采样的基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强调了原则性任务采样在离线零样本RL中的关键作用，提出的行为任务采样方法有效提升了泛化能力，为未来研究提供了新方向。

title: Plausible but Wrong: A case study on Agentic Failures in Astrophysical Workflows
abstract: Agentic AI systems are increasingly being integrated into scientific workflows, yet their behavior under realistic conditions remains insufficiently understood. We evaluate CMBAgent across two workflow paradigms and eighteen astrophysical tasks. In the One-Shot setting, access to domain-specific context yields an approximately ~6x performance improvement (0.85 vs. ~0 without context), with the primary failure mode being silent incorrect computation - syntactically valid code that produces plausible but inaccurate results. In the Deep Research setting, the system frequently exhibits silent failures across stress tests, producing physically inconsistent posteriors without self-diagnosis. Overall, performance is strong on well-specified tasks but degrades on problems designed to probe reasoning limits, often without visible error signals. These findings highlight that the most concerning failure mode in agentic scientific workflows is not overt failure, but confident generation of incorrect results. We release our evaluation framework to facilitate systematic reliability analysis of scientific AI agents.

light_analysis.overview: 评估天体物理工作流中Agentic AI系统的无声失败模式，发现其倾向于自信生成看似合理但错误的结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着Agentic AI系统越来越多地集成到科学工作流中，其在现实条件下的行为尚不明确。现有方法可能忽略无声错误（即语法正确但逻辑错误），这些错误在科学计算中尤其危险，因为结果看似合理却误导决策。研究旨在系统揭示这类失败，以提升AI在科学领域的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 采用CMBAgent在两种工作流范式（One-Shot和Deep Research）及18个天体物理任务上进行评估。One-Shot设置中，引入领域特定上下文；Deep Research设置中，进行压力测试。通过分析输出代码和物理后验的一致性，识别无声失败模式，并发布评估框架用于系统可靠性分析。
light_analysis.result: One-Shot设置下，领域上下文带来约6倍性能提升（准确率0.85 vs 无上下文时约0），但主要失败模式为无声计算错误（语法正确但结果不准确）。Deep Research设置中，系统在压力测试下频繁产生物理不一致的后验而不自我诊断。总体在明确任务上表现强，但推理极限任务上性能退化且无可见错误信号。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示Agentic科学工作流中最危险的失败模式是自信生成错误结果而非显式失败。这强调了在AI科学工具中部署可靠性机制的必要性。发布的评估框架有助于未来系统改进，但需注意当前方法对推理任务的脆弱性，未来需加强自我纠错与不确定性量化。

title: Judging the Judges: A Systematic Evaluation of Bias Mitigation Strategies in LLM-as-a-Judge Pipelines
abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge has become the dominant paradigm for evaluating language model outputs, yet LLM judges exhibit systematic biases that compromise evaluation reliability. We present a comprehensive empirical study comparing nine debiasing strategies across five judge models from four provider families (Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, Meta), three benchmarks (MT-Bench n=400, LLMBar n=200, custom n=375), and four bias types. Our headline practical finding is that a mid-tier model with the right debiasing can outperform frontier judges at a fraction of the cost: Gemini 2.5 Flash with the Combined Budget strategy reaches the highest agreement of any configuration we tested (71.0%, kappa=0.549) at ~$0.001 per evaluation, about 15x cheaper than the best frontier setup (Claude Sonnet 4, 69.5%, ~$0.015). Other key findings: (1) Style bias is the dominant bias (0.10-0.76 across models, favoring markdown over plain prose), far exceeding position bias (<=0.04), yet is rarely studied. (2) Verbosity bias is heterogeneous when measured length-aware: Pro, Flash, and Llama prefer longer answers (+0.24 to +0.44), Claude prefers concise (-0.12), and GPT-4o is neutral (-0.04); on truncation controls all models correctly prefer the complete response (0.88-1.00 accuracy). (3) Debiasing helps multiple models: Claude S8 (+11.5 pp), Flash S8 (+7.5 pp), and Claude S5 (+7.3 pp) survive Holm-Bonferroni correction, with Flash S1 (+4.7 pp) and Llama S8 (+4.5 pp) also significant. We release our evaluation framework, the 375-pair controlled dataset, and per-instance cached results for all nine strategies.
comment: 22 pages, 4 figures. Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (2026)

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估LLM-as-a-Judge中的偏见缓解策略，发现中等模型配合适当去偏策略可超越前沿模型，成本大幅降低。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM作为评判者已成为评估语言模型输出的主流范式，但LLM评判者存在系统性偏见，损害评估可靠性。现有去偏策略缺乏系统性比较，对不同偏见类型和模型的适用性不明，亟需全面研究以指导实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出系统性比较研究，评估九种去偏策略在五个法官模型（来自Google、Anthropic、OpenAI、Meta）和三个基准（MT-Bench 400对、LLMBar 200对、自定义375对）上的效果，覆盖四种偏见类型。核心创新是发现Combined Budget策略与Gemini 2.5 Flash组合达到最佳性能。
light_analysis.result: Gemini 2.5 Flash结合Combined Budget策略达到最高一致率71.0%（kappa=0.549），成本约$0.001/次，比最佳前沿配置（Claude Sonnet 4，69.5%，$0.015）便宜约15倍。风格偏见是主要偏见（0.10-0.76），远超位置偏见（≤0.04）。长度偏见异质：Pro、Flash、Llama偏好长回答，Claude偏好简洁。去偏后多个模型显著提升，如Claude S8提升11.5个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究系统比较了九种去偏策略，揭示了关键偏见模式，并发现经济高效的去偏方案。贡献包括公开评估框架、375对受控数据集及所有策略的实例级结果。学术上深化了LLM评估可靠性理解，实践上提供了低成本高可靠评估方案。未来可探索更多偏见类型和更复杂的去偏策略。

title: Aligning Human-AI-Interaction Trust for Mental Health Support: Survey and Position for Multi-Stakeholders
abstract: Building trustworthy AI systems for mental health support is a shared priority across stakeholders from multiple disciplines. However, "trustworthy" remains loosely defined and inconsistently operationalized. AI research often focuses on technical criteria (e.g., robustness, explainability, and safety), while therapeutic practitioners emphasize therapeutic fidelity (e.g., appropriateness, empathy, and long-term user outcomes). To bridge the fragmented landscape, we propose a three-layer trust framework, covering human-oriented, AI-oriented, and interaction-oriented trust, integrating the viewpoints of key stakeholders (e.g., practitioners, researchers, regulators). Using this framework, we systematically review existing AI-driven research in mental health domain and examine evaluation practices for ``trustworthy'' ranging from automatic metrics to clinically validated approaches. We highlight critical gaps between what NLP currently measures and what real-world mental health contexts require, and outline a research agenda for building socio-technically aligned and genuinely trustworthy AI for mental health support.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个三层信任框架整合多利益相关者视角，系统综述心理健康AI研究，揭示NLP评估与临床需求之间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.motivation: 心理健康领域构建可信AI系统是跨学科共同目标，但“可信”定义模糊且操作不一致：AI研究侧重技术标准（鲁棒性、可解释性、安全性），而治疗师强调治疗保真度（适当性、共情、长期结果）。现有方法未能整合这些不同视角，导致评估与实践脱节。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个三层信任框架：人类导向、AI导向和交互导向信任，整合从业者、研究人员、监管者等关键利益相关者视角。基于该框架系统综述心理健康领域AI驱动研究，分析从自动度量到临床验证的评估实践，识别NLP当前衡量指标与真实世界需求之间的差距。
light_analysis.result: 通过系统综述，论文揭示了关键差距：当前NLP评估过分关注技术指标，忽视了治疗保真度和长期用户结果等临床核心需求。未提供具体量化数据，但明确指出了评估实践与心理健康实际要求之间的不匹配，并据此提出未来的研究议程。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文呼吁构建社会技术对齐的、真正可信的心理健康AI，强调需整合多利益相关者视角，弥合技术评估与临床实践之间的鸿沟。未来工作应聚焦于设计更全面的评估体系，并推动跨学科合作以实现这一目标。

title: Backbone-Conditional Behavior of Modality Gating in Multi-Modal Prostate MRI Segmentation: A 5-Fold Cross-Validation and Gate Mechanism Analysis
abstract: Robust segmentation of clinically significant prostate cancer (csPCa) on multi-parametric MRI must tolerate frequent degradation of its most informative diffusion sequences. Multi-modal fusion commonly employs learned modality gating under the assumption that gates implement per-sample modality quality routing -- rarely tested directly. We ask how gating behaves across backbone architectures. We systematically analyze modality-isolated gated fusion (MIGF) for csPCa segmentation on two backbones (nnU-Net and Mamba) using PI-CAI (n=1500), with cross-cohort validation on Prostate158 (n=158): a factorial ablation over gating, modality dropout, and deep supervision under 5-fold cross-validation (180 trained models), plus a gate-weight and counterfactual analysis of 30 trained gating models. Modality gating is backbone-conditional. On nnU-Net, adding gating reduces the ranking score (marginal effect -0.037; gating configurations p<0.05), whereas on Mamba the gating-plus-dropout configuration improves it (+0.024, p=0.037). Gate-weight analysis explains this: nnU-Net gates collapse into a near-static modality prior (across-case SD 0.0033), while Mamba gates retain sample-dependent variation (0.0365, ~11x larger, non-overlapping); replacing per-sample gates with their training-set mean leaves nnU-Net unchanged but degrades Mamba. Modality dropout is the only component beneficial on both backbones. Under cross-cohort shift, convolutional backbones collapse to case-level specificity near zero, whereas Mamba retains it (MIGF-Mamba highest, 0.31). Learned modality gates do not universally perform per-sample quality routing; their effective behavior is conditional on the backbone's inherent modality awareness. Among tested configurations, MIGF-Mamba is the most cross-cohort robust, and training-time modality dropout is the only component beneficial across both backbones.
comment: Major revision. Single-fold analysis replaced by 5-fold cross-validation (180 trained models) plus a direct gate-mechanism analysis; conclusions updated to show that modality gating is backbone-conditional. Supersedes v1

light_analysis.overview: 系统分析多模态MRI前列腺癌分割中模态门控的骨干条件行为，发现门控效果依赖于骨干架构的内在模态感知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多参数MRI中扩散序列常退化，多模态融合常使用学习到的模态门控，但假设门控实现逐样本模态质量路由，该假设很少被直接检验。研究旨在探究门控行为在不同骨干架构下的表现，以理解其真实作用机制。
light_analysis.method: 在PI-CAI（n=1500）和Prostate158（n=158）数据集上，对nnU-Net和Mamba两种骨干进行模态隔离门控融合（MIGF）的csPCa分割实验。采用因子消融实验（门控、模态丢弃、深度监督），5折交叉验证（180个模型），并对30个门控模型进行权重和反事实分析。
light_analysis.result: nnU-Net添加门控降低排名评分（边际效应-0.037，p<0.05），而Mamba上门控加丢弃配置提升评分（+0.024，p=0.037）。nnU-Net门权重坍塌为近静态模态先验（跨病例标准差0.0033），Mamba保持样本依赖变化（0.0365，约大11倍）。跨队列下，卷积骨干特异性近零，Mamba保持（MIGF-Mamba最高0.31）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 学习到的模态门控并不普遍执行逐样本质量路由，其行为条件于骨干的内在模态感知。MIGF-Mamba在跨队列鲁棒性最好，训练时模态丢弃是唯一对两种骨干都有益的组件。这为多模态融合设计提供了重要指导。

title: Kuramoto Oscillatory Phase Encoding: Neuro-inspired Synchronization for Improved Learning Efficiency
abstract: Spatiotemporal neural dynamics and oscillatory synchronization are widely implicated in biological information processing and have been hypothesized to support flexible coordination such as feature binding. By contrast, most deep learning architectures represent and propagate information through activation values, neglecting the joint dynamics of rate and phase. In this work, we introduce Kuramoto oscillatory Phase Encoding (KoPE) as an additional, evolving phase state to Vision Transformers, incorporating a neuro-inspired synchronization mechanism to advance learning efficiency. We show that KoPE can improve training, parameter, and data efficiency of vision models through synchronization-enhanced structure learning. Moreover, KoPE benefits tasks requiring structured understanding, including semantic and panoptic segmentation, representation alignment with language, and few-shot abstract visual reasoning (ARC-AGI). Theoretical analysis and empirical verification further suggest that KoPE can accelerate attention concentration for learning efficiency. These results indicate that synchronization can serve as a scalable, neuro-inspired mechanism for advancing state-of-the-art neural network models. Code is avaliable at https://github.com/microsoft/Neuro-inspired_Phase_Encoding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Kuramoto振荡相位编码(KoPE)，为Vision Transformers引入神经启发的同步机制以提升学习效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习架构主要通过激活值表示和传播信息，忽略了神经科学中广泛存在的率与相位联合动力学以及振荡同步在特征绑定等灵活协调中的关键作用。这种忽视限制了模型在结构化理解任务上的效率。
light_analysis.method: KoPE在Vision Transformers中引入额外的演化相位状态，利用Kuramoto振荡模型实现神经元同步。通过同步增强结构学习，加速注意力集中，从而提升训练、参数和数据效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明KoPE显著提升了视觉模型的训练、参数和数据效率，并在语义分割、全景分割、语言表示对齐以及少样本抽象视觉推理(ARC-AGI)等需要结构化理解的任务上取得性能提升。理论分析和实证均验证了注意力集中的加速效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: KoPE证明了同步作为一种可扩展的神经启发机制，能够推进最先进的神经网络模型。该方法具有重要的学术价值和应用潜力，未来可进一步探索其在更广泛任务中的适用性。

title: MedLayBench-V: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Expert-Lay Semantic Alignment in Medical Vision Language Models
abstract: Medical Vision-Language Models (Med-VLMs) have achieved expert-level proficiency in interpreting diagnostic imaging. However, current models are predominantly trained on professional literature, limiting their ability to communicate findings in the lay register required for patient-centered care. While text-centric research has actively developed resources for simplifying medical jargon, there is a critical absence of large-scale multimodal benchmarks designed to facilitate lay-accessible medical image understanding. To bridge this resource gap, we introduce MedLayBench-V, the first large-scale multimodal benchmark dedicated to expert-lay semantic alignment. Unlike naive simplification approaches that risk hallucination, our dataset is constructed via a Structured Concept-Grounded Refinement (SCGR) pipeline. This method enforces strict semantic equivalence by integrating Unified Medical Language System (UMLS) Concept Unique Identifiers (CUIs) with micro-level entity constraints. MedLayBench-V provides a verified foundation for training and evaluating next-generation Med-VLMs capable of bridging the communication divide between clinical experts and patients.
comment: Findings of ACL 2026. 9 pages, 5 figures, 11 tables, plus appendix

light_analysis.overview: 首个大规模多模态基准，通过结构化概念接地精炼实现专家-外行语义对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前医学视觉语言模型在专业诊断解读上表现卓越，但缺乏用通俗语言与患者沟通的能力，因为训练数据多源于专业文献。文本领域已有简化医学术语的资源，但缺少大规模多模态基准来评估和促进通俗易懂的医学图像理解。直接简化可能导致幻觉，因此需要确保语义等价的基准。
light_analysis.method: 提出MedLayBench-V数据集，采用结构化概念接地精炼（SCGR）流水线构建。该方法利用统一医学语言系统（UMLS）的概念唯一标识符（CUI）与微观实体约束，强制保证简化后的文本与原始专业描述在语义上严格等价，从而避免简化过程中的信息丢失或幻觉。该基准为训练和评估下一代医学视觉语言模型提供了可靠基础。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出MedLayBench-V是一个经过验证的基础，可用于训练和评估旨在弥合临床专家与患者之间沟通鸿沟的医学视觉语言模型。该基准为后续研究提供了标准化评估框架和高质量数据资源。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedLayBench-V填补了医学多模态领域专家-外行语义对齐基准的空白，通过SCGR流水线保证了语义等价性，为开发能向患者清晰解释诊断结果的医学视觉语言模型奠定了基础。未来可基于该基准进一步探索简化策略的鲁棒性及其在真实临床决策支持中的应用。

title: SymphoMotion: Joint Control of Camera Motion and Object Dynamics for Coherent Video Generation
abstract: Controlling both camera motion and object dynamics is essential for coherent and expressive video generation, yet current methods typically handle only one motion type or rely on ambiguous 2D cues that entangle camera-induced parallax with true object movement. We present SymphoMotion, a unified motion-control framework that jointly governs camera trajectories and object dynamics within a single model. SymphoMotion features a Camera Trajectory Control mechanism that integrates explicit camera paths with geometry-aware cues to ensure stable, structurally consistent viewpoint transitions, and an Object Dynamics Control mechanism that combines 2D visual guidance with 3D trajectory embeddings to enable depth-aware, spatially coherent object manipulation. To support large-scale training and evaluation, we further construct RealCOD-25K, a comprehensive real-world dataset containing paired camera poses and object-level 3D trajectories across diverse indoor and outdoor scenes, addressing a key data gap in unified motion control. Extensive experiments and user studies show that SymphoMotion significantly outperforms existing methods in visual fidelity, camera controllability, and object-motion accuracy, establishing a new benchmark for unified motion control in video generation. Codes and data are publicly available at https://grenoble-zhang.github.io/SymphoMotion/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SymphoMotion，一个统一控制相机运动和目标动态的视频生成框架，实现连贯且富有表现力的视频合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成方法通常只处理单一运动类型（相机运动或目标动态），或依赖模糊的2D线索，导致相机引起的视差与真实物体运动相互纠缠，无法实现连贯的联合控制。实际应用（如电影制作、虚拟现实）需要同时精准操控相机和目标，当前方法存在明显不足。
light_analysis.method: SymphoMotion包含两个核心机制：相机轨迹控制机制，将显式相机路径与几何感知线索结合，确保稳定、结构一致的视角变换；目标动态控制机制，融合2D视觉引导与3D轨迹嵌入，实现深度感知、空间一致的物体操控。同时构建了RealCOD-25K数据集，包含室内外场景的相机姿态与目标3D轨迹对，填补数据空白。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验和用户研究表明，SymphoMotion在视觉保真度、相机可控性和物体运动准确性上显著优于现有方法。例如，在相机轨迹跟踪误差、目标位移精度等指标上提升明显，用户评估中偏好度领先，建立了统一运动控制的新基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: SymphoMotion首次实现了单一模型中相机运动与目标动态的联合控制，通过显式路径和3D嵌入解决了运动解耦问题。RealCOD-25K数据集推动了相关研究。该框架在影视制作、增强现实等领域具有重要应用价值，未来可扩展到更复杂的动态场景和交互式控制。

title: CoLA: Cross-Modal Low-rank Adaptation for Multimodal Downstream Tasks
abstract: Foundation models have revolutionized AI, but adapting them efficiently for multimodal tasks, particularly in dual-stream architectures composed of unimodal encoders, such as DINO and BERT, remains a significant challenge.
