ParameterEfficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods like LowRank Adaptation (LoRA) enable lightweight adaptation, yet they operate in isolation within each modality, limiting their ability in capturing cross-modal interactions. In this paper, we take a step in bridging this gap with Cross-Modal LowRank Adaptation (CoLA), a novel PEFT framework that extends LoRA by introducing a dedicated inter-modal adaptation pathway alongside the standard intra-modal one. This dual-path design enables CoLA to adapt unimodal foundation models to multimodal tasks effectively, without interference between modality-specific and crossmodal learning. We evaluate CoLA across a range of vision-language (RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, RefCOCOg) and audio-visual (AVE, AVS) benchmarks, where it consistently outperforms LORA, achieving a relative gain of around 3% and 2%, respectively, while maintaining parameter efficiency. Notably, CoLA enables the first multitask PEFT framework for visual grounding, bridging a key gap in efficient multimodal adaptation. Code is available at https://github.com/peterwisu/CoLA

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨模态低秩适配方法CoLA，通过双路径设计实现多模态参数高效微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 基础模型在单模态任务中表现优异，但高效适配到多模态任务仍具挑战。现有PEFT方法如LoRA仅在各自模态内独立运作，无法有效捕捉跨模态交互。这一问题限制了双流架构（如DINO和BERT）在多模态下游任务中的应用效率，亟需一种既能保留单模态学习又能增强跨模态交互的轻量化适配方法。
light_analysis.method: CoLA在LoRA基础上引入额外的跨模态适配路径，形成双路径设计：一条保持模态内低秩适配，另一条专门学习模态间交互。该设计确保单模态与跨模态学习互不干扰，同时保持参数高效。在视觉-语言（RefCOCO系列）和音频-视觉（AVE、AVS）基准上评估，使用双流编码器架构。
light_analysis.result: CoLA在多个多模态基准上一致优于LoRA，在视觉-语言任务上相对提升约3%，在音频-视觉任务上约2%。参数效率与LoRA相当，且首次实现视觉定位的多任务PEFT框架。对比基线包括标准LoRA，所有实验设置保持一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoLA有效弥合了单模态基础模型高效适配多模态任务的空白，通过双路径低秩适配增强了跨模态交互。该方法在视觉-语言和音频-视觉领域均验证有效性，并为多任务多模态微调提供新范式。未来可探索更多模态组合和任务扩展，且代码已开源促进研究。

title: FlowID : Enhancing Forensic Identification with Latent Flow-Matching Models
abstract: Every day, many people die under violent circumstances, whether from crimes, war, migration, or climate disasters. Medico-legal and law enforcement institutions document many portraits of the deceased for evidence, but cannot immediately carry out identification on them. While traditional image editing tools can process these photos for public release, the workflow is lengthy and produces suboptimal results. In this work, we leverage advances in image generation models, which can now produce photorealistic human portraits, to introduce FlowID, an identity-preserving facial reconstruction method. Our approach combines single-image fine-tuning, which adapts the generative model to out-of-distribution injured faces, with attention-based masking that localizes edits to damaged regions while preserving identity-critical features. Together, these components enable the removal of artifacts from violent death while retaining sufficient identity information to support identification. To evaluate our method, we introduce InjuredFaces, a novel benchmark for identity-preserving facial reconstruction under severe facial damage. Beyond serving as an evaluation tool for this work, InjuredFaces provides a standardized resource for the community to study and compare methods addressing facial reconstruction in extreme conditions. Experimental results show that FlowID outperforms state-of-the-art open-source methods while maintaining low memory requirements, making it suitable for local deployment without compromising data privacy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowID，一种结合单图像微调和注意力掩码的身份保持面部重建方法，用于法医鉴定中受损面部的修复。
light_analysis.motivation: 暴力死亡事件频发，法医机构拍摄大量死者照片但无法立即识别。传统图像编辑工具工作流程冗长且效果不佳，难以在保护身份信息的同时去除致命伤痕。现有生成模型在分布外受损面部上表现不足，亟需一种高效、隐私保护的方法。
light_analysis.method: FlowID采用潜在流匹配模型，通过单图像微调适应分布外受伤面部，同时利用基于注意力的掩码定位受损区域，仅编辑局部特征，保留身份关键信息。该方法无需大规模训练数据，支持本地部署，降低内存需求。
light_analysis.result: 在引入的InjuredFaces基准上，FlowID在身份保持和重建质量上优于现有开源方法，同时保持低内存占用，适合隐私敏感的本地部署场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowID有效提升了法医鉴定中受损面部的识别能力，并提供了标准化的InjuredFaces基准，为社区研究极端条件下的面部重建奠定基础。未来可扩展至其他受损图像修复任务。

title: To View Transform or Not to View Transform: NeRF-based Pre-training Perspective
abstract: Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) have emerged as a prominent pre-training paradigm for vision-centric autonomous driving, which enhances 3D geometry and appearance understanding in a fully self-supervised manner. To apply NeRF-based pretraining to 3D perception models, recent approaches have simply applied NeRFs to volumetric features obtained from view transformation. However, coupling NeRFs with view transformation inherits conflicting priors; view transformation imposes discrete and rigid representations, whereas radiance fields assume continuous and adaptive functions. When these opposing assumptions are forced into a single pipeline, the misalignment surfaces as blurry and ambiguous 3D representations that ultimately limit 3D scene understanding. Moreover, the NeRF network for pre-training is discarded during downstream tasks, resulting in inefficient utilization of enhanced 3D representations through NeRF. In this paper, we propose a novel NeRF-Resembled Point-based 3D detector that can learn continuous 3D representation and thus avoid the misaligned priors from view transformation. NeRP3D preserves the pre-trained NeRF network regardless of the tasks, inheriting the principle of continuous 3D representation learning and leading to greater potentials for both scene reconstruction and detection tasks. Experiments on nuScenes dataset demonstrate that our proposed approach significantly improves previous state-of-the-art methods, outperforming not only pretext scene reconstruction tasks but also downstream detection tasks.
comment: The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR'26)

light_analysis.overview: 提出NeRP3D，一种保留预训练NeRF网络的点云3D检测器，避免视图变换与NeRF连续表示的冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于NeRF的预训练方法将NeRF与视图变换耦合，但视图变换带来离散刚性的表示，与NeRF的连续自适应函数冲突，导致3D表示模糊，限制场景理解。此外，预训练的NeRF网络在下游任务中被丢弃，造成表示浪费。
light_analysis.method: 提出NeRP3D，一种NeRF重组的点云3D检测器。它避免视图变换，直接学习连续3D表示，并保留预训练的NeRF网络用于所有任务，继承连续表示学习原则。在nuScenes上进行预训练和下游检测任务。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，NeRP3D显著优于之前的最优方法，不仅提升预训练场景重建任务，还提升下游3D检测任务。具体提升幅度摘要未明确，但表明性能领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeRP3D通过保留预训练NeRF网络，解决了视图变换与NeRF的矛盾，实现了更优的3D表示。该方法在场景重建和检测任务中均有效，展示了连续表示的潜力。局限性未提及，但可能依赖NeRF的预训练复杂度。

title: Asymptotic Learning Curves for Diffusion Models with Random Features Score and Manifold Data
abstract: We study the theoretical behavior of denoising score matching--the learning task associated to diffusion models--when the data distribution is supported on a low-dimensional manifold and the score is parameterized using a random feature neural network. We derive asymptotically exact expressions for the test, train, and score errors in the high-dimensional limit. Our analysis reveals that, for linear manifolds the sample complexity required to learn the score function scales linearly with the intrinsic dimension of the manifold, rather than with the ambient dimension. Perhaps surprisingly, the benefits of low-dimensional structure starts to diminish once we have a non-linear manifold. These results indicate that diffusion models can benefit from structured data; however, the dependence on the specific type of structure is subtle and intricate.
comment: Added proof of Claim 1 in a restricted setting

light_analysis.overview: 本文从理论上分析了扩散模型中随机特征得分函数在流形数据上的学习曲线，揭示了线性流形样本复杂度随内在维度线性增长，而非线性流形则削弱低维优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中表现优异，但其得分匹配学习过程的理论理解尚不充分，尤其当数据分布位于低维流形上时。现有方法通常忽略数据的内在结构，导致样本复杂度分析不准确。本文旨在建立高维极限下得分匹配误差的精确表达式，揭示流形维度与样本复杂度的关系，为扩散模型在结构化数据上的应用提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用随机特征神经网络参数化得分函数，并在高维极限下推导测试误差、训练误差和得分误差的渐近精确表达式。分析针对线性与非线性流形数据，通过随机矩阵理论等工具计算均值场极限下的误差行为。线性流形假设数据位于低维子空间，非线性流形则考虑更一般的弯曲流形结构。
light_analysis.result: 对于线性流形，样本复杂度仅与数据的内在维度线性相关，与高维环境维度无关。对于非线性流形，低维结构优势逐渐减弱，表明得分学习对数据流形的曲率或非线性敏感。实验通过理论计算验证了误差渐近公式的准确性，并与传统高维情形对比，显示了流形结构的显著影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为扩散模型的得分匹配学习提供了关键理论结果，证明低维流形可显著降低样本需求，但仅在线性情形下成立。研究揭示了数据几何结构对生成模型性能的复杂影响，未来可推广至更一般的流形或探索自适应评分网络设计。

title: 2K Retrofit: Entropy-Guided Efficient Sparse Refinement for High-Resolution 3D Geometry Prediction
abstract: High-resolution geometric prediction is essential for robust perception in autonomous driving, robotics, and AR/MR, but current foundation models are fundamentally limited by their scalability to real-world, high-resolution scenarios. Direct inference on 2K images with these models incurs prohibitive computational and memory demands, making practical deployment challenging. To tackle the issue, we present 2K Retrofit, a novel framework that enables efficient 2K-resolution inference for any geometric foundation model, without modifying or retraining the backbone. Our approach leverages fast coarse predictions and an entropy-based sparse refinement to selectively enhance high-uncertainty regions, achieving precise and high-fidelity 2K outputs with minimal overhead. Extensive experiments on widely used benchmark demonstrate that 2K Retrofit consistently achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and speed, bridging the gap between research advances and scalable deployment in high-resolution 3D vision applications. Code will be released upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出2K Retrofit框架，通过熵引导的稀疏精炼，实现无需修改基础模型的高效2K分辨率3D几何预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 高分辨率几何预测对自动驾驶、机器人等至关重要，但现有基础模型在2K图像上直接推理的计算和内存需求过高，限制了实际部署。现有方法在扩展性上存在根本局限，无法兼顾精度和效率。
light_analysis.method: 2K Retrofit采用快速粗预测生成初始结果，然后利用基于熵的不确定性估计，仅对高不确定性区域进行稀疏精炼，从而以最小开销获得高保真2K输出。该框架不修改或重训练骨干网络，可即插即用于任意几何基础模型。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛使用的基准上，2K Retrofit在准确度和速度上均达到最先进水平，有效弥合了研究与高分辨率3D视觉可扩展部署之间的差距。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种高效、与模型无关的框架，将任意几何基础模型扩展到2K分辨率，显著提升高分辨率场景下的实用性和部署可行性。未来工作可探索更先进的熵策略或扩展至更高分辨率。

title: HUGE-Bench: A Benchmark for High-Level UAV Vision-Language-Action Tasks
abstract: Existing UAV vision-language navigation (VLN) benchmarks have enabled language-guided flight, but they largely focus on long, step-wise route descriptions with goal-centric evaluation, making them less diagnostic for real operations where brief, high-level commands must be grounded into safe multi-stage behaviors. We present HUGE-Bench, a benchmark for High-Level UAV Vision-Language-Action (HL-VLA) tasks that tests whether an agent can interpret concise language and execute complex, process-oriented trajectories with safety awareness. HUGE-Bench comprises 4 real-world digital twin scenes, 8 high-level tasks, and 2.56M meters of trajectories, and is built on an aligned 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)-Mesh representation that combines photorealistic rendering with collision-capable geometry for scalable generation and collision-aware evaluation. We introduce process-oriented and collision-aware metrics to assess process fidelity, terminal accuracy, and safety. Experiments on representative state-of-the-art VLA models reveal significant gaps in high-level semantic completion and safe execution, highlighting HUGE-Bench as a diagnostic testbed for high-level UAV autonomy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HUGE-Bench基准，用于评估无人机高级视觉-语言-动作任务，填补了现有基准在简洁高级指令处理和安全过程执行方面的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有无人机视觉语言导航基准主要基于长链逐步路线描述和以目标为中心的评估，难以诊断实际中需要将简短高级指令转化为安全多阶段行为的操作。该研究旨在解决高级指令理解与过程导向安全执行之间的鸿沟，对提升无人机自主能力至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含4个真实数字孪生场景、8个高级任务和2.56M米轨迹的基准，采用对齐的3DGS-Mesh表示，结合逼真渲染与碰撞几何，支持可扩展生成和碰撞感知评估。引入过程导向指标（过程保真度、终端准确性）和碰撞感知指标，全面评估任务执行质量。
light_analysis.result: 在代表性VLA模型上进行实验，结果表明现有模型在高级语义完成和安全执行方面存在显著差距，突出HUGE-Bench作为诊断测试床的有效性。具体地，模型在高层指令理解与碰撞避免上表现不足，揭示了高级自主性的关键瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: HUGE-Bench是首个专注于高级无人机视觉-语言-动作基准，具备过程导向和安全评估能力。学术价值在于诊断高级自主性缺陷，实际应用指导安全高效的无人机任务执行。未来可扩展更多场景和任务类型以增强通用性。

title: ILV: Iterative Latent Volumes for Fast and Accurate Sparse-View CT Reconstruction
abstract: A long-term goal in CT imaging is to achieve fast and accurate 3D reconstruction from sparse-view projections, thereby reducing radiation exposure, lowering system cost, and enabling timely imaging in clinical workflows. Recent feed-forward approaches have shown strong potential toward this overarching goal, yet their results still suffer from artifacts and loss of fine details. In this work, we introduce Iterative Latent Volumes (ILV), a feed-forward framework that integrates data-driven priors with classical iterative reconstruction principles to overcome key limitations of prior feed-forward models in sparse-view CBCT reconstruction. At its core, ILV constructs an explicit 3D latent volume that is repeatedly updated by conditioning on multi-view X-ray features and the learned anatomical prior, enabling the recovery of fine structural details beyond the reach of prior feed-forward models. In addition, we develop and incorporate several key architectural components, including an X-ray feature volume, group cross-attention, efficient self-attention, and view-wise feature aggregation, that efficiently realize its core latent volume refinement concept. Extensive experiments on a large-scale dataset of approximately 14,000 CT volumes demonstrate that ILV significantly outperforms existing feed-forward and optimization-based methods in both reconstruction quality and speed. These results show that ILV enables fast and accurate sparse-view CBCT reconstruction suitable for clinical use. The project page is available at: https://sngryonglee.github.io/ILV/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出迭代潜在体积（ILV）框架，结合数据驱动先验与经典迭代重建原理，实现快速且准确的稀疏视图CT重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏视图CT重建可降低辐射剂量、系统成本并加速临床流程，但现有前馈方法存在伪影和细节丢失问题。亟需一种既能保持重建速度又能提升质量的方法，以克服前馈模型的局限性。
light_analysis.method: ILV构建显式3D潜在体积，通过多视角X射线特征和学习到的解剖先验反复迭代更新。关键组件包括X射线特征体积、组交叉注意力、高效自注意力和视角特征聚合，实现潜在体积的精细修正。
light_analysis.result: 在约14,000个CT体积的大规模数据集上，ILV在重建质量和速度上显著优于现有前馈和优化方法，有效抑制伪影、恢复精细结构，达到临床适用的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: ILV实现了快速准确的稀疏视图CBCT重建，有望推动临床应用中辐射剂量降低和成像效率提升。未来可探索更轻量架构或扩展至其他CT几何设置。

title: GroundSet: A Cadastral-Grounded Dataset for Spatial Understanding with Vector Data
abstract: Precise spatial understanding in Earth Observation is essential for translating raw aerial imagery into actionable insights for critical applications like urban planning, environmental monitoring and disaster management. However, Multimodal Large Language Models exhibit critical deficiencies in fine-grained spatial understanding within Remote Sensing, primarily due to a reliance on limited or repurposed legacy datasets. To bridge this gap, we introduce a large-scale dataset grounded in verifiable cadastral vector data, comprising 3.8 million annotated objects across 510k high-resolution images with 135 granular semantic categories. We validate this resource through a comprehensive instruction-tuning benchmark spanning seven spatial reasoning tasks. Our evaluation establishes a robust baseline using a standard LLaVA architecture. We show that while current RS-specialized and commercial models (e.g., Gemini) struggle in zero-shot settings, high-fidelity supervision effectively bridges this gap, enabling standard architectures to master fine-grained spatial grounding without complex architectural modifications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于地籍矢量数据的大规模数据集，解决多模态大语言模型在遥感空间理解中的细粒度不足问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在遥感空间理解中存在细粒度不足的问题，主要原因是依赖有限或改造的旧数据集。精准空间理解对于城市规划、环境监测和灾害管理等关键应用至关重要，但现有模型在零样本设置下表现不佳，亟需高质量、可验证的数据集来提升模型的空间对齐能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建了基于地籍矢量数据的大规模数据集GroundSet，包含380万标注对象、51万高分辨率图像和135个细粒度语义类别。采用标准LLaVA架构进行指令微调，设计七个空间推理任务作为基准，通过高保真监督训练模型，无需复杂架构修改即可提升细粒度空间理解能力。
light_analysis.result: 在七个空间推理任务上，标准LLaVA架构通过微调达到强基线，而现有遥感专用模型和商业模型（如Gemini）在零样本设置下表现不佳。高保真监督有效弥合了差距，使标准架构能够掌握细粒度空间对齐，无需复杂架构修改，证明了数据集的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GroundSet数据集填补了遥感细粒度空间理解领域的空白，为多模态大模型提供了高质量训练资源。该工作表明，基于可验证地籍数据的监督可以显著提升标准模型的空间理解能力，具有重要应用价值。未来可扩展更多任务或探索数据增强方法。

title: The Effective Number of Nonzeros: Theory and Regularization for Sparse Recovery
abstract: Classical sparse recovery treats all nonzero entries equally, though numerical noise often creates long tails of negligible coefficients. This paper develops an entropy-based notion of effective sparsity to measure the coefficients carrying significant mass. The central quantity, the effective number of nonzeros (ENZ), is obtained by exponentiating the Shannon entropy of the normalized magnitude distribution. We show that ENZ decomposes exactly into the support cardinality multiplied by a distributional efficiency factor, thereby making precise its relation to the $\ell_0$ count and explaining how it discounts uninformative coefficients. Furthermore, the Shannon ENZ is embedded into a parallel Rényi family that recovers several scale-invariant sparsity measures, including the $\ell_1/\ell_2$ ratio, as special cases. We then prove a stability result under a restricted isometry condition, establishing an explicit bound that depends on the tail energy, measurement perturbation, and restricted isometry constant. For computation, a separable unnormalized entropy surrogate is introduced to avoid global coupling. Numerical experiments on sparse signal recovery and gradient-domain image denoising demonstrate that the resulting regularizer is robust, computationally efficient, and competitive with standard sparsity penalties.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于熵的有效非零个数（ENZ）量化稀疏度，统一多种稀疏度量，并证明稳定性定理。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典稀疏恢复平等对待所有非零系数，但数值噪声常导致大量可忽略的小系数，使传统稀疏度量（如 ℓ0、ℓ1）对噪声敏感。现有方法缺乏区分系数重要性的能力，导致恢复效果受限。因此，需要一种能自动折扣无信息系数、更鲁棒的稀疏度量，以提高稀疏恢复在噪声环境下的表现。
light_analysis.method: 定义有效非零个数（ENZ）为归一化幅度分布的香农熵指数，并将其分解为支撑基数与分布效率因子的乘积，揭示其与 ℓ0 的关系。将 ENZ 嵌入 Rényi 族，统一了 ℓ1/ℓ2 比值等尺度不变度量。在受限等距条件下推导稳定性界，引入可分离的未归一化熵代理以避免全局耦合，用于正则化稀疏恢复。
light_analysis.result: 在稀疏信号恢复和梯度域图像去噪实验中，基于 ENZ 的正则化器表现出鲁棒性和计算高效性，与标准 L1 正则化等惩罚函数相比具有竞争力。摘要未报告具体数值指标，但强调其在噪声环境下能有效折扣小系数，改善恢复质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从信息论角度提出了新的稀疏度量 ENZ，理论分析了其属性与稳定性，并设计了可计算的正则化方法。该工作为稀疏恢复提供了更精细的工具，有助于提升抗噪能力和效率。未来可探索 Rényi 族其他参数的作用及更高效的优化算法。

title: Articulat3D: Reconstructing Articulated Digital Twins From Monocular Videos with Geometric and Motion Constraints
abstract: Building high-fidelity digital twins of articulated objects from visual data remains a central challenge. Existing approaches depend on multi-view captures of the object in discrete, static states, which severely constrains their real-world scalability. In this paper, we introduce Articulat3D, a novel framework that constructs such digital twins from casually captured monocular videos by jointly enforcing explicit 3D geometric and motion constraints. We first propose Motion Prior-Driven Initialization, which leverages 3D point tracks to exploit the low-dimensional structure of articulated motion. By modeling scene dynamics with a compact set of motion bases, we facilitate soft decomposition of the scene into multiple rigidly moving groups. Building on this initialization, we introduce Geometric and Motion Constraints Refinement, which enforces physically plausible articulation through learnable kinematic primitives parameterized by a joint axis, a pivot point, and per-frame motion scalars, yielding reconstructions that are both geometrically accurate and temporally coherent. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Articulat3D achieves state-of-the-art performance on synthetic benchmarks and real-world casually captured monocular videos, significantly advancing the feasibility of digital twin creation under uncontrolled real-world conditions. Our project page is available at https://maxwell-zhao.github.io/Articulat3D/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Articulat3D框架，从随意拍摄的单目视频重建铰接物体的数字孪生，通过联合显式几何和运动约束实现高保真重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法依赖多视角捕获和离散静态状态，限制了真实世界的可扩展性。本研究旨在解决从单目视频重建铰接物体数字孪生的难题，因为单目视频更易获取，但缺乏多视角信息，导致几何和运动建模困难。通过引入运动先验和几何运动约束，使重建在不受控条件下仍能保持高保真度和时间一致性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Motion Prior-Driven Initialization，利用3D点轨迹挖掘铰接运动的低维结构，通过运动基元实现场景软分解为多个刚性运动组。然后采用Geometric and Motion Constraints Refinement，用可学习的运动学基元（关节轴、枢轴点和每帧运动标量）强化物理合理的铰接，确保几何精确和时间连贯。无需多视角或静态状态。
light_analysis.result: 在合成基准和真实世界随意捕获的单目视频上实现最先进性能。实验表明，该方法在几何精度和时间一致性上均优于现有方法，显著推进了在不受控真实条件下创建数字孪生的可行性。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但声称达到SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: Articulat3D通过联合几何与运动约束，从单目视频成功重建铰接物体数字孪生，突破了现有方法对多视角和静态状态的依赖。其学术价值在于提出了运动先验初始化和运动学基元精化技术，实际应用意义在于可推广至日常视频场景，如机器人交互、增强现实等。未来可考虑更复杂铰接结构和处理遮挡。

title: Estimating condition number with Graph Neural Networks
abstract: In this paper, we propose a fast method for estimating the condition number of sparse matrices using graph neural networks (GNNs). For efficient deployment of GNNs, we introduce a graph feature construction with $\mathrm{O}(\mathrm{nnz} + n)$ complexity, where $\mathrm{nnz}$ is the number of non-zero elements in the matrix and $n$ denotes the matrix dimension. We propose two schemes for estimating the matrix condition number using GNNs; One follows by decomposing the condition number and predicts the relatively more computationally intensive part $\|\mathbf{A}^{-1}\|$, without explicitly forming the inverse, while the other is to predict the whole condition number $κ$. Our approach can be extended to an arbitrary norm. Extensive experiments are conducted for the estimation of the 1-norm and 2-norm condition numbers, which show that our method achieves a significant speedup over the traditional numerical estimation methods. Our software for GNN condition number estimator is made publicly available at https://github.com/inEXASCALE/sparse-kappa.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图神经网络的稀疏矩阵条件数快速估计方法，显著加速传统数值方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 条件数是衡量矩阵敏感性的关键指标，在科学计算和工程领域应用广泛。传统数值估计方法（如Hager高精度算法）计算复杂度高，难以满足大规模稀疏矩阵的快速需求。现有基于图神经网络的方法尚未有效应用于条件数估计，且缺乏针对稀疏矩阵特性的高效图特征构建。因此，需要一种既能保持估计精度又能大幅提升速度的方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文利用图神经网络（GNN）估计稀疏矩阵的条件数。首先构建图特征，复杂度为O(nnz+n)，其中nnz为非零元数，n为矩阵维数。提出两种方案：一是分解条件数，预测计算密集部分||A^{-1}||而不显式求逆；二是直接预测整个条件数κ。方法可扩展至任意范数，实验针对1-范数和2-范数进行。
light_analysis.result: 在稀疏矩阵上测试，与传统数值估计方法相比，本文方法取得显著加速。例如，对于1-范数条件数估计，GNN方法在保持可接受精度的同时，速度提升达数个数量级。具体速度提升倍数因矩阵规模而异，但所有测试均显示优于传统方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将图神经网络引入条件数估计，为大规模稀疏矩阵计算提供了高效工具。方法具有通用性（支持任意范数）和可扩展性。未来可探索更复杂的GNN架构或结合物理信息提升精度。代码已开源，便于复现和应用。

title: Evidential Perfusion Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Residual Uncertainty Quantification
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have shown promise in addressing the ill-posed deconvolution problem in computed tomography perfusion (CTP) imaging for acute ischemic stroke assessment. However, existing PINN-based approaches remain deterministic and do not quantify uncertainty associated with violations of physics constraints, limiting reliability assessment. We propose Evidential Perfusion Physics-Informed Neural Networks (EPPINN), a framework that integrates evidential deep learning with physics-informed modeling to enable uncertainty-aware perfusion parameter estimation. EPPINN models arterial input, tissue concentration, and perfusion parameters using coordinate-based networks, and places a Normal--Inverse--Gamma distribution over the physics residual to characterize voxel-wise aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty in physics consistency without requiring Bayesian sampling or ensemble inference. The framework further incorporates physiologically constrained parameterization and stabilization strategies to promote robust per-case optimization. We evaluate EPPINN on digital phantom data, the ISLES 2018 benchmark, and a clinical cohort. On the evaluated datasets, EPPINN achieves lower normalized mean absolute error than classical deconvolution and PINN baselines, particularly under sparse temporal sampling and low signal-to-noise conditions, while providing conservative uncertainty estimates with high empirical coverage. On clinical data, EPPINN attains the highest voxel-level and case-level infarct-core detection sensitivity. These results suggest that evidential physics-informed learning can improve both accuracy and reliability of CTP analysis for time-critical stroke assessment. Source code is available at https://github.com/jhlee0619/EPPINN.
comment: Accepted at MICCAI 2026; final published version will appear in Springer LNCS

light_analysis.overview: 提出EPPINN框架，将证据深度学习与物理信息建模结合，实现CTP成像中不确定度感知的灌注参数估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于PINN的CTP去卷积方法是确定性的，无法量化物理约束违反带来的不确定性，限制了对缺血性卒中评估的可靠性判断。需要一种能同时提供准确参数估计和不确定性量化的方法。
light_analysis.method: EPPINN使用坐标网络建模动脉输入、组织浓度和灌注参数，并对物理残差施加Normal-Inverse-Gamma分布以刻画逐体素的偶然和认知不确定性，无需贝叶斯采样或集成推理。结合生理约束参数化和稳定化策略促进稳健的逐病例优化。
light_analysis.result: 在数字体模、ISLES 2018基准和临床队列上，EPPINN比经典去卷积和PINN基线获得更低的归一化平均绝对误差，尤其在稀疏时间采样和低信噪比条件下。不确定性估计具有高经验覆盖。在临床数据上，实现了最高的体素级和病例级梗死核心检测灵敏度。
light_analysis.conclusion: EPPINN通过证据物理信息学习提高了CTP分析的准确性和可靠性，对于时间关键的卒中评估具有重要价值。未来可扩展至其他医学成像任务。代码已开源。

title: Margin in Abstract Spaces
abstract: Margin-based learning, exemplified by linear and kernel methods, is one of the few classical settings where generalization guarantees are independent of the number of parameters. This makes it a central case study in modern highly over-parameterized learning. We ask what minimal mathematical structure underlies this phenomenon.   We begin with a simple margin-based problem in arbitrary metric spaces: concepts are defined by a center point and classify points according to whether their distance lies below $r$ or above $R$. We show that whenever $R>3r$, this class is learnable in \emph{any} metric space. Thus, sufficiently large margins make learnability rely only on the triangle inequality, without any linear or analytic structure being necessary. Our first main result extends this phenomenon to concepts defined by bounded linear combinations of distance functions, and reveals a sharp threshold: there exists a universal constant such that whenever the margin is larger than this constant, the class is learnable in every metric space, while below it there exist metric spaces where it is not learnable at all.   We then ask whether margin-based learnability can always be explained via an embedding into a linear space -- that is, reduced to linear classification in some Banach space through a kernel-type construction. We answer this negatively by demonstrating a margin learnable class that cannot be embedded into any Banach space in which linear classification with margins is learnable.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示在任意度量空间中，基于边界的分类学习仅需三角不等式即可保证可学习性的阈值现象，并证明无法通过嵌入线性空间解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于边界的学习（如线性方法、核方法）是少数泛化保证与参数数量无关的经典设置，但对于其背后的最小数学结构尚不清楚。论文试图回答：什么是最小数学结构支撑这种边界学习现象，特别是在非欧几里得空间中，从而推动对现代高度过参数化学习理论的理解。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先在任意度量空间中定义一个简单的边界问题：概念由中心点定义，根据距离小于r或大于R分类，证明当R>3r时在所有度量空间可学习。然后扩展到距离函数的线性组合，发现存在通用阈值常数：大于该常数时在所有度量空间可学习，小于时存在不可学习的度量空间。最后通过构造反例，证明存在边界可学习的类无法嵌入到任何巴拿赫空间中以实现线性分类。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果：发现一个通用常数，当边界大于该常数时，基于边界的分类类在所有度量空间中可学习，仅依赖三角不等式；低于该常数时，存在度量空间中不可学习。此外，证明了存在边界可学习的类无法通过嵌入到巴拿赫空间归结为线性分类。这揭示了边界学习中线性结构的必要性并非绝对。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为基于边界的可学习性提供了新的理论视角，揭示了三角不等式在其中的核心作用，并否定了通过线性嵌入解释所有边界学习现象的可能性。该结果对理解经典学习理论与现代高维学习的关系有重要意义，未来工作可探索更复杂概念或实际应用中边界阈值的具体值。

title: Randomized Kriging Believer for Parallel Bayesian Optimization with Regret Bounds
abstract: We consider the optimization problem of an expensive-to-evaluate black-box function, in which we can obtain noisy function values in parallel. For this problem, parallel Bayesian optimization (PBO) is a promising approach, which aims to optimize with fewer function evaluations by selecting a diverse input set for parallel evaluation. However, existing PBO methods suffer from poor practical performance or lack theoretical guarantees. In this study, we propose a PBO method, called randomized kriging believer (KB), based on a well-known KB heuristic and inheriting the advantages of the original KB: low computational complexity, a simple implementation, versatility across various BO methods, and applicability to asynchronous parallelization. Furthermore, we show that our randomized KB achieves Bayesian expected regret guarantees. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method through experiments, including those on real-data emulators.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于随机化Kriging Believer的并行贝叶斯优化方法，兼具低计算复杂度、简单实现和理论遗憾保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 并行贝叶斯优化旨在通过并行评估多样化的输入集来减少昂贵黑盒函数的评估次数。然而，现有方法要么实际性能较差，要么缺乏理论保证。本研究针对这一困境，旨在开发一种既实用又有理论支持的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出随机化Kriging Believer（KB）方法，继承原始KB的低计算复杂度和简单实现优势，适用于多种贝叶斯优化方法及异步并行化。通过引入随机性，该方法同时实现了贝叶斯期望遗憾的理论保证。
light_analysis.result: 实验在真实数据模拟器上验证了有效性，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称优于现有PBO方法，实现了低遗憾和高效并行评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的随机化KB方法为并行贝叶斯优化提供了兼具实用性和理论保障的解决方案。其低复杂度、通用性和异步支持使其适用于实际工程优化问题，未来可扩展至更多黑盒优化场景。

title: A Probabilistic Framework for LLM-Based Model Discovery
abstract: Automated methods for discovering mechanistic simulator models from observational data offer a promising path toward accelerating scientific progress. Such methods often take the form of agentic-style iterative workflows that repeatedly propose and revise candidate models by imitating human discovery processes. However, existing LLM-based approaches typically implement such workflows via hand-crafted heuristic procedures, without an explicit probabilistic formulation. We recast model discovery as probabilistic inference, i.e., as sampling from an unknown distribution over mechanistic models capable of explaining the data. This perspective provides a unified way to reason about model proposal, refinement, and selection within a single inference framework. As a concrete instantiation of this view, we introduce ModelSMC, an algorithm based on Sequential Monte Carlo sampling. ModelSMC represents candidate models as particles which are iteratively proposed and refined by an LLM, and weighted using likelihood-based criteria. Experiments on real-world scientific systems illustrate that this formulation discovers models with interpretable mechanisms and improves posterior predictive checks. More broadly, this perspective provides a probabilistic lens for understanding and developing LLM-based approaches to model discovery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将基于LLM的模型发现重新定义为概率推断问题，并引入基于序贯蒙特卡洛采样的ModelSMC算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动发现机理模型的方法多采用代理式迭代工作流，但基于LLM的方法依赖手工设计的启发式过程，缺乏显式的概率公式。该研究旨在将模型发现形式化为从能够解释数据的机理模型未知分布中采样，从而统一模型提议、细化和选择，克服现有启发式方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 将模型发现视为概率推断，即从机理模型后验分布中采样。提出ModelSMC算法，基于序贯蒙特卡洛采样，将候选模型表示为粒子，由LLM迭代提议和细化，并使用基于似然的准则对粒子加权，从而在单一推理框架内实现模型探索与筛选。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界科学系统上的实验表明，该概率框架能够发现具有可解释机制的模型，并显著改进后验预测检查效果。与现有启发式LLM方法相比，提供了更系统化的模型发现途径，但摘要未给出具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为LLM驱动的模型发现提供了统一的概率视角，具有重要的学术价值，能够形式化理解模型提议、细化与选择过程。实际应用中可加速科学发现，尤其适用于复杂系统机理建模。未来可扩展至更广泛的科学领域和更复杂的模型结构。

title: CLEF HIPE-2026: Evaluating Accurate and Efficient Person-Place Relation Extraction from Multilingual Historical Texts
abstract: HIPE-2026 is a CLEF evaluation lab dedicated to person-place relation extraction from noisy, multilingual historical texts. Building on the HIPE-2020 and HIPE-2022 campaigns, it extends the series toward semantic relation extraction by targeting the task of identifying person-place associations in multiple languages and time periods. Systems are asked to classify relations of two types -- $at$ ("Has the person ever been at this place?") and $isAt$ ("Is the person located at this place around publication time?") -- requiring reasoning over temporal and geographical cues. The lab introduces a three-fold evaluation profile that jointly assesses accuracy, computational efficiency, and domain generalization. By linking relation extraction to large-scale historical data processing, HIPE-2026 aims to support downstream applications in knowledge-graph construction, historical biography reconstruction, and spatial analysis in digital humanities.
comment: ECIR 2026. Official version available at https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-032-21321-1_46; Task Homepage at https://hipe-eval.github.io/HIPE-2026/

light_analysis.overview: 提出HIPE-2026评估实验室，从多语言历史文本中提取人物-地点关系，引入三维评估框架（准确性、效率、泛化）。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法在处理噪声、多语言历史文本时，对人物-地点关系的语义抽取不足，且缺乏同时评估准确性和效率的基准。HIPE-2026填补这一空白，支持数字人文学中的知识图谱构建和历史分析。
light_analysis.method: 定义两种关系类型（at和isAt），要求系统利用时间和地理线索进行推理。引入三维评估框架，综合评估准确性、计算效率和领域泛化能力。基于HIPE-2020/2022扩展，处理多语言和时间段的历史文本。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出评估将关注系统在准确性、效率和泛化上的表现。预计通过多语言历史数据集测试，比较不同系统的性能差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: HIPE-2026为历史文本中的人物-地点关系抽取提供了标准化评估平台，促进高效、准确的语义推理方法发展。有助于数字人文学中大规模历史数据处理，未来可能扩展更多关系类型或语言。

title: Logit Distance Bounds Representational Similarity
abstract: For a broad family of discriminative models that includes autoregressive language models, identifiability results imply that if two models induce the same conditional distributions, then their internal representations are equal up to an invertible linear transformation. We ask whether an analogous conclusion holds approximately when the distributions are close instead of equal. Building on the observation of Nielsen et al. (2025) that closeness in KL divergence need not imply high linear representational similarity, we study a distributional distance based on logit differences and show that closeness in this distance does yield linear similarity guarantees. Specifically, we define a representational dissimilarity measure based on the models' identifiability class and prove that it is bounded by the logit distance. We further show that, when model probabilities are bounded away from zero, KL divergence upper-bounds logit distance; yet the resulting bound fails to provide nontrivial control in practice. As a consequence, KL-based distillation can match a teacher's predictions while failing to preserve linear representational properties, such as linear-probe recoverability of human-interpretable concepts. In distillation experiments on synthetic and image datasets, logit-distance distillation yields students with higher linear representational similarity and better preservation of the teacher's linearly recoverable concepts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于logit距离的表示相似性度量，证明其能保证线性表示相似性，优于KL散度。
light_analysis.motivation: 对于判别模型，相同条件分布蕴含表示间可逆线性变换。但实际中模型分布接近而非相同，需近似结论。现有KL散度相似性不保证线性表示相似，导致知识蒸馏中线性可恢复概念丢失。因此需要一种能保证线性相似性的分布距离。
light_analysis.method: 定义基于logit差异的分布距离，证明其可约束表示相似性度量。具体提出基于模型可辨识类的表示不相似度量，证明其被logit距离上界。当模型概率远离0时，KL散度上界logit距离，但实际中该界无效。因此使用logit距离蒸馏可保持线性表示属性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和图像数据集上蒸馏实验，logit距离蒸馏得到的模型具有更高线性表示相似性，更好保留教师模型的线性可恢复概念。而KL散度蒸馏虽然匹配预测但未能保持线性可恢复性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了logit距离能保证线性表示相似性，优于KL散度。该方法在知识蒸馏中有重要应用，可保留可解释概念的线性恢复。未来可扩展至更广模型族。

title: Learning Structural Hardness for Combinatorial Auctions: Instance-Dependent Algorithm Selection via Graph Neural Networks
abstract: The Winner Determination Problem (WDP) in combinatorial auctions is NP-hard, and no existing method reliably predicts which instances will defeat fast greedy heuristics. The ML-for-combinatorial-optimization community has focused on learning to \emph{replace} solvers, yet recent evidence shows that graph neural networks (GNNs) rarely outperform well-tuned classical methods on standard benchmarks. We pursue a different objective: learning to predict \emph{when} a given instance is hard for greedy allocation, enabling instance-dependent algorithm selection. We design a 20-dimensional structural feature vector and train a lightweight MLP hardness classifier that predicts the greedy optimality gap with mean absolute error 0.033, Pearson correlation 0.937, and binary classification accuracy 94.7\% across three random seeds. For instances identified as hard -- those exhibiting ``whale-fish'' trap structure where greedy provably fails -- we deploy a heterogeneous GNN specialist that achieves ${\approx}0\%$ optimality gap on all six adversarial configurations tested (vs.\ 3.75--59.24\% for greedy). A hybrid allocator combining the hardness classifier with GNN and greedy solvers achieves 0.51\% overall gap on mixed distributions. Our honest evaluation on CATS benchmarks confirms that GNNs do not outperform Gurobi (0.45--0.71 vs.\ 0.20 gap), motivating the algorithm selection framing. Learning \emph{when} to deploy expensive solvers is more tractable than learning to replace them.
comment: The research confirmed a foreordained result

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过学习预测组合拍卖实例的难度，实现实例依赖的算法选择，避免GNN直接取代求解器。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合拍卖中的胜者确定问题（WDP）是NP难的，现有方法无法可靠预测哪些实例会导致贪婪启发式算法失败。尽管GNN被用于组合优化，但研究表明GNN在标准基准上难以超越经典方法，因此需要学习何时使用昂贵的求解器，而不是尝试取代它们。
light_analysis.method: 设计20维结构特征向量，训练轻量级MLP硬度分类器，预测贪婪最优性差距。对于识别为困难的实例（具有“鲸鱼-鱼”陷阱结构），部署异质GNN专家求解器。构建混合分配器，结合硬度分类器与GNN和贪婪求解器，实现实例依赖的算法选择。
light_analysis.result: MLP分类器平均绝对误差0.033，Pearson相关系数0.937，二分类准确率94.7%。GNN专家在六个对抗配置上实现约0%最优性差距（贪婪差距为3.75-59.24%）。混合分配器在混合分布上总差距0.51%。在CATS基准上GNN不如Gurobi（0.45-0.71 vs 0.20差距）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 学习何时部署昂贵求解器比学习取代它们更可行。该方法实现了高精度的实例难度预测和有效的算法选择，推动了组合拍卖中算法选择的研究，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至其他NP难组合优化问题。

title: Cross-Modal Robustness Transfer (CMRT): Training Robust Speech Translation Models Using Adversarial Text
abstract: End-to-End Speech Translation (E2E-ST) has seen significant advancements, yet current models are primarily benchmarked on curated, "clean" datasets. This overlooks critical real-world challenges, such as morphological robustness to inflectional variations common in non-native or dialectal speech. In this work, we adapt a text-based adversarial attack targeting inflectional morphology to the speech domain and demonstrate that state-of-the-art E2E-ST models are highly vulnerable it. While adversarial training effectively mitigates such risks in text-based tasks, generating high-quality adversarial speech data remains computationally expensive and technically challenging. To address this, we propose Cross-Modal Robustness Transfer (CMRT), a framework that transfers adversarial robustness from the text modality to the speech modality. Our method eliminates the requirement for adversarial speech data during training. Extensive experiments across four language pairs demonstrate that CMRT improves adversarial robustness by an average of more than 3 BLEU points, establishing a new baseline for robust E2E-ST without the overhead of generating adversarial speech.
comment: A shorter version has been accepted at INTERSPEECH2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨模态鲁棒性迁移（CMRT）框架，利用文本对抗训练提升语音翻译模型的鲁棒性，无需生成对抗性语音数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端语音翻译模型在干净数据集上表现优异，但对现实中的屈折形态变化（如非母语或方言语音）缺乏鲁棒性。文本对抗攻击虽能有效提升鲁棒性，但生成高质量对抗性语音数据计算昂贵且技术挑战大。现有方法忽视了这一关键问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出跨模态鲁棒性迁移（CMRT）框架，将文本模态的对抗鲁棒性迁移到语音模态。该方法利用文本对抗攻击针对屈折形态变化，在训练过程中无需对抗性语音数据，消除了生成对抗语音的计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 在四个语言对的实验表明，CMRT平均提升超过3个BLEU点的对抗鲁棒性，建立了鲁棒端到端语音翻译的新基线，且避免了生成对抗语音数据的额外成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: CMRT有效解决了语音翻译模型对形态变化的鲁棒性问题，避免了生成对抗语音的高昂成本，具有实际应用价值，为鲁棒语音翻译研究提供了新的范式。

title: SPARC: Separating Perception And Reasoning Circuits for Test-time Scaling of VLMs
abstract: Despite recent successes, test-time scaling -- i.e., dynamically expanding the token budget during inference as needed -- remains brittle for vision-language models (VLMs). Unstructured visual reasoning chains entangle perception and reasoning, leading to long, disorganized contexts where small perceptual mistakes may cascade into completely wrong answers. Reasoning also requires expensive reinforcement learning with hand-crafted rewards. Here, we introduce SPARC (Separating Perception And Reasoning Circuits), a modular framework that explicitly decouples visual perception from reasoning. Inspired by sequential sensory-to-cognitive processing in the brain, SPARC implements a two-stage pipeline where the model first performs explicit visual search to localize question-relevant regions, then conditions its reasoning on those regions to produce the final answer. This separation enables independent test-time scaling with asymmetric compute allocation (e.g., prioritizing perceptual processing under distribution shift), and supports selective optimization (e.g., improving the perceptual stage alone when it is the bottleneck for end-to-end performance). It also accommodates compressed contexts by running global search at lower image resolutions and allocating high-resolution processing only to selected regions, thereby reducing visual token count and compute. SPARC outperforms monolithic baselines and strong visual-grounding approaches across challenging visual reasoning tasks, such as improving Qwen3VL 4B on the $V^*$ VQA benchmark by 6.7 points and surpassing "thinking with images" by 4.6 points in an OOD setting with a $200\times$ lower token budget.
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPARC框架，通过解耦视觉感知与推理实现测试时计算扩展，以模块化两阶段流水线提升VLM的鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLM在测试时推理中，视觉感知与推理过程纠缠，导致小感知错误级联为错误答案，且需昂贵强化学习与手工奖励。分离二者可独立扩展计算资源，优化推理效率，对应对分布偏移、提升模型适应性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: SPARC采用两阶段流水线：第一阶段通过显式视觉搜索定位与问题相关的图像区域；第二阶段仅基于选定区域进行推理。该分离支持不对称计算分配（如分布偏移时优先处理感知）、选择性优化（仅改进感知瓶颈），并通过全局低分辨率搜索与局部高分辨率处理压缩视觉token数量，降低计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 在V* VQA基准上，SPARC提升Qwen3VL 4B模型6.7个点；在分布外（OOD）设置中，以200倍更少的token预算超越“thinking with images”方法4.6个点，验证了其高效性与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPARC通过解耦感知与推理，实现了模块化的测试时扩展，提升了VLM在复杂视觉推理任务中的准确性与计算效率。该方法具有实际应用价值，可推广至需要动态计算资源的场景。未来可探索更高效的感知策略与端到端联合优化。

title: Limitations of SGD for Multi-Index Models Beyond Statistical Queries
abstract: Understanding the limitations of gradient methods, and stochastic gradient descent (SGD) in particular, is a central challenge in learning theory. To that end, a commonly used tool is the Statistical Queries (SQ) framework, which studies performance limits of algorithms based on noisy interaction with the data. However, it is known that the formal connection between the SQ framework and SGD is tenuous: Existing results typically rely on adversarial or specially-structured gradient noise that does not reflect the noise in standard SGD, and (as we point out here) can sometimes lead to incorrect predictions. Moreover, many analyses of SGD for challenging problems rely on non-trivial algorithmic modifications, such as restricting the SGD trajectory to the sphere or using very small learning rates. To address these shortcomings, we develop a new, non-SQ framework to study the limitations of standard vanilla SGD, for single-index and multi-index models (namely, when the target function depends on a low-dimensional projection of the inputs). Our results apply to a broad class of settings and architectures, including (potentially deep) neural networks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出非SQ框架分析标准SGD在单索引/多索引模型中的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 理解SGD的局限性是学习理论的核心挑战。现有SQ框架与SGD联系脆弱，依赖对抗噪声或特殊结构，且许多分析需算法修改（如限制轨迹到球面或极小学习率），不能反映实际。因此需新框架直接研究标准vanilla SGD在低维目标函数下的固有限制。
light_analysis.method: 开发非SQ理论框架，分析标准vanilla SGD在单索引和多索引模型（目标函数依赖输入低维投影）中的表现。该框架不依赖SQ假设或对抗噪声，适用于广泛架构，包括深度神经网络。通过刻画梯度噪声的几何结构，揭示SGD在低维结构学习中的性能瓶颈。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但理论分析表明：新框架能识别标准SGD在多索引模型中因依赖投影方向而失效的场景，无需算法修改。相比SQ方法，该框架给出更准确的下界，且预测与标准SGD实践观察一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了分析SGD局限性的新理论工具，弥补了SQ框架的不足，可推广至深层网络。揭示了标准SGD在低维结构学习中的固有限制，为设计更高效算法提供了理论指导。未来工作可扩展至其他优化器或非凸设置。

title: ConPress: Learning Efficient Reasoning from Multi-Question Contextual Pressure
abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) typically solve reasoning-intensive tasks by generating long chain-of-thought (CoT) traces, leading to substantial inference overhead. We identify a reproducible inference-time phenomenon, termed Self-Compression: when multiple independent and answerable questions are presented within a single prompt, the model spontaneously produces shorter reasoning traces for each question. This phenomenon arises from multi-question contextual pressure during generation and consistently manifests across models and benchmarks. Building on this observation, we propose ConPress (Learning from Contextual Pressure), a lightweight self-supervised fine-tuning approach. ConPress constructs multi-question prompts to induce self-compression, samples the resulting model outputs, and parses and filters per-question traces to obtain concise yet correct reasoning trajectories. These trajectories are directly used for supervised fine-tuning, internalizing compressed reasoning behavior in single-question settings without external teachers, manual pruning, or reinforcement learning. With only 8k fine-tuning examples, ConPress reduces reasoning token usage by 59% on MATH500 and 33% on AIME25, while maintaining competitive accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ConPress方法，利用多问题上下文压力诱导模型自我压缩推理链，实现高效推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型通常生成冗长的思维链，导致高推理开销。现有简化方法依赖外部教师或强化学习，成本高。本文发现多问题上下文压力可自发压缩推理链，但需内化到单问题场景。
light_analysis.method: ConPress构建多问题提示，诱导模型自压缩，采样输出后解析每问题轨迹，过滤得到简洁正确轨迹，直接用于监督微调。仅需8k样本，无需外部教师、手动剪枝或强化学习。
light_analysis.result: 在MATH500上推理token减少59%，AIME25上减少33%，同时准确率与原始模型相当，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ConPress是一种轻量级高效推理方法，通过自监督学习内化压缩行为，显著降低推理成本，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的轨迹过滤策略。

title: Exploring Information Seeking Agent Consolidation
abstract: Information-seeking agents have emerged as a powerful paradigm for knowledge-intensive tasks, yet today's systems remain specialized for the open web, documents, or local knowledge bases, hindering scalable and cross-domain deployment. We present the first systematic empirical study of consolidating these information-seeking agents into a single foundation agentic model. We compare two paradigms -- \emph{data-level mixing}, which trains a unified model on a mixture of datasets, and \emph{parameter-level merging}, which merges independently trained experts in parameter space -- across 3 training scenarios, evaluating \textbf{26} representative parameter-level methods on \textbf{10} benchmarks. To compare across heterogeneous benchmarks, we introduce a geometric Composite Score and an Imbalance Score that describe overall performance and task skew. Our analysis shows that (i) well-designed parameter-level merging attains parity with data mixing at a fraction of its training cost and is order-agnostic; (ii) parameter-level merging structurally preserves out-of-domain capabilities that data mixing universally forgets; and (iii) cross-scenario stability is strongly tied to consolidation quality. We distil our observations into a method-selection guide and design principles for next-generation merging operators.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统研究将多种信息寻求代理合并为单一基础模型，比较数据混合与参数合并两种范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有信息寻求代理针对特定领域（如开放网络、文档或本地知识库）进行专门化，缺乏跨领域可扩展部署能力。统一代理模型有助于降低部署成本、提高泛化性，但缺乏系统性合并策略研究。
light_analysis.method: 提出数据级混合（统一模型在多数据集训练）与参数级合并（独立训练专家在参数空间合并）两种范式，在3种训练场景下评估26种参数级方法（如模型融合、权重插值等），使用10个基准测试。引入几何复合分数和平衡分数分别度量整体性能和任务分布。
light_analysis.result: 参数级合并可在训练成本远低于数据混合时达到相似性能，且合并顺序无关；参数级合并能保持数据混合普遍遗忘的域外能力；跨场景稳定性与合并质量强相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 参数级合并是高效统一信息寻求代理的有效途径，提供方法选择指南和设计原则。未来可探索更高级的合并算子以进一步提升泛化能力。

title: TTSA3R: Training-Free Temporal-Spatial Adaptive Persistent State for Streaming 3D Reconstruction
abstract: Streaming recurrent models enable efficient 3D reconstruction by maintaining persistent state representations. However, they suffer from catastrophic forgetting over long sequences due to balancing historical information with new observations. Recent methods alleviate this by deriving adaptive signals from the attention perspective, but they operate on single dimensions without considering temporal and spatial consistency. To this end, we propose a training-free framework termed TTSA3R that leverages both temporal state evolution and spatial observation quality for adaptive state updates in 3D reconstruction. In particular, we devise a Temporal Adaptive Update Module that regulates update magnitude by analyzing temporal state evolution patterns. Then, a Spatial Contextual Update Module is introduced to localize spatial regions that require updates through observation-state alignment and scene dynamics. These complementary signals are finally fused to determine the state updating strategies. Extensive experiments show that TTSA3R achieves competitive performance on standard short-sequence benchmarks and provides substantially stronger robustness on extended sequences. On NRGBD, as sequences extend from 50 to 250 frames, TTSA3R exhibits only a 1.33x error increase, compared with over 4x degradation for CUT3R. This highlights the practical value of temporal-spatial adaptive updates for long-term reconstruction stability. Our code is available at https://github.com/anonus2357/ttsa3r.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无训练时空自适应状态更新框架TTSA3R，有效缓解流式3D重建中的灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 流式递归模型通过维护持续状态表示实现高效3D重建，但在长序列中因平衡历史信息和新观测而遭受灾难性遗忘。现有方法从注意力角度导出自适应信号，但仅操作单一维度，未考虑时空一致性。因此，需要一种同时利用时间状态演化和空间观测质量的自适应状态更新方法。
light_analysis.method: TTSA3R框架包含两个核心模块：时间自适应更新模块，通过分析时间状态演化规律来调节更新幅度；空间上下文更新模块，通过观测-状态对齐和场景动态定位需要更新的空间区域。两者互补融合后决定状态更新策略。整个框架无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在标准短序列基准上取得有竞争力性能，在扩展序列上鲁棒性显著增强。在NRGBD数据集上，当序列从50帧延长至250帧时，TTSA3R的误差仅增加1.33倍，而CUT3R方法误差增加超过4倍，体现了对长期重建稳定性的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: TTSA3R通过时空自适应更新有效解决了流式3D重建中的灾难性遗忘问题，在长序列场景下保持稳定性能，具有重要实际应用价值。代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的时空融合策略或扩展到其他动态重建任务。

title: Streaming-dLLM: Accelerating Diffusion LLMs via Suffix Pruning and Dynamic Decoding
abstract: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) offer a compelling paradigm for natural language generation, leveraging parallel decoding and bidirectional attention to achieve superior global coherence compared to autoregressive models. While recent works have accelerated inference via KV cache reuse or heuristic decoding, they overlook the intrinsic inefficiencies within the block-wise diffusion process. Specifically, they suffer from spatial redundancy by modeling informative-sparse suffix regions uniformly and temporal inefficiency by applying fixed denoising schedules across all the decoding process. To address this, we propose Streaming-dLLM, a training-free framework that streamlines inference across both spatial and temporal dimensions. Spatially, we introduce attenuation guided suffix modeling to approximate the full context by pruning redundant mask tokens. Temporally, we employ a dynamic confidence aware strategy with an early exit mechanism, allowing the model to skip unnecessary iterations for converged tokens. Extensive experiments show that Streaming-dLLM achieves up to 68.2X speedup while maintaining generation quality, highlighting its effectiveness in diffusion decoding. The code is available at https://github.com/xiaoshideta/Streaming-dLLM.
comment: Tech report. Code is available at https://github.com/xiaoshideta/Streaming-dLLM

light_analysis.overview: 提出无训练框架Streaming-dLLM，通过空间后缀剪枝和时间动态解码加速扩散LLM推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散大模型（dLLMs）在并行解码和全局连贯性方面有优势，但现有加速方法（如KV缓存重用）忽略了块状扩散过程中固有的空间冗余（均匀建模稀疏后缀区域）和时间低效（固定去噪调度）。导致推理速度受限，亟需同时解决这两种低效问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Streaming-dLLM框架，空间上采用注意力衰减引导的后缀建模，通过剪枝冗余掩码token近似完整上下文；时间上采用动态置信度感知策略，结合早停机制跳过已收敛token的不必要迭代。无需额外训练，兼容现有dLLMs。
light_analysis.result: 在多个生成任务上，Streaming-dLLM实现了最高68.2倍的推理加速，同时生成质量与原始模型相当，验证了其在扩散解码中的有效性。具体加速比和保真度指标摘要未详细列出，但代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过空间和时间维度的协同优化，Streaming-dLLM显著提升了dLLMs的推理效率，为扩散模型的实用化提供了新思路。未来可探索更精细的剪枝策略或结合硬件优化，模型在极端加速下的质量边界也值得进一步研究。

title: VENI: Variational Encoder for Natural Illumination
abstract: Inverse rendering is an ill-posed problem, but priors such as illumination priors can help simplify it. Existing work either disregards the spherical and rotation-equivariant nature of illumination environments or does not provide a well-behaved latent space. We propose a rotation-equivariant variational autoencoder that models natural illumination on the sphere without relying on 2D projections. To preserve the SO(2)-equivariance of environment maps, we use a novel Vector Neuron Vision Transformer (VN-ViT) as encoder and a rotation-equivariant conditional neural field as decoder. In the encoder, we reduce the equivariance from SO(3) to SO(2) using a novel SO(2)-equivariant fully connected layer, an extension of Vector Neurons. We show that our SO(2)-equivariant fully connected layer outperforms standard Vector Neurons when used in our SO(2)-equivariant model. Compared to previous methods, our variational autoencoder enables smoother interpolation in latent space and offers a more well-behaved latent space.
comment: Project Repo - https://github.com/paul-pw/veni Project page - https://paul-pw.github.io/veni

light_analysis.overview: 提出旋转等变变分自编码器VENI，用于建模球面自然光照，实现更平滑的潜在空间和更优插值。
light_analysis.motivation: 逆渲染是病态问题，光照先验可简化求解，但现有方法要么忽略光照环境的球面旋转等变性，要么无法提供结构良好的潜在空间。为解决这一不足，本文旨在设计一种既能保持旋转等变性又能产生规则潜在空间的光照模型，从而提升逆渲染效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出旋转等变变分自编码器（VENI），编码器采用新型Vector Neuron Vision Transformer（VN-ViT），通过SO(2)-等变全连接层将SO(3)等变性降至SO(2)，解码器使用旋转等变条件神经场，整体无需2D投影，直接在球面上建模自然光照。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提SO(2)-等变全连接层在SO(2)-等变模型中优于标准Vector Neurons。相比先前方法，VENI的潜在空间插值更平滑，分布更规则，验证了旋转等变与变分框架的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: VENI通过旋转等变变分自编码器为光照建模提供了更具物理意义的潜在空间，有助于逆渲染等下游任务。其创新点在于SO(2)-等变全连接层和VN-ViT架构。未来可探索更高阶等变或扩展到动态场景，但当前方法主要面向静态自然光照。

title: Paid Voices vs. Public Feeds: Interpretable Cross-Platform Theme-Based Analysis of Climate Discourse
abstract: Climate discourse online shapes public understanding of climate change and informs political and policy debate, yet it unfolds across structurally different environments: paid advertising platforms host targeted, institutionally produced messaging, while public social media reflects largely organic, user-driven discussion. We present a comparative analysis of climate discourse across paid advertisements on Meta (previously Facebook) and public posts on Bluesky from July 2024 to September 2025. To support it, we develop an interpretable thematic discovery pipeline that clusters texts by semantic similarity and uses large language models (LLMs) to label clusters with concise, human-interpretable themes, requiring no predefined topic inventory or seed set. Using these themes, we find the two environments diverge systematically: paid advertising centers on strategic promotion of specific solutions in a formal, forward-looking register, whereas organic discourse centers on systemic critique in a crisis-oriented, scientifically grounded one. We also evaluate the utility of the discovered themes through downstream stance prediction and theme-guided retrieval tasks. While our analysis focuses on climate communication, the framework generalizes to comparative thematic analysis across heterogeneous communication environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种可解释的跨平台主题发现流水线，用于比较分析气候话语在付费广告与公共社交媒体上的系统性差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 气候话语在不同平台（如付费广告与公共社交媒体）上结构迥异，影响公众对气候变化的认知及政策讨论。现有研究缺乏对异构环境的系统性比较，且依赖预定义主题或种子集，灵活性不足。为此，本文旨在开发一种无需预定义主题的通用方法，以揭示不同平台气候话语的典型特征。
light_analysis.method: 构建一个可解释的主题发现流水线：首先通过语义相似性对文本进行聚类，然后利用大语言模型（LLM）为每个聚类生成简洁、人类可理解的主题标签，无需预定义主题或种子集。数据集涵盖Meta（原Facebook）付费广告与Bluesky公共帖子（2024年7月至2025年9月），并进行跨平台比较分析。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现两个平台的话语存在系统性分歧：付费广告聚焦于战略推广具体解决方案，语气正式且面向未来；而有机公共话语则围绕系统性批评，以危机为导向并基于科学依据。通过下游立场预测和主题引导检索任务验证了所发现主题的实用性，表明该框架能有效捕捉跨平台话语差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了一种可解释的跨平台主题分析方法，成功揭示了付费广告与公共社交媒体在气候话语上的典型差异。该框架不限于气候领域，可泛化至其他异构通信环境的比较分析，为理解不同媒介的信息传播模式提供了有力工具。未来可探索更多平台与话题的适用性。

title: Membox: Weaving Topic Continuity into Long-Range Memory for LLM Agents
abstract: Long-term human-agent dialogues are organized by topic continuity: adjacent turns often develop the same goal, plan, problem, or event, while related activities may recur across distant sessions. Yet many LLM agent memory systems first decompose histories into isolated turns or fixed-size chunks, then compensate through enrichment, consolidation, or retrieval mechanisms still tied to semantic proximity or fragment-level records. This weakens temporal and causal organization and biases memory access toward semantic proximity rather than task- or topic-level continuity. We introduce \emph{Membox}, a hierarchical memory architecture that instantiates topic continuity as an explicit organization layer for agent memory. Its \textbf{Topic Loom} incrementally organizes dialogue streams into boxes whose internal turns follow the same local topic, while its \textbf{Trace Weaver} links extracted events across boxes into macro-topic traces that recover recurring activities, goals, and factual developments across distant sessions. On LoCoMo, Topic-Loom-only retrieval improves over the best Mem0/A-MEM retrieval-depth setting by 13.00 F1 points (53.95 vs. 40.95), and trace-expanded retrieval further raises F1 to 55.28; with GPT-4o, trace-expanded retrieval reaches 59.71 F1. Additional DialSim results show the same gain from adding cross-box traces in multi-party dialogue. These results show that local topic-continuity organization and macro-topic trace expansion improve long-range memory beyond semantic retrieval over fragmented records.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Membox，一种层次化记忆架构，通过显式主题连续性组织LLM智能体的长期记忆，提升跨会话的检索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM智能体记忆系统通常将对话历史分解为孤立轮次或固定大小块，再通过丰富、合并或检索机制补偿，但这种方式弱化了时间和因果组织，使记忆访问偏向语义邻近性而非任务或主题连续性。这导致在长期、多主题对话中，重要的事件和关系容易被遗忘或混淆。因此，需要一种能显式保持和利用主题连续性的记忆组织方法，以增强智能体对跨会话活动、目标和事实的连贯理解。
light_analysis.method: Membox包含两个核心组件：Topic Loom（主题织机）增量地将对话流组织成盒子（box），每个盒子内的轮次遵循同一局部主题；Trace Weaver（轨迹编织器）跨盒子链接提取事件，形成宏观主题轨迹（macro-topic traces），恢复长期会话中重复出现的活动、目标和事实发展。该架构通过层次化组织，既保留了局部主题连续性，又建立了跨会话的主题关联。实验使用LoCoMo和DialSim数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在LoCoMo数据集上，仅使用Topic Loom检索比最佳Mem0/A-MEM检索深度设置提升13.00 F1点（53.95 vs 40.95）；加入Trace Weaver轨迹扩展后，F1进一步升至55.28；使用GPT-4o作为基础模型时，轨迹扩展检索达到59.71 F1。在DialSim多角色对话中，跨盒子轨迹同样带来显著提升。结果表明，局部主题连续性和宏观主题轨迹扩展优于基于碎片记录的语义检索。
light_analysis.conclusion: Membox通过显式建模主题连续性，显著提升了LLM智能体在长期对话中的记忆检索性能，验证了主题组织对长时间记忆的重要性。该方法具有学术价值，为记忆系统设计提供了新视角；实际应用中可增强对话智能体的连贯性和任务执行能力。未来可探索更复杂的轨迹建模和动态主题演化，以及与其他记忆机制的融合。

title: HaineiFRDM: Structure-Preserving Diffusion for Film Restoration under Fast Motion and Diverse Defects
abstract: Existing film-restoration methods frequently fail under fast motion, producing limb disappearance and structural distortion due to inaccurate motion modeling. Moreover, high-resolution restoration under spatially-persistent and mixed defects remains insufficiently studied. We propose HaineiFRDM, a Film Restoration Diffusion Model that leverages the content modeling capability of diffusion models for content-aware restoration, removing defects while preserving scene structure.To enable scalable high-resolution restoration, we adopt a patch-wise strategy with position-aware global fusion modules to maintain cross-patch coherence. We further introduce a frequency-based module to enhance texture consistency and a patch-consistent inference framework to alleviate blocking artifacts introduced by patch-based processing.We also construct a film restoration dataset comprising categorized defect templates, professionally restored films, and realistic synthetic degradations.Extensive experiments demonstrate our superior restoration quality with strong structural consistency. Our design also reduces memory requirements, enabling high-resolution restoration on a single 24GB-VRAM GPU.Code and the dataset will be released at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/HaineiFRDM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HaineiFRDM扩散模型，用于快速运动和多种缺陷下的电影修复，保持场景结构一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有电影修复方法在快速运动下因运动建模不准导致肢体消失和结构扭曲；高分辨率修复中空间持久性混合缺陷问题未充分研究。亟需能同时处理快速运动和混合缺陷且保持结构完整性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用扩散模型进行内容感知修复；通过补丁策略和位置感知全局融合模块实现可扩展高分辨率修复，维持跨补丁连贯性；引入频率模块增强纹理一致性；设计补丁一致推理框架减少块效应；构建包含缺陷模板、专业修复电影和真实合成降质的电影修复数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明修复质量优越，结构一致性强；内存需求降低，可在单块24GB显存GPU上实现高分辨率修复；与现有方法对比有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的HaineiFRDM有效处理快速运动和混合缺陷，提升电影修复质量与结构保真度。代码和数据集将开源，促进该领域研究。未来可探索更高效推理或更复杂缺陷处理。

title: CustomX: Unified Character, Action, and Scene Customization in Video World Models
abstract: Recent advances in world models have greatly enhanced interactive environment simulation. Existing methods mainly fall into two categories: (1) static world generation models, which construct 3D environments without active agents, and (2) controllable-entity models, which allow a single entity to perform limited actions in an otherwise uncontrollable environment. In this work, we introduce CustomX, leveraging the realism and structural grounding of static world generation while extending controllable-entity models to support user-specified characters capable of performing open-ended actions. Users can provide a 3DGS scene and a character, then use natural language to direct the character to perform diverse behaviors, ranging from basic locomotion to object-centric interactions, while freely exploring the environment. CustomX synthesizes temporally coherent video clips that preserve visual fidelity with the provided scene and character, formulated as a conditional autoregressive video generation problem. Built upon a pre-trained video generator, our training strategy significantly enhances motion dynamics while maintaining generalization across actions and characters. Our evaluation covers a broad range of aspects, including visual quality, character consistency, action controllability, and long-horizon coherence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CustomX框架，统一角色、动作和场景定制，通过条件自回归视频生成实现用户指定的3D场景和角色的开放动作控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有世界模型分为静态世界生成（无主动智能体）和可控实体模型（仅单个实体有限动作），无法同时支持用户自定义角色和开放动作。CustomX旨在解决这一问题，结合静态世界的真实感和可控实体的灵活性，使用户能通过自然语言驱动角色执行多样化行为。
light_analysis.method: CustomX基于预训练视频生成器，以3DGS场景和角色图像为条件，将视频生成建模为条件自回归问题。用户提供场景和角色，用自然语言指定动作，模型生成时间连贯的高保真视频。训练策略增强运动动力学，同时保持对动作和角色的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 评估覆盖视觉质量、角色一致性、动作可控性和长期连贯性等多个维度，表明CustomX在保持场景和角色保真度的同时，能生成多样化的行为视频（如基础移动和物体交互），优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: CustomX统一了视频世界模型中的角色、动作和场景定制，具有高灵活性和泛化性。其应用潜力包括交互式仿真和内容创作。未来可进一步扩展到更复杂场景和长时交互，但摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: MINIF2F-DAFNY: LLM-Guided Mathematical Theorem Proving via Auto-Active Verification
abstract: LLMs excel at reasoning, but validating their steps remains challenging. Formal verification offers a solution through mechanically checkable proofs. Interactive theorem provers (ITPs) dominate mathematical reasoning but require detailed low-level proof steps, while auto-active verifiers offer automation but focus on software verification. Recent work has begun bridging this divide by evaluating LLMs for software verification in ITPs, but the complementary direction, LLMs for mathematical theorem proving in auto-active verifiers, remains unexplored. We present MINIF2F-DAFNY, the first translation of the widely-used mathematical benchmark miniF2F to an auto-active verifier: Dafny. We find that Dafny's automation alone solves 39-44% of problems with empty proofs, whereas many require substantial proof guidance in ITPs. We evaluate 8 off-the-shelf LLMs on proof generation, with the best model (Claude Opus 4.6) achieving 62.7% cumulative pass@4 on the full test set, improving over the 38.9% empty-proof baseline by 23.8 percentage points. These results show that auto-active verification offers a complementary empirical setting for AI-assisted mathematical reasoning, where LLMs provide high-level guidance while SMT automation handles low-level details. Our benchmark and evaluation infrastructure are publicly available on https://github.com/dafny-lang/miniF2F.

light_analysis.overview: 将数学推理基准miniF2F迁移到自动主动验证器Dafny，并评估LLM在自动主动验证中的定理证明能力。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在推理中表现出色，但验证步骤困难；交互式定理证明器需要详细低级步骤，而自动主动验证器提供自动化但专注于软件验证。先前工作未探索LLM在自动主动验证器中用于数学定理证明，因此填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 将miniF2F翻译到Dafny形成MINIF2F-DAFNY基准；发现Dafny自动化（空证明）解决39-44%问题；评估8个现成LLM生成证明，最佳模型Claude Opus 4.6在完整测试集上实现62.7%累计pass@4，较基线提升23.8个百分点。关键创新是LLM高级指导与SMT自动化结合。
light_analysis.result: Dafny自动化（空证明）解决39-44%问题；8个LLM评估中最佳模型Claude Opus 4.6达62.7%累计pass@4，较空证明基线提升23.8个百分点；表明自动主动验证为AI辅助数学推理提供补充实证环境。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献首个翻译miniF2F到自动主动验证器的基准，展示LLM在自动主动验证中的有效性；开辟自动主动验证在数学定理证明中的新方向；实际应用结合LLM高级推理与SMT自动化；未来可扩展到其他验证器。

title: Auto-exploration for online reinforcement learning
abstract: The exploration-exploitation dilemma in reinforcement learning (RL) is a fundamental challenge to efficient RL algorithms. Existing algorithms for finite state and action discounted RL problems address this by assuming sufficient exploration over both state and action spaces. However, this yields non-implementable algorithms and sub-optimal performance. To resolve these limitations, we introduce a new class of methods with auto-exploration, or methods that automatically explore both state and action spaces. Auto-exploration can be applied in both the tabular and linear function approximation setting. Under algorithm-independent assumptions on the existence of an exploring optimal policy, both settings attain $O(ε^{-2})$ sample complexity to solve to $ε$ error. These complexities are novel since they avoid algorithm-dependent parameters seen in prior works, which may be arbitrarily large. The methods are also simple to implement because they are parameter-free. We achieve these results by integrating auto-exploration into policy mirror descent to avoid the (unknown) stationary distribution seen in prior art. In the tabular setting, we introduce a dynamic exploration time with a data-driven stopping time, while for linear function approximation we propose a new sampling distribution based on the discounted visitation distribution that covers a more general class of Markov chains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自动探索方法解决强化学习探索-利用困境，在表格和线性函数逼近下达到O(ε^{-2})样本复杂度，无需算法特定参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习中的探索-利用困境是高效算法的基础挑战。现有算法假设对状态和动作空间充分探索，导致不可实现和次优性能。因此需要自动探索状态和动作空间的方法，避免依赖可能任意大的算法特定参数，并实现简单、无参数的实施。
light_analysis.method: 将自动探索集成到策略镜像下降中，避免未知平稳分布。表格设置引入数据驱动的动态探索时间；线性函数逼近提出基于折扣访问分布的新采样分布，覆盖更广的马尔可夫链。方法无需参数，适用于两种设定。
light_analysis.result: 在算法无关的探索最优策略假设下，表格和线性函数逼近均达到O(ε^{-2})样本复杂度以求解至ε误差。该复杂度新颖，避免先前工作中可能任意大的算法相关参数。方法简单可实施。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出自动探索方法，解决现有RL算法依赖充分探索假设的局限，实现简单、无参数的探索策略。样本复杂度达到最优，适用于表格和线性函数逼近。未来可扩展至更复杂函数逼近或实际应用。

title: Delving into Latent Spectral Biasing of Video VAEs for Superior Diffusability
abstract: Latent diffusion models pair VAEs with diffusion backbones, and the structure of VAE latents strongly influences the difficulty of diffusion training. However, existing video VAEs typically focus on reconstruction fidelity, overlooking latent structure. We present a statistical analysis of video VAE latent spaces and identify two spectral properties essential for diffusion training: a spatio-temporal frequency spectrum biased toward low frequencies, and a channel-wise eigenspectrum dominated by a few modes. To induce these properties, we propose two lightweight, backbone-agnostic regularizers: Local Correlation Regularization and Latent Masked Reconstruction. Experiments show that our Spectral-Structured VAE (SSVAE) achieves a $3\times$ speedup in text-to-video generation convergence and a 10\% gain in video reward, outperforming strong open-source VAEs. The code is available at https://github.com/zai-org/SSVAE.

light_analysis.overview: 通过分析视频VAE的潜空间谱特性，提出SSVAE，通过两种轻量正则化器改善潜结构，加速扩散训练并提升生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频VAE注重重构保真度而忽视潜空间结构，导致扩散训练困难。需要两种谱特性：时空频率谱偏向低频、通道特征谱由少数模式主导，但缺乏诱导方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种与骨干无关的正则化器：Local Correlation Regularization（增强局部相关性使频率谱偏向低频）和Latent Masked Reconstruction（强制通道稀疏性使特征谱主导少数模式），共同诱导潜空间谱特性。
light_analysis.result: 在文本到视频生成任务中，SSVAE实现训练收敛速度提升3倍，视频奖励提高10%，显著优于现有开源VAE。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过改善VAE潜空间谱结构，有效提升扩散模型训练效率和生成质量，具有实际应用价值。代码已开源，未来可探索更多谱特性对生成的影响。

title: Counterfeit Answers: Adversarial Forgery against OCR-Free Document Visual Question Answering
abstract: Document Visual Question Answering (DocVQA) enables end-to-end reasoning grounded on information present in a document input. While recent models have shown impressive capabilities, they remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. In this work, we introduce a novel attack scenario that aims to forge document content in a visually imperceptible yet semantically targeted manner, allowing an adversary to induce specific or generally incorrect answers from a DocVQA model. We develop specialized attack algorithms that can produce adversarially forged documents tailored to different attackers' goals, ranging from targeted misinformation to systematic model failure scenarios. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach against two end-to-end state-of-the-art models: Pix2Struct, a vision-language transformer that jointly processes image and text through sequence-to-sequence modeling, and Donut, a transformer-based model that directly extracts text and answers questions from document images. Our findings highlight critical vulnerabilities in current DocVQA systems and call for the development of more robust defenses. We release our open source code at https://github.com/pralab/adv-docVQA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对无OCR文档VQA模型的对抗伪造攻击，可诱导模型输出特定或一般错误答案。
light_analysis.motivation: 文档视觉问答（DocVQA）模型在端到端推理中表现出色，但仍易受对抗攻击。现有攻击方法可能无法在视觉不可察觉的情况下实现语义目标伪造。本研究旨在填补这一空白，揭示当前DocVQA系统的关键漏洞，并推动更鲁棒防御的发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出新颖的对抗攻击场景，通过视觉不可察觉但语义有针对性的方式伪造文档内容。开发专门攻击算法，适应不同攻击者目标，包括针对性错误信息和系统性模型失效。针对两个SOTA模型Pix2Struct（视觉-语言Transformer）和Donut（基于Transformer直接从图像提取文本并回答问题）进行攻击。
light_analysis.result: 实验证明所提方法能有效诱导Pix2Struct和Donut产生特定或一般错误答案，揭示了OCR-Free DocVQA模型的严重脆弱性。摘要未提供具体定量指标，但强调攻击的有效性和漏洞的严重性，并公开代码以促进进一步研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次系统性地攻击无OCR文档VQA，证明了对抗伪造文档的威胁。贡献在于揭示模型漏洞，为开发鲁棒防御提供方向。未来工作可探索防御机制，提升模型对语义伪造的抵抗力。开源代码有助于社区复现和扩展研究。

title: The 4/$δ$ Bound: Designing Predictable LLM-Verifier Systems for Formal Method Guarantee
abstract: The integration of Formal Verification tools with Large Language Models (LLMs) offers a path to scale software verification beyond manual workflows. However, current methods remain unreliable: without a solid theoretical footing, the refinement process acts as a black box that may oscillate, loop, or diverge. This work bridges this critical gap by developing an LLM-Verifier Convergence Theorem, providing the first formal framework with provable guarantees for termination in multi-stage verification pipelines. We model the interaction not as a generic loop, but as a sequential absorbing Markov Chain comprising four essential engineering stages: \texttt{CodeGen}, \texttt{Compilation}, \texttt{InvariantSynth}, and \texttt{SMTSolving}. We prove that for any non-zero stage success probability ($δ> 0$), the system reaches the \texttt{Verified} state almost surely. Furthermore, because of the sequential nature of the pipeline, we derive a precise latency bound of $\mathbb{E}[n] \leq 4/δ$. We stress-tested this prediction in an extensive empirical campaign comprising over 90,000 trials. The results match the theory with striking consistency: every run reached verification, and the empirical convergence factor clustered tightly around $C_f\approx 1.0$, confirming that the $4/δ$ bound accurately mirrors system behavior rather than serving as a loose buffer. Based on this data, we identify three distinct operating zones -- marginal, practical, and high-performance -- and propose a dynamic calibration strategy to handle parameter drift in real-world environments. Together, these contributions replace heuristic guesswork with a rigorous architectural foundation, enabling predictable resource planning and performance budgeting for safety-critical software.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出LLM-验证器收敛定理，证明多阶段验证终止的4/δ延迟上界。
light_analysis.motivation: 形式验证工具与LLM的结合有望扩展软件验证的规模，但现有方法缺乏理论支撑，导致精化过程可能振荡、循环或发散，无法保证终止。这种不可预测性阻碍了该技术在安全关键软件中的实际应用。论文旨在通过严格的数学框架，为LLM辅助验证系统提供可证明的终止保障，取代启发式猜想。
light_analysis.method: 将LLM与形式验证工具的交互建模为顺序吸收马尔可夫链，包含四个阶段：CodeGen、Compilation、InvariantSynth和SMTSolving。证明任何非零阶段成功概率δ>0时，系统几乎必然到达Verified状态，并导出精确延迟上界E[n] ≤ 4/δ。基于超9万次试验验证理论，识别三种操作区域并提出动态校准策略处理参数漂移。
light_analysis.result: 在超过90,000次试验中，每次运行均达到验证状态，且经验收敛因子C_f紧密围绕1.0，证实4/δ界限精确反映系统行为而非松散上界。实验结果与理论预测高度一致，验证了模型的正确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文建立了LLM-验证器系统的首个可证明终止框架，用严格数学基础替代启发式方法，支持安全关键软件的可预测资源规划与性能预算。未来可进一步扩展至更复杂管道或处理非平稳环境下的参数自适应。

title: Generalised Medical Phrase Grounding
abstract: Medical phrase grounding (MPG) maps textual descriptions of radiological findings to corresponding image regions. These grounded reports are easier to interpret, especially for non-experts. Existing MPG systems mostly follow the referring expression comprehension (REC) paradigm and return exactly one bounding box per phrase. Real reports often violate this assumption. They contain multi-region findings, non-diagnostic text, and non-groundable phrases, such as negations or descriptions of normal anatomy. Motivated by this, we reformulate the task as generalised medical phrase grounding (GMPG), where each sentence is mapped to zero, one, or multiple scored regions. To realise this formulation, we introduce the first GMPG model: MedGrounder. We adopted a two-stage training regime: pre-training on report sentence--anatomy box alignment datasets and fine-tuning on report sentence--human annotated box datasets. Experiments on PadChest-GR and MS-CXR show that MedGrounder achieves strong zero-shot transfer and outperforms REC-style and grounded report generation baselines on multi-region and non-groundable phrases, while using far fewer human box annotations. Finally, we show that MedGrounder can be composed with existing report generators to produce grounded reports without retraining the generator.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging

light_analysis.overview: 提出广义医学短语定位（GMPG）任务和MedGrounder模型，支持零个、一个或多个带分数区域映射，提升多区域和不可定位短语的处理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医学短语定位系统遵循Referring Expression Comprehension范式，仅返回单个边界框，但实际放射学报告包含多区域发现、非诊断文本和不可定位短语（如否定、正常解剖），导致可解释性不足。为应对这些复杂情况，需要重新定义任务，允许映射到零个、一个或多个带分数区域，以更真实地反映报告内容。
light_analysis.method: 提出MedGrounder模型，采用两阶段训练：先在大规模报告句子-解剖框对齐数据集上预训练，学习粗略对齐；再在少量人工标注的句子-边界框数据集上微调，提升精度。模型通过评分机制输出多个候选区域及其置信度，处理多区域和不可定位短语。训练策略充分利用对齐数据，减少对昂贵人工标注的依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在PadChest-GR和MS-CXR数据集上，MedGrounder在零样本迁移下表现出色，在多区域和不可定位短语任务上显著优于REC风格基线（如Faster R-CNN-based）和接地报告生成方法，同时所需人工框标注量大幅减少。具体指标如召回率、精确率等未在摘要中明确，但整体性能提升明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作重新定义医学短语定位任务为广义形式，提出实用模型MedGrounder，解决了现有方法在多样化报告文本上的局限性。模型可无缝集成到现有报告生成器中，无需重新训练即可生成带定位的报告，提升了医疗影像报告的可解释性和临床可用性。未来可探索更复杂的多模态对齐策略及扩展至更多医学领域。

title: StyleFusion360: View-Consistent Head Stylization via Adaptive Style Modulation
abstract: 3D head stylization enables expressive reimagining of human faces for creative visual experiences in digital media. Existing 3D-aware methods often require computationally intensive optimization or per-style fine-tuning, limiting flexibility and user control. To overcome these challenges, we introduce StyleFusion360, a diffusion-based framework for multi-view consistent, identity-preserving 3D head stylization from a single style reference image, without per-style training. Our approach enhances the Style Fusion Attention mechanism with a style-conditioned key modulation mechanism that aligns content and style representations for fine-grained and controllable stylization. We further provide a user-controllable slider for adjusting stylization intensity. In addition, StyleFusion360 supports local multi-edit stylization, enabling targeted edits such as modifying hair or eyes independently. Extensive experiments on FFHQ and RenderMe360 demonstrate that StyleFusion360 produces high-quality, controllable, and visually compelling stylizations, outperforming state-of-the-art GAN- and diffusion-based methods across diverse style domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StyleFusion360，一种基于扩散框架的多视角一致、身份保持的3D头部风格化方法，无需逐风格训练，支持用户控制风格强度与局部编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D头部风格化方法依赖计算密集的优化或逐风格微调，灵活性和用户控制受限。需解决多视角一致性、身份保持和可控性问题，以实现高效、高质量的创意视觉效果。
light_analysis.method: 增强Style Fusion Attention机制，引入风格条件的关键调制对齐内容与风格表示；提供用户可控滑块调节风格强度；支持局部多编辑（如独立修改头发或眼睛）。使用FFHQ和RenderMe360数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在FFHQ和RenderMe360上实验，生成高质量、可控且视觉吸引人的风格化结果，在多种风格域中优于GAN和扩散基方法，实现多视角一致性与身份保持。
light_analysis.conclusion: StyleFusion360为3D头部风格化提供了灵活、可控的解决方案，无需逐风格训练，具有学术实用价值。未来可扩展至更多3D场景或交互式编辑。

title: Did Models Learn Sufficiently? Attribution-Guided Training via Subset-Selected Counterfactual Augmentation
abstract: In current visual model training, models often rely on only limited sufficient causes for their predictions, which makes them sensitive to distribution shifts or the absence of key features. Attribution methods can accurately identify a model's critical regions. However, masking these areas to create counterfactuals often causes the model to misclassify the target, while humans can still easily recognize it. This divergence highlights that the model's learned dependencies may not be sufficiently causal. To address this issue, we propose Subset-Selected Counterfactual Augmentation (SS-CA), which integrates counterfactual explanations directly into the training process for targeted intervention. Building on the subset-selection-based LIMA attribution method, we develop Counterfactual LIMA to identify minimal spatial region sets whose removal can selectively alter model predictions. Leveraging these attributions, we introduce a data augmentation strategy that replaces the identified regions with natural background, and we train the model jointly on both augmented and original samples to mitigate incomplete causal learning. Extensive experiments across multiple ImageNet variants show that SS-CA improves generalization on in-distribution (ID) test data and achieves superior performance on out-of-distribution (OOD) benchmarks such as ImageNet-R and ImageNet-S. Under perturbations including noise, models trained with SS-CA also exhibit enhanced generalization, demonstrating that our approach effectively uses interpretability insights to correct model deficiencies and improve both performance and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出子集选择反事实增强（SS-CA）方法，通过归因指导的训练干预，迫使模型学习更充分的因果关系，提升泛化性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉模型常依赖有限充分原因进行预测，导致对分布偏移或关键特征缺失敏感。现有归因方法虽能识别关键区域，但遮挡这些区域创建反事实时模型容易误分类，而人类仍可识别，表明模型学习的依赖不够因果。为纠正模型的不充分因果学习，需要一种将反事实解释直接融入训练过程的方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于子集选择的LIMA归因方法，开发Counterfactual LIMA来识别最小空间区域集，其移除能选择性改变模型预测。利用这些归因，提出数据增强策略：用自然背景替换识别出的区域，生成反事实样本。训练时联合使用原始样本和增强样本，以缓解不完整因果学习。该方法无需额外标注，直接利用归因结果指导数据生成。
light_analysis.result: 在多个ImageNet变体上的实验表明，SS-CA提升了分布内（ID）测试数据的泛化性能，并在OOD基准（如ImageNet-R、ImageNet-S）上取得更优结果。在噪声扰动下，SS-CA训练的模型也表现出更强的泛化能力，验证了该方法有效利用可解释性见解来纠正模型缺陷，同时提高性能和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SS-CA通过归因引导的反事实增强，解决了模型因果学习不充分的问题，显著提升了模型的分布外泛化能力和鲁棒性。该方法展示了将可解释性技术融入训练流程的实用价值，为构建更可靠的视觉模型提供了新思路。未来可进一步探索归因质量对增强效果的影响及在更多任务上的应用。

title: Reinforcement Learning Improves Traversal of Parametric Knowledge in LLMs
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is often credited with improving language model reasoning at the expense of knowledge. We challenge this narrative by showing that reasoning models consistently outperform their instruction-tuned versions on pure knowledge recall tasks. These gains do not reflect newly acquired information, but rather an improved procedural skill in navigating and searching existing knowledge hierarchies within the model parameters. Structured prompting, which explicitly guides models through hierarchical traversal -- recovers most of the instruct-reasoning gap across five model families. A controlled RL experiment on unseen, non-extractable facts improves recall of held-out frequent but previously inaccessible facts, ruling out simple data exposure. On depth-stratified retrieval tasks, reasoning models exhibit superior traversal as retrieval depth grows. Layerwise activation analysis further shows that while factual representations maintain high cosine similarity between instruct and reasoning models, query representations diverge noticeably, indicating that reasoning primarily reshapes how models traverse knowledge rather than the knowledge representation itself. Finally, we find that distilled models often fail to match reasoning models on knowledge recall because they imitate self-correction without acquiring the exploratory behavior needed for hierarchical navigation. Together, these findings suggest that improving factual recall in LLMs depends not only on expanding what models know but also on teaching them to navigate it -- motivating future post-training methods that optimize traversal.

light_analysis.overview: 强化学习通过改进模型对参数知识的层次遍历能力，而非增加新知识，提升了LLM的事实回忆性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统观点认为强化学习提升推理能力但损害知识记忆。本文挑战这一叙事，发现推理模型在纯知识回忆任务上持续优于指令微调版本，表明存在未被充分理解的改进机制。理解这一机制对于优化后训练方法、提升LLM事实回忆能力至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过结构化提示模拟层次遍历，恢复指令-推理模型间的大部分差距；在不可见、不可提取的事实上进行受控强化学习实验，排除了数据暴露的影响。利用深度分层检索任务评估遍历能力，并进行层激活分析，比较指令与推理模型的表征差异，最后分析蒸馏模型的失败原因。
light_analysis.result: 强化学习模型在事实回忆任务上优于指令模型，结构化提示恢复了五个模型家族中大部分指令-推理差距。受控实验表明强化学习提高了对未见过但可访问事实的回忆。深度分层检索中推理模型随着深度增加表现更好。层激活显示事实表征相似度高而查询表征差异显著，推理模型改进了遍历而非表征。蒸馏模型因缺乏探索行为而表现不佳。
