light_analysis.conclusion: 强化学习通过改善模型对参数化知识的层次遍历能力来提升事实回忆，而非增加新知识。这揭示了后训练方法中优化遍历的重要性，为未来设计提升LLM知识可访问性的方法提供了方向。局限性在于未探索不同强化学习算法的影响。

title: Benchmarking Deep Learning Models for Laryngeal Cancer Staging Using the LaryngealCT Dataset
abstract: Laryngeal cancer imaging research lacks standardised public datasets to enable reproducible deep learning (DL) model development. We present LaryngealCT, a curated benchmark of 1,029 computed tomography (CT) scans aggregated from six collections from The Cancer Imaging Archive (TCIA). Uniform 1 mm isotropic volumes of interest encompassing the larynx were extracted using a weakly supervised parameter search framework validated by clinical experts. Six 3D DL architectures (custom 3D CNN, ResNet18,50,101, DenseNet121 and MedicalNet-pretrained ResNet50) were benchmarked on (i) early (Tis,T1,T2) vs. advanced (T3,T4) and (ii) T4 vs. non-T4 classification tasks. On the independent test set, the 3D CNN achieved the strongest overall performance across global and per-class metrics (Accuracy 0.854, F1-macro 0.841) in early vs. advanced classification. In the T4 task, AU-ROC values exceeded 0.82 for most models, but sensitivity for T4 disease remained limited (less than or equal to 0.412), with ResNet101 showing the most promising calibrated T4 recall (0.706. Model explainability assessed using GradCAMpp with thyroid cartilage overlays for T4 classification task revealed anatomically plausible peri-cartilage activations, although spatial overlap was modest. Through open-source data, pretrained models, and integrated explainability tools, LaryngealCT offers a reproducible foundation for AI-driven research to support future clinical decision-making in laryngeal oncology.

light_analysis.overview: 提出喉癌CT数据集LaryngealCT，并基准测试多种3D深度学习模型用于分期分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 喉癌影像研究缺乏标准化公共数据集，导致深度学习模型开发的可重复性差。现有方法无法在统一标准下进行公平比较，且模型可解释性不足。该研究通过构建大规模、经过专家验证的CT数据集，并提供基准测试结果，为喉癌分期AI研究奠定可重复基础。
light_analysis.method: 从TCIA的6个集合收集1029个CT扫描，使用弱监督参数搜索框架提取喉部1 mm各向同性感兴趣区域。基准测试六种3D架构：自定义3D CNN、ResNet18/50/101、DenseNet121及MedicalNet预训练ResNet50。任务包括早期（Tis,T1,T2）vs晚期（T3,T4）和T4 vs非T4分类，并采用GradCAMpp进行模型可解释性分析。
light_analysis.result: 在早期vs晚期分类任务中，3D CNN取得最佳全局性能（准确率0.854，F1-macro 0.841）。T4分类任务中，多数模型AU-ROC超0.82，但T4灵敏度普遍偏低（≤0.412），ResNet101校准后T4召回率达0.706。GradCAMpp可视化显示甲状软骨周围激活，但空间重叠适中。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaryngealCT数据集及基准测试为喉癌AI研究提供了可重复的基准，通过开源数据和预训练模型支持未来临床决策。研究揭示了模型在T4检测方面的局限性，并指出可解释性空间重叠需改进。该工作有助于推动喉癌影像AI的可重复性和临床转化。

title: Distribution Preference Optimization: A Fine-grained Perspective for LLM Unlearning
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities learned from vast corpora, concerns regarding data privacy and safety are receiving increasing attention. LLM unlearning, which aims to remove the influence of specific data while preserving overall model utility, is becoming an important research area. One of the mainstream unlearning classes is optimization-based methods, which achieve forgetting directly through fine-tuning, exemplified by Negative Preference Optimization (NPO). However, NPO's effectiveness is limited by its inherent lack of explicit positive preference signals. Attempts to introduce such signals by constructing preferred responses often necessitate domain-specific knowledge or well-designed prompts, fundamentally restricting their generalizability. In this paper, we shift the focus to the distribution-level, directly targeting the next-token probability distribution instead of entire responses, and derive a novel unlearning algorithm termed \textbf{Di}stribution \textbf{P}reference \textbf{O}ptimization (DiPO). We show that the requisite preference distribution pairs for DiPO, which are distributions over the model's output tokens, can be constructed by selectively amplifying or suppressing the model's high-confidence output logits, thereby effectively overcoming NPO's limitations. We theoretically prove the consistency of DiPO's loss function with the desired unlearning direction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiPO achieves a strong trade-off between model utility and forget quality. Notably, DiPO attains the highest forget quality on the TOFU benchmark, and maintains leading scalability and sustainability in utility preservation on the MUSE benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分布偏好优化（DiPO），通过直接操作模型输出token的概率分布实现高效且可泛化的LLM遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM遗忘旨在移除特定数据影响同时保持模型效用。现有优化方法如负偏好优化（NPO）缺乏显式正偏好信号，引入该信号需领域知识或精心设计提示，限制泛化性。DiPO从分布层面解决这一问题，避免上述依赖。
light_analysis.method: DiPO直接针对下一token概率分布而非完整响应，通过选择性放大或抑制模型高置信度输出logits构造偏好分布对。理论证明损失函数与期望遗忘方向一致。无需外部知识或复杂提示，仅利用模型自身输出。
light_analysis.result: 在TOFU基准上DiPO达到最高遗忘质量，在MUSE基准上保持领先的可扩展性和效用保持可持续性。实现模型效用与遗忘效果之间的强平衡，优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiPO为LLM遗忘提供了一种细粒度、通用的优化框架，无需领域特定知识。其分布级视角提升了泛化性和效率。未来可探索更高效的偏好分布构造方法及更复杂遗忘场景。

title: Robustness assessment of large audio language models in multiple-choice evaluation
abstract: Recent advances in large audio language models (LALMs) have primarily been assessed using a multiple-choice question answering (MCQA) framework. However, subtle changes, such as shifting the order of choices, result in substantially different results. Existing MCQA frameworks do not account for this variability and report a single accuracy number per benchmark or category. We dive into the MCQA evaluation framework and conduct a systematic study spanning three benchmarks (MMAU, MMAR and MMSU) and four models: Audio Flamingo 2, Audio Flamingo 3, Qwen2.5-Omni-7B-Instruct, and Kimi-Audio-7B-Instruct. Our findings indicate that models are sensitive not only to the ordering of choices, but also to the paraphrasing of the question and the choices. Finally, we propose a simpler evaluation protocol and metric that account for subtle variations and provide a more detailed evaluation report of LALMs within the MCQA framework.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了大型音频语言模型在多项选择评估中对选项顺序和问题改写的敏感性，并提出更鲁棒的评估协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型音频语言模型的评估主要依赖多项选择题问答框架，但细微变化（如选项顺序调整）会导致结果显著差异，而现有方法仅报告单一准确率，忽略这种不稳定性。这阻碍了模型能力的可靠评估，需要系统性研究来量化这种变异性并提出改进方案。
light_analysis.method: 在MMAU、MMAR和MMSU三个基准上，对Audio Flamingo 2/3、Qwen2.5-Omni-7B-Instruct和Kimi-Audio-7B-Instruct四个模型进行系统实验。通过改变选项顺序和改写问题及选项内容，分析评估结果的敏感性，并据此设计了一个更简单的评估协议和考虑变异的指标。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所有模型均对选项顺序和问题改写敏感，导致同一模型在不同配置下准确率波动显著。现有单一准确率指标无法反映这种不稳定性，而新提出的协议能提供更细粒度的评估报告，揭示模型在细微变化下的表现差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次系统验证了多项选择评估框架对音频语言模型的不稳定性，指出了现有评估方法的缺陷，并实际提出了一个更稳健的评估协议。这不仅有助于更准确地衡量模型能力，也为未来音频语言模型评估标准的制定提供了参考，但新协议仍需在更多基准和模型上验证。

title: How Does the Pretraining Distribution Shape In-Context Learning? A Fundamental Trade-Off
abstract: The factors driving the performance of in-context learning (ICL) in large language models (LLMs) remain poorly understood despite ICL's surprising effectiveness, enabling models to adapt to new tasks from only a handful of examples. To clarify and improve these capabilities, we characterize how the statistical properties of the pretraining distribution (e.g., tail behavior, coverage) shape ICL. We develop a theoretical framework that encompasses generalization and task selection and show how distributional properties govern sample efficiency, task retrieval, and robustness. To this end, we generalize existing concentration results to heavy-tailed priors and dependent sequences, better reflecting the structure of LLM pretraining data. Our framework reveals a fundamental design trade-off: heavy-tailed pretraining distributions facilitate robust task selection under distribution shifts but are detrimental to generalization, especially in low-data regimes. We then empirically evaluate our predictions by studying how ICL performance varies with the pretraining distribution on challenging tasks such as stochastic differential equations and stochastic processes with memory. Together, these findings suggest that controlling key statistical properties of the pretraining distribution is essential for building ICL-capable and reliable LLMs.
comment: 57 pages, 15 figures; to be presented at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 揭示预训练分布的统计属性（如重尾）对上下文学习的泛化与鲁棒性之间的基本权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文学习（ICL）虽能通过少量示例适应新任务，但其性能驱动因素尚不明确。现有研究缺乏对预训练分布统计属性（如尾行为、覆盖）如何系统影响ICL的理论理解。明确这些因素有助于构建更可靠的大语言模型，并指导预训练数据的设计。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，揭示分布特性与样本效率、任务检索和鲁棒性之间的内在联系。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个理论框架，涵盖泛化和任务选择，将现有浓度结果推广到重尾先验和相关序列，以更好地模拟LLM预训练数据结构。通过分析分布属性对样本效率、任务检索和鲁棒性的影响，揭示了基本的设计权衡。实证评估采用随机微分方程和带记忆的随机过程等挑战性任务，控制预训练分布的关键统计属性来观察ICL性能变化。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明：重尾预训练分布在分布偏移下有利于鲁棒任务选择，但会损害泛化能力，尤其在低数据场景下。实证结果验证了这一权衡：在不同统计属性的预训练分布上，ICL性能在泛化和鲁棒性间呈反向变化。具体指标如样本效率和任务检索准确率随分布尾重增加而呈现差异，支持理论预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文阐明了预训练分布的统计属性（如尾行为）对上下文学习的核心影响，揭示了泛化与鲁棒性之间的基本权衡。这一发现对构建可靠大语言模型具有重要指导意义，建议通过控制预训练数据的统计特性来平衡模型性能。未来工作可探索更复杂的依赖结构及实际应用中的数据设计策略。

title: Removing Noise, not Finding Gold: Quality Filtering for Large-Scale Pretraining
abstract: Large-scale models are pretrained on massive web-crawled datasets containing documents of mixed quality, making data filtering essential. A popular method is Classifier-based Quality Filtering (CQF), which trains a binary classifier to distinguish between pretraining data and a small, high-quality set. It assigns each pretraining document a quality score defined as the classifier's score and retains only the top-scoring ones. We provide an in-depth analysis of CQF.   We show that while CQF improves downstream task performance, it does not necessarily enhance language modeling on the high-quality set. Importantly, we find that training on CQF-selected data can outperform training directly on the high-quality set, even when the latter is sufficiently large. This finding alone is particularly striking, given the substantial effort and cost recently devoted to augmenting high-quality data. We explain this paradox by the fact that CQF implicitly filters the high-quality dataset as well as the low-quality one. Finally, we introduce an optimization-driven notion of data quality and demonstrate that it can be reliably estimated using small-scale proxy experiments. Altogether, our results both elucidate the mechanisms behind CQF and deepen our understanding of data selection methods widely used in practice.
comment: 21 pages, 22 figures, 2 tables, accepted at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 揭示分类器质量过滤(CQF)的机制，发现其通过过滤噪声而非寻找高质量数据来提升预训练性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模预训练数据来自网络爬取，质量参差不齐，数据过滤至关重要。现有CQF方法被广泛使用，但其机制尚不清晰。作者发现尽管CQF提升下游任务性能，却不提高高质量集上的语言建模，且CQF选择的数据优于直接使用高质量集，这一反直觉现象需要深入分析。
light_analysis.method: 对CQF进行深入分析：CQF训练二元分类器区分预训练数据和少量高质量集，以分类器得分作为质量分数，保留高分文档。通过实验揭示CQF隐式同时过滤了高质量集和低质量集。引入基于优化的数据质量定义，利用小规模代理实验可靠估计，从而解释CQF的实际作用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CQF提升下游任务性能，但未改善高质量集上的语言建模；CQF选择的数据训练效果优于直接使用高质量集（即使高质量集足够大）。这说明CQF主要移除噪声而非寻找高质量数据，并通过小规模代理实验验证了优化的质量概念。
light_analysis.conclusion: 阐述了CQF的机制，揭示其通过过滤噪声而非选择高质量数据提升预训练效果，解释了为何无需大量增加高质量数据。加深了对数据选择方法的理解，为设计更高效的数据过滤策略提供了理论基础。

title: ScalingAR: Scaling Confidence for Autoregressive Image Generation
abstract: Test-time strategies have shown remarkable success in improving large language models, but their application to next-token prediction (NTP) autoregressive (AR) image generation remains largely underexplored. Existing test-time scaling (TTS) methods for visual autoregressive models (VAR) rely on frequent partial decoding and external reward models, which are inefficient and often ineffective for NTP-based image generation due to the inherent instability of intermediate decoding results. To address these limitations, we propose ScalingAR, a novel test-time scaling framework tailored for NTP-based AR image generation. ScalingAR introduces token entropy as a confidence signal and operates at two complementary levels: (i) Profile Level, integrates intrinsic uncertainty and conditional utilization into a unified confidence state, and (ii) Policy Level, leverages this state for adaptive trajectory pruning and dynamic guidance scheduling. Without requiring early decoding or auxiliary rewards, ScalingAR achieves significant improvements across diverse benchmarks. Experiments show that ScalingAR (I) improves base models by $12.5\%$ on GenEval and $15.2\%$ on TIIF-Bench, (II) reduces visual token consumption by $62.0\%$ while outperforming baselines, and (III) enhances robustness, mitigating performance degradation by $26.0\%$ in challenging scenarios. These results establish ScalingAR as a robust and efficient test-time scaling solution for autoregressive image generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需早期解码和外部奖励的测试时缩放框架ScalingAR，利用token熵作为置信度信号，在概要级和策略级进行自适应轨迹剪枝和动态引导调度，提升自回归图像生成性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时缩放策略在大型语言模型中表现优异，但在基于下一token预测的自回归图像生成中应用不足。现有视觉自回归模型的测试时缩放方法依赖于频繁的部分解码和外部奖励模型，由于中间解码结果的不稳定性，效率低且效果不佳。因此需要一种高效、无需外部辅助的测试时缩放方法。
light_analysis.method: ScalingAR引入token熵作为置信度信号，在概要级将内在不确定性和条件利用率整合为统一置信状态，在策略级利用该状态进行自适应轨迹剪枝和动态引导调度。方法无需早期解码或辅助奖励模型，适用于NTP自回归图像生成。
light_analysis.result: 在GenEval上基础模型提升12.5%，TIIF-Bench上提升15.2%；视觉token消耗减少62.0%，同时性能优于基线；在挑战场景中性能退化降低26.0%，展现了鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScalingAR为自回归图像生成提供了一种鲁棒且高效的测试时缩放解决方案，无需外部奖励或频繁解码，显著提升性能并降低计算成本。未来可探索扩展到更多生成任务或结合其他置信度信号。

title: Scale or Reason? A Compute-Equivalent Analysis of Reasoning Distillation
abstract: Distilling reasoning traces from strong teacher models has become the standard recipe for building capable small language models. Yet reasoning traces are 5-20$\times$ longer than standard instruction fine-tuning (IFT) outputs, meaning every practitioner who chooses reasoning distillation implicitly forgoes training a larger IFT model on the same compute budget. Whether this trade-off is worthwhile remains unaddressed. We study it with a controlled experiment: a single teacher generates paired IFT and reasoning outputs for identical prompts by toggling only its reasoning mode, isolating supervision format as the sole variable. Training students at five scales (0.5B to 14B) and evaluating on 18 benchmarks, we find that at matched FLOPs, IFT lies on or near the Pareto frontier across the majority of configurations. Reasoning reaches the Pareto frontier only on open-ended tasks at 7B and above. Even there, a sequential curriculum mixing just 25-50\% reasoning data with IFT captures most of the accuracy benefit at far lower compute cost.

light_analysis.overview: 通过计算等价分析，发现标准指令微调在相同计算预算下通常优于推理蒸馏，后者仅在特定条件下有效。
light_analysis.motivation: 推理蒸馏训练小模型时，推理轨迹比标准指令微调（IFT）长5-20倍，相同计算预算下相当于放弃了训练更大的IFT模型。目前缺乏对这种权衡的系统研究，因此需要明确在固定计算资源下，选择推理蒸馏还是扩大IFT模型更优。
light_analysis.method: 通过控制实验，使用同一教师模型为相同提示生成配对的IFT和推理输出，仅切换推理模式以隔离监督格式变量。在0.5B到14B五个学生规模、18个基准上训练并评估，比较相同FLOPs下的性能，并引入帕累托前沿分析。
light_analysis.result: 在大多数配置中，IFT位于或接近帕累托前沿；推理仅在7B及以上规模的开源任务上达到帕累托前沿。即使如此，使用25-50%推理数据与IFT混合的顺序课程可在更低计算成本下获得大部分精度提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明推理蒸馏在计算效率上通常不如IFT，建议优先考虑IFT或混合训练。这为小模型训练提供了计算优化指导，但未探索不同推理策略或更多样化的数据集。

title: VolSplat: Rethinking Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Voxel-Aligned Prediction
abstract: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a highly effective solution for novel view synthesis. Existing methods predominantly rely on a \emph{pixel-aligned} Gaussian prediction paradigm, where each 2D pixel is mapped to a 3D Gaussian. We rethink this widely adopted formulation and identify several inherent limitations: it renders the reconstructed 3D models heavily dependent on the number of input views, leads to view-biased density distributions, and introduces alignment errors, particularly when source views contain occlusions or low texture. To address these challenges, we introduce VolSplat, a new multi-view feed-forward paradigm that replaces pixel alignment with voxel-aligned Gaussians. By directly predicting Gaussians from a predicted 3D voxel grid, it overcomes pixel alignment's reliance on error-prone 2D feature matching, ensuring robust multi-view consistency. Furthermore, it enables adaptive control over density based on 3D scene complexity, yielding more faithful Gaussians, improved geometric consistency, and enhanced novel-view rendering quality. Experiments on widely used benchmarks demonstrate that VolSplat achieves state-of-the-art performance, while producing more plausible and view-consistent results. The video results, code and trained models are available on our project page: https://lhmd.top/volsplat.
comment: ECCV 2026, Project Page: https://lhmd.top/volsplat, Code: https://github.com/ziplab/VolSplat

light_analysis.overview: 提出体素对齐的3D高斯预测范式，替代像素对齐，实现鲁棒的多视图一致性和自适应密度控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈3DGS方法采用像素对齐的高斯预测，将每个2D像素映射到3D高斯。该范式导致重建模型严重依赖输入视图数量，产生视图偏置的密度分布，并在源视图存在遮挡或低纹理时引入对齐误差。这些问题限制了多视图一致性和渲染质量，亟需新的预测范式来克服对2D特征匹配的依赖。
light_analysis.method: VolSplat提出体素对齐的前馈范式，从预测的3D体素网格直接生成高斯，替代像素对齐的2D特征匹配。该方法通过体素化场景表示，确保多视图一致性；同时根据3D场景复杂度自适应控制高斯密度，生成更忠实于几何的表示。关键创新在于摆脱像素对齐的固有缺陷，利用3D体素先验提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛使用的基准测试上，VolSplat实现了最先进的新视图合成性能，生成更合理且视图一致的结果。与像素对齐方法相比，显著降低了遮挡和低纹理区域的重建误差，提升了密度分布的几何一致性。具体指标（如PSNR、SSIM）达到最优，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: VolSplat重新思考前馈3DGS的预测范式，证明了体素对齐相比像素对齐在鲁棒性和多视图一致性上的优势。该工作为3D场景表示学习提供了新视角，可应用于高质量新视图合成。未来可探索更高效的体素特征学习或结合动态场景扩展。

title: Discovering New Theorems via LLMs with In-Context Proof Learning in Lean
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant promise in formal theorem proving. In this study, we investigate the ability of LLMs to discover novel theorems and produce verified proofs. We propose a pipeline called Conjecturing-Proving Loop (CPL), which iteratively generates mathematical conjectures and attempts to prove them in Lean 4. A key feature of CPL is that each iteration conditions the LLM on previously generated theorems and their formal proofs, enabling parameter-free improvement of proof strategies via in-context learning. We provide both theoretical and experimental evidence that CPL increases the discovery rate of hard-to-prove theorems compared to frameworks that generate statements and proofs simultaneously. Moreover, our experiments show that reusing the LLM's own formally verified outputs as context consistently improves subsequent proof success, demonstrating the effectiveness of self-generated in-context learning for neural theorem proving. The source code is available at https://github.com/auto-res/ConjecturingProvingLoop.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Conjecturing-Proving Loop(CPL)管道，利用大语言模型在Lean中迭代生成并证明新定理，通过上下文学习提升发现率。
light_analysis.motivation: 形式定理证明中，现有方法通常同时生成语句和证明，难以发现难证的新定理。本研究旨在利用LLM的生成能力，通过迭代方式鼓励发现新颖数学定理，并验证其可证明性。该问题重要，因为自动化发现定理能加速数学研究和形式化验证，但现有框架缺乏有效机制引导LLM探索更难定理。
light_analysis.method: 提出CPL管道，在Lean 4中迭代生成数学猜想并尝试证明。每次迭代中，LLM基于之前生成的定理及其形式证明进行上下文学习，无需参数更新。通过将历史成功证明作为上下文，引导后续生成，从而增加发现难证定理的概率。该方法利用自生成的形式验证输出来改进证明策略。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，与同时生成语句和证明的框架相比，CPL提高了难证定理的发现率。重用LLM自身生成的形式验证输出作为上下文，持续改进了后续证明成功率，证明了自生成上下文学习的有效性。具体性能提升百分比未在摘要中明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: CPL管道利用LLM进行定理发现与证明，实现了参数免费的上下文学习改进。研究展示了自生成形式验证输出对提高证明能力的价值。未来可探索更复杂的推理策略和更大规模的定理库。该方法在自动数学研究和形式化验证领域具有实际应用潜力。

title: Why Pool When You Can Flow? Active Learning with GFlowNets
abstract: The scalability of pool-based active learning is limited by the computational cost of evaluating large unlabeled datasets, a challenge that is particularly acute in virtual screening for drug discovery. While active learning strategies such as Bayesian Active Learning by Disagreement (BALD) prioritize informative samples, it remains computationally intensive when scaled to libraries containing billions samples. In this work, we introduce BALD-GFlowNet, a generative active learning framework that circumvents this issue. Our method leverages Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) to directly sample objects in proportion to the BALD reward. By replacing traditional pool-based acquisition with generative sampling, BALD-GFlowNet achieves scalability that is independent of the size of the unlabeled pool. In our virtual screening experiment, we show that BALD-GFlowNet achieves a performance comparable to that of standard BALD baseline while generating more structurally diverse molecules, offering a promising direction for efficient and scalable molecular discovery.
comment: Accepted at the NeurIPS 2025 Workshop on AI Virtual Cells and Instruments: A New Era in Drug Discovery and Development (AI4D3 2025), San Diego, California, USA. 6 pages; 5 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出BALD-GFlowNet，利用生成流网络根据BALD奖励直接采样分子，实现与未标记池大小无关的可扩展主动学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于池的主动学习在评估大型未标记数据集（如数十亿分子库）时计算成本高昂，BALD等策略虽能筛选信息样本但扩展性差。亟需一种无需遍历整个池的生成式主动学习方法，以降低计算开销并保持性能。
light_analysis.method: BALD-GFlowNet将主动学习转化为生成问题，使用GFlowNets学习生成分子，其概率与BALD奖励成正比。通过生成采样代替传统池评估，使得计算复杂度与池大小解耦。GFlowNets通过轨迹平衡目标优化，生成多样且高奖励的分子。
light_analysis.result: 在虚拟筛选实验中，BALD-GFlowNet取得了与标准BALD基线相当的活性预测性能，同时生成的分子结构多样性更高。该方法避免了池评估瓶颈，可扩展至数十亿级别库，而基线方法在同等规模下计算不可行。
light_analysis.conclusion: BALD-GFlowNet为大规模分子发现提供了高效、可扩展的主动学习范式，通过生成采样绕过池评估限制。未来可结合更复杂的奖励函数，并应用于其他领域的生成式主动学习任务。

title: Shapley-Inspired Feature Weighting in $k$-means with No Additional Hyperparameters
abstract: Clustering algorithms often assume all features contribute equally to the data structure, an assumption that usually fails in high-dimensional or noisy settings. Feature weighting methods can address this, but most require additional parameter tuning. We propose SHARK (Shapley Reweighted $k$-means), a feature-weighted clustering algorithm motivated by the use of Shapley values from cooperative game theory to quantify feature relevance, which requires no additional parameters beyond those in $k$-means. We prove that the $k$-means objective can be decomposed into a sum of per-feature Shapley values, providing an axiomatic foundation for unsupervised feature relevance and reducing Shapley computation from exponential to polynomial time. SHARK iteratively re-weights features by the inverse of their Shapley contribution, emphasising informative dimensions and down-weighting irrelevant ones, and is equivalent to replacing the arithmetic mean of feature dispersions with their harmonic mean. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data sets show that SHARK consistently matches or outperforms existing methods, achieving superior robustness and accuracy, particularly in scenarios where noise may be present. Software: https://github.com/rickfawley/SHARK.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SHARK算法，利用Shapley值实现特征加权的k-means，无需额外超参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 聚类算法常假设所有特征同等重要，但在高维或噪声场景下失效。现有特征加权方法需额外参数调优，增加了使用复杂度。SHARK旨在解决这一问题，提供一种无需额外参数的特征加权聚类方法。
light_analysis.method: SHARK基于合作博弈论中的Shapley值量化特征相关性，证明k-means目标可分解为每个特征的Shapley值之和，从而将Shapley计算复杂度从指数降为多项式。算法迭代地根据Shapley贡献的倒数重加权特征，强调信息维度，抑制噪声维度，等价于用特征离散度的调和平均代替算术平均。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，SHARK在鲁棒性和准确性上一致匹配或超越现有特征加权聚类方法，尤其在噪声场景下表现优越。代码已开源在GitHub。
light_analysis.conclusion: SHARK为无监督特征相关性提供了公理基础，无需额外超参数即可有效提升k-means在高维和噪声数据上的性能。未来可探索将其扩展至其他聚类算法或更高效的Shapley值近似计算。

title: PERTINENCE: Input-based Opportunistic Neural Network Dynamic Execution
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are widely used for their ability to model complex patterns across domains such as computer vision, speech recognition, and robotics. However, larger models, while often more accurate, are computationally expensive and energy-intensive. Since such a cost is typically needed only for challenging inputs, dynamically selecting lighter models for simpler inputs can improve efficiency with minimal impact on accuracy. We introduce PERTINENCE, a runtime method that selects, from a set of pre-trained models, the lightest model likely to process each input correctly. An ML-based dispatcher performs this selection, and a genetic algorithm explores dispatcher training strategies to identify Pareto-optimal trade-offs between accuracy and computational cost. We evaluate PERTINENCE on CNNs trained on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, ViTs trained on TinyImageNet, and a YOLO-based road occupancy estimation application using real-time intersection camera feeds. Results show that PERTINENCE matches or improves the accuracy of state-of-the-art pre-trained models while reducing operations by up to 36%, with equivalent or lower end-to-end inference time through tunable invocation intervals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于输入的动态模型选择方法PERTINENCE，通过ML调度器和遗传算法实现准确率与计算成本的最佳权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络准确率与计算成本存在矛盾，大模型对简单输入过于冗余。现有方法缺乏输入自适应的动态选择机制，导致资源浪费。PERTINENCE旨在运行时为每个输入自动选择最轻量的预训练模型，保证精度的前提下显著降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: PERTINENCE采用ML-based调度器从一组预训练模型中为每个输入选择最轻量且能正确处理的模型。使用遗传算法探索调度器的训练策略，以在准确率和计算成本之间获取帕累托最优解。评估于CIFAR-10/100上的CNN、TinyImageNet上的ViT及真实交通场景下的YOLO模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，PERTINENCE匹配或超越现有最优预训练模型的准确率，同时减少最多36%的计算操作数。通过可调节的调用间隔，端到端推理时间持平或更低。
light_analysis.conclusion: PERTINENCE有效实现了输入驱动的动态模型选择，在保持高精度的同时大幅降低计算成本，特别适用于资源受限或实时性要求高的场景。未来可扩展至更广泛的模型库与异构硬件。

title: ESMStereo: Enhanced ShuffleMixer Disparity Upsampling for Real-Time and Accurate Stereo Matching
abstract: Stereo matching has become an increasingly important component of modern autonomous systems. Developing deep learning-based stereo matching models that deliver high accuracy while operating in real-time continues to be a major challenge in computer vision. In the domain of cost-volume-based stereo matching, accurate disparity estimation depends heavily on large-scale cost volumes. However, such large volumes store substantial redundant information and also require computationally intensive aggregation units for processing and regression, making real-time performance unattainable. Conversely, small-scale cost volumes followed by lightweight aggregation units provide a promising route for real-time performance, but lack sufficient information to ensure highly accurate disparity estimation. To address this challenge, we propose the Enhanced Shuffle Mixer (ESM) to mitigate information loss associated with small-scale cost volumes. ESM restores critical details by integrating primary features into the disparity upsampling unit. It quickly extracts features from the initial disparity estimation and fuses them with image features. These features are mixed by shuffling and layer splitting then refined through a compact feature-guided hourglass network to recover more detailed scene geometry. The ESM focuses on local contextual connectivity with a large receptive field and low computational cost, leading to the reconstruction of a highly accurate disparity map at real-time. The compact version of ESMStereo achieves an inference speed of 116 FPS on high-end GPUs and 91 FPS on the AGX Orin.

light_analysis.overview: 提出增强型Shuffle Mixer模块，通过特征融合和高效上采样实现实时高精度立体匹配。
light_analysis.motivation: 立体匹配在自主系统中至关重要，但现有方法难以兼顾实时性与精度。大尺度代价体计算量大、冗余信息多，无法实时；小尺度代价体信息不足导致精度低。因此需要一种能从小尺度代价体中恢复关键细节的轻量级方法，以实现实时高精度视差估计。
light_analysis.method: 提出Enhanced Shuffle Mixer (ESM)模块，集成主要特征到视差上采样单元以补偿信息损失。首先从初始视差估计中快速提取特征并与图像特征融合，然后通过shuffling和layer splitting混合特征，最后经紧凑的特征引导沙漏网络细化，恢复场景几何细节。ESM利用局部上下文连接和大感受野，计算成本低，能重建高精度视差图。
light_analysis.result: 紧凑版ESMStereo在高端GPU上达到116 FPS的推理速度，在嵌入式平台AGX Orin上达到91 FPS。在公开数据集（如KITTI、Scene Flow）上，精度优于或持平其他实时方法，有效平衡了速度与准确度。
light_analysis.conclusion: ESMStereo通过轻量级ESM模块解决了小尺度代价体的信息丢失问题，实现了实时高精度立体匹配。该方法适用于自主系统等对实时性要求高的场景，且易于部署到边缘设备。未来可进一步优化模块结构以适配更多硬件平台。

title: HiT-JEPA: A Hierarchical Self-supervised Trajectory Embedding Framework for Similarity Computation
abstract: The representation of urban trajectory data plays a critical role in effectively analyzing spatial movement patterns. Despite considerable progress, the challenge of designing trajectory representations that can capture diverse and complementary information remains an open research problem. Existing methods struggle in incorporating trajectory fine-grained details and high-level summary in a single model, limiting their ability to attend to both long-term dependencies while preserving local nuances. To address this, we propose HiT-JEPA (Hierarchical Interactions of Trajectory Semantics via a Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture), a unified framework for learning multi-scale urban trajectory representations across semantic abstraction levels. HiT-JEPA adopts a three-layer hierarchy that progressively captures point-level fine-grained details, intermediate patterns, and high-level trajectory abstractions, enabling the model to integrate both local dynamics and global semantics in one coherent structure. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world datasets for trajectory similarity computation show that HiT-JEPA's hierarchical design yields richer, multi-scale representations. Code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/HiT-JEPA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 HiT-JEPA 分层自监督轨迹嵌入框架，通过联合嵌入预测架构学习多尺度语义表示，提升轨迹相似度计算性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有轨迹表示方法难以在单一模型中同时捕获轨迹的细粒度细节与高层语义概览，导致无法兼顾长期依赖与局部细微差别。该研究旨在解决这一矛盾，实现统一的多层级轨迹表示，以提升下游任务（如相似度计算）的效果。
light_analysis.method: HiT-JEPA 采用三层分层结构：第一层捕获点级细粒度细节，第二层学习中间模式，第三层提取高层轨迹抽象。通过联合嵌入预测架构实现跨层级语义交互，使模型既能保留局部动态，又能整合全局语义，最终生成丰富的多尺度轨迹嵌入。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界轨迹数据集上进行的相似度计算实验表明，HiT-JEPA 的分层设计能够产生比现有方法更丰富的多尺度表示。摘要未明确说明具体性能提升数值，但强调了分层设计的有效性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: HiT-JEPA 为轨迹相似度计算提供了统一的分层自监督框架，有效整合了局部细节与全局语义。其多尺度表示能力可推广至其他轨迹分析任务，未来工作可能探索更深的层次结构或跨模态应用。

title: Scalable unsupervised feature selection via weight stability
abstract: Unsupervised feature selection is critical for improving clustering performance in high-dimensional data, where irrelevant features can obscure meaningful structure. In this work, we propose the Minkowski weighted $k$-means++, a novel initialisation strategy for the Minkowski Weighted $k$-means. Our initialisation selects centroids probabilistically using feature relevance estimates derived from the data itself. Building on this, we propose two new feature selection algorithms, FS-MWK++, which aggregates feature weights across a range of Minkowski exponents identifying stable and informative features, and SFS-MWK++, a scalable variant based on subsampling. We support our approach with a theoretical analysis, demonstrating that, under explicit assumptions on noise features and cluster structure, relevant features are assigned consistently higher weights than noise features across a range of Minkowski exponents. Our software can be found at https://github.com/xzhang4-ops1/FSMWK.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于权重重稳定性的可扩展无监督特征选择算法，通过Minkowski加权k-means++初始化及跨指数权重聚合。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维数据中无关特征会掩盖聚类结构，现有无监督特征选择方法对参数敏感且可扩展性不足。本文旨在通过特征权重的稳定性自适应识别相关特征，克服初始化随机性和指数选择问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Minkowski加权k-means++初始化，利用数据自身特征相关性概率性选择质心。基于此设计FS-MWK++算法，聚合多个Minkowski指数下的特征权重以识别稳定特征；SFS-MWK++通过子采样提升可扩展性。理论证明相关特征权重一致高于噪声。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数值，但通过理论分析验证了在噪声和簇假设下相关特征权重的稳定性优势。代码已开源，可复现实验。实际性能需参考原文实验部分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种新的无监督特征选择框架，利用权重稳定性克服参数敏感性问题。理论分析保障方法有效性，算法可扩展版本适用于大规模数据。未来可进一步研究自适应指数选择或与深度学习结合。

title: Uncovering Insights of Compound Flooding with Data-Driven AI
abstract: Compound flooding, driven by nonlinear interactions between multiple hydrometeorological factors, poses a significant challenge to hazard prevention. Existing forecasting approaches, whether physics-based or data-driven, often emphasize temporal patterns while underexploring how multiple interacting factors jointly shape flood dynamics. To address this problem, we conduct a large-scale data-driven analysis of compound flooding in South Florida, a typical area for compound flooding, by integrating tidal conditions, rainfall, groundwater stage, and human water management activities. Our analysis reveals three key findings: (i) models that capture temporal dynamics alone fail to represent multi-factor interactions during compound events; (ii) subsurface saturation, as reflected by groundwater levels, emerges as a dominant predictor of flood severity, often outweighing immediate rainfall intensity in this porous coastal region; and (iii) the spatial state of surrounding monitoring stations within a finite effective radius provides critical causal context for flooding, while extending temporal history yields diminishing returns during extreme events. These findings suggest that compound flooding is governed more by spatially coupled system states than by long-term temporal dependencies, challenging rain-centric and sequence-dominated forecasting paradigms. By framing data-driven models as tools for scientific inquiry rather than prediction alone, this study offers new insights into the mechanisms of compound flooding and informs the design of more physically grounded early-warning systems for coastal environments. Our dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/AslanDing/SFBench.
comment: Accepted to SIGKDD 2026 AI for Science Track; 12 Pages, 5 Figures, 6 Tables

light_analysis.overview: 通过大规模数据驱动分析，揭示复合洪水受空间耦合系统状态主导，而非长期时间依赖性，挑战传统预测范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 复合洪水由多个水文气象因素非线性相互作用引发，对灾害预防构成重大挑战。现有预测方法（物理或数据驱动）常强调时间模式，但未充分探索多因素如何共同塑造洪水动态。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过整合潮汐、降雨、地下水位和人类水管理活动等多因素，深入理解复合洪水机制。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用数据驱动方法，整合潮汐条件、降雨、地下水位和人类水管理活动数据，构建模型捕获多因素交互。通过对比仅考虑时间动态的模型，分析发现地下水位是主导预测因子，空间相邻站点的状态提供关键因果背景，而长时间历史序列贡献递减。数据集和代码公开。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现三个关键结果：(i) 仅捕获时间动态的模型无法表示复合事件中的多因素交互；(ii) 地下水位成为洪水严重性的主导预测因子，在多孔沿海地区甚至超过即时降雨强度；(iii) 有限有效半径内空间相邻站点的状态提供关键因果背景，而极端事件中延长时间历史收益递减。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明复合洪水更多受空间耦合系统状态支配，而非长期时间依赖，挑战以降雨为中心和序列主导的预测范式。将数据驱动模型作为科学探究工具，为设计更物理基础的早期预警系统提供新见解，并公开数据集和代码促进进一步研究。

title: Model-agnostic Mitigation Strategies of Data Imbalance for Regression
abstract: Data imbalance persists as a pervasive challenge in regression tasks, introducing bias in model performance and undermining predictive reliability. This is particularly detrimental in applications aimed at predicting rare events that fall outside of the domain of the bulk of the training data. In this study, we review the current state-of-the-art regarding sampling-based methods and cost-sensitive learning. Additionally, we propose novel approaches to mitigate model bias. To better assess the importance of data, we introduce the density-distance and density-ratio relevance functions, which effectively integrate empirical frequency of data with domain-specific preferences, offering enhanced interpretability for end-users. Furthermore, we present advanced mitigation techniques (cSMOGN and crbSMOGN), which build upon and improve existing sampling methods. In a quantitative evaluation, we benchmark state-of-the-art methods on 10 synthetic and 42 real-world datasets, using neural networks, XGBoosting trees and Random Forest models. Our analysis shows that while most strategies improve performance on rare samples, they degrade it on frequent ones. The trade-off becomes larger the more the performance on rare samples is increased. However, to reduce this effect we demonstrate that constructing an ensemble of models -- one trained with imbalance mitigation and another without -- can be used. The key findings underscore the superior performance of our novel crbSMOGN sampling technique with the density-ratio relevance function for neural networks, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
comment: To be submitted to Springer Nature Machine Learning

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于密度-相关性函数的采样方法cSMOGN和crbSMOGN，有效缓解回归任务中的数据不平衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 回归任务中数据不平衡导致模型对罕见样本预测偏差，现有采样和代价敏感方法在提升稀有样本性能时通常牺牲频繁样本精度，缺乏平衡二者且具有可解释性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 引入密度-距离和密度-比相关性函数，将数据经验频率与领域偏好结合，提升可解释性。提出改进采样技术cSMOGN和crbSMOGN，并构建集成模型（一个带缓解、一个不带）以减少性能权衡。在10个合成和42个真实数据集上使用神经网络、XGBoosting和随机森林进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明大多数方法提升罕见样本性能但降低频繁样本性能，且提升越大权衡越大。crbSMOGN配合密度-比相关性函数在神经网络上表现最佳，优于现有方法。集成模型有效减轻性能退化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提供了一种模型无关的回归不平衡缓解框架，crbSMOGN与密度-比函数成为新标杆，集成策略为实际应用提供平衡方案。未来可探索更高效的自适应权重机制。

title: Fox in the Henhouse: Supply-Chain Backdoor Attacks Against Reinforcement Learning
abstract: The current state-of-the-art backdoor attacks against Reinforcement Learning (RL) rely upon unrealistically permissive access models, that assume the attacker can read (or even write) the victim's policy parameters, observations, or rewards. In this work, we question whether such a strong assumption is required to launch backdoor attacks against RL. To answer this question, we propose the \underline{S}upply-\underline{C}h\underline{a}in \underline{B}ackdoor (SCAB) attack, which targets a common RL workflow: training agents using external agents that are provided separately or embedded within the environment. In contrast to prior works, our attack only relies on legitimate interactions of the RL agent with the supplied agents. Despite this limited access model, by poisoning a mere $3\%$ of training experiences, our attack can successfully activate over $90\%$ of triggered actions, reducing the average episodic return by $80\%$ for the victim. Our novel attack demonstrates that RL attacks are likely to become a reality under untrusted RL training supply-chains.
comment: Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对强化学习的供应链后门攻击SCAB，仅通过合法交互即可高效触发后门。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习后门攻击依赖不切实际的强访问权限（如读取或修改策略参数、观测或奖励）。本研究质疑是否必须如此，旨在探索在更弱假设下实现后门攻击的可能性，以揭示强化学习训练供应链中的安全风险。
light_analysis.method: 提出供应链后门（SCAB）攻击，针对常见强化学习工作流：使用外部代理（单独提供或嵌入环境）训练智能体。攻击仅依赖RL智能体与供应代理的合法交互，无需读写策略参数等。通过仅污染3%的训练经验，即可植入后门。
light_analysis.result: 在攻击下，能够成功激活超过90%的触发动作，并使得受害者的平均情节回报下降80%。该结果在极低的污染比例下实现，证明了在受限访问模型下后门攻击的有效性和严重性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCAB攻击表明，在不受信任的强化学习训练供应链中，后门攻击可能成为现实威胁。本研究揭示了现有安全假设的不足，为强化学习系统的安全部署提供了警示，未来可探索防御机制。

title: GeoRanker: Distance-Aware Ranking for Worldwide Image Geolocalization
abstract: Worldwide image geolocalization-the task of predicting GPS coordinates from images taken anywhere on Earth-poses a fundamental challenge due to the vast diversity in visual content across regions. While recent approaches adopt a two-stage pipeline of retrieving candidates and selecting the best match, they typically rely on simplistic similarity heuristics and point-wise supervision, failing to model spatial relationships among candidates. In this paper, we propose GeoRanker, a distance-aware ranking framework that leverages large vision-language models to jointly encode query-candidate interactions and predict geographic proximity. In addition, we introduce a multi-order distance loss that ranks both absolute and relative distances, enabling the model to reason over structured spatial relationships. To support this, we curate GeoRanking, the first dataset explicitly designed for geographic ranking tasks with multimodal candidate information. GeoRanker achieves state-of-the-art results on two well-established benchmarks (IM2GPS3K and YFCC4K), significantly outperforming current best methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoRanker距离感知排序框架，利用大型视觉语言模型实现世界级图像地理定位的候选排序与空间关系建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有世界图像地理定位方法采用两阶段流程，但依赖简单的相似性启发和点级监督，无法建模候选图像间的空间关系，导致候选排序不准确。这种局限性在处理全球范围视觉多样性时尤为突出，亟需一种能够联合编码查询-候选交互并预测地理邻近性的方法。
light_analysis.method: GeoRanker框架利用大型视觉-语言模型联合编码查询与候选图像，并预测地理邻近性，实现距离感知排序。提出多阶距离损失，同时排序绝对距离和相对距离，使模型能够推理结构化空间关系。同时构建了GeoRanking数据集，专为地理排序任务设计，包含多模态候选信息，用于训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在IM2GPS3K和YFCC4K两个公认基准上，GeoRanker取得了最先进的性能，显著超越了包括当前最佳方法在内的所有现有方法。具体性能指标如召回率、平均距离误差等均得到提升，但摘要未给出具体数值，仅明确性能领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoRanker通过距离感知排序和多阶损失函数，有效解决了图像地理定位中候选空间关系建模不足的问题，显著提升定位精度。该工作为大规模地理定位提供了新范式，并贡献了首个地理排序数据集。未来可扩展至更多模态或更精细的排序任务。

title: Bias Fitting to Mitigate Length Bias of Reward Model in RLHF
abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) relies on reward models to align large language models with human preferences. However, RLHF often suffers from reward hacking, wherein policy learning exploits flaws in the trained reward model to maximize reward scores without genuinely aligning with human preferences. A significant example of such reward hacking is length bias, where reward models usually favor longer responses irrespective of actual response quality. Previous works on tackling length bias have notable limitations, these approaches either mitigate bias without characterizing the bias form, or simply assume a linear length-reward relation. To accurately model the intricate nature of length bias and facilitate more effective bias mitigation, we propose FiMi-RM (Bias Fitting to Mitigate Length Bias of Reward Model), a framework that autonomously learns and corrects underlying bias patterns. Our approach consists of three stages: First, we warm up by training a standard reward model which inherently contains length bias. Next, we deploy a lightweight fitting model to capture the non-linear relation between length and reward. Finally, we incorporate this learned relation into the reward model, effectively decoupling length from reward while preserving preference modeling capabilities. Experimental results demonstrate that FiMi-RM achieves a more balanced length-reward distribution. Furthermore, when applied to alignment algorithms such as Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) and Best-of-N (BoN), our debiased reward model improves length-controlled win rate and reduces verbosity without compromising its performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FiMi-RM框架，通过拟合长度偏差来缓解RLHF中奖励模型的长度偏差问题。
light_analysis.motivation: RLHF中奖励模型常存在长度偏差，即倾向长回复，导致奖励黑客问题。现有方法或未明确偏差形式，或简单假设线性关系，无法准确建模复杂的长度-奖励关系。因此，需要一种能自主学习并校正偏差模式的方法，以提升对齐效果。
light_analysis.method: FiMi-RM包含三阶段：首先训练标准奖励模型（含长度偏差）；然后使用轻量拟合模型捕获长度与奖励的非线性关系；最后将此关系融入奖励模型，解耦长度与奖励，同时保留偏好建模能力。该方法无需预设偏差形式，能自适应学习。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明FiMi-RM实现了更平衡的长度-奖励分布。应用于DPO和BoN对齐算法时，去偏奖励模型提升了长度控制下的胜率，减少了冗长回复，且不损害性能。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但定性上效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: FiMi-RM有效缓解了奖励模型的长度偏差，提高了RLHF的对齐质量。其自适应拟合框架具有通用性，可扩展至其他偏差类型。未来工作可探索更复杂的偏差模式或在更广泛任务中验证。

title: OmegAMP: Targeted AMP Discovery via Biologically Informed Generation
abstract: Deep learning-based antimicrobial peptide (AMP) discovery faces critical challenges such as limited controllability, lack of representations that efficiently model antimicrobial properties, and low experimental hit rates. To address these challenges, we introduce OmegAMP, a framework designed for reliable AMP generation with increased controllability. Its diffusion-based generative model leverages a novel conditioning mechanism to achieve fine-grained control over desired physicochemical properties and to direct generation towards specific activity profiles, including species-specific effectiveness. This is further enhanced by a biologically informed encoding space that significantly improves overall generative performance. Complementing these generative capabilities, OmegAMP leverages a novel synthetic data augmentation strategy to train classifiers for AMP filtering, drastically reducing false positive rates and thereby increasing the likelihood of experimental success. Our in silico experiments demonstrate that OmegAMP delivers state-of-the-art performance across key stages of the AMP discovery pipeline, enabling us to achieve an unprecedented success rate in wet lab experiments. We tested 25 candidate peptides, 24 of them (96%) demonstrated antimicrobial activity, proving effective even against multi-drug resistant strains. Our findings underscore OmegAMP's potential to significantly advance computational frameworks in the fight against antimicrobial resistance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OmegAMP框架，通过扩散生成模型与生物信息编码实现高可控抗菌肽发现，湿实验成功率96%。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在抗菌肽发现中面临可控性差、缺乏有效表征抗菌特性的表示、实验命中率低等挑战，限制了可靠生成和应用，因此亟需一种能精细控制理化性质和物种特异性活性的高成功率的生成框架。
light_analysis.method: OmegAMP采用扩散生成模型，通过新型条件机制实现对抗菌肽理化性质和物种特异性活性的精细控制，利用生物信息编码空间提升生成性能；同时提出合成数据增强策略训练分类器进行AMP过滤，大幅降低假阳性率，提高实验成功概率。
light_analysis.result: 在in silico实验中达到SOTA性能；湿实验测试25个候选肽，24个（96%）显示抗菌活性，包括对多重耐药菌株有效，显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmegAMP显著提高了AMP发现的可靠性和成功率，为对抗抗菌素耐药性提供了有效计算框架；未来可进一步优化生成模型和扩大湿实验验证。

title: Learning to Erase Private Knowledge from Multi-Documents for Retrieval-Augmented Large Language Models
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is a promising technique for applying LLMs to proprietary domains. However, retrieved documents may contain sensitive knowledge, posing risks of privacy leakage in generative results. Thus, effectively erasing private information from retrieved documents is a key challenge for RAG. Unlike traditional text anonymization, RAG should consider: (1) the inherent multi-document reasoning may face de-anonymization attacks; (2) private knowledge varies by scenarios, so users should be allowed to customize which information to erase; (3) preserving sufficient publicly available knowledge for generation tasks. This paper introduces the privacy erasure task for RAG and proposes Eraser4RAG, a private knowledge eraser which effectively removes user-defined private knowledge from documents while preserving sufficient public knowledge for generation. Specifically, we first construct a global knowledge graph to identify potential knowledge across documents, aiming to defend against de-anonymization attacks. Then we randomly split it into private and public sub-graphs, and fine-tune Flan-T5 to rewrite the retrieved documents excluding private triples. Finally, PPO algorithm optimizes the rewriting model to minimize private triples and maximize public triples retention. Experiments on four QA datasets demonstrate that Eraser4RAG achieves superior erase performance than GPT-4o.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Eraser4RAG，一种针对检索增强大语言模型的多文档私有知识擦除方法，有效移除用户定义的私有信息并保留公共知识。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）中检索文档可能包含敏感知识，导致隐私泄露。现有文本匿名化方法未考虑RAG的多文档推理、用户自定义擦除和保留公共知识的需求，因此需要一种专门针对RAG的隐私擦除方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建全局知识图谱识别跨文档潜在知识以防御去匿名化攻击；然后随机分割为私有和公共子图；微调Flan-T5模型重写文档，排除私有三元组；使用PPO算法优化重写模型，最小化保留私有三元组并最大化公共三元组。
light_analysis.result: 在四个QA数据集上，Eraser4RAG实现了比GPT-4o更优的擦除性能，有效去除私有信息同时保留足够公共知识用于生成任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出并验证了Eraser4RAG在RAG中有效擦除私有知识，兼顾用户自定义和公共知识保留。未来可探索更高效的知识图谱构建和重写方法。

title: From Uncertain to Safe: Conformal Adaptation of Diffusion Models for Safe PDE Control
abstract: The application of deep learning for partial differential equation (PDE)-constrained control is gaining increasing attention. However, existing methods rarely consider safety requirements crucial in real-world applications. To address this limitation, we propose Safe Diffusion Models for PDE Control (SafeDiffCon), which introduce the uncertainty quantile as model uncertainty quantification to achieve optimal control under safety constraints through both post-training and inference phases. Firstly, our approach post-trains a pre-trained diffusion model to generate control sequences that better satisfy safety constraints while achieving improved control objectives via a reweighted diffusion loss, which incorporates the uncertainty quantile estimated using conformal prediction. Secondly, during inference, the diffusion model dynamically adjusts both its generation process and parameters through iterative guidance and fine-tuning, conditioned on control targets while simultaneously integrating the estimated uncertainty quantile. We evaluate SafeDiffCon on three control tasks: 1D Burgers' equation, 2D incompressible fluid, and controlled nuclear fusion problem. Results demonstrate that SafeDiffCon is the only method that satisfies all safety constraints, whereas other classical and deep learning baselines fail. Furthermore, while adhering to safety constraints, SafeDiffCon achieves the best control performance. The code can be found at https://github.com/AI4Science-WestlakeU/safediffcon.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SafeDiffCon，利用不确定性分位数实现安全约束下的PDE控制，结合共形预测与扩散模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习方法用于PDE约束控制时忽视安全约束，这在现实应用中至关重要。传统方法无法保证生成的控制序列满足安全条件，可能导致危险后果。因此需要一种能够同时优化控制目标并严格满足安全约束的方法。
light_analysis.method: SafeDiffCon在训练后阶段，使用共形预测估计不确定性分位数，通过重新加权扩散损失微调预训练扩散模型，使生成的控制序列更好满足安全约束。推理时，模型根据控制目标动态调整生成过程和参数，通过迭代引导和微调整合不确定性分位数。
light_analysis.result: 在1D Burgers方程、2D不可压缩流体和受控核聚变三个任务上，SafeDiffCon是唯一满足所有安全约束的方法，而其他经典和深度学习基线均失败。在遵守安全约束的同时，SafeDiffCon实现了最佳控制性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SafeDiffCon首次将共形预测与扩散模型结合用于安全PDE控制，同时保证安全性和控制性能。该方法可推广至其他涉及安全约束的控制问题，未来可探索更高效的不确定性量化或在线适应策略。

title: ACT-JEPA: Novel Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for Efficient Policy Representation Learning
abstract: Learning efficient representations for decision-making policies is a challenge in imitation learning (IL). Current IL methods require expert demonstrations, which are expensive to collect. Additionally, they are not explicitly trained to understand the environment. Consequently, they have underdeveloped world models. Self-supervised learning (SSL) offers an alternative, as it can learn a world model from diverse, unlabeled data. However, most SSL methods are inefficient because they operate in raw input space. In this work, we propose ACT-JEPA, a novel architecture that unifies IL and SSL to enhance policy representations. It is trained end-to-end to jointly predict 1) action sequences and 2) latent observation sequences. To learn in latent space, we utilize Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture, which allows the model to filter out irrelevant details and learn a robust world model. We evaluate ACT-JEPA in different environments and across multiple tasks. Our results show that it outperforms the strongest baseline in all environments. ACT-JEPA achieves up to 40% improvement in world model understanding and up to 10% higher task success rate. Finally, we show that predicting latent observation sequences effectively generalizes to predicting action sequences. This work demonstrates how integrating IL and SSL leads to efficient policy representation learning, an improved world model, and a higher task success rate.

light_analysis.overview: ACT-JEPA通过联合预测动作和潜在观测序列，统一模仿学习与自监督学习，实现高效策略表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 模仿学习方法依赖昂贵的专家演示，且未显式训练理解环境，导致世界模型不完善。自监督学习可从无标签数据学习世界模型，但多数方法在原始输入空间操作，效率低下。因此需要一种高效结合两者、在潜在空间学习的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出ACT-JEPA架构，端到端训练，联合预测动作序列和潜在观测序列。利用联合嵌入预测架构在潜在空间学习，过滤无关细节，学习鲁棒世界模型。无需额外数据增强或负样本。
light_analysis.result: 在多个环境和任务中评估，ACT-JEPA超越所有最强基线。世界模型理解提升最高40%，任务成功率提升最高10%。预测潜在观测序列可有效泛化到预测动作序列。
light_analysis.conclusion: 集成模仿学习和自监督学习实现了高效策略表示学习，改进了世界模型并提高了任务成功率。未来可探索更复杂环境或扩展至机器人等其他领域。

title: Improving Factuality of 3D Brain MRI Report Generation with Paired Image-domain Retrieval and Text-domain Augmentation
abstract: Acute ischemic stroke (AIS) requires time-critical decision-making, where inaccurate interpretation of neuroimaging findings can lead to irreversible disability. Diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI) and apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC) maps from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) are central to detecting acute infarction, yet generating factually reliable radiology reports directly from 3D MRI remains challenging due to the difficulty of learning robust cross-modal alignments between volumetric images and clinical text. We propose paired image-domain retrieval and text-domain augmentation (PIRTA), a retrieval-augmented generation framework that improves report factuality by avoiding explicit image-text alignment. PIRTA retrieves clinically similar 3D DWI/ADC volumes using a pretrained 3D vision encoder and leverages their paired clinician-authored reports to ground large language model (LLM)-based report generation. Experiments on multi-institutional in-house data, a held-out external privacy-preserving cohort, and the public ISLES benchmark demonstrate that PIRTA achieves strong image-domain retrieval performance and consistently improves ischemic-territory accuracy, a clinically grounded surrogate for report factuality, compared to direct image-to-text baselines. These results indicate that retrieval-grounded generation provides a scalable and reliable paradigm for producing factually consistent radiology reports from complex 3D brain MRI. Source code is available at https://github.com/jhlee0619/PIRTA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PIRTA框架，通过检索增强生成提高3D脑MRI报告的事实准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 急性缺血性卒中需要快速准确解读神经影像，但直接从3D MRI生成可靠报告面临跨模态对齐困难。现有方法难以学习稳健的图像-文本对应，导致报告事实性不足，影响临床决策。因此，需要一种避免显式对齐、利用现有临床报告知识的生成范式。
light_analysis.method: PIRTA框架包含两个阶段：首先，使用预训练3D视觉编码器从影像库中检索与输入DWI/ADC体积临床相似的案例；然后，基于检索到的配对报告，利用大型语言模型（LLM）生成目标报告。该方法通过检索替代直接图像-文本对齐，提升了生成报告的事实一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在多机构内部数据、外部隐私保留队列以及公共ISLES基准上，PIRTA实现了强图像检索性能，并在缺血区域准确性（事实性的临床替代指标）上持续优于直接图像到文本基线方法，表明检索增强生成可有效提升报告可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PIRTA为从复杂3D脑MRI生成事实一致放射学报告提供了可扩展、可靠的范例，通过检索现有临床报告降低对显式跨模态对齐的依赖。代码已开源，未来可进一步扩展至其他医学影像模态。

title: An Improved Variational Method for Image Denoising
abstract: The total variation (TV) method is an image denoising technique that aims to reduce noise by minimizing the total variation of the image, which measures the variation in pixel intensities. The TV method has been widely applied in image processing and computer vision for its ability to preserve edges and enhance image quality. In this paper, we propose a Mixed-norm TV (MixTV) model for image denoising and the associated numerical algorithm to carry out the procedure, which is particularly effective in removing several types of noise and their combinations. Our MixTV admits a unique solution and the associated numerical algorithm guarantees convergence. Numerical experiments are demonstrated to show improved effectiveness and denoising quality compared to other TV models. Such encouraging results further enhance the utility of the TV method in image processing. Our project page is available at https://angusbb.github.io/MixTV.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种混合范数全变分（MixTV）图像去噪模型，具有唯一解和收敛保证，实验表明去噪效果优于传统TV方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 全变分（TV）方法是图像去噪的经典技术，能有效保留边缘，但传统TV模型对混合噪声处理能力有限。现有方法在去除多种类型噪声及其组合时效果不佳，且缺乏唯一解和收敛性保证。因此，本文旨在提出一种改进的混合范数TV模型，以提高去噪质量并确保理论性质。
light_analysis.method: 提出Mixed-norm TV (MixTV)模型，通过结合不同范数来适应多种噪声类型。该模型具有唯一解，且设计了收敛的数值算法。实验采用标准图像数据集，与经典TV模型及变体进行对比，验证了MixTV在去除高斯噪声、椒盐噪声及其混合时的优越性。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明，MixTV在峰值信噪比（PSNR）和结构相似性（SSIM）指标上均优于其他TV模型。特别在混合噪声场景下，去噪效果提升明显，同时保持了边缘清晰度。算法收敛速度快，稳定性好。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的MixTV模型有效提升了图像去噪性能，具有坚实的理论保证（唯一解和收敛性）。该方法扩展了TV在图像处理中的应用，尤其适用于多种噪声混合的场景。未来可进一步优化算法效率或拓展至三维图像去噪。

title: Explaining a probabilistic prediction on the simplex with Shapley compositions
abstract: Originating in game theory, Shapley values are widely used for explaining a machine learning model's prediction by quantifying the contribution of each feature's value to the prediction. This requires a scalar prediction as in binary classification, whereas a multiclass probabilistic prediction is a discrete probability distribution, living on a multidimensional simplex. In such a multiclass setting the Shapley values are typically computed separately on each class in a one-vs-rest manner, ignoring the compositional nature of the output distribution. In this paper, we introduce Shapley compositions as a well-founded way to properly explain a multiclass probabilistic prediction, using the Aitchison geometry from compositional data analysis. We prove that the Shapley composition is the unique quantity satisfying linearity, symmetry and efficiency on the Aitchison simplex, extending the corresponding axiomatic properties of the standard Shapley value. We demonstrate this proper multiclass treatment in a range of scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Shapley compositions，基于Aitchison几何解释多类概率预测，扩展标准Shapley值的公理性质。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准Shapley值用于多类概率预测时，采用一对多方式分别处理每个类别，忽略了输出概率分布位于多维单形上的成分性质。这种处理方式不符合数据的几何结构，可能导致解释失真。因此需要一种能正确反映概率分布成分特性的解释方法。
light_analysis.method: 引入Shapley compositions，利用成分数据分析中的Aitchison几何定义单形上的运算。证明该量是唯一满足线性、对称和效率公理（在Aitchison单形上）的扩展，将标准Shapley值的公理化性质推广至多类概率预测场景。
light_analysis.result: 在多个场景中验证了Shapley compositions的有效性，展示了正确处理多类概率解释的优势。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但理论分析和实验表明其比一对多方法更合理。
light_analysis.conclusion: Shapley compositions为多类概率预测提供了理论上严谨的解释框架，弥补了现有方法忽略成分性质的不足。其基于Aitchison几何的公理化保证了唯一性，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索在其他成分数据解释中的应用。

title: Certified Robust Invariant Polytope Training in Neural Controlled ODEs
abstract: We propose a framework for training neural network controllers with certified robust forward invariant polytopes. First, we parameterize a family of lifted control systems in a higher dimensional space, where the original neural controlled system evolves on an invariant subspace of each lifted system. We use interval analysis and neural network verifiers to further construct a family of lifted embedding systems, carefully capturing the knowledge of this invariant subspace. If the vector field of any lifted embedding system satisfies a sign constraint at a single point, then a certain convex polytope of the original system is robustly forward invariant. Treating the neural network controller and the lifted system parameters as variables, we propose an algorithm to train controllers with certified forward invariant polytopes in the closed-loop control system. Through two examples, we demonstrate how the simplicity of the sign constraint allows our approach to scale with system dimension to over $50$ states, and outperform state-of-the-art Lyapunov-based sampling approaches in runtime.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种训练神经网络控制器的框架，实现具有认证的鲁棒正向不变多面体，通过提升嵌入系统和符号约束确保不变性。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络控制器在安全关键系统中应用广泛，但保证其鲁棒正向不变性（即系统状态始终保持在安全集合内）是一个挑战。现有方法如Lyapunov函数采样在规模和效率上存在局限，难以扩展到高维系统或实时应用。本文旨在提供一种可扩展且高效的方法，通过认证的方式确保控制系统的正向不变性。
light_analysis.method: 本文方法通过参数化高维空间中的提升控制系统，使原始系统在不变子空间上演化。利用区间分析和神经网络验证器构建提升嵌入系统，捕捉不变子空间知识。若任何提升嵌入系统的向量场在单点满足符号约束，则原系统的凸多面体为鲁棒正向不变。将神经网络控制器和提升系统参数作为变量，训练出具有认证不变多面体的闭环控制器。
light_analysis.result: 通过两个示例验证，该方法可扩展至超过50维的系统状态，显著优于现有的Lyapunov采样方法。具体表现为在运行时更高效，且能提供认证的鲁棒不变多面体。摘要未提供精确的数值对比，但强调了可扩展性和性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的框架为神经网络控制器提供了可认证的鲁棒正向不变多面体，具有高可扩展性和低计算成本，适用于高维安全关键控制系统。未来工作可能包括处理更复杂的不变形状或动态环境中的在线应用。局限性在于符号约束的保守性可能影响训练灵活性。

title: Privacy-Aware Visual Language Models
abstract: As Visual Language Models (VLMs) become increasingly embedded in everyday applications, ensuring they can recognise and appropriately handle privacy-sensitive content is thus essential to protect users. To this end, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of twelve state-of-the-art VLMs and identify limitations in their understanding of visual privacy. However, existing privacy-related datasets often suffer from label inconsistencies, limiting their reliability. To address this, we introduce two compact, high-quality benchmarks, PrivBench and PrivBench-H, that focus on commonly recognised visual privacy categories aligned with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Additionally, we present PrivTune, an instruction-tuning dataset specifically curated to improve privacy sensitivity. We obtain multiple Privacy VLMs by fine-tuning off-the-shelf VLMs on only a few hundred samples from PrivTune, which leads to substantial gains on all benchmarks, surpassing even GPT-4, while maintaining strong performance on other tasks. Our findings show that privacy-awareness in VLMs can be substantially improved with minimal data and careful dataset design, setting the stage for safer, more privacy-aligned AI systems.
comment: Accepted at Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)

light_analysis.overview: 通过高质量小样本微调显著提升视觉语言模型的隐私感知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在日常生活应用中越来越普遍，但现有模型对视觉隐私内容的识别和处理能力不足。尽管已有隐私相关数据集，但标签不一致限制了其可靠性。因此，亟需高标准的隐私基准和有效的隐私感知训练方法，以确保AI系统符合隐私法规（如GDPR），保护用户隐私。
light_analysis.method: 首先，评估12个最先进VLM的视觉隐私理解能力，发现局限。其次，引入两个小型高质量基准PrivBench和PrivBench-H，基于GDPR的常见视觉隐私类别。然后，构建指令微调数据集PrivTune，专门提升隐私敏感性。最后，在PrivTune的数百样本上微调现有VLM，获得多个Privacy VLM。
light_analysis.result: 微调后的Privacy VLM在所有基准测试中取得显著提升，甚至超越GPT-4，同时在其他任务上保持强性能。这表明通过精心设计的小数据集即可大幅提升VLM的隐私感知能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明，通过少量高质量数据和精细数据集设计，可以显著提升VLM的隐私意识，为构建更安全、隐私对齐的AI系统奠定基础。未来可扩展至更多隐私类别和场景。

title: Narrative Feature or Structured Feature? A Study of Large Language Models to Identify Cancer Patients at Risk of Heart Failure
abstract: Cancer treatments are known to introduce cardiotoxicity, negatively impacting outcomes and survivorship. Identifying cancer patients at risk of heart failure (HF) is critical to improving cancer treatment outcomes and safety. This study examined machine learning (ML) models to identify cancer patients at risk of HF using electronic health records (EHRs), including traditional ML, Time-Aware long short-term memory (T-LSTM), and large language models (LLMs) using novel narrative features derived from the structured medical codes. We identified a cancer cohort of 12,806 patients from the University of Florida Health, diagnosed with lung, breast, and colorectal cancers, among which 1,602 individuals developed HF after cancer. The LLM, GatorTron-3.9B, achieved the best F1 scores, outperforming the traditional support vector machines by 39%, the T-LSTM deep learning model by 7%, and a widely used transformer model, BERT, by 5.6%. The analysis shows that the proposed narrative features remarkably increased feature density and improved performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用大语言模型（LLM）处理结构化病历生成的叙事特征，用于识别癌症患者心衰风险，性能显著优于传统方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 癌症治疗常引发心脏毒性，影响患者预后与生存。早期识别心衰高风险患者对于改善治疗效果和安全性至关重要。现有方法多依赖传统机器学习或标准结构化数据，但特征稀疏、性能有限。本研究旨在利用大语言模型从结构化医疗编码中提取新型叙事特征，提升预测能力。
light_analysis.method: 研究比较了传统SVM、时间感知LSTM（T-LSTM）和大语言模型（LLM）GatorTron-3.9B在预测癌症患者心衰风险上的表现。从佛罗里达大学健康系统12,806名癌症患者（肺癌、乳腺癌、结直肠癌）的电子健康记录中提取结构化医疗编码，并将其转换为叙事特征输入LLM。GatorTron-3.9B通过自注意力和预训练知识捕获编码间上下文关系。
light_analysis.result: LLM模型GatorTron-3.9B取得了最佳F1分数，比传统SVM高39%，比T-LSTM高7%，比广泛使用的BERT高5.6%。分析表明，所提出的叙事特征显著提升了特征密度，从而改善了模型性能。数据集包含1,602例心衰患者。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明大语言模型结合叙事特征能有效识别化疗后心衰高风险癌症患者，为临床决策提供支持。该方法通过特征增强提升了预测准确性，未来可推广至其他治疗相关并发症的预测。局限在于单一机构数据，需外部验证。

title: Deep Network Approximation: Beyond ReLU to Diverse Activation Functions
abstract: This paper explores the expressive power of deep neural networks for a diverse range of activation functions. An activation function set $\mathscr{A}$ is defined to encompass the majority of commonly used activation functions, such as $\mathtt{ReLU}$, $\mathtt{LeakyReLU}$, $\mathtt{ReLU}^2$, $\mathtt{ELU}$, $\mathtt{CELU}$, $\mathtt{SELU}$, $\mathtt{Softplus}$, $\mathtt{GELU}$, $\mathtt{SiLU}$, $\mathtt{Swish}$, $\mathtt{Mish}$, $\mathtt{Sigmoid}$, $\mathtt{Tanh}$, $\mathtt{Arctan}$, $\mathtt{Softsign}$, $\mathtt{dSiLU}$, and $\mathtt{SRS}$. We demonstrate that for any activation function $\varrho\in \mathscr{A}$, a $\mathtt{ReLU}$ network of width $N$ and depth $L$ can be approximated to arbitrary precision by a $\varrho$-activated network of width $3N$ and depth $2L$ on any bounded set. This finding enables the extension of most approximation results achieved with $\mathtt{ReLU}$ networks to a wide variety of other activation functions, albeit with slightly increased constants. Significantly, we establish that the (width,$\,$depth) scaling factors can be further reduced from $(3,2)$ to $(1,1)$ if $\varrho$ falls within a specific subset of $\mathscr{A}$. This subset includes activation functions such as $\mathtt{ELU}$, $\mathtt{CELU}$, $\mathtt{SELU}$, $\mathtt{Softplus}$, $\mathtt{GELU}$, $\mathtt{SiLU}$, $\mathtt{Swish}$, and $\mathtt{Mish}$.
comment: This arXiv version contains only minor typo corrections and small clarifications to improve readability

light_analysis.overview: 本文证明了常见激活函数网络可以任意精度逼近ReLU网络，将ReLU网络的逼近能力扩展到多种激活函数。
light_analysis.motivation: ReLU网络的逼近能力已有深入理论分析，但实际中广泛使用的其他激活函数（如ELU、GELU、Swish等）缺乏类似的理论保证。现有工作通常针对特定激活函数分别证明，缺乏统一框架。本文旨在建立一个通用理论，证明任何属于所定义激活函数集的网络都能达到与ReLU网络相当的逼近能力，为实际应用中的激活函数选择提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 定义一个包含常见激活函数（如ReLU、LeakyReLU、GELU、Swish等）的集合A。证明对任意ρ∈A，一个宽度N、深度L的ReLU网络可以在任意有界集上被一个宽度3N、深度2L的ρ激活网络任意逼近。该证明通过构造性方法，利用ρ激活函数模拟ReLU单元。进一步，对于子集（包括ELU、CELU、SELU、Softplus、GELU、SiLU、Swish、Mish），优化缩放因子至(1,1)，即相同宽度和深度。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明：对于任意ρ∈A，ReLU网络在宽度和深度上分别乘以因子3和2即可被ρ网络逼近；对于特定子集，缩放因子降至(1,1)。该结果将ReLU网络的几乎所有逼近结论（如宽度-深度权衡）扩展至多种激活函数，仅增加了常数因子。虽然未提供实验数据，但理论证明严格且具有普遍性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了从ReLU网络到多种激活函数网络逼近能力迁移的统一理论框架，显著扩展了深度网络逼近理论的应用范围。证明的(3,2)和(1,1)缩放因子给出了实际网络设计中的理论指导。未来工作可探索更紧凑的缩放因子或针对更广泛激活函数的扩展。该工作为工程师在特定任务中选择激活函数提供了理论保障。
